Name: Sun Gro Horticulture
Description:
About Us
Sun Gro Horticulture is one of the most prominent North American horticultural companies, employing over 800 staff and serving customers worldwide. Since its humble beginnings in 1929, it has become the leading supplier of soilless growing mixes to North America’s top 100 greenhouse and nursery growers, shipping over 70,000 truckloads of product annually. Sun Gro products are made to exacting standards and conform to high product quality and performance criteria.

Who We Are
Sun Gro Horticulture’s mission is to be an industry leading Growing Media Company in soilless growing mixes, serving horticultural professionals, retailers, and gardeners with superior quality, branded growing mixes that yield exceptional results.

Services
Industry leading technical and sales support sets Sun Gro Horticulture apart. Our dedicated sales team serves national and international customers and a dedicated Customer Care Center that operates in every major North American time zone. As an added benefit, Sun Gro’s exemplary Research & Development and Technical Support teams are on call to help professional growers troubleshoot and make the most of Sun Gro products.

Employees & Jobs
Over 300 employees serve Sun Gro Horticulture industries and communities across North America. Our many scientists, technicians, managers, facilities workers, and sales professionals are the heart of our company. We operate a network of 20 production/distribution facilities across Canada and the United States and take pride in the high-quality jobs that we offer everyday people in small towns and rural areas. In turn, we are exceedingly proud of our team of employees who make it a priority every day to carry out Sun Gro’s stewardship of peatlands, ensuring that this abundant resource will be available for future generations. We are the industry leader in bog restoration/reclamation.

Name: Grodan
Description:
Grodan is part of the ROCKWOOL Group, the world’s leading supplier of innovative products and systems based on stone wool, improving the environment and the quality of life for millions of people.

Grodan supplies innovative and sustainable stone wool substrate solutions for the professional horticultural sector, based on Precision Growing principles. These solutions are, among others, applied for the cultivation of vegetables and flowers, such as tomatoes, cucumbers, sweet peppers, eggplants, roses and gerberas. Stone wool substrates are offered together with tailor-made advice and tools to support Precision Growing and therefore facilitate the sustainable production of healthy, safe and tasty fresh produce for consumers. Sustainability plays a prominent role within the Group, from the manufacture of stone wool substrates to end-of-life solutions. 

Grodan is founded in 1969 and is active in more than sixty countries worldwide. The head office is located in Roermond, the Netherlands.

Name: Beekenkamp Plants B.V.
Description: Beekenkamp Plants BV is part of the Beekenkamp Group and has 2 divisions. Vegetables; producing quality vegetable youngplants for professional in- and outdoor growers throughout Europe. Ornamentals is worldwide known as breeder and propagator of bedding, pot and house annual plants.  Supplying the commercial growers with the starting material.

Name: Fluence
Description:
Fluence creates powerful and energy-efficient LED lighting solutions for commercial cannabis production and research applications. Fluence is the lead LED lighting supplier in the global cannabis market and is committed to enabling more efficient production with the world’s top vertical farms and greenhouse produce growers. Fluence global headquarters are in Austin, Texas, with its EMEA headquarters located in Eindhoven.

For more information about Fluence, visit www.fluence-led.com

Fluence operates as a business unit within Signify’s Digital Solutions division.

Name: Ball Seed Company
Description:
The dedicated team behind Ball Seed combines our extensive experience and innovative thinking to make sure greenhouse growers always have the best products, the most efficient tools, and the dynamic solutions to build winning businesses. We source world-class breeding and product development that drive new sales, delight the consumer, and generate demand.

The Ball Seed Sales Team, Ball ColorLink, field experts, and customer service teams are the best in the business. From helping you choose the right varieties and cultural expertise, to trouble-shooting complex situations and managing your business through WebTrack, Ball Seed strives to be the easiest company to do business with. Visit us online and log into WebTrack at www.ballseed.com.

Name: Royal Brinkman
Description:
Royal Brinkman is a supplier, consultant and installer for the professional horticulture. Our webshop royalbrinkman.com offers more than 30,000 products, but also the advice of our specialists. 

From our head office in's-Gravenzande, we supply products, systems and services in the fields of crop rotation, crop care, crop protection & disinfection, packaging & design, mechanization, technical projects and other service products. We supply these products all over the world, as Royal Brinkman is located in the most important horticultural areas of the world. 

Royal Brinkman has a team of experienced and enthusiastic employees with specialized knowledge. Within Royal Brinkman, this knowledge is subdivided into 7 themes with corresponding product specialists, who can answer your specific questions in the field of cultivation, packaging and technical issues. By combining the knowledge from our different themes, we can always give a complete advice. In this way, we are happy to help you to carry out your day-to-day business as well as possible! 

Follow us also through our other social media channels:
- Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/user/RoyalBrinkman
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/royalbrinkmanglobal/

Name: Ridder
Description:
Ridder has been a pioneer of innovation in greenhouse and farming technologies since 1953. Today, we offer a wide range of essential systems and solutions.

From climate control to robotics, our innovative products are designed to optimize every aspect of greenhouse and farming operations. Explore our complete lineup of advanced technologies and find the perfect solutions to grow your business.

Name: Proven Winners
Description: Proven Winners is the leading plant brand in North America and a leading supplier of plants and gardening products to garden centers across the U.S. and Canada.

Name: Koppert Cress
Description:
Koppert Cress is located in the Westland in the Netherlands and is always on the lookout for natural, innovative ingredients which chefs can use to intensify the flavour, aroma, or presentation of their dishes; products that meet the increasingly stringent requirements of restaurants worldwide. The assortment consist of freshly-sprouted seedlings (cresses) and other edible leaves and flowers (specialties) from 100% natural aromatic plants. 

The success of Koppert Cress is completely dependent on the recognition and acceptance by the professional user. Taste is a precondition for this. But there is more than taste. Rob Baan realized early on that healthy food will play an increasingly important role and that we will be increasingly involved. The company has chosen as its mission "Let's change the way we look at food".

The Koppert Cress Group is an overall organization in which three different companies are represented: Koppert Cress, Sango Seeds and Division Q.

What is Sango Seeds?
Sango Seeds produces seeds and sells them to growers around the world. The market for Cress is still expanding and it is beneficial for the entire chain to have high-quality, food-safe seeds. It is always a challenge to have year-round access to the right quantity and best quality seeds. To secure this supply, seed company Sango Seeds was established. 

What is Division Q?
Sustainability has always been a high priority at Koppert Cress. This is why the company has also set a number of ambitious sustainability goals. For example, it wants to be climate positive by 2026, no longer use fossil fuels and only discharge clean water. Completely emission-free cultivation, in other words. So Division Q was set up to carry out all the sustainability projects at Koppert Cress. Only it doesn't stop there. We will be actively involved in sharing techniques and experiences with the rest of the sector.

Name: Expo2023Doha
Description: The International Horticultural Expo 2023 will be hosted by the State of Qatar. Located on the west of Doha city, 2,5km from West Bay, 3,5km from Doha Port and about 12km away from Hamad International Airport. The EXPO site will blossom into an experience of innovation, sustainability, sharing, culture and entertainment, welcoming the world to an event ready to make history.

Name: Altman Plants
Description: Nestled in the hills of north San Diego County, Altman Plants is home to over 1,025 unique varieties of cacti and succulents. In 1975, Altman Plants was simply a backyard hobby for Ken and Deena Altman. Their nurturing care and passion for each individual plant set them apart and quickly grew the business to the industry front-runner it is today. Since those humble beginnings, with the help of a team of renowned plant breeders and dedicated staff, Altman Plants is now one of the largest nurseries in the country and the largest succulent grower in the world. We strive to provide high-quality living treasures, for collectors and retailers alike.

Name: Green Circle Growers
Description:
Green Circle Growers is one of the largest greenhouses in North America with over 150 acres of indoor growing space. We’re a family-owned company located in Oberlin, Ohio and growing faster than ever after more than 50 years in the business.

Our continuously expanding portfolio of indoor plants, including seasonal crops, tropicals, foliage, and succulents, provides a scalable, reliable source of product for our retail partners year-round.

Name: Metrolina Greenhouses INC
Description: Metrolina Greenhouses is a family-owned, wholesale plant and services company that was founded in April 1972. Our Huntersville location is the largest single-site heated greenhouse in the United States at 200 acres under glass.  In addition we have approximately 30 acres of outdoor growing space and are still expanding. We also have a second location in York S.C. that has 200 acres of outdoor growing space for perennials.

Name: Meteor Systems
Description:
𝗪𝗲𝗹𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗠𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗼𝗿 𝗦𝘆𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗺𝘀

With over 25 years of experience, 4 locations worldwide, and a team of over 130 professionals, we are the partner for innovative horticultural systems. From vegetables and strawberries to cut flowers and leafy greens – we provide tailored solutions for all types of crops, including water-based cultivation.

Our production facility in the Netherlands houses a state-of-the-art machine park where we develop everything in-house: from growing troughs and support systems to irrigation solutions. This enables us to respond quickly and provide customized solutions.

𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗱𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝘁𝗮𝗸𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗵𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗻𝗲𝘅𝘁 𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹?
Send us a message and discover how we can turn your vision into reality!

Name: Cora Seeds Srl
Description:
We are an Italian professional seed company dealing with research, production and sale of vegetable seeds worldwide.

We breed, produce and sale innovative genetics, our products are able to satisfy consumers’ requests and to meet the needs of the value chain.

Cora Seeds s.r.l. was founded on September 5th, 2006 in Cesena, Italy, with the purpose of researching new cultivars of the main horticultural species for the cultivation in different areas of the world.
Our vision is to be an innovator in the industry and to provide our customers with cutting-edge and successful products, achieved through the great cooperation and creativity of our team. Our mission is to develop products in line with the modern demands of the national and international market, offering growers and factories high quality seeds and continuous technical and commercial support.

The Cora Seeds brand is well known on the Italian market, thanks to the 18 professionals who operate throughout our territory and in Europe, Asia, North Africa and the Middle East thanks to the foreign sales network. The headquarters are located in Cesena, an important international hub for the production of horticultural seeds. It includes the main departments: offices and warehouses, seed technology, laboratories, greenhouses and demo fields. Our research programs are also developed in the two delocalized stations of Latina and Antalya in Turkey.

Discover the pleasure of cooperating and sharing success with the Cora Seeds family!

Maurizio Bacchi
(CEO)

Name: Glastuinbouw Nederland
Description:
Ondernemers in de glastuinbouw telen op een verantwoorde manier groenten, fruit, bloemen en planten ter bevordering van een gezonde samenleving. Zij zijn met elkaar in staat om op een economisch verantwoorde wijze consumentenwensen en milieueisen in hun bedrijfsvoering te verenigen. In de beschermde omgeving van de kas gebruiken zij al het goede van de natuur optimaal, houden zij ziekten en belagers buiten de deur en sluiten zij milieubelastende reststromen uit. Ook bieden zij uitdagende banen op ieder opleidingsniveau en op veel verschillende vakgebieden.

Glastuinbouw Nederland verenigt en ondersteunt ondernemers hierin met als belangrijkste activiteiten lobby richting de (inter)nationale, provinciale en regionale overheden, het aanjagen van kennisontwikkeling en het inspireren van ondernemers door kennisuitwisseling.

Name: Sollum Technologies
Description: Sollum offers the only 100% dynamic LED lighting solution that modulates the full spectrum of the Sun’s natural light to illuminate greenhouses and controlled environmental agricultural research. Sollum Technologies’ AI-powered light fixtures are controlled by our proprietary SUN as a Service cloud platform. A fully scalable cleantech solution that evolves with business needs, offering multi-zone light management, with each zone benefiting from automatic dimming of an unlimited number of light recipes for vegetable and fruit crops and cultivars and nursery plants. Sollum’s grow lights provide an unparalleled value in terms of energy savings, increased productivity, and superior produce quality for greenhouse growers. Our horticulture and agronomist experts support your team year-round. Founded in 2015, the company is headquartered in Montréal (Québec, Canada), where its design, development, and manufacturing activities are concentrated. It also has a representative office in Leamington (Ontario, Canada) and sales throughout North America and Europe. For more information, visit sollum.tech.

Name: Dutch Greenhouse Delta
Description: Dutch Greenhouse Delta markets the Dutch greenhouse horticulture worldwide as a cluster. We do this by offering the entire horticultural eco-system of Fork2Farm, consisting of science, enterprise, education and government, in a number of focus regions. Dutch Greenhouse Delta has the ambition to contribute to the provision of healthy, affordable, nutritious and safe food that is produced sustainably and locally. We focus on large-scale complex projects and issues relating to food and horticulture in expanding mega-cities. At the present time, over 25 greenhouse horticulture companies and the branch organisations AVAG and LTOGlaskrachtare affiliated, all of whom are contributing to the realisation of the foundation's activities.

Name: Barcham Trees PLC
Description:
Barcham Trees Plc has been growing trees for over 45 years and is based just outside Ely, Cambridgeshire. 

Our tree nursery covers over 300 acres and we specialise in containerised trees ranging in size between 3 and 6 metres in height, all grown in our patented white Light Pots to ensure a vibrant and quick-to-establish root system after planting. 

Barcham stocks over 450 different varieties and have a production of 125,000 container trees per year making our tree nursery the largest of its type in Europe.

We have made trees our specialty and our trees have been planted along the length and breadth of the UK, so you are never too far away from a Barcham tree!

We supply semi-mature instant impact wholesale trees to commercial buyers all the way through to single beautiful small garden trees online for retail to private individuals, so no order is too big or too small!

Visit our Commercial website www.barchampro.co.uk

Name: Flavorite Group
Description: Innovative Australian growing expert, sustainably farming and marketing flavoursome, nutritious fresh produce.

Name: Heliospectra Smart LED Lighting
Description:
Heliospectra is a leader in smart LED grow light solutions for greenhouse cultivation and controlled environments horticulture. As a Smart lighting partner, our commitment to sustainable agriculture drives us to achieve energy efficiency through cutting-edge technologies by delivering
premium LED lights, wireless technology, and advanced light control software and sensors. Making every day a perfect day!!

Name: Sheel Biotech Limited
Description:
Sheel Biotech Limited, incorporated in 1991, is an ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, and ISO 45001:2018 certified company headquartered in New Delhi, with regional offices across India.

The company is a manufacturer and service provider engaged in Biotechnology, Tissue Culture, Planting Material, Floriculture, Greenhouses, Integrated Packhouses, Centers of Excellence, Berry Farming, Organic Adoption & Certification, Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs), and Skill Development.

Sheel Biotech is managed by industry experts and professionals with deep expertise in Fruit Farming, Floriculture, Horticulture, Agriculture, Biotechnology, and Protected Cultivation. Its state-of-the-art Research & Development laboratory is recognized by the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) and the Department of Science & Technology (DST), Government of India.

Name: Lumiforte
Description:
𝐖𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐩 𝐬𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭, 𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐡-𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐬𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐬, 𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞 𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭, 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐥 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐬𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲.

Brand: Vitapanel

Name: Jivagro Limited
Description: Jivagro, we believe nutritious food begins at the farm before it reaches the kitchen, and we continuously strive to secure goodness of horticulture produce in the farms through our superior range of specialized products. We partner farmers in crop protection and nourishment and empower them to grow high quality fruits and vegetables that bring goodness to your kitchen tables.

Name: Kekkilä-BVB
Description:
Welcome to Kekkilä-BVB, a global leader in substrates, soils, and growing media. With a strong focus on innovation and sustainability, we develop and launch new products and concepts within our extensive brand portfolio. Our R&D department ensures strict quality control throughout production.

We prioritize our customers' needs by providing high-quality, customized growing media. Join us on our journey towards a sustainable future. Partnering with us means being part of our efforts to create a better world.

With our own production facilities, a well-established supply chain, and global distribution, we serve customers in 100+ countries. Our impressive turnover of 330 million euros supports our mission of facilitating sustainable living worldwide.

We support customers every step of the way, helping them understand how sustainability choices impact their financial results. By sharing our expertise in organic substrates, we foster growth and collaboration, ensuring a brighter future.

Kekkilä-BVB comprises renowned brands in substrates and growing media. Our products cater to horticulture, mushroom cultivation, landscaping, urban planning, and more. We also provide bulk shipping of raw materials to support local distributors.

Food production needs to increase by 70% in the next 35 years. Through smart technology, organic materials, and tailored solutions, Kekkilä-BVB empowers sustainable production.

Joining us means joining an international environment. Our core values focus on customer success, collaboration, innovation, and trust. We demonstrate these values through transparent updates, collaborative projects, and unwavering commitment.

At Kekkilä-BVB, we care for life. Join us on our mission to create sustainable everyday living.

Name: Blue Radix
Description: Blue Radix is the specialist and market leader in Autonomous Growing. Blue Radix creates automated intelligence for almost all daily decisions and actions in greenhouses. With the continuous growth of the world population, the need for healthy food is increasing. The greenhouse horticulture business is currently scaling up on a global level. But this scale up cannot be achieved due to a lack of crop experts. Blue Radix offers solutions for these worldwide challenges: the algorithm-based services empower growers with a digital brain for their greenhouse. Growers are able to optimize and realize their unique crop strategy with AI.

Name: Ebben Tree Nursery
Description:
Based in the beautiful and fertile province of Brabant, on the banks of the River Maas, in the Netherlands, Ebben Nurserymen have been growing lane, park and topiary trees, as well as solitair shrubs, in sizes from 12-14 cm up to and including trunk circumferences of 80-100 cm, for the past 150 years. 
The 350-hectare nursery, with its extensive and extraordinary collection of high-quality trees and shrubs, is located in the heart of its sales region, which extends across the whole of Europe. 

The trees grown by Ebben Nurserymen guarantee healthy and pleasant living and working environments in a host of public and private spaces in innumerable major European cities and towns. 

When we say quality, we really mean quality: We make absolutely no compromises when it comes to high quality. And we can prove it: At the nurseries, in practice on widely varying projects (references), and from a bird’s eye view, on our website. 

Our website offers a wide range of information on our assortment, the quality of our trees, our services, and advice on design and planting plans. 

Ebben Nurserymen: We stand for special, multifaceted, and quality. Why not take a look for yourself!

Name: Tomatoworld
Description:
Tomatoworld and its field lab are the center for innovation in Dutch greenhouse horticulture. Here, high-tech companies, startups, and students collaborate to develop and demonstrate new technologies such as 5G, IoT, AI, and robotics. 

Visitors from around the world gain unique insight into the future of this sector.  A visit to the only publicly accessible greenhouse completes the experience, making Tomatoworld the ultimate destination for greenhouse horticulture in Westland.

Name: Horticultural Development Council
Description:
We are growers and exporters of horticulture coming together to organise, revitalize, grow and transform this industry to deliver economic, social and business dividends.

Our members:
Zimbabwe Tea Growers Association
Citrus Growers Association of Zimbabwe
Zimbabwe Avocado Growers Association
Zimbabwe Export Produce Growers Association
Berry Growers Association of Zimbabwe 
Export Flower Growers Association
Deciduous Fruit Growers Association
Zimbabwe Farmers Union
Commercial Farmers Union
Federation of Young Farmers Clubs
Trade organizations

We continue to assist in the formation and growth of Specialist Producer Associations which form the base of our representation.  These Specialist Associations ensure we maintain our target of representing the majority of horticultural producers in Zimbabwe.  The Union representation helps reach those who desire to export in the not too distant future.

Name: Stolze
Description: Stolze is a specialist in the field of electrical and irrigation technology, grow light, automation and climate technology.

Name: Rocket Farms, Inc.
Description:
Rocket Farms is a pioneering force in the horticulture industry, boasting a rich history spanning over 70 years. We are recognized nationwide for our unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability. Nestled in the unmatched farming environment of Northern California, our cutting-edge cultivation facilities stand as a testament to our dedication. With a diverse range of products including blooming plants, culinary herbs, and fresh produce, we cater to both national and regional retailers, valuing customer satisfaction alongside the well-being of our employees. Join us as we lead the way in innovation and environmental stewardship, enriching lives and communities one plant at a time, and cultivating a brighter future for everyone. 

Follow us on Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/rocketfarms

Like us on Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/rocketfarms

Name: Quality Tomato Morocco
Description:
Quality Tomato Morocco is a subsidiary of Agro Care Growers. With an area of over 260 hectares of high tech greenhouses, Agro Care Growers has become one of the largest tomato producers in Europe. We grow tomatoes in various varieties to meet the requirements of the large retail organizations. We grow on the European continent and in both Morocco and Tunisia. Producing with an eye for people and nature is paramount at Agro Care.

The Agadir region is a horticultural hotspot. Tomatoes, peppers, blueberries and raspberries are grown there. Cultivation takes place in plastic film greenhouses, which are common in this region. Greenhouses are not heated. 

In addition to the 18 hectares of our own greenhouses, external 'outgrowers' also contribute to production. Agro Care supports them with growing advice and with the supply of materials under favourable conditions. This fits in with the strategy of entering into long-term relationships with growers. Through Fairtrade certification, we also contribute to better living conditions for the local population.

Name: Star Roses and Plants
Description: Star Roses and Plants has been bringing great plants to the world’s gardens since 1897.  Many notable roses, shrubs and perennials have made it to market, but one of the most impressive to date is The Knock Out Family of Roses.  Introduced in 2000, this family of extremely floriferous, low-maintenance shrub roses revolutionized the way we think of roses.  Equally impressive is a collection of groundcover roses, Drift Roses, which offer a more compact solution to gardens of all sizes.  With more to offer than just roses, Star Roses and Plants also has breakthrough edibles.  The Bushel and Berry series is a collection of compact, self-pollinating, berry plants for the home garden.  These blueberries, raspberries, and blackberries are easy to grow and easy to love! At Star Roses and Plants, we are a family of brands. We always learn from the plants we trial, and as a result, we are proud to bring breakthrough plants and programs to market so that your gardening experience is just a little happier as a result.

Name: Walters Gardens, Inc.
Description:
Walters Gardens, Inc. didn’t set out to be the biggest and best in the industry. We simply wanted to provide our local growers with high quality perennials. To fulfill that dream, a small perennial farm was established by Dennis and Harriet Walters in Zeeland, Michigan in 1946, worked by just a few strong men including Dennis’ four brothers. Tall Garden Phlox, Creeping Phlox, Delphiniums, Leucanthemum, and Gaillardias were their specialties and these bare root plants were shipped out by rail, truck, and bus.

Today, Walters Gardens, Inc. has grown to be one of the nation’s largest wholesale perennial growers with a reputation for superior quality, excellent service, and cutting edge new varieties. Our company continues to be run by the Walters family, aided by over 200 dedicated employees including skilled growers and hybridizers, plant health experts, inventory managers, marketing specialists, a dedicated team of inside sales and customer service staff, and national sales representatives and brokers.

We offer over 1,000 varieties of perennials including a line of exclusive Proven Winners Perennials, and over 100 new items are added each year. Bare root perennials are grown on 1,500 acres of land while over 500,000 square feet of modern greenhouses contain our plug growing operations. Over 18 million perennial liners are shipped to grower retailers, wholesale finish growers, landscapers, mail order companies, and more across the US and Canada.

Name: Hortimed
Description:
HORTIMED is a premier producer of high-quality innovative horticulture products for professional and hobby growers around the world.

We are always striving to produce, develop and research new and effective
products for everyone, including peat substrates, natural peat, soil conditioners, liquid growth enhancers and biostimulants.

Name: Berries Australia
Description:
Berries Australia Limited is a joint venture between Australian Blueberry Growers’ Association (ABGA), Strawberries Australia Inc (SAI) and Raspberries and Blackberries Australia Incorporated (RABA). The initiative has resulted in a new proprietary company, limited by guarantee, and managed by a board of directors appointed by the shareholders (ABGA, SAI and RABA).

Berries Australia now represents the single biggest fresh produce line in our supermarkets and our combined value is more than $1.3 billion. The peak berry industry bodies (ABGA, RABA and SAI) still exist and each has several Directors on the Berries Australia Board, with Anthony Poiner as the independent Chair.

Name: Apple and Pear Australia Limited (APAL)
Description:
Apple and Pear Australia Limited (APAL) is the peak industry body and non-profit membership organisation that supports Australia’s commercial apple and pear growers by: 

> Improving orchard productivity and grower profitability through Future Orchards
> Creating export market opportunities
> Promoting industry interests with Government, retailers and other relevant bodies
> Collecting and analysing industry data

East West Seed Indonesia (http://www.panahmerah.id).

We believe that farmers' livelihoods can be improved, among others, by means of a transfer of knowledge and technology in order to increase the capacity and productivity of farmers in farming. In this regard, the Foundation provides counseling and consulting services, conducts training on cultivation and agricultural business, and operates nurseries. Name: REMY - Advanced Agriculture Solutions
Description:
Remy is a family owned company. We provide advanced tech solutions and expertise for percision agriculture, plant growth and research.

Established in 2008, Remy grew from a specialized lighting company to a comprehensive AgriTech solutions provider. Since 2011, we've been pioneering agronomic lighting technologies, and from 2017, we've been delivering advanced precision agriculture solutions. 

We bring deep market insights and a profound understanding of growers' challenges and needs. Our clients are cultivators, researchers, and agricultural innovators, together we constantly seek innovative ways to maximize crop yield at high consistency while maintaining uncompromised quality. 

We believe a successful grow operation is never dependent only on one parameter, so we offer comprehensive agricultural solutions: Advanced precision LED lighting systems, multi-spectral research lighting technologies, soilless growing media (Rockwool) and cannabis track and trace management software. 

Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to help solve the global food crisis, one plant at a time.

Name: Profile Growing Solutions | Horticulture
Description:
Profile Products, based in Buffalo Grove, Illinois, has been providing customers with green industry solutions for more than 50 years and its products are used in more than 70 countries.

Profile’s Growing Solutions division offers a comprehensive portfolio of products that improve substrates and growing/soil blending operations. These product brands include HydraFiber engineered fibers; Profile Sphagnum Peat Moss and Profile Coconut Coir; Florikan controlled-release fertilizer; and a line of Quick Plug bonded media technology for propagation and food production.

Through these innovative products, growers and blenders have cost-effective, environmentally friendly inputs for their soil media program. 

Today, more than half of the top 100 ornamental growers in North America have switched to HydraFiber blends and see positive results on their plants and their business. Among the proven benefits of HydraFiber are more available water, better air space and improved root zone development for plants. Highly-compressed HydraFiber Ultra is the most economical raw material in the line and offers the greatest cost savings. HydraFiber EZ Blend can be used without specialized processing equipment.

ProfilePeat is offered in two gradations that come in highly-efficient 64 cu ft and 135 cu ft towers to maximize freight savings. Nutricote CRF is the world’s leading controlled-release fertilizer for nutrient effectiveness and timed-release feed for plants. And our Quick Plug bonded media technology offers propagators with a wide range of plugs, trays, and liners for plant establishment.

All of these innovative products combine to allow growers of any size, anywhere in the world to experience the proven Profile Products advantage.

Name: KP Holland
Description: KP Holland trades, cultivates and produces flowering plants, starting materials and cutflowers. We specialise in plants such as Curcuma, Kalanchoe and Spathiphyllum. As the quality of our products is of primary importance, we are involved in the entire chain from breeding to product marketing. This enables us to meet our customers’ requirements and give our undivided attention to the development of better, more beautiful products. To safeguard our internal processes and constantly improve the quality of our products, we use a quality system compliant with MPS GoldLabel (GAP, Quality, MPS-A, Socially Qualified). KP Holland is based in the Westland region, with sites in Naaldwijk, De Lier and Maasland. The company employs a workforce of ±140.

Name: ErfGoed
Description:
ErfGoed has built leading reputation in the international horticulture market. Starting in The Netherlands in 1986, the company has grown into a worldwide provider of cultivation floors. With ErfGoed technology, growers achieve a range of advantages which strengthen their position in a competitive market. Plant nurseries across the world have chosen ErfGoed as its strategic partner in growth solutions. ErfGoed is encouraged to let its customers’ business grow!

7 unique reasons why growers choose ErfGoed

1.	Uniform irrigation
The ErfGoedFloor is a unique patented cultivation floor, not least because it guarantees uniform irrigation for your crop. 

2.	Trouble-free irrigation
The ErfGoedFloor system gives you trouble-free irrigation because it uses a mechanical valve developed in-house by ErfGoed.

3.	Perfect growing climate
Special anti-condensation sheeting under the weed matting keeps the ErfGoedFloor 100% dry. This benefits the growing climate and delivers a substantial saving in terms of energy costs.

4.	World leader
ErfGoed has an extensive team of specialists and is thus very flexible and exceptionally dynamic. 

5.	Research and innovation
Research and innovation are two key words for ErfGoed. We work closely with others, including WUR Glastuinbouw [Wageningen UR Greenhouse Horticultural research institute] to create the perfect growing conditions for the ErfGoedFloor.

6.	Specialists
ErfGoed was established more than 50 years ago as an agricultural services contractor and grower. The company and its employees have their roots in horticulture, and thus know better than anyone else what growers want.

7.	Highest yield
ErfGoed operates in the horticulture sector both in the Netherlands and abroad. ErfGoedFloors can be found all around the world. They are finely tuned to local circumstances. So by choosing the ErfGoedFloor, you are also opting for the highest return on investment.

Name: AIPH
Description:
The International Association of Horticultural Producers (AIPH) is the world’s champion for the power of plants

For more than 75 years, AIPH has united its member grower associations representing thousands of producers of flowers and ornamental plants around the world. Together, we champion the essential role of plants in creating sustainable, liveable, and prosperous communities.

AIPH’s vision is to create a world where the essential value of plants is fully recognised — socially, environmentally, and economically. We strive to lead, connect, and inspire the global horticultural community through advocacy, knowledge, and collaboration.

AIPH leads international programmes that showcase, support, and advance horticulture — from global Expos to sustainability, urban greening, and industry insight.

Ornamentals Production
AIPH was founded by growers, for growers. Today, the Ornamentals Production Committee continues that legacy — driving sustainability, promoting plant health, and supporting innovation.

Global Industry Intelligence Centre
Through the Global Industry Intelligence Centre and the International Statistics Yearbook, AIPH provides trusted data that supports decision-making, strategy, and growth across horticulture.

International Horticultural Exhibitions
Since 1960, AIPH-approved Expos have brought millions of visitors together to experience the power of plants. These events inspire greener lifestyles, celebrate culture, and promote innovation in cities worldwide.

AIPH Green City Initiative
The AIPH Green City Initiative leads global thinking on integrating plants into urban environments. Through research, advocacy, and the AIPH World Green City Awards, AIPH helps cities harness the benefits of plants to improve resilience and wellbeing.

Name: MobiGa - Mobile Vertikale Gärten
Description:
Wir machen versiegelte Flächen grüner und lebenswerter!
Mobile vertikale Gärten sind ganzjährig einsetzbare multifunktionale wartung- und pflegearme Begrünungssysteme für den öffentlichen Raum. 
Für ein besseres Wohlbefinden, für mehr Biodiversität und als Klimaanpassungsmaßnahme bieten sie die ideal Sofortlösung überall dort, wo keine direkte Pflanzung in den Boden möglich ist und nur wenig Platz zur Verfügung steht. 
MobiGa-Systeme versorgen sich weitgehend selbst mit Niederschlagswasser. Die torffreien organischen Spezialsubstrate mit bioaktivierter Pflanzenkohle ermöglichen eine optimale Nährstoff- und Wasserversorgung der Pflanzen. Mehrjährige (essbare) winterharte Stauden und Kräuter benötigen nur eine geringe Pflege. Mit der cloudbasierten Systemüberwachung und Steuerung ist die Wartung und Pflege noch einfacher.
Wir verwenden langlebige und robuste Materialien, achten auf Ressourcenschonung und Klimaneutralität. Ideal für Projekte rund um nachhaltige Begrünungen, zur Entwicklung einer blaugrünen Infrastruktur, für Biodiversitätsmaßnahmen, für ökologische Bildungsaktionen, für sozial-ökologische Nachbarschaftsvernetzungen und vieles mehr.

Name: ACHI
Description:
We aim to transform the horticulture sector in Ghana by training young motivated farming enthusiasts on the necessary climate-smart practices and entrepreneurial skills to become successful in horticulture. To do this, the ACHI project brings together the 5 agricultural colleges in Ghana, the Holland Green Tech Ghana team and their broad network of lead farmers and industry players all over Ghana.

Since the beginning of 2020, the TU Delft together with Holland Greentech Ghana (HGT), has worked extensively with the Kwadaso Agricultural College (KAC) in Kumasi to build capacity and improve the practical education in the field of horticulture and introduce entrepreneurial skills. By introducing practical and climate smart horticulture skills and assignments together with the Holland Greentech Ghana team of agronomists and by offering education on “Farming as a Business” with support of the Delft Centre for Entrepreneurship, we realized a concrete and sustainable transformation at KAC that is now fully embedded at the college. This was known as the Archipelago program In the follow-up ACHI project, we build on the success of the Archipelago project and scale it to the other agricultural colleges in Ghana and to the other regions, targeting a larger group of young people and developing an innovation ecosystem that will benefit all Dutch and Ghanaian actors that are active in the horticulture sector.

Our reputation for excellence is built on decades of proven horticultural practices, attention to detail, and a steadfast commitment to innovation. By utilizing advanced growing technology and streamlining operations, we consistently provide exceptional plants at competitive prices.

Name: TerraCottem Australia
Description: TerraCottem is the world's leading soil conditioning technology that helps you succeed in all planting/turfing projects despite the challenging effects of poor soils and climate change. Soil is life, but not all soils are conducive to good plant growth. Many soils need to be amended or conditioned. TerraCottem produces all-in-one soil conditioners for all types of plants/soils to enhance your work and reduce risk factors. TerraCottem soil conditioners work at the plant's root level. They are mixed with the soil when planting. Each TerraCottem soil conditioner contains nutritive, growth-stimulating and water-absorbing components. It works, in synergy, to stimulate root development and plant growth, even in poor and degraded soils. TerraCottem provides a constant water supply and nutrients around the root system reducing drought stress and plant mortality. It has a dual effect: you get sustainable, healthy plant growth and savings of up to 50% in irrigation water, even in challenging conditions. It also reduces nutrient leaching. TerraCottem makes greenery thrive with fewer inputs. A win-win situation for you, your clients and the environment.

Name: PBR International
Description:
PBR International specialises in the manufacturing and supply of the highest quality horticulture, floriculture and agriculture products, including environmentally friendly powder, liquid, and gel rooting hormones, and fertilisers.

Established in 2004, PBR International has managed to evolve into one of the leading manufacturers and suppliers of horticultural plant rooting and growth stimulants and products. Our success is due to our outstanding products, exceptional service, as well as our intensive pinpoint marketing, research and specialist support team.

PBR International manufactures and supplies Dynaroot (powder and gel rooting hormone), Dip and Root (liquid rooting hormone), DynaGro (liquid fertiliser), DynaMist (cutting mist spray) and Elsenburg Mix (specialised fynbos liquid rooting hormone). 
Our innovative team also recently launched PBR International’s newly developed cloning ball – the “DynaBall”; With our South African developed and manufactured “DynaBall” air layering has become an easy and practical method of propagation for home gardeners, amateur horticulturists as well as commercial growers of horticulture, agriculture and floriculture products.

We are exceptionally proud of the results of our products, as proven by independent trials. These trials proved, as certified, better rooting, and thus plant growth when compared to other products internationally.

We supply some of the largest production, commercial and retail nurseries as well as commercial distribution companies, supermarket chain stores and selected retail outlets in numerous countries. 

Our products are widely used by tunnel growers, commercial flower farms, fruit tree farmers, golf courses, commercial estate developments, home growers, cannabis growers, and other avid horticulture enthusiasts alike.

Name: GreenPlugs North America
Description:
We give growers premium performance in every propagation plug. We adapted  machinery and innovative technology from the tobacco industry to produce plugs that are consistently crafted with premium substrates and wrapped in our exclusive ultra-permeable paper.

With customized substrates, our premium paperplugs offer optimal, rapid, and equal growth in young plants. GreenPlugs unlocks a complete and reliable propagation system for growers; delivering consistency, reducing labor, and saving space. Throughout the entire cultivation process our specialists are here to advise and assist growers and their teams.

Over the last 30 years, we have become one of Europe’s largest suppliers of paperplugs. We serve professional propagators and growers worldwide with an annual production of over half a billion GreenPlugs. 

Manufactured in The Netherlands. 
North American distribution is through Qualitree, exclusively brokered via BallSeed and Star Roses and Plants.

Name: Veldhoven Loonwerk
Description:

VERTROUWD
Veldhoven Loonwerk is een bedrijf met historie en dat schept vertrouwen. In 1963 startte oprichter Koos van Veldhoven met het loonbedrijf. Nu staan Marcel, Dennis, Robbin, Dick en Sito aan het roer. Met even veel passie verrichten zij verschillende werkzaamheden in opdracht uit. Met de overname van Marel loonwerk in 2022 heeft Veldhoven Loonwerk een vaste plek in de top 3 van allround loonbedrijven.

VAKKUNDIG
Bij Veldhoven Loonwerk kennen ze de tuinbouw. De mensen van van Veldhoven weten aan welke eisen loonwerk op een modern glastuinbouwbedrijf moet voldoen en leveren dan ook de beste kwaliteit. Flexibiliteit staat daarbij voorop.

VOORUITSTREVEND
Van Veldhoven beschikt over een groot modern machinepark en werkt voortdurend aan innovatie. Zo wordt maximale efficiëntie gegarandeerd.

Name: Garten-Q GmbH

Name: Air-Pot
Description:
THE AIR-POT SYSTEM

For plants to thrive they need healthy roots, but standard pots deform roots which seriously compromises the plant. The Air-Pot system does the opposite, actively enhancing the plant, by making it develop a mass of healthy fibrous roots. This maximises its ability to absorb nutrients and water, leading to a healthier, faster-growing plant.

The ground-breaking design of the Air-Pot container has been continually refined over twenty years and is now in its sixth generation. Every detail has been enhanced to guarantee healthy root development and maximise aeration. Toughly constructed from recycled plastic Air-Pot containers can last up to ten years or more.

Name: Verlag dergartenbau

Die erfahrene und gut vernetzte Fachredaktion arbeitet mit über hundert Autorinnen und Autoren zusammen. Die redaktionellen Beiträge sind auf die einzelnen Fachrichtungen und Wirkungsfelder der Grünen Branche ausgelegt. Angesprochen werden – in Gewichtung der Branchenbedeutung – der GaLaBau, die gärtnerische Produktion, der Endverkauf und Handel sowie die Fachbereiche Stadtgrün und Landschaftsarchitektur. Name: Stichting Innovatie Glastuinbouw Nederland
Description:
SIGN is an innovation accelerator in the horticulture sector dedicated to advancing sustainable practices and value chains in and outside the greenhouses. Our mission is to inspire and mobilize businesses by creating new perspectives on circular innovation while organizing pilots to test and scale these ideas in real-world settings.

Through our Circular Horticulture Program (2021-2025), we tackle the sustainability challenges of today, including the circular use of resources, climate neutrality, biodiversity, and healthy food systems. 

One of SIGN’s endeavours is the SIGN Living Lab. Currently located in Bleiswijk  Dijkshoorn Recycling in Bleiswijk, the lab serves as a collaborative space where circular solutions for the horticulture industry are developed and tested. At the Living Lab, students, entrepreneurs, designers, and researchers explore creative ways to repurpose and upcycle biomatter fresh out of the greenhouses, such as transforming plant fibers into durable, biobased construction materials or converting wet organic waste into nutrient-rich fertilizers.

By stimulating partnerships with government bodies, industry leaders, academic institutions, and entrepreneurs, SIGN plays a pivotal role in accelerating the transition to a circular horticulture industry.

Name: Bloembollenkeuringsdienst BKD

BKD ondersteunt de markttoegang door het keuren van bloembollen.
Dit doen wij op een toonaangevend kwaliteitsniveau. BKD geeft (inter-) nationaal waarborgen voor de kwaliteit van bloembollen. 

BKD keurt op onafhankelijke, betrouwbare en efficiënte manier.
Hiervoor heeft BKD integer vakmanschap nodig van specialisten en talenten. 

BKD is een zelfstandig bestuursorgaan.
In onze platte, middelgrote organisatie heerst een positieve, open en informele sfeer.

Name: Brinkman Horticultural Service UK Ltd
Description:
𝗕𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗺𝗮𝗻 𝗨𝗞 𝗟𝘁𝗱 is a horticultural supplier, installer, and consultant, focused on helping growers improve their yields through sustainable and innovative solutions. Established in 1974, Brinkman UK Ltd is part of 𝗥𝗼𝘆𝗮𝗹 𝗕𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗺𝗮𝗻, a global leader in horticulture since 1885. Royal Brinkman received the prestigious ‘Royal’ title in 1985 to celebrate its century of service to the horticultural industry.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘀
Brinkman UK Ltd provides a wide selection of horticultural products, designed to support the cultivation of vegetables, flowers, and potted plants. The range includes advanced irrigation systems, climate control technologies, growing media, and crop protection solutions. These products help growers optimize their production processes, making their operations more efficient and sustainable.

𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀
Brinkman UK Ltd offers sustainable services in water management, electrical systems, and climate control. Whether for new construction projects or renovations, the company provides expert consultation and technical assistance, helping clients design systems that are environmentally friendly and productive.

𝗛𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆
Brinkman UK Ltd’s roots trace back to Royal Brinkman, a company that began in the Netherlands in 1885. Initially a small business providing ropes for agricultural use, Royal Brinkman has grown into a leading global supplier in horticulture, with expertise in seven core areas: crop care, crop protection, packaging, mechanization, and more.

𝗖𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵
Brinkman UK Ltd takes a customer-focused approach, offering personalized solutions through local offices, dealers, and a convenient web-shop. The company’s efficient logistics ensure timely delivery, and a strong, team-driven service culture guarantees high-quality support for every grower.

With over 100 years of expertise and modern innovations, Brinkman UK Ltd is a reliable partner, helping growers succeed.

Name: Greenlit Cannabis
Description:
At Greenlit Cannabis, we pride ourselves on a methodical approach to breeding that sets us apart in the industry. We believe that excellence comes from careful selection and rigorous testing of our lines, rather than taking the easy route. While some breeders simply pollinate a room full of elite clones with a single male and release them without testing, we are committed to a higher standard.
We choose our breeding material with precision, ensuring that each component complements the others perfectly. Every strain we develop is crafted with a specific goal in mind, and we test our creations relentlessly to achieve the desired results. Our dedication to this meticulous process ensures that each product we offer is not just a strain, but a masterpiece of cannabis breeding.. 
With over 20 years of experience in the cannabis industry, specializing in the preservation and cultivation of heirloom cannabis genetics. Our passion lies in maintaining the integrity of rare clones and classic strains, ensuring these unique genetic lines continue to thrive. We are dedicated to offering premium cannabis seeds and clones to enthusiasts and cultivators who value quality and tradition. Our commitment to excellence and innovation has made us a trusted name in the world of cannabis genetics.

Name: 26 Seasons
Description:
26 Seasons was born in a small Wellington garage in 2017, initially growing microgreens. Even though our focus has shifted to growing strawberries, when we first started we knew two things - we wanted to produce the best-tasting produce for chefs and home cooks alike, but we wanted to do it without taking too much from our land. So, mixing a lot of Kiwi ingenuity with plenty of research and expert advice, we are proud to say the result is sustainable farming and business practices that mean we can now grow strawberries year-round without any compromise to taste and distribute our products with minimal impact on Mother Nature.

We do not use any soils, approximately 90% of our water is recycled and, our packaging is recyclable. Our indoor controlled environment farm is in Foxton, New Zealand, supplying the North Island with freshly grown strawberries, thereby reducing food miles.

But we aren't stopping there - we are always challenging ourselves to find innovative and sustainable solutions for the love of our planet.

Name: Grow Jersey
Description:
GROW Jersey is a community project in which we tackle issues such as nutritional poverty, loneliness and isolation, low mood and mental health, drastic biodiversity loss, climate change, food waste and much more, through a number of partnerships and hard work.

As with all Thrive project, we believe that the best way to resolve our community’s social issues must start from within the community itself – with GROW, our first site measuring 13 vergees, large enough to make a bold statement and a significant contribution towards reducing the deficit. Our aim is also to inspire change and to change mindsets in order for more islanders to start their own similar initiatives, thereby increasing the overall benefit.

Our strategy demonstrates that within the confines of one field it is possible to design and manage a community-led operation which delivers a sustainable and diverse variety of nutritional foods, grown regeneratively in a way that also supports local biodiversity. All delivered in a way that fosters a sense of community, helping to combat loneliness and isolation.

GROW aims to deliver a large amount of fruit and veg each year, the majority of which will be gifted to help combat issues around nutritional poverty. a comprehensive biodiversity monitoring programme, which will track the impact the farming model has on the local environment, with the aim of improving biodiversity over time.  As well as being a sustainable food source, GROW is a location that provides a safe place to meet people, educate adults and students and show the rewards of growing healthy and locally sources food, all within a conservation backdrop that preserves the local ecosystems we depend upon.

Grow Jersey is a collaboration between Thrive Jersey, the Parish of St Helier and The Good Jersey Life.
