Name: Palmstead Nurseries
Description:
Established in 1968 by John Langman and his family, Palmstead Nurseries has been growing to meet the evolving needs of the horticultural industry for over five decades.

From our 53-hectare site in Wye, Kent, we specialise in in-house propagation and young plant development—growing most of the plants we sell and building a strong reputation for provenance, quality, and biosecurity. Our experienced team closely monitors every stage of plant development, ensuring healthy, reliable stock that delivers on specification and on time.

We’ve invested heavily in sustainable practices, from pioneering water harvesting systems, including three on-site reservoirs for irrigation self-sufficiency—to peat-free compost and recyclable pots. Our potting lines are powered in part by our on-site solar array, and we’ve partnered with Planet Mark to measure and actively reduce our carbon footprint each year.

Palmstead was proud to be named the inaugural HTA ‘Best Inspirational Business’—a recognition of both our environmental leadership and our customer-first ethos.

With live stock availability, online ordering, and transparent pricing for account holders, we make it easy for landscapers, designers, and contractors to access the quality they need, when they need it.

We’re proud to do things the right way, not just for today, but for the future.

Name: Immo Herbst GmbH
Description:
Alles aus einer Hand
Als Dienstleister im wahrsten Sinne des Wortes decken wir die volle Breite des Garten- und Landschaftsbaus ab. Mit über 35 Jahren Erfahrung können wir Ihnen eine professionelle Ausführung Ihres Bauvorhabens garantieren. Da wir nicht nur beim Neubau zu Hause sind, sondern auch in der Werterhaltung und Pflege, begleiten und beraten wir Sie gerne über Jahre hinweg. Unsere Idee, Ihnen alles aus einer Hand anbieten zu können, wird von einer eigenen Baumschule, einem Containerdienst und einer eigenen Werkstatt unterstützt.

Ein paar Fakten und Zahlen, die für sich sprechen:

über 250 Mitarbeiter
10 Tochterunternehmen
über 200 Fahrzeuge
mehr als 350 Maschinen
über 2000 Kleingeräte

Name: Combinatie Mauritz B.V.
Description:
Combinatie Mauritz – A Family Legacy, Rooted in Quality 

At Combinatie Mauritz, we take pride in being a true family business with deep roots in tree cultivation. In 1972, three brothers—Jan, Gerrit, and Henk Mauritz—founded our nursery in Opheusden, specializing in avenue trees. Today, the next generation continues their legacy, with a son of each brother; Henk, Erik, and Wouter Mauritz.

Over the years, our nursery has expanded to 160 hectares of field-grown trees and 11 hectares of container-grown trees. We grow a wide range of trees and shrubs, including:
 Avenue trees
 Ornamental trees & topiary
 Multistem & solitary shrubs
 Fruit trees

With generations of expertise, modern techniques, and a strong focus on sustainability, we provide high-quality trees and export 95% of our trade across Europe.

 Family-owned since 1972 – A trusted name in tree cultivation
 171 hectares of top-quality trees – Grown with care and precision
 Sustainable & reliable – A long-term partner for your green projects

Looking for a supplier with passion, experience, and reliability? Let’s grow together! 

 Contact us to learn more!

Name: SlijkermanKalanchoë
Description:
We are SlijkermanKalanchoë


With over 30 years of expertise in selecting and producing kalanchoe cuttings, we ensure growers worldwide get a strong start with fresh, high-quality cuttings, anytime, anywhere. Our production sites span multiple locations across the globe, always operating with respect for people and planet.

Innovation is at the heart of SlijkermanKalanchoë. Every day, our dedicated team works with cutting-edge techniques to develop new colors, improved cultivation methods, and longer shelf life. We offer a distinctive range of varieties suitable for different pot sizes and climate conditions, empowering growers worldwide with high-quality options.

In our state-of-the-art greenhouse in Heerhugowaard, the Netherlands, we grow finished kalanchoe plants in a highly automated and sustainable way. We use biological crop protection and hold the MPS-Florimark Production certification, ensuring a responsible approach to cultivation. This facility also serves as a practical testing ground where growers can experience our varieties firsthand.

Our story

Our roots go back to 1946 when founder Cor Slijkerman started cultivating vegetable crops. With the rise of greenhouses, he transitioned to growing gerberas and pot chrysanthemums. Under the leadership of his son, Johan Slijkerman (2nd generation), the company made the switch to Kalanchoë, and in 2001, we began breeding our own varieties. 

Today, Stefan Slijkerman (3rd generation) leads our internationally operating company, continuing our legacy of passion, quality and innovation in the world of Kalanchoë.

Name: Le Champ des Sourires
Description:
Le Champ des Sourires est une association dont l'objectif est de soutenir la transition professionnelle de femmes, à travers la production et la valorisation de fleurs coupées. 

Un tremplin vers l'emploi et la confiance en soi !

Name: TILL
Description:
Till is the first and only creative agency at the intersection of gardens, design, and culture. We champion world’s leading horticulturists, photographers, landscape designers, botanical artists, thinkers, visual storytellers and more. Till connect brands with the power of nature to craft compelling narratives, immersive experiences, and innovative visual storytelling.

With a global network of talent, Till offers a fully integrated approach to brand collaborations—encompassing creative direction, artist representation, content development, cultural programming, and design consulting.

Our mission is to elevate an underserved market with a huge opportunity for sustained growth, environmental change and ecological impact.

Name: Thoughtful Viticulture Ltd
Description:
I believe that a wine is made in the vineyard, and with a thoughtful strategy, any vineyard can be guided towards specific stylistic goals.

Thoughtful viticulture transcends the standard classifications of conventional, organic, biodynamic, and regenerative philosophies, to help growers farm with intention.

All services are tailored to each client. Backed by a fundamental understanding of vine physiology, and years of scientific research in commercial vineyards, clients are provided with advice that is sustainable for both the environment and their operation.

Name: Butterfly Orchids
Description:
Butterfly Orchids is een moderne orchideeënkwekerij in Andel (Nederland).
Bij Butterfly Orchids draait alles om groei. Niet alleen van onze orchideeën, maar ook van onze mensen en onze ideeën. Al meer dan 15 jaar kweken we met liefde en vakmanschap de mooiste orchideeën – en dat doen we op een manier die nét even anders is. Onze kas van 3,5 hectare is een plek vol slimme technieken, groene oplossingen en vooral: fijne collega’s. En we zitten niet stil! We bouwen op dit moment aan een gloednieuwe, 6 hectare grote kas die helemaal fossielvrij is. Super duurzaam én vol innovatie. Maar hoe modern we ook zijn, het allerbelangrijkste blijft: onze collega's. Jij dus. Want zonder betrokken, gemotiveerde mensen geen groei, geen mooie planten en geen Butterfly Orchids.

Name: Azur Plantes
Description:
Notre groupe OTTENWAELDER/AZUR PLANTES est spécialisé dans la production de plantes fleuries telles que Bégonia, Impatiens de Nouvelle Guinée, Gerbera, Hibiscus (HibisQs), Cyclamen, Poinsettia, plantes en suspensions, et beaucoup d’autres.

Nos serres sont situées dans le sud de la France, au coeur de la ville de Fréjus. 

Notre groupe distribue ses produits dans les régions PACA et RHÔNE-ALPES essentiellement à des paysagistes, des grossistes et des distributeurs spécialisés.

Name: SchreudersGroen
Description:
Natuur en biodiversiteit zorgen voor onze gezondheid, welzijn en kwaliteit van leven. In het hart van onze missie ligt daarom dan ook een diepe toewijding aan het creëren en beheren van groene (ecologische) buitenruimtes. Door onze expertise, innovatie en bewuste keuzes creëren we al ruim 40 jaar duurzame buitenruimtes die mensen en natuur met elkaar verbinden. 

Onze opdrachtgevers zijn overheden, woningbouwverenigingen en -stichtingen, bedrijven, begraafplaatsen, scholen, instellingen en ziekenhuizen. Wij zijn actief in de regio tussen Amsterdam (Noord-Holland), Utrecht en Tiel (Gelderland). Uiteraard zijn wij VCA, ISO en Groenkeur gecertificeerd en zijn wij op het hoogste niveau (5) gecertificeerd op de CO2-Prestatieladder.

Name: Aquila Flowers
Description: Cut Flowers Producer & Exporter.

Name: FASTA Fresh and Secure Trade Alliance
Description:
FASTA combines national research expertise in regulatory market access research and in-field insect pest management with a focus on addressing and identifying the impact of fruit flies and other insects that pose a barrier to trade in horticulture. 

FASTA is funded through Hort Innovation's Hort Frontiers strategic partnership initiative, with co-investment from the Department of Agriculture and Fisheries, Department of Primary Industries and Regional Development, Department of Energy, Environment and Climate Action, Department of Tourism, Industry and Trade, Department of Primary Industries and Regions, Department of Natural Resources and Environment, Queensland University of Technology, James Cook University, Western Sydney University, Australian Blueberry Growers’ Association, GreenSkin Avocados, and contributions from the Australian Government and the strawberry and avocado R&D levy

Name: AVVN
Description:
Al bijna honderd jaar wroeten we met onze handen in de aarde en komen we op voor de belangen van volkstuinders. Voluit luisteren we naar de naam het Algemeen Verbond van Volkstuindersverenigingen in Nederland, maar noem ons gerust AVVN. Dat doen we zelf ook. Onze familie is in al die jaren flink gegroeid. Inmiddels helpen we iedereen met een groen hart met natuurlijk tuinieren. Of dat nou in de achtertuin, een buurttuin of in een volkstuin is. Wij delen onze groenkennis en maken samen tuinieren nog makkelijker én leuker.

Of je nou een siertuin, pluktuin, moestuin of een bijvriendelijke voortuin wilt, AVVN helpt je. Wij geven praktische tips over natuurlijk tuinieren, bieden leerzame en inspirerende workshops en lezingen en brengen je in contact met andere groenliefhebbers. Stekjes ruilen, zaden uitwisselen, samen aan de slag met buurtgroen: wij helpen je met organiseren. 

Waarom?
Groen doen, is altijd goed. Zeker als je het samen doet. AVVN maakt zich sterk voor het behoud en uitbreiding van groen in de woonomgeving. In iedere wijk, dorp of stadsdeel in Nederland willen we samen kunnen tuinieren. Elkaar ontmoeten, leren kennen en samenwerken in de buurt, doe je het beste in een tuin. Tuinieren verbindt, is goed voor ieders gezondheid en verbetert het humeur. Je begrijpt waarom wij altijd het zonnetje in huis zijn ;-).

Name: Allied Corp
Description:
Allied Corp combines the Colombian natural advantages with pharmaceutical-grade standards to deliver high quality medical cannabis solutions worldwide.

Leveraging Canadian cultivation expertise and strict pharmaceutical standards, combined with a site within Colombia’s optimal growing conditions, we offer a consistent supply of high-quality cannabis products to key medical markets globally. Our proven supply chain ensures reliable access for partners, always keeping the needs of patients at the forefront.

Name: Riverland Fruit Company
Description:
Bringing people together, one apple at a time.

Fresh fruit, from our family to yours.
Riverland has been growing and selling fresh fruit for over 50 years and is still owned and operated by the Hamlin family, four generations later.

Our business is about more than fruit; it’s about empowering our team to do what they do best, and creating a loving, joyful community, where families come together through the sharing of good food.

Our fruit is grown with skill, love, and care. These values permeate through every process and every interaction - from the orchard to the fruit bowl.

We hope that you can feel the love that’s gone into every piece of fruit that leaves our orchard, and that eating it brings you as much joy as it’s brought us growing it.

Look out for 'Riverland - the most loved' - a familiar sight on the shelves of all major supermarket and specialty fruit & vegetable stores around NZ.

Find out more about us at www.riverland.co.nz

Name: Drenthe Growers BV
Description:
Drenthe Growers BV is het bedrijf van de familie De Vries. Op dit moment wordt er op 18 hectare komkommers geteeld.  

Drenthe Growers BV levert zijn komkommers via Oxin Growers aan verschillende handelshuizen. Deze verkopen de komkommers naar de handelaren en supermarkten in binnen- en buitenland.

Waarom Komkommer? Drenthe Growers BV is gespecialiseerd in het telen van komkommers maar kan ook goed omgaan met de hectiek en logistieke problemen die een komkommerteelt met zich meebrengt. Een komkommer groeit snel en de teelt is heel arbeidsintensief. Hierdoor zijn er veel uitdagingen die we met ons team graag aangaan!

Name: eGarden
Description:
eGarden is providing Landscape architecture services, based in Lahore, Pakistan, founded in 2013. We are renowned for delivering innovative, large-scale Landscape Architecture solutions and excel in Urban Development and Environmental services. Our expertise spans diverse sectors including Energy, Real estate, Government projects, and Hospitality sectors. Integrating advanced Horticultural practices, we create lush, Sustainable environments that enhance both aesthetics and functionality. With a focus on extensive-scale projects and cutting-edge solutions. 
eGarden is dedicated to expanding its global reach with climate-responsive designs that seamlessly blend cultural and environmental sensibilities, making us the ideal partner for ambitious developments.

Name: Floriculture Today Magazine
Description: India's first and only monthly magazine focused on floriculture, landscape, gardening, and greenhouse technology is **"Indian Horticulture."** It covers a wide range of topics, including gardening tips, landscape design, and advancements in greenhouse technologies. This magazine serves as a valuable resource for horticulturists, gardeners, and anyone interested in the green industry in India. If you’re looking for specific features or articles, let me know!

Name: HidroBio
Description:
At HidroBio, we are redefining agriculture!

Through innovative hydroponic solutions, we produce kilometer zero, highly nutritious, and healthier foods while using resources like water with maximum efficiency. Our systems are designed to create sustainable, and circular food production models that reduce waste and bring fresh produce closer to people.

We believe the future of agriculture is local, ecological, and sustainable — and we are committed to delivering it today.

Name: Acorn Farms Inc
Description: Acorn Farms Inc was founded in 1976 as a Central Ohio wholesale nursery and tree farm on a 80 acre tract in the Alum Creek Valley of Central Ohio. Acorn Farms continues to grow and expand offering over 800 acres of the highest quality shade and ornamental trees and 80 acres of container stock including wholesale shrubs, perennials, annuals, succulents, poinsettias, mums, bulbs, and seasonal plants. Sales are generated by both on and off site staff, with truck delivery to the US East Coast including New York, Long Island, New England, New Jersey, New Hampshire, Rhode Island, Connecticut, Delaware, and to the Midwest areas of Pennsylvania, Maryland, Michigan, Kentucky, Virginia, W. Virginia, Indiana, Illinois, Wisconsin and Iowa.

Name: Eco Bristo
Description: Eco Bristo empowers Africa's smallholder farmers with affordable, chemical-free pest control and soil regeneration solutions to boost yields, ensure export compliance, and combat climate change.

Name: Majestic Trees
Description:
Majestic Trees is an award-winning, Plant Healthy certified nursery specialising in instant impact semi-mature and mature specimen trees. With over 550 varieties — including rare and unusual species of trees, shrubs and hedging — we are recognised for quality, service excellence and environmental responsibility.

Our trees are grown in reusable AirPots, producing unrivalled fibrous root systems in 35L–5000L containers. This ensures year-round planting with the highest establishment success rates.

Clients are welcome to explore our 27-acre nursery and hand-select trees with the guidance of our horticultural experts, who provide professional advice to match each client’s vision and needs.

We provide a complete service: consultation, supply, delivery, expert planting with warranty, and tailored aftercare packages extending up to 24 months.

Beyond trees, we are committed to professional excellence and industry leadership. We champion plant health, innovation and inclusivity in horticulture — operating with transparency and a drive to give back to the industry.

Name: Grovo Tuinbouw B.V.
Description:
Dé leverancier van opslagtanks voor de tuinbouwsector!

Grovo Tuinbouw, onderdeel van Groeneveld Holding, biedt een oplossing voor elke behoefte aan opslagtanks in de tuinbouwsector. Grovo Tuinbouw levert wereldwijd tanks, via verwarmingsinstallateurs, aan glastuinders. Grovo Tuinbouw is gespecialiseerd in horizontale tanks, verticale tanks, olietanks, drukvaten, ontgassingstanks & drukloze expansievaten. Bovendien kunnen we de tanks van isolatie voorzien. Doordat Grovo zo breed gespecialiseerd is, hebben we voor elke behoefte aan diverse opslagtanks een oplossing. Grovo levert de tanks in samenwerking met andere bedrijven binnen de groep. Met als missie om glastuinders over de hele wereld te voorzien van de juiste opslagtanks

Name: Sylvan Vale Nursery Ltd
Description: Sylvan Vale Nursery is a family owned and operated nursery that specializes in growing reforestation seedlings.

Name: Total Energy Group
Description:
A horticulture supply and service company focused on greenhouse systems to optimize the use of energy for optimal cultivation results. 

Curtain Systems
Heat Systems 
LED Lighting Systems
Ventilation
Drive Systems
Environmental Controls
Water Storage

Name: Plantaflor Humus Verkaufs-GmbH
Description: Plantaflor knows its stuff when it comes to the quality demands on good potting soil and professional substrate. As a traditional sales organization for 20 peat and substrate factories in Germany and the Baltic States, we offer our customers a diverse range of products that we are continually developing and expanding.

Name: DM Flowers
Description: DM Flowers - Your direct source for exquisite Kenyan blooms, shipped fresh to Australia. We specialize in wholesaling premium flowers to florists and floral boutiques, while also providing stunning floral arrangements for special occasions such as weddings, events, and funerals. Elevate your floral experience with DM Flowers today.  #FreshFromKenya #FloralElegance

Name: WinGen, LLC.
Description: WinGen Plants is a small multinational plant breeding and product development company based in the Austin, Texas metro area. We are part of a large international horticultural network and are dedicated to the breeding and development of novel and innovative ornamental plant varieties.

Name: Dutch Greenhouse Systems
Description: Greenhouse Projects advisory and development.

Name: Laederach Gartenbau AG
Description:
Die Firma Laederach Gartenbau mit Sitz in Hünenberg ZG wurde 1989 von Armin Laederach gegründet und aufgebaut.

Mit festen und saisonalen Fachkräften kombinieren wir beste Qualität, gärtnerisches Flair und den momentanen Zeitgeist.

Gerne stellen wir Ihnen unseren Erfahrungsschatz zur Verfügung – persönlich, flexibel und mit viel Leidenschaft.

Name: Aromeya
Description: Based in the Central Highlands of Madagascar, Aromeya was founded in 2017 and specializes in the export of organic essential and vegetable oils. We carefully select high-quality local raw materials to ensure pure, traceable ingredients for aromatherapy, cosmetics, well-being and perfumery. Through a responsible production model, Aromeya promotes Madagascar’s natural resources while meeting international quality standards. To learn more about our company, please visit our website.

Name: Gulf States Horticultural Expo
Description: The Gulf States Horticultural Expo (GSHE) is the deep south's premier winter trade show for green industry professionals, hosted each January in Mobile, Alabama, and drawing over 2,800 attendees annually.

Name: Proptek UK
Description:
For over 40 years, Proptek has been Globally developing and manufacturing propagation and growing trays made in Injection Molded PolyPropylene to give a frequent use product that will last for many years.

The patented technology that allows the roots of the plants to be air pruned, creates a uniform root system without the root circling or the creation of "J" roots that we see so often in pots and trays without Air Pruning technology. 

The benefits of allowing the roots to do the work is not only evident on the nursery but also on the balance sheet. These include:
Increased plant growth in size and health.
Reduced labour by reorganising nursery operations.
Improved yields in transplant and fruits.
Reduced substrate volumes for the same plant quality *
Basically, bigger, better, healthier, more even plant crops for less money.

Proptek trays and Air Pruning is only exclusive to those who grow plants. So all sectors can benefit from the system such as Forestry, Ornamentals, Soft fruit and Vegetable and Salad growers to name a few.

From propagation trays with the smallest 10mm plug size to a huge 50 litre pot, AirPruning technology is available from Proptek.UK. Please see the website for more details or scan the QR code to get in touch for more details.

* Proptek trays have been designed to use Ellepots that can use 40% less substrate than plugs of an equivalent size when loose filled.

Name: Hoveniersbedrijf Oscar's Groen
Description:
Hoveniersbedrijf Oscar’s Groen is al ruim 35 jaar actief en is in die tijd uitgegroeid tot een gerenommeerd hoveniersbedrijf met een aanzienlijke staat van dienst.

In nauwe samenwerking met onze opdrachtgevers, ons eigen ontwerpbureau en de ploegen van uitvoering worden de projecten met grote zorg en vakmanschap uitgevoerd en vervolgens uitstekend begeleid door onze onderhoudsploegen; 10 mensen met een groen hart en passie voor tuinen.

Name: De Rond Agro
Description: De Rond Agro is een groenteteelt bedrijf gelegen in het Brabantse dorp Hoeven. Wij telen jaarrond diverse producten zoals rabarber, bloemkool, paksoi en vollegrondsradijs. Naast de teelt verzorgen wij ook een gedeelte van de verpakking voor onze klanten. We streven altijd naar lange termijn relaties met de klant.

Name: Hampshire Farms
Description: Hampshire Farms is a 1,000,000 square foot greenhouse dedicated to the growing of top-quality perennials and the distribution of house plants and holiday décor. Our products can be found at The Home Depot locations across Chicagoland, Wisconsin, Minnesota, and Northwest Indiana.

Name: tollerei
Description:
Wir sind die tollerei aus Uhingen und gestalten Spielräume mit Herz, Hand und Haltung. Seit unserer Gründung 2019 planen, bauen und pflegen wir naturnahe Spielplätze, die nicht nur Kinder zum Entdecken und Toben einladen – sondern Menschen verbinden. 

Mit unserer Produktreihe POP-UP Sonnensegel schaffen wir seit 2024 schattige Plätzchen und Aufenthaltsqualität für Orte, die keine Zeit für Bauprojekte haben. Flexible, individuelle und modulare Lösungen für Schulhöfe, Spielplätze, Kitas und Marktplätze. 
Die POP-UP Sonnensegel sorgen für gestalterische Akzente UND kühle Köpfe.

Was uns antreibt:
Nachhaltigkeit & Natur: Unsere Spielplätze bestehen aus robusten, natürlichen Materialien wie Robinienholz, Sand und Granit – sicher, langlebig und umweltbewusst. 

Einzigartige Konzepte: Jedes Projekt ist individuell. Wir gehen auf die Träume der Kinder, Wünsche der Gemeinde und Besonderheiten des Ortes ein – kein Platz ist wie der andere. 

Verbindungen schaffen: Ob zwischen Kindern, Natur und Gemeinschaft oder innerhalb unseres Teams – wir glauben an die Kraft des Miteinanders. 

Unsere Zielgruppen:
Kommunen & öffentliche Auftraggeber
Schulen, Kindergärten & Städteplaner
Familien, die für ihre Außenbereiche besondere Spielräume wünschen

Stark im Team:
Wir sind ein engagiertes, kreatives Team mit rund 20 Mitarbeitenden und arbeiten nicht nur für, sondern vor allem auch mit Menschen.

Unser Motto:
„Spielend verbinden“ – denn echte Verbindungen entstehen nicht nur beim Spielen, sondern durch gemeinsame Visionen, nachhaltiges Handeln und authentische Begegnungen.

Name: gronatura
Description: gronatura consultancy is an organization that, provides consultancy services for hydroponics, vertical farming, aquaponics, berry cultivation, precision farming and food processing.

Name: Fora Sahara Horticulture & Farms Limited
Description:
At Fora Sahara Horticulture and Farms Limited, we are dedicated to sustainable agriculture and innovative farming practices. Our company specializes in the cultivation of a wide range of crops, perticularly herbs, vegetables, and tuber crops as well as interests in vermiculture and dairy farming. We believe in the power of nature to provide, which is why we are committed to organic farming. 
Our efforts extend beyond traditional agriculture; we produce high-quality organic fertilizer through vermicomposting using earthworms and create biofertilizers and biopesticides through innovative rabbit rearing techniques. Our mission is to contribute to a healthier environment and deliver nutrient-rich produce to our customers.
With a strong emphasis on sustainability, innovation, and quality, Fora Sahara is at the forefront of modern farming in Kenya. Our goal is to reshape the agricultural landscape by combining traditional knowledge with cutting-edge technology, ensuring a greener and more prosperous future for all.

Name: Manna Farms Pty Ltd
Description:
In a time when more and more farms are passing out of family hands and into corporations, we have gone against the tide. Manna Farms remains solely in our family’s hands and has grown into the largest producer of Biodynamic almonds in the country.

In the red earth of Nangiloc and Colignan, an hour out of Mildura, in Victoria’s far north west, Manna Farms has been growing biodynamic nuts to nourish your life since the late 1980s. In the years since our family first purchased land in Nangiloc, we’ve challenged commonly accepted farming practices, delivering consistently high quality nuts to our clients.

Whilst our father, Ian Keens, who named the family business ‘Manna’ meaning ‘divine or spiritual nourishment’, has retired, he has passed on all of his knowledge and passion to his sons, David and Rob. Raised in the shadow of our father’s passion for biodynamic farming, we along with our highly skilled staff, are driven to not only fulfil our father’s vision but surpass it.

Name: A portée de feuille
Description: A portée de feuille souhaite  se placer comme un tiers de confiance pour aider les fleuristes indépendants à se fournir en plantes françaises et pour aider les producteurs à trouver de nouveaux clients près de chez eux . Tout ça dans une optique de circuit court.

Name: Essunga Plantskola
Description:
Essunga Plantskola är ett familjeägt företag beläget mitt i Västergötland. Vi odlar park- och alléträd, fruktträd, prydnadsbuskar, bärbuskar, klängväxter och barrväxter till offentliga anläggningar och privata trädgårdar. Vi odlar våra växter i ett eget framtaget biokolssubstrat.

Företagets grundfilosofi har alltid varit, att med kunnig och erfaren personal leverera växter snabbt med god service, med omtanke om kund, växter och miljö samt med en bra prisnivå i förhållande till kvalitet. För oss har det alltid varit viktigt att ha en nära dialog med kunden och att samtidigt kunna presentera ett nytt sortiment.

Name: Heartyculture Natural Products LLP
Description: Plants, seedlings, gardening and landscaping. A 100-acre nursery providing horticulture solutions all over India. We specialise in nurturing native and endangered trees and plants of India. Contact us to know more.

Name: Micro Paradox
Description:
Micro Paradox is a Northern California tissue-culture lab and nursery supplying clean, consistent young plants to growers, nurseries, and distributors across the industry. We specialize in propagating difficult-to-produce crops through tissue culture and delivering reliable, high-quality starter plants at commercial scale.

Our portfolio includes agaves, yuccas, perennials, natives, and a wide range of fruit and nut tree rootstocks—all propagated and finished in California. Every plant begins in our clean-plant facility, ensuring uniformity, strong performance, and dependable supply for our customers.

Beyond production, we partner with breeders to maintain and distribute proprietary genetics, support clean-plant and virus-eradication projects, and help bring new varieties to market through high-quality in vitro propagation.

At Micro Paradox, our mission is simple:
Provide growers with clean, scalable, and consistent young plants—rooted in science and made in California.

Open to partnerships with growers, brokers, breeders, and distributors seeking reliable supply and modern propagation capabilities.

Name: Svedberga Parti AB
Description: Svedberga Parti Ab erbjuder ett av nordens största sortiment av växter

Name: Eden Farms (Australia)
Description: Eden Farms is a family-owned pioneering hydroponic greenhouse operation, growing a considerable proportion of Australia's Continental and Baby Cucumber supply.  Located in the Wide Bay-Burnett region of Queensland, the town of Bundaberg is home to the two farms that collectively make up Eden Farms.

Name: GROWGREENS
Description:
Volgens de Food and Argiculture Organization (FAO) wordt er geschat dat de totale wereldbevolking in 2050 meer dan 9.1 miljard mensen betreft. Als dit punt wordt bereikt is de globale voedselindustrie niet meer in staat om alle monden te voeden. Een probleem van de toekomst, dat nu al aangepakt moet worden!

Jaarlijks gooien Nederlandse huishoudens zo'n 590 miljoen kilo aan voedsel weg.
Dat is 34 kilo per persoon, per jaar!

Zonde!

GROWGREENS is in het leven geroepen om bewustwording te creëren in het oog van de consumenten over gezond, biologisch en lekker eten in een duurzame omgeving. 

Wij geloven dat het anders kan! 

Door middel van ons product "The GrowTower"  kan er op een gezonde, duurzame en leuke manier gegroeid worden. Altijd verse kruiden, salade groente en fruit binnen handbereik.
Oogst alleen wat je nodig hebt en groei 365 dagen per jaar! 

En dat allemaal zonder hoge aanschafkosten en geen plastic verpakkingen. 
Bespaar geld op boodschappen, food-waste en kweek je eigen kruiden en salade!

Maar welke voordelen heb jij bij het gebruik van ons product?

- Geen hoge aanschafkosten.
- Inkorten distributieketen.
- Verkleinen ecologische voetafdruk.
- Geen gebruik van pesticiden.
- Bespaar geld op boodschappen.
- Verse kruiden, salade, groente en fruit.
- 365 dagen per jaar kweken.
- Minder verpakking en (plastic) afval.
- Zaaien, groeien, oogsten, een leuke en leerzame activiteit voor het hele gezin!

Name: Plantar SRL
Description:
Bienvenidos a Plantar SRL 

Desde 1999, ofrecemos plantines francos e injertados por pedido y al por mayor.

 Disponemos de insumos para productores, tanto en venta mayorista como minorista.

 Nuestro compromiso es brindar productos de alta calidad y un servicio confiable para los productores que nos eligen.

 La Plata, Buenos Aires, Argentina
 +54 9 221 438 0341

Name: Landesverband Gartenbau NRW e.V.
Description:
Wir sind die Interessenvertretung der gärtnerischen Unternehmen in Nordrhein-Westfalen.  

Als Landesverband Gartenbau Nordrhein-Westfalen e. V. bündeln wir rund 1.700 Mitglieder aus sieben Fachbereichen. Dabei handelt es sich in der Regel um inhabergeführte Familienbetriebe, die sich mit dem Ziel einer gemeinsamen Interessenvertretung organisiert haben. Unser oberstes Ziel ist es, die Wirtschaftlichkeit der Mitgliedsbetriebe des Landesverbandes Gartenbau Nordrhein-Westfalen e. V. zu stärken und weiter auszubauen.

Name: Cloudcrop
Description: Cloudcrop analyzes data from greenhouses, creating and executing optimal action plans.

Name: Holstein Flowers gerbera
Description: Holstein Flowers is kweker én veredelaar van exclusieve gerbera's van topkwaliteit. Met meer dan 140 gerberasoorten en 11 hectare zijn we één van de grootste gerberakwekers ter wereld. We zetten ons intensief in om onze gerbera’s zo duurzaam mogelijk te produceren.

Name: Micro Farm Planner
Description:
Are you looking to develop a really good growth and harvest plan for your vegetable farm? We have the right tool!

The Micro-Farm Planner supports all stages of production planning for your farm or Community Supported Agriculture (CSA) project. It allows you to plan and track your operational tasks as well as document your work in real time.

The Micro Farm Planner offers much more than most conventional crop management programs, which simply support the most basic agricultural production needs for large scale agriculture. With the Micro Farm Planner, you always have an overview of what is planned at any given time on all your fields and beds, what tasks need to be done when, how much seed and how many seedlings are needed, and what harvest quantities you will need in order to fulfill the needs of your customers. Each employee knows exactly what to do when, and has all the necessary information available to them at all times.

Name: T&L Nursery
Description: T&L Nursery is a wholesale plant nursery located in Redmond, WA. We are a regional grower and supplier of top quality annuals, perennials, vines, grasses, heathers, house plants, bulbs, succulents and other plant varieties. Proudly growing our region's joy of plants for over 35 years across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho.

Name: NFF Horticulture Council
Description: The Council is the recognised peak body for forming policy and advocating on behalf of the national horticulture industry. Established in 2017, it now comprises 21 national commodity and state-based horticulture bodies, who together represent the full breadth of an incredibly diverse industry.

Name: Biolchim New Zealand
Description:
Biolchim S.p.A. is a leading company in the production and commercialization of biostimulants, whose function is to stimulate natural processes to enhance nutrient uptake, nutrient efficiency, tolerance to abiotic stress, and crop quality in full respect of sustainable agriculture values and practices. Thanks to the experience acquired in 40 years of activity, the strong relationship with the greatest worldwide producers of raw materials, and the collaboration with important Universities and Research Centres, Biolchim offers a complete portfolio of biostimulants that maximize the performance of any crop, anywhere in the world. The Headquarters is based in Italy, where the production lines and the extraction units are located, Biolchim is active in more than 50 countries in Europe, Africa, Asia, South America. In Brazil, Germany, and Hungary, New Zealand, and Australia.
Biolchim operates directly through subsidiaries; in other countries, Biolchim is active through a strong and reliable network of partnerships with independent distributors and importers. Biolchim is considered among the most dynamic companies on the international markets.

Name: Baum Gartenbau GbR
Description: Im südlichen Düsseldorfer Rheinbogen produzieren wir Stauden und Zierpflanzen auf einer Fläche von rund 30 ha im Ganzjahresprogramm. Mit viel Leidenschaft und großem Gespür für Qualität, stehen wir für punktgenaues Wachstum ausdrucksstarker Pflanzen.

Name: Greenjeans Interiorscape Ltd.
Description:
Greenjeans Interiorscape is a locally owned and operated horticultural service company dedicated to excellence in design, customer service and plant care.  
Operating since 1997, we’ve developed an extensive and diverse client base built on our motto “Real Plants, Fresh Air, Great Care”.  It all started with Jill and Peter Harleman and a watering can. Today, Peter and managing partner Holly O’Flaherty head a team that digs in daily to demonstrate why we’re Edmonton’s leading interiorscape company.
Our purpose is to enrich the built environment by providing people with a beneficial connection to nature. We help our clients make their spaces welcoming, desirable and beautiful with the energy of live plants. We care for people, plants and the environment. We strive to make Edmonton as beautiful as it can be, inside and out. 
The Greenjeans team is committed to the advancement of our niche industry – we’re perpetually evolving and educating ourselves on the most recent developments, technology and best practice.  We’re active members of the National Interiorscape Network and BOMA. We hold the BOMA Certification of Customer Service Excellence.
Greenjeans has been chemical-free from day one.  We employ non-toxic integrated pest management solutions.  We do not use poisons or registered pesticides.  We are committed to minimising our carbon footprint.  We run fuel-efficient vehicles, and two hybrid cars are part of our fleet. Our plant people are mindful of environmental concerns - we operate on the premise of reduce, reuse, recycle and compost wherever possible. 
In the Edmonton area Greenjeans Interiorscape is the proven, award-winning leader for: 
•	Design and care of interior plantscapes.
•	Design, installation and care of green walls.
•	Design, planting and care of exterior seasonal displays.
•	Working with property managers and architects on LEED and WELL Building designation. 
•	Fabulous and festive holiday decor.

Name: Farmcentric
Description: At the heart of Farmcentric is the goal to uplifting rural economy, Farmcentric welcomes you to ancient, exotic and spiritual India. The company was established in 2021. We are members of FIEO (Federation Of Indian Export Organization) and APEDA (Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority) which are export promotion organizations and councils. Our objective has been to develop our business as partners of our overseas buyers with emphasis on reliability as the key to our relationship.

Name: New Zealand Cherry Corp
Description:
New Zealand Cherry Corp. grew out of a 40 year friendship and partnership between Bob Robertson and Henry van der Velden and their families. It now owns the largest netted cherry orchard in New Zealand and has been involved in growing, picking and exporting cherries since 2005.

In the 2014/2015 cherry season the company’s owners, Henry van der Velden and Bob Robertson, commissioned a state-of-the-art pack house to fulfil their vision of becoming a totally integrated business from the field to the market place to help take their brands to the top of the premium quality cherry market.

The New Zealand Cherry Corp. team ensured all packing to export processes were in place to ensure quality management, traceability and food safety. A strong focus was placed on cool-chain, minimum fruit handling and rapid passage through the picking and packing process so that export to customers happened in the shortest possible time. New Zealand Cherry Corp. also achieved full GLOBAL G.A.P. accreditation.

In November 2014 Bob passed away unexpectedly but in line with Henry and Bob’s vision, the team took the New Zealand Cherry Corp. brands to the top of the market, exporting to most Asian countries and the US. Achieving this was no accident. Henry and Bob identified the best people, the best machinery, the best engineers, the best systems and the best partners. This has provided the foundation to ensure that New Zealand Cherry Corp. goes into the future as a leader in the New Zealand cherry industry.

Name: Soil to Supper
Description:
“Our purpose is to make gardening accessible for everyone”

Through online and onsite programs and services, Soil to Supper delivers simple ideas and support to individuals and professionals, on a journey into the garden.

We believe that people of all ages and abilities benefit from a connection with others, experience a sense of joy and the health benefits gained from being in the garden and engaging in garden-based activities.

The "Growing Together" Program provides garden-based activities that build social connections, bring joy and grow wellness within aged care homes and community organisations. Read more here: https://soiltosupper.com/therapeutic-gardening-program/

The Wellbeing Garden Academy is for professionals wanting a career in Therapeutic Horticulture or to integrate gardening within a current profession. Learn here: https://soiltosupper.com/therapeutic-gardening-training/

Our mission at Soil to Supper is to support and guide individuals and professionals to make gardening accessible for everyone.

Name: Green Space Lanka Pvt Ltd
Description: We are a company that manufactures and exports hydroponic substrates and industrial coir fiber products in Sri Lanka that is dedicated to align our processes, tasks and all sort of operations with UN 17 SDGS goals.

Name: Alchemy Greenhouse Solutions
Description:
Alchemy Greenhouse Solutions brings together the industry’s best experience in a partnership that provides innovative and cost-effective solutions for new construction, renovations, maintenance and equipment. Our unsurpassed knowledge of greenhouse structures and systems gives us an enormous advantage in making efficient and economical decisions. We have more than 100 years of collective experience partnering with commercial growers, retail garden centers, municipalities, educational and research institutions, and more. Let us transform your ideas into growth and success.

Distributor of Best-in-Class Structures
We work with the leading greenhouse manufacturers in North America and Europe to give customers a wide range of greenhouse designs and equipment options, resulting in a curated greenhouse that we execute from start to finish without compromise. Our team has the connections and capabilities to create the exact environment each project requires.

Exceptional Service and Support
We take a holistic approach to each job, partnering with clients to discover the most creative and cost-effective solutions to suit each project. Alchemy is founded on a commitment to earn trust through impeccable customer service, timely communication, ongoing project support and superior results. We listen, collaborate openly and deliver on our plan, bringing visions into reality. Dedicated to exceptional project management, we see each unique project through from design to construction, including reliable expert installation services.
Procuring the Industry’s Top Products
• Greenhouse structures (choose from A-frames, quonset-hut, venlo, cold frames and more)
• Greenhouse coverings (polyethylene, polycarbonate, acrylic and glass)
• Roll curtain systems, shade cloth and energy curtains
• Side ventilation systems (rack and pinion vents)
• Grow lights, benching, irrigation systems
• Heating systems (unit heaters to boiler systems) 
• Cooling systems (cooling pads, exhaust fans, fogging)

Name: UpScale Ag
Description: Utilizing cutting-edge indoor vertical ag tech to revolutionize the cannabis industry. Indoor ag tech has been mainstream for food production for decades. Vertical hydroponic grow systems are the future of cannabis; lower OPEX and rapid scalability while producing higher yields with no sacrifice to quality. It’s time to Upscale your growth.

Name: Australian Nursery's Fruit Improvement Company (ANFIC) Ltd
Description:
The Australian Nursery's Fruit Improvement Company (ANFIC) is a leading innovator in the Australian fruit industry, dedicated to developing superior fruit varieties for growers and consumers alike.

With 40 years of experience in IP Management, Commercialisation, and Propagation, we are proud to have played a pivotal role in shaping the nation's fruit industries, contributing to the development of new fruit varieties and rootstocks.

Name: Collison Cut Flowers Ltd
Description: Since 1966 the Collison family have been growing seasonal cut flowers in the fertile soil of West Norfolk. Now one of the leading UK cut flower growers we are proud to still be a family business supplying UK multiple retailers with fresh British flowers 52 weeks of the year. We specialise in top quality seasonal products and sustainability runs through the core of our business. Find out more by visiting our website collisoncutflowers.co.uk

Name: The National Allotment Society
Description:
Founded in the early 20th century, The National Allotment Society is the leading representative body for UK allotment holders, representing the views of over 125,000 members.

By working with government, NGOs, the media, landlords and developers, we strive to provide, promote and preserve allotments – highlighting the social and environmental benefits of growing sites and preserving allotments for future generations.

Membership comes with a host of benefits including legal advice, liability insurance, horticultural discounts, allotment information, advice and guidance. 

Experts in allotment and site management, our regional network of representatives offer on-the-ground support on issues spanning funding, security, horticulture, establishing projects and setting up associations.

Name: Prairie Nursery
Description:
Prairie Nursery is an online retailer of native plants and seeds. Our nursery propagated native plants include grasses, sedges, wildflowers, ferns and shrubs. We specialize in natives that range from the Midwestern prairies to the eastern woodlands, and ship our plants and seeds nationwide through our online store.

Delivering quality plant material and expert information – to gardeners, landowners, landscape designers and project managers – is our way of creating success for our customers, and success for a product that we feel passionately about. By choosing native plants individuals and communities participate in the creation of sustainable plant and wildlife communities, and the practice of soil and water conservation.

Name: Botman Hydroponics B.V.
Description: Maak kennis met de Botman Hydroponics - FlowAerator: de sleutel tot de oplossing voor de bestrijding van blauwalg in oppervlaktewater! Dit krachtige apparaat kan grote volumes water van elke diepte omhoog halen en circuleren, waardoor de niveaus van opgeloste zuurstof worden verhoogd. Met een laag energieverbruik en de mogelijkheid om water te beluchten en circuleren, is de FlowAerator de perfecte oplossing voor het verbeteren van de waterkwaliteit in zwemwater en andere wateromgevingen. Potentiële stakeholders, waaronder waterschappen, gemeentes, Rijkswaterstaat, vis- en duikverenigingen, kunnen profiteren van dit apparaat om water met een laag zuurstofniveau en troebel water aan te pakken. Neem contact op met info@botmanhydroponics.com voor meer informatie over de toepassing van de FlowAerator!.

Name: The Wildflower Gardening Company
Description: I'm a self-reliant gardener, deeply devoted to nature's wonders! If you're in need of routine upkeep or a total garden transformation, consider me your go-to! Servicing all of Berkshire, I'm turning my passion into a reality. Intrigued? Contact me for a free quotation

Name: FronTier Racking
Description:
We’re here to disrupt the industry with our quality, efficient, and cost-effective racking systems.

From vertical mobile racking systems to single-tier, rolling benches, v-track benches, airflow solutions, and beyond. 

We provide top notch service and expertise. 
Our growers grow. Our engineers design. Our sales team cares.

With Canadian, Asian and European presence, we’re on the ground where you need us, when you need us.

We’re backed with the financial strength and long-term stability that you can rely on, alongside our trusted suppliers and partnerships. 

Every system comes with the assurance of robust support and warranties that match our quality.

We’re proud to bring together a world-class team united by one mission: 
to raise the bar in this industry and deliver solutions that outperform and outlast.

No hype. Just results.

Name: Hydro Logistics Ltd
Description:
Growing, packaging and delivering organic fresh bio vegetables around the island to retailers and wholesalers, including hotels and restaurants. 

At Hydro Logistics Ltd, the best sustainable growing practices are applied to produce and deliver high quality vegetables with an environmentally-conscious approach.

Hydro Logistics Ltd is in operation since 2017 and is a registered SME company, under the aegis of SME Mauritius.

Name: Van Schie
Description:
Van Schie is a Decorum supplier of top quality flowering plants.  A wide range of potted lilies and chrysanthemum is available all year round in many varieties, colors and potsizes.
The company is located in Honselersdijk, Zuid-Holland, The Netherlands.

Name: Henry Mast Greenhouses
Description: Henry Mast Greenhouses, based in Byron Center, Michigan, is a large wholesale plant grower that supplies annuals, potted flowers, and seasonal plants to major retailers like Meijer and The Home Depot. Founded by Dutch immigrant Henry Mast, Sr. in the 1940s, it has grown to over 30 acres of greenhouse space plus outdoor growing areas. Today it operates as part of the Masterpiece Flower Company, which handles sales, marketing, and distribution, with Peak Transportation Solutions managing logistics. Together, they serve major retailers' floral and garden centers across the Midwest. They are a top 100 U.S. grower and have been serving their communities for over 70 years.

Name: Vaarathi
Description:
Vaarathi is a B2B floriculture platform reimagining India’s rich, millennium-old flower tradition for the modern world. Rooted in devotion and driven by innovation, we work closely with over 5,000+ farmers, connecting them directly to global customers with the vision of delivering freshness, beauty, and joy to a billion celebrations.

A Govt. of India (DPIIT) recognized start-up, founded in March 2023 and headquartered in Hyderabad, we are building a multi-source, multi-destination, multi-species marketplace powered by AI-driven demand mapping and a demand-backed supply chain, reducing wastage, improving freshness, and ensuring fair value for all.

From small farmers and retailers to exporters, perfume makers, and devotional institutions, we are creating a transparent, tech-enabled ecosystem that honors both the farmer’s effort and the sanctity of the flowers. Whether adorning temples, brightening weddings, or becoming the essence of fragrances, our flowers are nurtured with care and delivered with precision.

Our purpose is simple, to make flowers travel smarter, last longer, and reach the right hands at the right time, carrying with them the fragrance of devotion and the promise of prosperity.

Are you an agricultural professional or innovator looking to grow with us? Join our mission to shape the future of farming and floriculture.

Name: Cultiwool
Description: Cultiwool is a high-quality brand, unique for cannabis cultivation. In fact, we are one of the leading suppliers of stone wool, and have been active in the cannabis industry for many years. We offer different types, sizes, and shapes of stone wool. Our products are specially designed in such a way, as to maximize yields and quality while reducing inputs and waste in the cultivation of cannabis. With our unique technologies (e.g., for drain maintenance) and consistency of the stone wool, controlling the water content, EC, and pH becomes easier.

Name: Vision Pest Control Solutions
Description: At Vision Pest Control Solutions, we take pride in delivering exceptional pest management services. Our highly skilled team combines cutting-edge techniques with extensive knowledge to tackle pests effectively. With a focus on safety and customer satisfaction, we provide tailored solutions that ensure a pest-free environment for your home or business. Trust Vision Pest Control Solutions for reliable, efficient, and long-lasting pest control. Say goodbye to pests and hello to peace of mind

Name: Rijtak
Description: Wij zijn een tuinbouwbedrijf dat al jaren tomaten en paprika's kweken voor Belorta en sinds mei 2021 telen we spirulina.

Description: Passionate about our produce our people our customers and the environment

Description: Einfach Gärtner, nur anders. Egal welche Grösse, mit unseren massgeschneiderten Ideen holen wir stets das Maximum aus Ihrem Garten heraus. Dabei vereinen wir Natürlichkeit mit moderner Gestaltung und schaffen so aussergewöhnliche Lebensräume. Unsere Liebe für Gärten ist bedingungslos.

Name: Ornamental Trees Ltd
Description:
Ornamental Trees Ltd is one of the UK's leading online suppliers of trees, offering over 700 varieties and benefiting from 20 years of experience. We've received the Feefo Platinum Trusted Service Award for 4 consecutive years.

Choose from ornamental trees, fruit trees and shrubs in a range of sizes that is rarely seen elsewhere. Our offerings include the most popular garden varieties to those that are rarer and more unusual, as well as an extensive range of mature trees, expertly grown over many years. Species include Japanese Maples, Flowering Cherries, Birch, Magnolias, Conifers and many more.

We also offer expert tree care and advice—both online and over the phone—including planting guides and video tutorials, and a blog for top garden tips and inspiration.

Name: Gulshan-e-Waqar Nursery Farms
Description: Gulshan-e-Waqar nursery, originally established in 1976, has grown over the years to become the leading destination of trade and wholesale plant supply for nursery retailers, garden designers, residential and commercial landscape projects throughout Pakistan and Gulf countries.Our range includes flowering trees, landscaping trees, fruit plants, shrubs and ground covers, indoor plants, roses, palm trees, bonsai and topiaries.

Name: Zorgboerderij Het Groene Anker
Description:
Bij Het Groene Anker vinden mensen met een fysieke of mentale beperking een plek waar ze zich thuis kunnen voelen. Iedereen draagt zijn steentje bij, op zijn eigen manier. We streven naar een oase van rust en vreugde, waar iedereen welkom is. Ontdek de schoonheid van de natuur, geniet van de dieren en pluk je eigen geluk in onze prachtige pluktuin. Reserveer iets uit het aanbod of neem gerust contact op. We kijken er naar uit om je te ontvangen! 
Jeroen & Isabelle

Name: Féro B.V.
Description: Féro B.V. designs solutions to reforest degraded cropland through greenhouses and reforestation projects.

Name: Genesis Nurseries
Description:
Genesis are New Zealand’s leading specialist commercial fruit tree nursery growing apples, stonefruit and cherries to supply to and enable growers to be world leading.  

Over our 45 year history, Genesis Nurseries’ fruit varieties and rootstocks have formed a large part of the fruit tree industry in New Zealand. With market leading access to exclusive plant variety rights and our focus on the continual improvement of both varieties and scientific systems, Genesis is dedicated to supporting our customers to grow New Zealand’s premium horticulture industry.

Name: Bruce Jensen Nurseries/Florida LLC
Description: Bruce Jensen Nurseries/Florida LLC is a distinguished wholesale tropical foliage company with 70 years of experience in cultivating premium-quality foliage. We specialize in a diverse range of indoor plants, including Pothos, Ivy, Dracaenas, Hoyas, and Syngonium, among others.

Name: Organic Mechanics Soil Company
Description:
Founded in 2006, the Organic Mechanics Soil Company, LLC is a manufacturer and distributor of premier organic potting soils, soil amendments, and fertilizers for the professional and consumer gardening communities. Our retail products can be found in independent garden centers, houseplant shops, natural food stores, and indoor gardening stores. Our wholesale products ship to farms, growers, and landscape companies. We are proud to service most of the US, from the East Coast to the Southwest.

At the heart of all we do, we share a philosophy that embraces environmental sustainability and regenerative gardening practices. We are actively pursuing the dream of producing the highest quality, most earth-friendly organic potting soils, soil amendments, and fertilizers available. .

This is why we choose to use compost and coconut coir instead of peat, bio-diesel to power our equipment, and recycled products and local ingredients whenever possible. We are committed to operate our business in a responsible and sustainable way. 

For the best performing, easy-to-use, earth-friendly potting soil on the market, dig your hands into a bag of Organic Mechanics and start gardening. Your plants will love you for it!

Name: WPT - Biobased
Description: WPT Biobased ontwikkelt duurzame producten voor een plasticvrije sierteeltsector. Samen met partners en kennisinstellingen is WPT Biobased bezig met productontwikkeling, prototypes maken, praktijktesten en het in de markt brengen van plasticvrije teeltbenodigdheden.

Name: Department of Horticulture & Food Processing, Uttar Pradesh
Description: Official Page of Department of Horticulture & Food Processing, Government of Uttar Pradesh

Name: Camerons Nursery
Description:
Cameron's Nursery opened its doors in 1992 and is based in Arcadia, North-West of Sydney, Australia. Growing quality plants for the retail sector, landscaping and commercial projects throughout the east coast of Australia and has built a reputation for embracing diversity, innovation, value and sustainability in its products and practices. 
Sustainability underpins a long-term strategy within our business. Adopting this environmental commitment has enabled our business to assist in the conservation of the earth's limited resources while remaining economically viable. Our philosophy underpins our company's values, diminishes our business's risk, being socially responsible and more resilient. Our whole-farm design and water recycling have seen us be recognised as industry leaders, with our business winning many prestigious awards.

Name: Board for plant varieties
Description: The Board for plant varieties is an independent administrative body and the only body in the Netherlands responsible for granting plant breeders' rights and authorising plant varieties and stands.

Name: Arend Roses
Description:
Arend Roses is een toonaangevende Nederlandse handelskwekerij die een breed assortiment grootbloemige rozen aanbiedt.

Arend Roses bestaat uit drie vestigingen waarvan twee in Maasland - één aan de Burgerweg en één aan de Herenwerf. De derde locatie bevind zich in Almere. De totale oppervlakte van Van der Arend Roses is 149.000 vierkante meter.

Arend Roses weet haar Europese groothandelsklanten steeds te verrassen met aantrekkelijke producten in vele exclusieve variëteiten.

Met onze eigen professionele kwekerijen zijn wij in staat snel en flexibel een in alle opzichten hoogwaardig kwaliteitsproduct te leveren. 

We zien leverbetrouwbaarheid daarbij als de belangrijkste kernwaarde, dit vormt de basis van ons handelen.

Name: Coir Media Mexico
Description:
En Coir Media nos especializamos en la producción y distribución de sustratos de coco de alta calidad, diseñados para satisfacer las necesidades de la agricultura moderna.

Nuestros sustratos son ideales para cultivos como:
Blueberries, frambuesas, fresas, hortalizas, flores, pimientos y pepinos.

Ofrecemos:
	•	Sustratos premium con excelente retención de agua y drenaje
	•	Mezclas y presentaciones personalizadas para distintos sistemas de cultivo (bolsas, slabs, sustrato suelto)
	•	Soluciones sostenibles que promueven el desarrollo radicular y aumentan el rendimiento de los cultivos

Nos enfocamos en brindar productos confiables y eficientes para productores y distribuidores que buscan calidad y resultados.

Name: SARL DYNAVERT
Description:
Situé dans le sud de la France, la Sarl DYNAVERT commercialise la production de la EARL DYNAVERT et MIDIPLANTAZUR.
Entreprise engagé dans le dévéloppement durable, nombreux certifications et labels de qualité: Fleurs de France, MPS, Plante Bleue ..
De la production en passant par la commercialisation jusqu'à la livraison - toutes les étapes sont assurées par nos équipes.
Nous proposons une large gamme de plantes fleuris et méditérranéennes qui évolue selon vos besoins.  Nous assurons également des mises en cultures spéciales et des MDD.

Name: Demiri Gartenbau GmbH
Description: Unsere langjährige Erfahrung und fachliches Know-how im Gartenbau, Tiefbau und Strassenbau erstreckt sich von einem kleinst bis hin zu Grossprojekten.

Name: Horti India Expo
Description:
Horti India Expo is a premier platform dedicated to showcasing the complete spectrum of India’s horticulture industry. From nurseries, landscaping, protected cultivation, and irrigation systems to agri-inputs, farm machinery, and post-harvest technologies — the expo brings together leading companies, innovators, farmers, and stakeholders under one roof.

Organized by SV Global Expos, the event is designed to connect Indian growers and businesses with global opportunities, fostering knowledge exchange, partnerships, and growth. With a strong focus on networking, innovation, and sustainable practices, Horti India Expo is the ultimate meeting point for professionals shaping the future of horticulture in India and beyond.

Name: TCE Electrical Ltd
Description:
Since 2000, TCE has been specialising in cutting-edge horticultural engineering, particularly in the design and installation of LED grow light systems in glasshouse and vertical farms across the UK. We stand at the forefront of agricultural technology, providing tailored lighting solutions that enhance growth and optimise production for our clients.

Our close relationships with leading LED grow light and control system manufacturers enriches our offerings, ensuring we deliver a diverse range of options to meet specific horticultural needs. 

Committed to excellence, TCE offers comprehensive services from design to installation and maintenance, underpinning the horticultural industry with robust wiring, controls, and responsive breakdown services.

Name: GRUPA MULARSKI
Description:
Kupując produkty Grupy Mularski macie Państwo gwarancję, że wybieracie zdrowie dla siebie i swoich bliskich. Ścisłe procedury obowiązujące w gospodarstwach dotyczące zapewnienia bezpieczeństwa zdrowotnego żywności HACCP, oraz wymogi jakościowe produkcji GLOBALGAP, pozwalają zapewnić najwyższa jakość. 

Rozsady Mularski

Dysponujemy najnowocześniejszymi mnożarkami oraz hartownikiem dostępnym na rynku, na powierzchni 12 ha. Nowe technologie pozwalają nam osiągnąć najkorzystniejsze warunki do hodowli rozsady.

Name: AgriGuardNL
Description: AgriGuard is de nieuwe specialist in technisch advies voor glastuinbouwbedrijven. Met sector-specifieke kennis, heldere risicoanalyses en onafhankelijk advies zorgen wij dat uw kas, uw teelt en uw investering van optimale kwaliteit zijn. Zodat u zich volledig kunt richten op groei.

Name: Die Bodenbelüfter
Description:
The floor aerators - We analyse, restore and revitalise your floor.
Compacted, stressed or dysfunctional soil? We find the causes - and remedy them in a targeted, trenchless and sustainable manner.

With our special compressed air soil aeration process, we bring air, water and life back into the soil - the basis for healthy plants, vital trees and permanently functioning green spaces.
But before we act, we analyse precisely:
Our mobile soil laboratory comes directly to you. On site, we determine the actual causes of waterlogging, root stress or poor plant growth - well-founded, data-based and customised for each location.

Only when we know what exactly is wrong with your soil do we take action - targeted and efficient.
Using deep-acting compressed air loosening and the precise application of ecologically sound soil additives, we remedy the exact damage identified - without digging, without unnecessary intervention and with a long-term effect.

Whether you are a garden and landscape contractor, local authority, new-build company or discerning homeowner - we come into play precisely when conventional measures are no longer sufficient.

Do you want to make problem areas usable again, secure new plantings or regenerate green spaces - with a system instead of a gut feeling?
Then talk to us.

We will bring your soil back into balance - through analysis, expertise and customised work.

Name: W. Stehli AG Garten und Strassenbau
Description:
Willkommen bei unserer Gartenbaufirma im Zürich Oberland. Wir sind ein innovatives Unternehmen mit über 50 Jahren Erfahrung in den Bereichen Garten- und Strassenbau, Gartenpflege sowie Friedhofswesen. Unsere Expertise ermöglicht es uns, Dich bei der Planung und Realisation Deiner Projekte von Anfang bis Ende kompetent zu begleiten. Wir legen grossen Wert auf individuelle Beratung, um sicherzustellen, dass Deine Wünsche und Vorstellungen in jedem Detail berücksichtigt werden.

Unsere Kernkompetenzen erstrecken sich auf vielfältige Bereiche. Ein besonderer Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Planung und Erstellung von Gartenneuanlagen sowie Umänderungen bestehender Gärten. Egal, ob Du einen kleinen Privatgarten oder eine grosse Grünanlage betreust – wir bieten Lösungen, die genau auf Deine Bedürfnisse abgestimmt sind. Durch unsere langjährige Erfahrung im Unterhalt privater Gärten und öffentlicher Grünflächen können wir Dir garantieren, dass Dein Garten das ganze Jahr über in bestem Zustand bleibt.

Im Strassen- und Tiefbau verfügen wir über umfangreiche Erfahrung in der Erstellung von Kanalisationen, Werkleitungen und anderen wichtigen Infrastrukturen. Egal ob es sich um kleinere Strassenbauprojekte oder umfangreiche Bauvorhaben handelt – wir setzen diese fachgerecht und termingerecht um.

Ein weiteres Highlight unseres Angebots sind unsere Spezialbeläge, wie zum Beispiel Festkies und eingefärbter Asphalt. Diese Beläge eignen sich besonders gut, um Gärten, Plätze und Wege optisch aufzuwerten und gleichzeitig langlebige und robuste Oberflächen zu schaffen.

Unsere Gartenbaufirma im Zürich Oberland steht für Qualität, Zuverlässigkeit und Leidenschaft für das Handwerk. Wir freuen uns darauf, auch Dein Projekt zu realisieren.

Name: Idris Trading & Consulting
Description:
Welkom bij Idris, een toonaangevend bedrijf dat al 30 jaar gespecialiseerd is in de verkoop van hoogwaardig aardbeienplantgoed. Ons plantgoed komt voort uit variëteiten met een uitstekende resistentie tegen ziekten en plagen, gecombineerd met een indrukwekkende productiehoeveelheid. Onze moederplanten worden met zorg gekweekt in de vruchtbare Po-vlakte in Noord-Italië. Idris werkt er nauw samen met Salvi Vivai en Mazzoni Vivai en brengt de variëteiten mee op de markt in België, Nederland, Britse eilanden, Scandinavië en de Baltische Staten.

Bij Idris gaan we verder dan alleen het aanbieden van bestaande variëteiten. We zijn trots op onze voortdurende inspanningen om nieuwe, verbeterde aardbeienvariëteiten te ontwikkelen. Jaarlijks voeren we kruisingen uit en voeren we proefteelten uit onder diverse klimaatomstandigheden, met als doel planten te produceren die niet alleen resistent zijn, maar ook een optimale opbrengst leveren. Op productievelden wordt dronetechnologie toegepast om bepaalde parameters te bestuderen.

Op onze hoofdlocatie in Serskamp gaan we nog een stap verder door zowel zomer- als winterteelten te onderzoeken onder gecontroleerde LED-belichting. Hier streven we ernaar om te blijven innoveren en de grenzen te verleggen van wat mogelijk is in de aardbeienteelt. Idris investeert in de toekomst van aardbeienproductie met hoogwaardige planten en voortdurende streven naar verbetering.

Name: grewe-gruppe
Description:
Wir sind ein familiengeführtes, mittelständisches Unternehmen mit Zentrale in Rotenburg/Wümme und bieten Leistungen im Garten- und Landschaftsbau, im Freiflächenmanagement, in der Instandhaltung sowie in der Baumpflege an. Ergänzt werden diese Geschäftsbereiche durch weitere Leistungen wie Dachbegrünung, Sportplatzbau, Zaun- und Holzbau sowie Pflanzenanzucht und -handel.
Hinter all den großen und kleinen Garten- und Landschaftsbauprojekten, die wir in über 70 Jahren Familienunternehmen realisiert haben, stecken unsere fast 650 Mitarbeitenden, die mit Professionalität und Leidenschaft an unseren Standorten im Norden Deutschlands ihrem Beruf nachgehen. Dabei legen wir unser Augenmerk auf Nachhaltigkeit, Verlässlichkeit, wirtschaftliche Lösungen und eine faire Zusammenarbeit. So schaffen, erhalten und steigern wir Werte.
Bei uns haben sowohl ausgebildete Techniker, Meister und Ingenieure gute Karrierechancen als auch gelernte und ungelernte Fachkräfte. Jeder Mitarbeitende trägt zum Erfolg des Unternehmens bei. Deshalb fördern wir die Interessen unserer Mitarbeitenden und nehmen ihre Bedürfnisse ernst. Das macht grewe aus – und darauf sind wir stolz.

Name: Viherpalvelut Hyvönen Oy
Description:
Viherpalvelut Hyvönen Oy on joustava, vastuullinen ja kehittyvä viher- ja alueurakoitsija, joka näkee vihreyden kasvavan merkityksen rakennetussa ympäristössä. Toimimme Päijät-Hämeen, pääkaupunkiseudun ja Etelä-Savon alueilla, kunnossapitäen elämänympäristöjä.

Toimintamme perustuu vuosien mukanaan tuomaan ammattitaitoon ja yrityksen arvoihin sitoutuneisiin tiimiin, joka koostuu kymmenistä alamme ammattilaisista. He eivät pelkästään suorita töitään, vaan heidän työnsä on vahva taidonnäyte, jonka tulos kestää aikaa.

Tools & equipment for commercial groundcare and estate maintenance industry

Is it time to buy smarter?

With significant pressure on budgets groundcare contractors have been looking to make savings on traditional brand products or selecting cheap alternatives to reduce costs. To combat rising costs and inferior quality we have sourced products from around the world, worked with manufacturers and customers to build up a range of products that perform in the demanding commercial outdoor environment. By importing and selling direct we can reduce your costs without compromising on quality. It's time to buy smarter

Description:
La pépinière Astrance produit et commercialise des semences et des plants de végétaux d’origine sauvage et locale, caractéristiques du Massif central. La plupart des végétaux sont produits sous la marque "Végétal local"

Ces végétaux produits en agriculture biologique sont essentiellement destinés à l’aménagement paysager, au fleurissement et à la restauration de la biodiversité.

Astrance propose également de nombreux plants maraîchers de variétés paysannes et traditionnelles, également produits en agriculture biologique. Ces plants s’adresse aussi bien aux professionnels (maraîchage), associations (jardins collectifs) et particuliers (potagers individuels).

Cette ambition s’appuie sur une triple exigences :

Name: Young's Plant Farm, Inc.
Description:
Young's Plant Farm is a family owned and operated business, founded in 1961 by Gene Young. Still a family-run company, Young’s has grown its greenhouse space from 1,512 square feet in 1961 to more than 1.8 million square feet today. In addition to greenhouses, there are another thirty five-acres of meticulously groomed outside growing space.

Today, 60 years later, many things have changed, but one has remained the same – family values and a strong work ethic are still at the heart of Young’s Plant Farm. The third generation of the Young family is now involved with the business, and focuses on sustainability, reducing the company’s carbon footprint and growing plants of the highest quality. 

Our company motto, “Grow the best,” stems from our belief that we grow the best plants for our customers, always. Young’s Plant Farm works tirelessly, day after day, year after year, to provide healthy, beautiful annual plants for our customers.

Name: Australasian Green Infrastructure Network
Description: Our mission is to bring government, industry and researchers together to achieve high quality green infrastructure. Our vision is to create healthier, liveable and climate-resilient communities with high quality urban green infrastructure across Australia and Aotearoa New Zealand.

Name: Primato
Description:
Primato - Pure smaakmakers 

Een prachtige glans, een knapperige beet en een verrukkelijke uitgebalanceerde friszoete smaak – jaarrond kweken we bij Primato kwalitatieve en smaakvolle tomaten voor ieders goesting, budget en voor elke gelegenheid.

We zijn fier op onze tomaten, en telen ze trots voor BelOrta – de grootste veilingmarkt van België en tevens Europees marktleider. Door Lekker van bij ons-ambassadeur te zijn, zetten we die fierheid nog net dat beetje meer in de verf.

Als duurzaam familiebedrijf met een jonge ondernemersgeest willen we graag pionier zijn in de sector. Dag na dag werken we er hard aan om ons maximaal te integreren in de leefomgeving, positieve bijdragen te leveren aan de lokale gemeenschap én om ecologisch verantwoorde keuzes te maken voor onze teelt. Wist je dat we onze eigen elektriciteit en warmte opwekken, en dat we werken met hergebruikt regenwater dat grondig gefilterd en ontsmet wordt?

We geloven dat je beter doet wat je graag doet. Daarom vinden we een positieve werksfeer die hard werken, plezier en passie combineert, erg belangrijk. Onze medewerkers, die we graag smaakmakers noemen, vormen voor ons de motor van onze organisatie!

Name: GREENSPAN AGRITECH
Description:
Greenspan Agritech is a joint venture company founded in 2003 based in Pune India. Greenspan manufacturers of Greenhouses and Water Management technology products in India and distribute in 25 countries all over the world.
 
The synergy between superior Dutch technology & innovative, high quality, low cost manufacturing in India leads to an end product unparalleled by others. 

At Greenspan our goal is to promote protective cultivation technologies for superior quality and higher yields in horticulture while simultaneously ensuring conservation of environmental resources globally.

We make protective cultivation profitable and environment friendly.  

Our dedicated world-wide teams strive hard to design, create and implement tailor made solutions which are innovative and cost effective. 

At Greenspan, we build winning teams through people participation, mutual respect, professional integrity & honesty.

We are flexible, customer friendly & strive hard to offer tailor made solutions for different crops and/or climates.

Our network of agents, own offices & distributors in various countries across the globe help us to keep in close contact with our markets & customers.

Greenspan have build more than 600 ha of greenhouses all over the world and they are showcases of our performance and quality. 

Sustainable Horticulture Through Innovation is Our Mission and We Strive to Work Towards It.

Name: Carbon Gold Ltd
Description:
At Carbon Gold, we believe that healthy soil is the foundation of healthy landscapes, strong turf, and resilient trees. We specialise in biochar-based trade products for the amenity, horticulture, and landscaping sectors across the UK.
Our mission is to help landscapers, sports clubs, councils, and growers achieve sustainable soil health while reducing reliance on chemical inputs.

Who We Support:
 Sports clubs and groundskeepers managing high-performance pitches
 Landscapers and contractors delivering successful projects
 Councils and tree officers caring for urban trees and green spaces
 Horticulture professionals and nurseries seeking sustainable growth

At Carbon Gold, we combine innovation, science, and sustainability to offer practical solutions for modern soil challenges. Whether you are managing turf, growing commercially, planting trees, or improving landscapes, our enriched biochar products provide measurable results that last.




The Carbon Gold enriched biochar range includes Soil Association approved composts, fertiliser, soil improver and scientifically endorsed tree care products. Our biochar blends work in all soil types to deliver quicker establishment and root growth, increases nutrients, while retaining moisture, expanding microbial populations, resulting in increased vitality and reduced losses.

About biochar
Biochar is a carbon rich form of charcoal specifically designed for soil application to improve plant growth and health. Biochar is a very stable substance that is not broken down in soils, offering long-term soil benefits.

The biochar we use is made from pyrolysis of organic waste stream biomass heated in the absence of oxygen. The stability of biochar in the soil (from 50-600 years) has important implications for reducing atmospheric CO2 and other greenhouse gasses, including nitrous oxide and methane, enabling a positive impact on climate change.

Name: We are the first sustainable generation
Description:
We believe that the 21st century will be the century in which people and the planet flourish together. Thanks to technology, courage, and collaboration, we can produce more with less and give space back to nature.

This is the story of The First Sustainable Generation: an optimistic, future-oriented perspective in which growers, thinkers, and doers work together to build a world where prosperity and sustainability reinforce each other.

Name: Sakifarm
Description:
World's Best, Farm to Fork 

Welcome to our lush organic farm nestled in Nakuru, Kenya, where the fertile soils of the Great Rift Valley and equatorial temperatures converge to create the perfect environment for our premium avocados. Cultivated with precision and care, our fruits are handpicked at peak ripeness, ensuring unparalleled flavor and nutrient density. 

From tree to table, each avocado undergoes meticulous handling in our state-of-the-art packhouses, preserving its freshness and quality for discerning consumers worldwide. Experience the harmony of nature and science with our exquisite organic avocados, a true testament to sustainable agriculture and exceptional taste.

Name: Horticulture Jobs, brought to you by HortWeek

Published since 1840, Horticulture Week includes coverage targeted specifically at professionals working in production horticulture (both ornamentals and fresh produce), historic and botanic gardens, parks, garden retail, contracting, landscape design, arboriculture and turf.
