Name: Oasis Grower Solutions
Description:
At Oasis Grower Solutions, we understand the challenges growers face because we listen. We've been helping growers solve problems for more than 50 years. From our roots as propagation substrate pioneers, we've grown to offer a full suite of innovations that help you grow, from propagation to postharvest. We’re devoted to helping you consistently produce superior crops, sustainably and profitably.  

With a passion for global impact, our team of horticulture and controlled-environment agriculture (CEA) researchers and specialists are here to support you from start to finish. From vegetative propagation media and hydroponic production substrates to hydroponic fertilizer, wetting agents, postharvest products and greenhouse cleaners, our products help ensure you and your crops succeed.

Follow us and join the conversation on grower-driven innovation. We’re Oasis Grower Solutions, a division of Smithers-Oasis, helping growers meet the future and change the world, for good.

Name: Light Bio

Let's cultivate a vibrant community where knowledge blooms and ideas grow. Together, we'll sow the seeds of a greener and more beautiful world.  #Horticulture #Gardening #Sustainability #GreenSpaces.

Name: Mid-Atlantic Nursery Trade Show
Description: The Mid-Atlantic Nursery Trade Show, MANTS, is known as the Masterpiece of Trade Shows and is sponsored by the State Nursery and Landscape Associations of Maryland, Virginia and West Virginia. Name: Biortica Agrimed
Description: Biortica Agrimed delivers 'cannabis as a service' to customers in Australia and around the world.  With a genetic library of 850+ cultivars Biortica Agrimed is one of the few horticultural companies that can deliver and developed cannabis genetics and cultivate for customers either through facilities owned by the company or leveraging our network of cultivation partners around the world. As a B2B cannabis provider we work with leading brands who leverage Biortica Agrimed as their cannabis product partner enabling brands to develop a competitive advantage through proprietary genetics and high quality product.

Name: Royal Brinkman Canada
Description:
Royal Brinkman Canada formed in January 2023, a year after Kam’s Growers Supply was acquired by Royal Brinkman International.  

Headquartered in the Netherlands, the Royal Brinkman Group reliably serves customers in over 100 countries, by applying a local-for-local principle. Royal Brinkman Canada provides Canadian growers a range of quality horticultural products that are globally sourced but stocked locally. With Royal Brinkman Canada, growers can access international knowledge and expertise supported by a team of local sales and agronomy professionals that live and breathe Canadian horticulture. 

As horticulture experts, we are on a mission to make the job of growing easier. We offer products that enhance production, solutions that improve grower profitability and premier customer support. Our range of products includes crop protection, fertilizer, plant growth regulators, biologicals, shading and coating materials, hygiene and disinfectants, crop rotation products, and mushroom spawn/supplement. 

“Let’s improve together” is our philosophy. And our focus is on supplying high quality products, in combination with developing innovative solutions and applications, standard and customized, for the growers we work with. With our extensive network, our goal is to work together and take the horticultural sector to an even higher level.

Name: Verband Garten-, Landschafts- und  Sportplatzbau Baden-Württemberg e.V.
Description:
Der Verband Garten-, Landschafts- und Sportplatzbau Baden-Württemberg e. V. vertritt als Wirtschafts- und Arbeitgeberverband die Interessen der grünen Branche auf Landesebene.  Folgen Sie unserem Kanal für aktuelle Informationen aus der Branche!

Derzeit sind 795 Fachbetriebe, kleine bis mittelständische Unternehmen, im Verband organisiert. Der Gesamtumsatz der Branche in Baden-Württemberg lag 2024 bei 2,05 Milliarden Euro. Die Branche beschäftigt 15.080 gewerbliche Arbeitnehmer/-innen und bildet derzeit 1.286 Auszubildende zu Landschaftsgärtnerinnen und Landschaftsgärtnern aus.

Mit ihren Dienstleistungen bauen und erhalten sie die grüne, lebenswerte Umwelt für morgen – ein immer wichtig werdender Beitrag angesichts des spürbaren Klimawandels.

Name: Boot & Dart Boomkwekerijen bv
Description:
Al meer dan 75 jaar zijn wij gespecialiseerd in het kweken en leveren van een breed sortiment aan bomen, heesters, coniferen, rozen, vaste planten, bos- en haagplantsoen en andere producten voor het stedelijk en landschappelijk groen.
We leveren aan professionele afnemers zoals gemeenten, hoveniersbedrijven, groenaannemers en landschapsarchitecten in heel Europa.
Boot & Dart Boomkwekerijen onderscheidt zich door eigen kweek, duurzame productiemethoden en het voortdurend verbeteren van plantensoorten via eigen veredeling.
Bij ons staat de natuur centraal. Tegelijkertijd zijn we toegewijd aan innovatie en duurzaamheid.
Omdat we onze producten op eigen locaties in Boskoop en Zundert kweken, produceren we niet alleen efficiënt hoogwaardige planten op de beste gronden, maar kunnen we ook snel, soortecht en betrouwbaar leveren. 
Met een oppervlakte van ongeveer 120 ha zijn we één van de grootste kwekerijen in Nederland.
Met onze groene producten dragen we bij aan een gezonde en duurzame leefomgeving voor burgers, bedrijven en overheden.
Boot & Dart maakt zich er sterk voor om met duurzaam gekweekte bomen en planten, deskundig advies en focus op ecologie, biodiversiteit en klimaatbestendigheid een positieve en brede impact te creëren op steden en buitengebieden in heel Europa, nu en in de toekomst. 
Ook als werkgever streven we naar een brede impact.
Met onze deelname aan Social Return on Investment – projecten vergroten we de werkkansen van mensen in een kwetsbare positie en geven we invulling aan onze maatschappelijke verantwoordelijkheid.

Boot & Dart Boomkwekerijen – Compleet in functioneel groen

Name: Bridge Farm Group
Description: Bridge Farm Group has for over 30 years been one of the UK’s leading plant producers. Using traditional cultivation techniques together with cutting-edge technology and the latest bioscientific thinking, we grow high-demand plants of exceptional quality at an unrivalled scale. In a 60 acre, low-carbon glasshouse, our award-winning cultivation experts use innovative robotic and AI technology to grow over 70 million plants a year.

Name: Texas A&M University Department of Horticultural Sciences
Description:
Horticulture encompasses a unique blend of art, science, and technology. The Texas A&M Department of Horticultural Sciences offers two undergraduate and three graduate degrees that prepare students for a myriad of diverse career opportunities.

Our mission is to:

Prepare students for careers with a broad base of horticultural knowledge;
Develop research-based knowledge for efficient and profitable horticultural production
Improve the competitive position of the Texas horticultural industry
Increase the quality, variety, and availability of horticultural products
Deliver research-based knowledge about the ways horticulture improves our environment and serves as a source of personal enjoyment.

Name: GreenTech Azerbaijan
Description: GreenTech LLC is an innovative modern greenhouse, which started its activity in 2011. Our company is the leading provider of local and foreign markets for the production of various vegetable products. Greentech LLC consists of the glass modern greenhouse, open field, and nursery greenhouse. Smart complex carries its activity based on innovative technologies, the regulations of microclimate and irrigation is the remote-control system.

Name: Rijk Zwaan Nederland B.V.
Description:
Rijk Zwaan Nederland B.V.
Rijk Zwaan Nederland is het Nederlandse verkoopbedrijf van Rijk Zwaan: een internationaal groenteveredelingsbedrijf met ruim 3800 medewerkers in 30 verschillende landen (www.rijkzwaan.com/nl). We zijn gevestigd in het hoofdkantoor in De Lier, waar ook alle internationale activiteiten worden aangestuurd. Bij onze verkoopactiviteiten maken we dan ook optimaal gebruik van de kennis en het netwerk van de Rijk Zwaan groep. Tegelijkertijd hanteren we een lokale aanpak en spelen we in op typisch Nederlandse teelt- en marktomstandigheden.

Name: Kiwi Crunch
Description:
Kiwi Crunch is a global pipfruit business and manages supply programmes for some of the world’s most reputable apple and pear varieties produced in New Zealand. The company’s operations span across orchards, exports, post-harvest and packing. 

The company employs 830 staff annually, 130 of whom are permanent. Amongst other varieties, Kiwi Crunch grows, packs and exports seven proprietary varieties: Dazzle, Diva, Honeybelle, Kanzi, Kiku, Piqaboo  and Angelys.

The company has two modern packing facilities, three large coolstore facilities and exports close to 30,000 tonnes of fruit to more than 27 countries each year.

Name: Tuinbouw Jongeren Westland
Description:
Tuinbouw Jongeren Westland (TJW) is een netwerk voor jongeren van 16 tot 35 jaar die werkzaam zijn in de glastuinbouwsector. Een bruisende vereniging van meer dan 300 leden die maandelijks een interessante bijeenkomst organiseert voor haar leden. Dat zijn zowel (potentiële) glastuinbouwondernemers als werknemers die werken voor aanverwante bedrijven zoals banken, exporteurs, makelaars en toeleveranciers. TJW heeft een twaalfkoppig bestuur waarin vertegenwoordigers van glastuinbouwondernemers en aanverwante bedrijven voor een gezonde balans zorgen.

Doel
TJW wil hét kennisplatform zijn voor de jongste generatie die werkzaam is in en rond de Westlandse tuinbouw. Door excursies naar mooie bedrijven te organiseren kunnen leden op een ongedwongen manier het netwerk vergroten en kennis uitwisselen.  Dat kan een glastuinbouwbedrijf zijn, maar ook een toeleverancier met een grote activiteit in de tuinbouw. De insteek is echter altijd hetzelfde; het interessante combineren met het gezellige. Iedere ledenavond wordt dan ook afgesloten met een borrel, om na te praten en contacten te leggen. Op die manier voelt iedereen zich welkom bij TJW om op een ongedwongen manier mee te denken aan een vruchtbare en bloeiende toekomst. Door de jaren is TJW gegroeid tot een club die weet wat er speelt binnen de tuinbouw. Het maakt TJW een belangenbehartiger voor overheden en maatschappij.

Name: Houweling Americas
Description: We provide greenhouse growers with products to enhance their growing; specializing in Ultrasonic transmitter water treatment, hygiene products, coir substrates, fertilizers, and LED Lighting. Proud partners of Intracare, Dutch Plantin, Ultramins and Signify!

Name: ProJoules
Description:
ProJoules is a powerful, easy-to-use online tool that helps growers shift from reactive to proactive growing. Even before planting, gain clear insights into: plant load, energy needs, production forecasts.

ProJoules uses model-based calculations, developed by a grower with years of hands-on experience, combined with scientific and mathematical expertise. We don’t rely on self-learning formulas—we design them to ensure accuracy and reliability, tailored to real greenhouse challenges.

 Get in touch: info@projoules.com

Name: Agranom
Description:
Agranom specializes in horticulture lettuce and herb projects, offering a unique combination of hands-on expertise and strategic guidance. From the early stages of the concept development up to daily operations, our goal is to ensure that your project meets the highest industry standards by implementing the right expertise and technologies securing long-term success by focusing on product quality and ROI.

Among others, we support growers, suppliers and investors by delivering the following services:

• Cultivation support on-site & on distance
• Tailor-made project management support from “A to Z”
• Assessment of existing facilities for yield & operational improvements 
• Training & workshop on critical cultivation, technical & market related aspects

Find out more about our 7 step approach: www.agranom.nl
Get in contact: denis.laci@agranom.nl

Name: Seed Co Vegetables Zim
Description: Vegetable seed solutions provider, influencing the horticulture industry, making the farmer’s profit story a success!

Name: HortiPeMS
Description:
HortiPeMS is a reliable software program which makes Integrated Pest Control (IPM Pest Control) easier through a pest record keeping template. This crop management tool is a must-have resource for greenhouses, nurseries, farms and any other industry needing to follow the EPA Restricted Use Pesticides requirements and overall crop management. 

Pesticide Record Keeping Features
Quickly find pesticide labels
Save & manage all your pesticide applications
See (past) applications & REI's
Automatically generate EPA approved reports
Always have an up-to-date inventory, and get alerts when you run low
Find good solutions to your pest problem in minutes

Integrated Pest Control & Crop Management
Managing the health of your plants and adhering to pesticide use regulations no longer has to be a daunting task. Our software simplifies these processes and streamlines the tracking of restricted use pesticides, ensuring the well-being of your plants and the environment.

Name: Eco Organic Fertilizer
Description:
Eco Organic Fertilizer - Your Green Gardening Partner

Welcome to Eco Organic Fertilizer, your trusted source for premium Organic Fertilizers in Pune, Maharashtra!

At Eco Organic Fertilizer, we are passionate about sustainable gardening and providing high quality products to nurture your plants naturally. Our organic fertilizer are crafted to enrich the soil, promote healthy growth, and enhance the  vitality of your garden.

Why choose us ?
* Premium Organic ingredients
* Environmentally Friendly solutions
* Locally sourced and produced
* Committed to sustainability and eco-conscious practices.

Name: Plants & Plants Group
Description:
Plants & Plants Group is a leading horticulture company in Sri Lanka. Started in 2008. we are a professional and an ethical organisation that has expanded to cover products and services across multiple areas in horticulture products and services sector. Our current business operations include garden centres, plant nurseries, and landscaping and interiorscaping projects.

Our vision is:
“to be the leading total solutions company for plants by operating at the highest levels of innovation, quality, integrity and sustainability”.

And our mission is: 
“to enable our customers irrespective of space, location or lifestyle, to enjoy the wonders of plants and to realise the unique benefits they bring to us and to the wider environment".

At Plants & Plants we are passionate team committed to delivering on our mission with innovation and superior quality while operating at the highest levels of corporate integrity and environmental sustainability. Since 2008, we have steadily grown to a team of more than 70 full time staff operating from multiple locations in and out of Colombo.

Our stores are conveniently located to cater to some of the most sought-after residential and commercial addresses in Colombo and the suburbs. Our flagship store, the 3.5-acre Plants & Plants Supercentre, is the largest garden centre in Colombo. With 25 acres of purpose-built nursery space in the Western province of Sri Lanka, we can offer a wide range of high-quality house plants, trees, and shrubs suitable for all types of landscaping projects and in large quantities without compromising on quality. In addition to our own sizeable inhouse production capabilities, we work with an extensive network of out-growers, partner nurseries and suppliers across the country to offer a reliable and a single supplier solution for a wide range of trees and shrubs for a project of any size.

Name: Premier Plant Producers Ltd.
Description:
Premier Plant Producers Ltd. is an independent family business established in 1949 by Joh Overvoorde after coming from Holland to settle in East Yorkshire. It is now run by his son, Peter, and his grandson, Will, who are the 5th and 6th generation of the Overvoorde family in horticulture. Using 18 acres of modern heated greenhouses in combination with a further 10 acres of outdoor hardening-off areas, Premier Plant Producers Ltd. specialises in young plant propagation including Cell-grown tree and hedging, salads and brassicas in a range of tray styles and sizes from pressed peat blocks to loose filled modules.

Premier Plant Producers Ltd. provide a complete efficient growing service designed around the needs of customers. Using the latest techniques in plant production to ensure high quality and full traceability throughout, produce is delivered by our own transport fleet to the customer ready to plant.

Name: Thermeleon
Description: Thermeleon envisions climate neutral horticulture. We offer a Heat Battery tailored for high-tech greenhouses. It supplies sustainable heating and cooling – and thereby reducing the natural gas demand. As a result, both the gas costs and CO2 emissions are reduced significantly.

Name: Quantified Sensor Technology
Description: Reduce the consumption of water, nutriënts, energy and crop protection agents with wireless distributed sensors. All data connected to the climate computer or platform of your choice.

Name: Pipp Horticulture International
Description: Pipp Horticulture provides effective space-saving mobile vertical racking & in-rack airflow solutions to international growers looking to double and even triple their indoor canopy space. With our use of corrosion-resistant materials, ADA and seismically approved track & and anchoring system, integrated grow trays, in-rack airflow system and speedy delivery times at pricing levels near 50% less than other providers, Pipp Horticulture is well positioned to help you increase your yield and reduce your operating costs. Pipp Horticulture = growth, efficiency, savings, safety and service!

Name: Griffioen Wassenaar BV Perennial Nursery
Description:
Griffioen Wassenaar is an innovative supplier of perennials.
Millions of perennials are cultivated annually at our nurseries in Boskoop and Reeuwijk.

We virtually always deliver our perennials in the familiar blue, silver taupe and green 11 cm square pots. This size is 50% larger than the traditional 9 cm pots, guaranteeing a consistently high quality product  throughout the spring and summer months. 

For more information, visit our website at www.griffioenwassenaar.nl
There you can also find more information about our public green spaces concepts GreentoColour and Living Lanscape, our Griffioen Academy, and other solutions for the public green spaces.

Name: ALUVANA
Description: Aluvana was founded on quality and taste. Our mission is to source, process and distribute Kenyan avocado conforming to the highest international standard. Kenyan avocado to the world!

Name: FOTONIQ
Description:
Our PAR+ coating makes glass greenhouses more profitable, efficient, and sustainable. 
FOTONIQ develops and produces spray coatings for existing and new glass greenhouses. 
The current PAR+ coating is sustainable and has light enhancing properties adding value in all seasons, increasing crop yield by at least 6% annually for 8 years!  
With PAR+, you can generate up to €200k profit per hectare greenhouse.

Name: Growa
Description:
Growa is an app-controlled, automated, indoor grow cabinet for year-round, organic cultivation.

Constructed from sustainable materials, Growa's elegant design integrates seamlessly into any interior.

Individually handcrafted in the UK, Growa has a minimal carbon footprint and facilitates the growth of the highest quality, organic produce.

When you purchase your Growa you get access to ‘The Growa Method’, developed by experts, to ensure you attain all the fruits without the labour.

- Grow organic plants with maximum ease and highest yield.

- App-controlled, automated irrigation, lighting and fans.

- Odour free cultivation and integrated drying system.

- Low energy consumption.

- Secret locking mechanism to ensure security.

- Built in HD video camera for remote viewing.

- Environment monitor records temperature and humidity.

Name: Nini
Description:
Nini is a rose farm established in 1997 and became part of the Herburg Group in 2021. Nini is situated on the southern shore of Lake Naivasha. Nini is partnered together with Fairtrade, MPS, Global Gap, and the Kenya Flower Council.

Nini has a production area of 60 hectares. Our assortment currently has 17 varieties with a wide colour range. Nini exports an average of 125 million stems a year. A majority of the roses get exported to Europe and are mainly for the retail market.

Name: Deutsche Bundesgartenschau-Gesellschaft
Description:
Wir sind Profis für Gartenschauen

Integrierte Stadtentwicklung, grüne Regionalentwicklung, dem Klimawandel mit Grünflächen entgegen treten, neue Stadtquartiere erschließen: Das Expert*innen-Team der  Deutsche Bundesgartenschau-Gesellschaft mbH entscheidet über den Austragungsort einer BUGA oder IGA. Die DBG vergibt die Lizenzen zur Durchführung und gründet mit den Kommunen die Durchführungsgesellschaften, um gemeinsam erfolgreiche Gartenschauen zu organisieren.  Städte und Regionen bewerben sich bei uns. Wir beraten sie von der ersten Idee über die Planung und Umsetzung ihrer zukünftigen Gartenschau und neu entstehenden Grünflächen. Während einer BUGA oder IGA führen wir gärtnerische Ausstellungen und Veranstaltungen durch, außerdem unterstützen wir aktuelle und kommende Gartenschauen mit Presse- und Öffentlichkeitsarbeit.

Name: Horticulture Crop Protection Ltd
Description:
Horticulture Crop Protection Ltd (HCP) processes pesticide minor use applications (EAMUs) and emergency authorisation (EAs) applications on behalf of UK horticulture.

HCP operates on a ‘not for profit’ basis and is owned and funded by the crop associations. A small team at HCP team manages the EAMU and Emergency Authorisation approval process. This includes carrying out residue and efficacy trials to support applications where necessary.

Name: Thai Flora Plants Exports
Description: We specialize in exporting a diverse range of high-quality plants from Thailand to different parts of the world.

Name: IDCC Global Hydroponics
Description:
Vision and Mission of the Company

•	To develop current Traditional Agriculture system to Soilless Cultivation Technology (Hydroponics) in India.
 
•	To build New Agriculture Infrastructure.

•	To Educate and Train Agriculturist about this New Technology.

•	To save the country from shortage of Food in upcoming years.

•	To Save Water and Soil resources and use it wisely and get maximum of utilization from it.  

•	To help reduce the Cost of Cultivated Fruits, Vegetables and Herbs organically.

•	To Increase GDP and recover the losses and setbacks of COVID.

•	To Increase Right Employment.

Name: Koppert Nederland
Description:
Om onze wereld duurzamer te maken, hebben we teeltmethoden nodig die veilig en tegelijk gezond zijn. Wij geloven dat de natuur zelf oplossingen biedt voor deze landbouwkundige uitdagingen. Daarom werken we samen met de natuur. Zo helpen we onze aarde weer in balans te komen. Om dit te bereiken, zetten we natuurlijke vijanden in voor de bestrijding van plagen, hommels voor natuurlijke bestuiving en gebruiken we microbials en biostimulanten voor de ondersteuning, bescherming en versterking van gewassen. Daarmee verbeteren we de gezondheid van planten zowel boven als onder de grond.

Ons bedrijf werd opgericht in 1967 door Jan Koppert, een Nederlandse teler met een heldere visie: de wereld heeft behoefte aan een alternatief voor chemische bestrijdingsmiddelen. Hij was de eerste die een natuurlijke oplossing vond voor de bestrijding van de plaag in zijn gewas. Met zijn ontdekking bracht hij een grote transformatie op gang richting duurzame landbouw.

Al meer dan vijftig jaar zijn wij een aanjager van innovatieve landbouw en onze inspanningen hebben impact. Telers en boeren wereldwijd passen onze producten en kennis toe om het natuurlijke evenwicht in hun gewassen te herstellen. Daarmee verbeteren ze de gezondheid, weerbaarheid en opbrengst van hun gewassen.

Samen voldoen we aan de hoogste voedselveiligheidseisen op weg naar ons ultieme doel: 100% duurzame landbouw.

Een duidelijk doel dat we als afzonderlijk bedrijf niet kunnen bereiken. Daarom werken we samen met telers, partners, universiteiten, onderzoekscentra en overheidsinstellingen wereldwijd. Samen leveren we een bijdrage aan een betere gezondheid van mens en aarde. Laten we dan ook in de toekomst verdergaan als partner van de natuur.

Name: All-America Selections
Description: All-America Selections is an independent non-profit organization that tests new, never-before-sold varieties for the home gardener. After a full season of anonymous trialing by volunteer horticulture professionals, only the top garden performers are given the AAS Winner award designation for their superior performance.

Name: RIOCOCO
Description:
RIOCOCO is a leading supplier of 100% organic, natural, premium quality coconut coir substrates for cultivation and ecological restoration solutions, with 20 years of experience. 

Our coco coir mixes are made from high-quality coconut coir fiber from coconuts grown in a nutrient-rich region of Sri Lanka. 

We partner with world-class greenhouses around the globe to drive the development of next-generation coir-growing media mixes through our research and development programs. 

Our goal is to lead the coir industry towards a new era of 100% organic, clean, and sustainable cultivation solutions.

Name: Seiont Nurseries LTD
Description:
Seiont Nurseries was established in 1978 and became LTD in December 2015 after being bought by Lovania Nurseries LTD.
It is now a well known wholesale plug and liner producer of hardy ornamental nursery stock in plugs and liners.
Annual production exceeds 850000 Liners and 400000 plugs.
New and unusual varieties are our speciality and we ship across the UK and Europe on a weekly delivery service

Name: Chaperone
Description:
Chaperone is Delhi-NCR’s locally sown and locally grown plant care brand for everything related to gardening. While everyone thinks about online marketplaces for indoor plants, planters and gardening equipment, and stops there, the Chaperone team thinks beyond the purchase and delivery of plants. 
Chaperone is a team consisting of driven youngsters who believe that plants are companions (hence the name - Chaperone). 
To care for a companion you will need expert advice, the right resources and professional care. 

Chaperone is your one-stop destination for online plant buying, plant-care accessories, plant sitting (plant day care), plant rental and (gardener) maali booking services.

Name: The Horti House
Description: We're on a mission to transform houseplant wholesale by creating a one stop shop for businesses.  From plants, pots, CITES products, sales support and business insight, we offer the most sustainable and profitable solution designed for the British market with a focus on British growers and peat free plants where possible.

Name: Due Diligence Horticulture
Description:
About DDH | Due Diligence Horticulture
We are the trusted partner for investors, receivers, lenders, and operators in the cultivation industry.

Due Diligence Horticulture (DDH) specializes in protecting capital, restructuring distressed cultivation businesses, and driving operational success for cannabis, ornamental, cut flower, vine crop and vertical farming production systems worldwide.

We step in when operations are failing, cash flow is negative, or the business is ready for a jumpstart in innovation, research and product development. Our team of experts—including horticultural scientists, financial analysts, operational strategists, and production managers—brings decades of commercial plant production and turnaround experience.

Business Turnarounds & Restructuring

Production & Yield Optimization
Financial Modeling & Forecasting
CapEx/OpEx Strategy & Vendor Financing
Receivership & Bankruptcy Support
M&A Advisory for Distressed Assets
R&D, SOP Development & Technical Training

DDH combines advanced horticultural science, proven commercial production practices, and operational rigor to stabilize and transform distressed assets and bring science to the forefront of businesses ready for the next level.

We serve clients in the U.S., Canada, Europe, and Australia—delivering performance-based partnerships where we only win when our clients succeed.

Who We Work With:
Debt Lenders
Private Equity & Family Offices
Receivers & Legal Professionals
Cultivation Operators & MSOs
Equipment & Infrastructure Vendors

“We don’t just consult—we operate, execute, and deliver results.”

Reach out for a call to discuss your business goals. 

 Learn more at: https://www.ddhort.com/
 Inquiries: info@ddhort.com

Name: BioTherm Solutions

With over 44 years of unparalleled experience, BioTherm has been at the forefront of revolutionizing greenhouse climate technology. Our mission is to empower growers to craft their own ideal weather, fostering the perfect ecosystem for plants to thrive.

Description:
Our mission is to create the worlds best kiwifruit orchards. This serves our purpose of enhancing our team, customers, shareholders, and community.

Our expertise covers the entire life-cycle of an orchard – from choosing the right land, to developing and managing a top producing asset.

We strive to live our values: Excellence, Integrity, Teamwork, Relationships, Attitude

Name: Waterside
Description:
We are a licensed medicinal cannabis cultivation facility based in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Our high-tech Total Controlled Environment Agriculture (TCEA) facility is now fully operational and actively cultivating medical-grade cannabis for the UK market.

With approvals from the Home Office and MHRA, we are scaling production in partnership with strategic stakeholders. Our environmentally sustainable approach combines advanced climate control, precision agriculture, and AI technologies to consistently deliver reliable, high-quality products to meet the needs of the UK’s heavily import-reliant medicinal cannabis market.

Our mission is to deliver safe, efficacious, and affordable medicine that transforms the lives of millions of people. We are committed to responsible cultivation, regulatory excellence, and providing a consistent, trustworthy supply of medicinal cannabis for patients and healthcare providers across the UK.

Name: Ronico
Description:
Ronico is hét toonaangevende tulpenmerk wereldwijd. Sinds 1939 voorzien wij als familiebedrijf de hele wereld van tulpen van ongeëvenaarde kwaliteit. Ons toegewijde team werkt vanuit ultramoderne faciliteiten, waar we elk seizoen tulpenbollen en tulpenbloemen nog efficiënter, duurzamer en klantgerichter telen en verwerken dan het jaar ervoor. Dit alles met als doel om zoveel mogelijk mensen wereldwijd op te vrolijken met de schoonheid van tulpen.

Ronico is the world's leading tulip brand. Since 1939, we have been a family-owned business dedicated to providing unparalleled quality tulips to customers around the globe. Our committed team operates from state-of-the-art facilities, where each season we cultivate and process tulip bulbs and flowers with increased efficiency, sustainability, and customer focus compared to the previous year. Our mission is to brighten the lives of as many people as possible worldwide with the beauty of tulips.

Name: Colere Equipment
Description:
Colere Equipment was born in a grow room, not a boardroom. Its founders, lifelong cultivators, saw first-hand how confusing and costly it had become to build a successful grow operation. They faced the same hurdles many growers do: slick salespeople pushing expensive gear with little guidance, an avalanche of product choices with no clear answers, and big companies that didn’t understand the heart of growing. Tired of the complexity and elitism, they decided to cultivate a better way.

At Colere, we believe growing should be accessible to all – whether you’re a cannabis craft grower perfecting your next strain, or a produce farmer bringing sustainable greens to your community. This belief drives everything we do. We cut through the noise and hype to empower the grower. From day one, our mission has been simple: provide the best tools and knowledge, at the best prices, to help fellow growers thrive.

Name: Waterside Pharmaceuticals
Description:
We are a licensed medicinal cannabis cultivation facility based in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Our high-tech Total Controlled Environment Agriculture (TCEA) facility is now fully operational and actively cultivating medical-grade cannabis for the UK market.

With approvals from the Home Office and MHRA, we are scaling production in partnership with strategic stakeholders. Our environmentally sustainable approach combines advanced climate control, precision agriculture, and AI technologies to consistently deliver reliable, high-quality products to meet the needs of the UK’s heavily import-reliant medicinal cannabis market.

Our mission is to deliver safe, efficacious, and affordable medicine that transforms the lives of millions of people. We are committed to responsible cultivation, regulatory excellence, and providing a consistent, trustworthy supply of medicinal cannabis for patients and healthcare providers across the UK.

Name: JumpLights, Inc.
Description: JumpLights Inc. is a Maryland based LED Grow Light technology company that doesn't compromise crop yield and quality. We provide better light intensity and controlled spectrum for both the Vegetation and Flowering stages.

Name: Colere Equipment
Description:
Colere is a distributor of indoor and greenhouse cultivation equipment, proudly serving North American growers in the cannabis and general agriculture industries.
Founded by experienced cultivators, our mission is to make professional-grade growing tools accessible, affordable, and easy to understand. We believe that every grower— regardless of scale or experience—deserves straightforward guidance, fair pricing, and gear that’s proven to perform.
From vertical racking and LED lighting to dehumidification and layout consulting, we
simplify the process so our customers can focus on what they do best: growing.

Name: The Turf Doctor
Description:
We want everyone to make the best investments in at-home lawn care solutions in the UK.

At The Turf Doctor, we recognize that the lawn care industry is saturated with products. Unfortunately, around 75% of these are likely unsuitable for you – whether due to price, design, quality, or intended purpose.

Our mission is to help you find the very best products and solutions to address your home lawn care needs.

As an Amazon Associate, we earn from qualifying purchases made via our links.

Name: Wishfy Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Wishfy Technologies is a manufacturer and integrated service provider delivering advanced solutions in Biotechnology, Tissue Culture, Planting Material, Floriculture, Greenhouses, Integrated Packhouses, Berry Farming, Organic Adoption & Certification, Skill Development, and Agri-Tech/IT Solutions.

Our team of industry specialists in agriculture, biotechnology, horticulture, protected cultivation, and information technology combines cutting-edge research, smart automation, and digital design to create high-performance, sustainable ecosystems.

From intelligent greenhouse management to tech-enabled planting systems, we empower farmers, businesses, and urban developers to achieve greater productivity, efficiency, and environmental impact.
Additionally, we offer a diverse collection of plants and personalized gardening services to bring green innovation into everyday spaces.

Name: Hortus Loci Ltd
Description:
Hortus Loci is an award-winning wholesale plant nursery, supplying an unrivalled range of high-quality plants to landscape architects, garden designers and prestigious events since 2011. 

We supply a wide range of perennials, shrubs, trees and hedging from our site in North Hampshire, and our highly experienced staff work closely with clients to provide the most comprehensive service in the business.

We're exceptionally proud to have provided hundreds of thousands of plants for hundreds of show gardens at the RHS Chelsea Flower Show. On top of this, we also supply many RHS shows and prestigious events across the UK and Europe, including the Venice Biennale and the London Design Festival.

Name: Mikskaar
Description:
Mikskaar is an Estonian family company and one of the largest substrate producers in our country. The main goal of our existence is to be able to serve any grower anywhere in the world with the best substrate to make the plants grow. 

Mikskaar has provided growers with products for 30 years already. 
Our peat fields are well-chosen and cared for, far from any pollutants and weed-free. All peat fields are of substantial size and depth, located in Estonia. The factories are in Estonia, all well equipped for the production of high-quality substrates. 

All the installations are constantly tuned, improved and renewed. 
Diversity and flexibility are beneficial, we always aim to meet the needs and wishes of our customers and implement modifications if necessary. 

Mikskaar has been a member of the German quality control Gütegemeinschaft Substrate since 2001, the RAL quality sign assures the user that the product is reliable and that it has been analyzed according to the agreed and accepted norms.

Name: Easy Big Trees - Quality Advanced Grade Trees
Description:
Easy Big Trees is a 4th generation family business. For over 100 years we’ve been planting, nursing and growing some of the very best trees and shrubs in New Zealand. That’s more than a few hot summers and harsh winters. It’s this experience which has led us to become the largest big tree supplier in the South Island and today our nursery extends over 30 acres of Southland soil, where we have over 100,000 plants ready to be delivered to any corner of New Zealand.

Call us on 0508 215 215 or email sales@easybigtrees.co.nz. View our extensive range at www.easybigtrees.co.nz

Name: Nolina Kwekerijen B.V.
Description:
Nolina is een hecht familiebedrijf dat in 1966 met liefde voor het vak is opgericht in Woubrugge (Nederland, provincie Zuid-Holland) door de gebroeders De Lange. Tegenwoordig wordt het bedrijf opnieuw geleid door twee broers: Marcel en Steef de Lange. De eerst geteelde producten waren anjers en in 1975 is Nolina overgegaan op de teelt van (bloeiende) potplanten voor binnen- en buitenshuis. In 1990 zijn we voor het eerste begonnen met het telen van potrozen en in 1994 met tuinrozen. De Nolina kwekerij is sinds 1990 sterk gegroeid van 1 - tot 20 hectare oppervlakte, waarvan 9 hectare onder glas.
Missie: Growing for future generations
Ontwikkeling en groei zie je terug in onze planten, maar ook in onze collega's en klanten. Om goed te kunnen groeien zijn sterke wortels en goede grond van vitaal belang. We stoppen dan ook onze energie in een gedegen fundament en de intrinsieke kracht van onze planten en mensen. Dit resulteert in de groei en bloei van onze producten, collega's en klanten.
Bij Nolina blijven we innoveren en zijn we continu op zoek naar verbeteringen in kwaliteit en service. We gaan niet voor korte termijn successen, maar investeren juist in de lange termijn. Door goed te luisteren naar onze klanten en onze medewerkers en continu te anticiperen op nieuwe ontwikkelingen staan we samen sterk voor een duurzame toekomst!
 Passion for people, passion for plants
# passion for growth
# passion for presentation & education
# passion for inspiration
Nolina | kwekers met passie
Nolina Kwekerijen is een familiebedrijf dat elke dag vol passie werkt aan kwalitatief hoogwaardige rozen voor uw huis en tuin. Ons streven is om u nog langer en intenser te laten genieten van de roos - de 'koningin der bloemen. Dat doen we samen! Samen met onze ketenpartners en samen met u. We delen onze passie, kennis en ervaring dan ook graag met u.

Name: Takura
Description:
Takura is a thriving social enterprise committed to improving the livelihoods of rural communities through sustainable, market-driven horticulture. Evolving from a social development program funded by Anglo American and implemented by TechnoServe in 2020, Takura has transformed into a dynamic and impactful company, officially registered in 2024.

Nestled on a 15-hectare site with a scenic natural landscape, Takura’s state-of-the-art packhouse is at the heart of its operations. Completed in 2024, the facility can accommodate up to 200 employees and ensures efficient handling and export of high-quality crops, including sugar snap peas, fine French beans, baby sweet corn, bird's eye chilies, and rock melons. With GLOBALGAP-certified production and Sedex registration, Takura meets international standards of quality, safety, and sustainability.

Name: Afrex Gold Limited
Description:
Founded in 2000, Afrex Gold Limited was established in response to the increasing global demand for premium fruits and vegetables from East Africa.

Since our inception, we have built strong, long-term supply agreements with customers across Europe and the Gulf Region, delivering substantial volumes of high-quality fresh produce each year.

Our primary focus is on avocado production, complemented by a diverse range of sustainably sourced fruits and vegetables processed at our modern facility in Thika, Kenya. We maintain the highest standards through rigorous quality checks.

We take pride in our skilled workforce, all of whom are highly trained and compliant with food safety certification standards, reinforcing our commitment to quality and sustainability in every aspect of our operations.

Name: Hollandse Hoogtes
Description:
Hollandse Hoogtes is één van de 10 telers binnen het Experiment Gesloten Coffeeshopketen. 

Met Hollandse Hoogtes schudden we - legaal! - de cannabis business op. We zetten de Nederlandse cannabiscultuur terug op de wereldkaart. 

Traditie, vakmanschap en hi-techproductie ontmoeten elkaar in de allerbeste wiet, edibles en andere producten. 

We omarmen het verleden en bouwen aan een nog mooiere toekomst.

Name: Quick Plug
Description:
Quick Plug is a global company committed to providing growers with innovative, sustainable solutions to give their plants the strongest start possible.

Our customers are primarily commercial growers, young plant producers, tissue culture propagators or wholesalers. Our products are designed to reduce labor, boost root development and to increase germination rates. We like to work with our customers from A (the challenge) to Z (the solution), and we are committed to adding value to companies and products.

Our entire team is here to help customers succeed in their growing goals, regardless of the system you’re using or the type of plants you grow. We’re industry experts, and we’re here to help find or create the best substrate for your operation.

FlexiPlugs are a soil-less growing media often called "Grow plugs" and are widely used in commercial aquaponic  and hydroponic farming. FlexiPlugs also have applications with forestry where mechanized processes are used. 

FlexiTrays are also a soil-less growing medium but come inside of a propagation tray inside of an individual "Grow plug". FlexiTrays are widely used in aquaponics, hydroponics, floriculture, horticulture, and forestry.

Name: HCTS
Description:
Wij combineren en installeren álle technieken en mogelijkheden op het gebied van water, elektro, licht en klimaat gericht op de tuinbouw van morgen. Wij zijn uw belangrijkste partner als het gaat om continuïteit, service en onderhoud zodat u actief kunt zijn met het produceren van de beste kwaliteit groente, bloemen of planten. 

Waarom? Omdat tuinbouwtechniek onze passie is en wij als geen ander kennis van complexe technische systemen hebben. Wij geloven in de kracht van technische vooruitgang en innovaties om onze sector nog slimmer, efficiënter en duurzamer te maken.

Name: Royal Brinkman UK
Description:
𝗕𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗺𝗮𝗻 𝗨𝗞 𝗟𝘁𝗱 is a horticultural supplier, installer, and consultant, focused on helping growers improve their yields through sustainable and innovative solutions. Established in 1974, Brinkman UK Ltd is part of 𝗥𝗼𝘆𝗮𝗹 𝗕𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗺𝗮𝗻, a global leader in horticulture since 1885. Royal Brinkman received the prestigious ‘Royal’ title in 1985 to celebrate its century of service to the horticultural industry.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘀
Brinkman UK Ltd provides a wide selection of horticultural products, designed to support the cultivation of vegetables, flowers, and potted plants. The range includes advanced irrigation systems, climate control technologies, growing media, and crop protection solutions. These products help growers optimize their production processes, making their operations more efficient and sustainable.

𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀
Brinkman UK Ltd offers sustainable services in water management, electrical systems, and climate control. Whether for new construction projects or renovations, the company provides expert consultation and technical assistance, helping clients design systems that are environmentally friendly and productive.

𝗛𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆
Brinkman UK Ltd’s roots trace back to Royal Brinkman, a company that began in the Netherlands in 1885. Initially a small business providing ropes for agricultural use, Royal Brinkman has grown into a leading global supplier in horticulture, with expertise in seven core areas: crop care, crop protection, packaging, mechanization, and more.

𝗖𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵
Brinkman UK Ltd takes a customer-focused approach, offering personalized solutions through local offices, dealers, and a convenient web-shop. The company’s efficient logistics ensure timely delivery, and a strong, team-driven service culture guarantees high-quality support for every grower.

With over 100 years of expertise and modern innovations, Brinkman UK Ltd is a reliable partner, helping growers succeed.

Name: H2Ortigator
Description: At H2Ortigator, we’re on a mission to help vineyard and orchard growers get the best out of every vine and tree — right from the roots. Our precision irrigation and root protection pod are built for New Zealand’s unique growing conditions, and designed to give young plants the best start possible.

Name: Queensland Berries
Description:
Established in 2003, Queensland Berries is Australia's largest privately owned and operated commercial strawberry, raspberry, blackberry and blueberry enterprise. We supply berries through Driscoll's Australia all year round. Our berries can be found in Coles, Woolworths, Aldi and Costco.

Queensland Berries has enjoyed continued expansion and growth over the past 18 years. The first crop consisted of a mere 150,000 strawberry plants that has now expanded to over 5 million plants. This represents the equivalent of approximately 15,000,000 strawberry punnets annually from our two growing sites.

In 2008, Queensland Berries introduced the first commercial production of rubus varieties in Queensland. The growing of raspberries soon diversified into the production of blackberries.

Our organisation is comprised of a diverse mix of nationalities, many of whom have been working with us for many years. In addition to our management division, we have a team of supervisors and group leaders who manage up to 500 highly motivated, multinational staff who grow, pick and pack the fruit. We offer employment 12 months of the year.

Compliance is paramount to our company. Queensland Berries is a Sedex and Fair Farms approved employer. Our staff have peace of mind that they are working for an Ethical Employer that is recognised and audited by an internationally recognised body.

Our three berry categories are a ‘ready to eat’ product so food safety and compliance is essential to our business. Food safety certification provides a framework to ensure our company adheres to best practice within our organisation. It also offers our consumers assurance and peace of mind that the fruit they are eating is safe to consume.

Producing a safe, quality product requires consistent management and training of our staff and external suppliers. Food safety compliance provides buyer satisfaction that their product is compliant and within regulations with current Australian health practices.

Name: Vairom Crop Science
Description: We aim to develop superior vegetable hybrids with climate resilience.

Name: FitzGerald Nurseries Ltd
Description: Producers of young plants of innovative varieties selling to professional nursery growers  in 38 countries.

Name: Greenmakers
Description:
Wil jij je klanten voorzien van de beste en meest duurzame groene daken? 
Dan is Greenmakers jouw ideale partner. Onze complete en innovatieve groendaksystemen met sedum, grassen en kruiden zijn geschikt voor alle type daken. Groot, klein, plat, hellend of golvend.

Wil je meer weten over ons bedrijf, onze producten en de manier waarop wij omgaan met duurzaamheid en circulariteit ? Bel ons. We gaan graag met je in gesprek.

Name: Borst Bloembollen
Description: Bij ons vind je de meest nieuwe exclusieve tulpen en cultivars. Wij produceren en verwerken 165 hectare tulpen. Ook leveren we kwalitatief zeer goede pioenen en pioenstekken door ons oog voor kwaliteit.

Name: Leen Middelburg Chrysanten
Description: In ons familiebedrijf werken wij samen aan het toekomstbestendig telen van de mooiste en beste chrysanten voor het creëren van dagelijkse geluksmomenten voor consumenten’

Name: Indian Group of Nurseries and Gardens
Description:
Indian Group of Nurseries and Gardens is a wholesale Plant & Nursery in Saharanpur provides best quality of plant for your Farms & gardens. A wide range of plants in all sizes from small to biggest with a variety of 500+ plants and available throughout the year. We deal in wholesale for Farms & Gardens with the expertise in horticulture. We are passionate horticulturists that offers variety of growing plants in bulk and wholesale to garden owners, Industries, Farm Owners, Institutions and Government Agencies, Farmers with bulk availability with the best quality of plants to all over India. 

Indian Group of Nurseries and Gardens stablished in 1998 Chilkana Road, Chilkana, Saharanpur – 247231 and a leading supplier of nursery products such as fruit plants, Flower Plants, indoor plants and outdoor plants etc. we have expanded our product range from Majiya, White Narmi, Cheed Tree, Champa Tree, Fonis Paam, Dracaena Tree, Washingtonia Tree, Tarmelia Tree, Laila Majnu Tree, Kono Karpas Tree, Washingtonia Tree, Koper Tree, Aari/ Areca Palm Tree, Dwarf Chandni Plant, Gudhal Tree, Amla Tree, Acalypha Tree, Pili (Yellow) Double Chandni Tree, Alstonia Tree, Golden Tapori Plant, Kajorina Tapori, Copper Tapori Plant, Bottle Palm Plant (Hyophorbe Lagenicaulis), Juniparus Tree, Maalpeerya Treeto and many more for of our customers with a quality, and unrivaled customer service.

Name: Fair Farms
Description: Fair Farms is the only Australian social compliance training and certification program that deals exclusively with workplace laws and regulations in the horticulture industry.

Name: Royal Pride Group
Description: As one of Europe’s leading greenhouse companies, Royal Pride specializes in producing and packing a wide range of flavorful tomato and premium cucumber varieties. We lead the industry in performance and innovation, committed to delivering exceptional taste while continuously investing in sustainable, energy-efficient technologies for a greener future.

Name: SchermNed scherminstallaties & insectengaas
Description:
SchermNed bestaat sinds 1990 en heeft zich vergaand gespecialiseerd in scherm- en zonweringsystemen in de breedst mogelijke zin. Klimaatbeheersing, energiebesparing of lichtregulering: SchermNed heeft voor elk doel een passend systeem. Onze focus licht vooral op twee sectoren namelijk de tuinbouw en utiliteitsbouw.

Wij leveren Turnkey projecten: tijdens de bouw nemen we de complete zonwering van begin tot einde voor onze rekening. We zijn gespecialiseerd in duurzame en geavanceerde zonwering voor bijzondere situaties, zoals grote systemen voor lichtkoepels of atriums, die in de utiliteitsbouw vaak voorkomen. Onze kennis van geveltechnieken in de tuinbouw is daarbij een extra plus. Van eenvoudige screens voor binnen- of buitenzonwering tot computergestuurde schaduw- en zonweringsystemen van grote lichtstraten: SchermNed heeft het in huis!

SchermNed realiseert vooral projecten in Nederland maar ook in Europa en daarbuiten. We werken voor bouwbedrijven, architecten, projectontwikkelaars en overheidsinstellingen zoals scholen, musea en zorginstellingen en vooral ook de Tuinbouw. SchermNed heeft ruim vijftig medewerkers en is VCA-gecertificeerd. Onze sterke punten zijn:

Kwaliteit: we zijn innovatief, specialistisch en betrouwbaar
Snelheid: we zijn slagvaardig dankzij een groot machinepark en brede ervaring
Service: we bieden continuïteit door onderhoudscontracten en ons goed opgeleide personeel is zeer klantgericht

Name: Sturon Nursery Inc
Description:
Since 1993, Sturon Nursery Inc. has been servicing independent garden centers, wholesalers, interior/exterior landscapers, brokers, and developers. We provide over thirty acres of top quality foliage and blooming beauties. Our production team start with the very best cuttings and liners to grow more than 200 plant varieties to meet all your plant container needs from 6” interior/exterior foliage to 24” palms. If we don’t grow what you’re looking for, we offer a brokerage consolidation service to satisfy your needs completely.
In November 2020, Sturon Nursery Inc. has been acquired by Ismel Vera who also owns Vera’s Nursery Inc. Our inventory has expanded since the affiliation with Vera’s Nursery Inc. and we continue to be one of the finest growing and shipping facilities in South Florida with our own fleet of trucks. We have been instrumental in helping many of our customers receive national recognition and awards for their interior and exterior landscape jobs. Our knowledgeable staff offers the most pleasurable buying experience in the industry and values are strived to reflect in each client interaction. Please stop by for a tour of our inventory and see why so many garden centers, landscapers, and wholesale florists rely on us for their plant needs.

Name: The Big Green Plant Centre
Description:
We are a wholesale plant nursery, based near Uxbridge and serving trade professionals throughout London and the South East.

We supply to all aspects of the horticultural trade, landscape and amenity sectors, including garden designers, landscape contractors, landscape architects, schools, local authorities, professional gardeners and project developers.

We can supply over 4,000 plants from 400 nurseries through our On Line Plant Market – all your plant needs in one place, delivered twice a week to site or our nursery.  We also stock hedging, amenity plants and specimen stock on site.

We are green in nature as well as in name with our own native hedging, recycled materials use and self-sufficient heat generation.

Our 3-acre site in Denham is conveniently placed for access to London, the M40, M25 and M4.

Name: Oostland Company
Description:
Oostland Company  is gespecialiseerd in de teelt en handel van paprika’s. Het bedrijf teelt op meerdere locaties in regio Oostland zowel rode, groene als gele paprika’s en kan tevens oranje paprika’s leveren. Teun, Eléonore en Lennert Hendriks vormen als vierde generatie de directie van het familiebedrijf. 

Het bedrijf beschikt over meerdere teeltlocaties, die elk hun eigen locatiemanager hebben. Zij krijgen de vrijheid om hun vestiging naar eigen inzicht te organiseren, uiteraard in lijn met de algehele bedrijfsfilosofie. Alle locaties samen vormen een eenheid. Oostland Company bestaat uit een vaste kern van medewerkers. Afhankelijk van het seizoen en de drukte worden aanvullend uitzendkrachten ingehuurd. Onderscheid tussen vaste medewerkers en uitzendkrachten wordt niet gemaakt, iedereen binnen de organisatie is even waardevol. Op elke locatie wordt met een eigen team gewerkt, dat ook eigen verantwoordelijkheden heeft. Iedereen binnen het team speelt daarin een belangrijke rol. 

Oostland Company sorteert alle paprika’s zelf op de hoofdvestiging in Berkel en Rodenrijs, vervolgens worden deze eveneens op het eigen bedrijf verpakt. Dit kan in iedere gewenste verpakking en op maat worden verzorgd. Door de verkoop in eigen hand te houden, kan voor iedere klant maatwerk worden geleverd. De directe contacten met afnemers zorgen er bovendien voor dat de paprika’s elke dag gegarandeerd snel en vers kunnen worden geleverd. De ideale ligging nabij de snelwegen A4, A12 en A20 vormt een belangrijke logistieke meerwaarde om de producten snel op plaats van bestemming te krijgen.

Name: Stolze International
Description: Stolze is a specialist in the field of electrical and irrigation technology, grow light, automation and climate technology.

Name: Charter Seeds
Description: Charter Seeds, exclusive Starke Ayres agents for Zimbabwe have been operating for over 10 years. Charter Seeds supplies hybrid and open pollinated vegetable seed, flower seed and lawn seed with a specialized and dedicated service to our customers.

Name: Hortícolas Saturnino
Description:
As Hortícolas Saturnino são um negócio familiar surgido no final dos anos 80 do século XX.
Dedicada fundamentalmente à produção própria de cenouras, batatas e cebolas, tem hoje a capacidade para cumprir todas as etapas para levar o seu produto da terra até à mesa do consumidor.

Na sede em Alcochete, a sul do Tejo, valoriza-se a cor, o sabor e a vida útil do produto  sem nunca descurar naquela que é a base em que se assentam as  Hortícolas Saturnino: as boas práticas agrícolas. Em terrenos de solos arenosos e com abundância de água com qualidade para regar, nasce, cresce e colhe-se, este sabor tão familiar.

Name: IMPACT T&U - TKI Tuinbouw & Uitgangsmaterialen
Description: In TKI Tuinbouw & Uitgangsmaterialen (T&U) werken bedrijfsleven, kennisinstellingen en overheid met elkaar samen om innovatie in de sector te stimuleren.

Name: Compas Agro
Description:
Compas Agro gelooft in de agrarische sector en haar rol om de wereld voedselvraagstukken van de toekomst aan te pakken.

Compas Agro faciliteert ondernemers in de agrarische sector met:

1. Teeltadvies
2. Onderzoek
3. Opleiding

Name: BOAL Systems
Description:
BOAL Systems provides a comprehensive range of aluminum roof and sidewall systems for integration of high-tech glass, poly, foil, solar and sandwich panels. Since its establishment over 50 years ago, BOAL Systems has completed over 8,000 hectares of new greenhouses worldwide, constructed by various local and global greenhouse builders.

Its customized modular systems, which can include fully integrated solutions such as smart ventilation windows, insect netting, screening systems, solar panels and/or insulation panels, meet specific project requirements when it comes to size, complexity or regional challenges.

At the forefront of high-tech controlled environment agriculture (CEA) with a strong focus on partnership, engineering and innovation, BOAL Systems offers advanced greenhouse roofing solutions characterized by maximum light transmittance, enabling growers to achieve optimal yields with minimum resources.

Name: Holland Fyto
Description:
Holland Fyto is een nauw samenwerkende groep van 7 gelijkgestemde, door kennis gedreven toeleveranciers. We bedenken, ontwikkelen en bieden markt-en klantgerichte kwalitatief hoogwaardige en duurzame oplossingen voor telers. Dit resulteert in bodem-en gewasgezondheid met rendement.

Onze vernieuwde strategie legt de focus op vergroening. Het nieuwe Holland Fyto staat en gaat daarmee voor rentabiliteit, kwaliteit en duurzaamheid. 

Het streven en de ambitie daarbij is dat een GEZONDE BODEM en een VITALE PLANT resulteren in een RENDERENDE OOGST.

We willen het toonaangevende bedrijf zijn op het gebied van geïntegreerde teeltsystemen, gebaseerd op duurzame oplossingen en gericht op een gezonde bodem, een vitaal gewas en een renderende oogst.

Name: Gold Leaf Technologies Inc.
Description:
We are your growing partner. Our experienced team works with you to understand your goals and develop the right plan for your unique growing needs. We help growers be more efficient and consistent with LED lighting and sensor-based automation technology, and provide rebate expertise that saves money. 

We are a leading Canadian Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) ag-tech company with a wide network of partnerships for high quality LED lighting products, vertical farming equipment, and trusted sensor-based technology. With a focus on mutually-beneficial, long-term relationships, we’ve partnered with many of ag-tech’s best-in-class manufacturers, including Heliospectra, Thrive Agritech, Vertically Urban, Artechno, Sananbio, and Microclimates. These relationships empower us to customize solutions without compromise, so you know you are benefiting from the latest and greatest lighting and automation products on the market.

Areas of Expertise:

Vertical Farming — maximize space and maximize yields
Indoor Farm Planning and Design — make the most out of your space with thoughtful farm plans from our expert consultants
Agricultural LED Lighting — maximize yields with consistent lighting
Cannabis — lighting solutions tailored to cannabis grower’s specific needs
Automation — schedule, monitor, and optimize growth with an open source platform
Sensor Technology — sensors give you data you can trust to make decisions
Ag-Tech Research — empower researchers with the latest horticultural technology

Whether you’re looking for a fully customized plan for a new farm, or ready to retrofit your existing setup to become a more efficient grower, our team will support you in achieving your growing goals. 

Get in touch with us to discuss how we can become a growing partner you trust and rely on!

Name: Young Horties
Description:
There’s a fresh new buzz in the horticulture world, and it’s coming from a group of young people who are passionate about plants, produce, and people. Meet Young Horties—Australia’s first national network created specifically for all young people working across the horticulture supply chain. 

If you're under 40 and working in horticulture, now’s the time. Signing up gives you access to the group’s WhatsApp chat, email invites, webinars, and event invites. Just head to: https://tr.ee/bl84zdANG1 and follow @younghorties on LinkedIn and Instagram to stay in the loop.

Name: GREEN MORNING HORTICULTURE PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: GREEN MORNING HORTICULTURE PRIVATE LIMITED is a company based out of FLAT NO. 201, PLOT NO. 3, RISHAB RESIDENCY SAIPRIYA COLONY, DAMMAIGUDA, HYDERABAD, Telangana, India.

Name: The Valley Growers
Description:
Groei boven jezelf uit!
Producent van diverse vruchtgroentes. 
#waardoejijhetvoor

Name: Super Bloom | Plant Practice
Description:
Plant Practice | Living Beauty | Florific Biodiversity 

At Super Bloom, we are multi-disciplinary, plant practitioners and high skilled horticulturalists. We work across the plant spectrum, from major landscape and creative projects to supporting landscape practitioners and gardeners. We believe that teams make planting dreams and typically join design teams with landscape architects for innovative planting concept, design and care. 

See www.thesuperbloom.com for more.

We are educators and engagement specialists and can tailor plant professional development, training, consensus decision making and learning experiences for your teams and communities.

 

We describe Super Bloom as a  plant practice as we perceive gardens, landscapes and 'gardeners' as dynamic and progressive across time and the act of working with or tending plants as an active practice. 

Want to plant nerd? Contact us share a conversation about plants and possibilities hello@thesuperbloom.com.au

Name: Federatie Vruchtgroenteorganisaties (FVO)
Description:
FVO – Federatie Vruchtgroenteorganisaties - wordt gevormd door de vijf koplopers van Nederlandse glasgroente-telersverenigingen*. Het zijn de grootste telersverenigingen, met ruim 400 aangesloten groenteproducenten van Paprika, Aubergine, Courgette, Komkommer en Tomaat (vruchtgroenten genoemd).

Vijf verenigingen met ieder een eigen strategie, eigen concepten en eigen cultuur, maar overtuigd van de kracht van wederkerigheid en daarom overtuigd van het belang van samenwerken.

FVO verbindt koplopers uit de Nederlandse glasgroentesector:
- We vormen een samenwerking van koplopers die kennis en ervaring delen.
- We creëren condities onder welke de koplopers optimaal kunnen werken.
- De koplopers ontwikkelen tools om hun eigen ambities én de gedeelde FVO doelstellingen waar te maken.

*Telersvereniging: vertegenwoordiging van groente- en fruitproducenten (leden), die activiteiten als verkoop, marketing, inkoop, etc. centraal voor haar leden uitvoert

Name: Fresh Valley
Description:
Natuurlijke groei
Een specialist in knapperige Mini- en snackkomkommers, zoete tomaten aan de tros van het merk l’Amuse en de lekkerste aardbeien. Dat is wat natuurlijke groei kan doen. Onze telers zijn gepassioneerd over het produceren van de meest verse, best smakende en meest voedzame groenten en fruit - van zaad tot oogst. 

Samen werken
Een goede samenwerking is de basis voor succes. Bij Fresh Valley werken we graag samen met onze klanten en partners, elke dag weer. De combinatie van persoonlijke aandacht en contact, de juiste marktinformatie en up-to-date teeltkennis zorgen ervoor dat wij een marktgericht assortiment leveren. Fresh Valley is betrokken in het hele proces van zaadje, groei, levering tot op jouw bord, dat is de kracht van samen werken! 

Gezond verstand
Bij Fresh Valley handelen we met gezond verstand. Dat betekent een goede prijs-kwaliteitverhouding waardoor consumenten elke dag weer, en met gezond verstand, voor Fresh Valley kiezen. Die balans realiseren wij door onze productieprocessen en kwaliteit van bestaande producten te blijven verbeteren. Daarnaast investeert Fresh Valley in productontwikkeling én vernieuwing van ons huidige assortiment. Gezonde keuzes, gezond verstand, dát is Fresh Valley.

Name: de Groentegaard
Description: De Groentegaard is een natuurinclusieve tuinderij die gezond, lokaal voedsel produceert voor Midden Limburg!

Name: Seven Seeds
Description: We offer many kinds of vegetables & fruit seeds. We are Spontaneous, Sincere toward our customers, Sustainable towards the environment, Simplicity towards challenges, with Significance results, Sharing success, and Supporting our partners.

Name: Bulrush Horticulture Ltd
Description:
Bulrush Horticulture Ltd is a premier B2B supplier of high-quality substrates for professional and amateur growers, based in Northern Ireland. As a wholly owned subsidiary of Pindstrup Mosebrug A/S, a global leader in substrate production since 1905, we combine decades of expertise with innovative, responsible practices. 

At our facilities in Bellaghy, we produce peat-free, reduced-peat, and peat-based substrates tailored to the diverse horticultural needs, from propagation to retail products.  

We are committed to being a responsible supplier, leading the industry with peat-free substrate solutions and pioneering R&D projects, collaborating with academic institutions and commercial growers.

Name: Plense Technologies
Description:
Our mission is to make high-performance cultivation methods easy, efficient and accessible through ultrasound technology.
We build robust and affordable smart sensing devices that (literally) listen to plants and convert crop status into actionable data, thereby empowering growers to make informed, data-driven decisions about their precious crops. Join us in producing more food with less farming.

Name: Para Space Landscaping Inc.
Description:
Since August 1, 1979 Para Space has been a leader in the Canadian landscape industry. We have been built on care for those we work for and those who work here. Our company has always provided progressive landscape maintenance programs, along with contemporary designs, installations, and ecologically conscious plant health care. 

We have been able to grow our operation through hard work, efficiency, innovation, and by enhancing the wellbeing of our employees. Our active participation in trade associations has helped to advance our industry, especially in the areas of employee training and workplace safety. 

Para Space is the most accredited landscape firm in British Columbia. We are very proud of our staff's level of education and the knowledge they bring to the job each day. We have the expertise to work with you on any and all of your landscape needs.

Name: bQurius
Description:
Embrace change
Omarm verandering, dat is de insteek van bQurius. Samen met de deskundige adviseurs van bQurius kunnen wij kennis delen en een onderneming helpen groeien bij meerdere specialismes die haar dagelijkse aandacht behoeven. bQurius is een nieuwsgierig adviesbureau binnen de glastuinbouwsector. Wij bieden ondernemers de mogelijkheid om bij het maken van keuzes op meerdere specialismes advies in te winnen, met een betere aansturing van processen binnen een bedrijf als gevolg.

Name: Verde Luxe Plants Trading LLC
Description:
Verde Luxe Plant Trading LLC brings the beauty of nature indoors — without the maintenance. Based in Dubai, we specialize in premium artificial plants, trees, and moss walls designed for luxury interiors, retail spaces, and hospitality environments.

Our curated collections feature fire-retardant and UV-resistant greenery sourced from leading European brands, ensuring durability, realism, and compliance with UAE standards.

From bespoke installations to large-scale commercial projects, we collaborate with architects, designers, and developers to create immersive green experiences.

Specialties: Artificial Plants & Trees, Moss Walls, Vertical Gardens, Fire Retardant Décor, UV-Resistant Greenery, Interior Landscaping

Name: Topsector Horticulture & Starting Materials
Description: The goal of the Top Sector for Horticulture and Starting Materials is to be the world leader in successful solutions for global societal challenges in the areas of horticulture, food and a green environment.

Name: Division Q
Description:
Energiecrisis, oppervlaktewatervervuiling, stikstofemissie; in deze dynamische tijd staat het bestaansrecht van de glastuinbouw onder druk. Verduurzaming is noodzaak. Op dit gebied speelt Koppert Cress een vooraanstaande rol in de tuinbouw. Echter, het bedrijf wil de komende jaren de volgende stap zetten en volledig emissieloos gaan telen. Het bedrijf zet daarom vol in op innovatie door samen te werken met veelbelovende startups en wil de rest van de sector inspireren dit voorbeeld te volgen. Daarom heeft Koppert Cress besloten haar duurzame innovaties onder te brengen in een nieuw bedrijf dat zich daar 100% op gaat richten: Division Q.

Samenvattend is het doel van Division Q om Koppert Cress emissieloos te laten telen dóór duurzame innovatie en vormt het bedrijf de toegangspoort tot de tuinbouw vóór duurzame innovaties.

Al vele jaren vormen duurzame innovaties een belangrijke pijler in het succes van glastuinbouwbedrijf Koppert Cress uit Monster. Het bedrijf hecht er veel waarde aan haar cressen en specialties voor de gastronomie zo duurzaam mogelijk te produceren. Zo was Koppert Cress één van de allereerste grootschalige gebruikers van LED belichting en wordt op unieke wijze gebruik gemaakt van warmte- en koudeopslag, zonthermie en aquathermie. Ook opent het bedrijf graag haar deuren voor startups om te pionieren met hun nieuwe technieken in de kas. In 2016 leverde dit Koppert Cress al de Koning Willem I Plaquette op als duurzaamste bedrijf van Nederland in het MKB.

Voor de toekomst legt Koppert Cress de lat nog hoger. Naast de groei in de afzet van cressen en specialties, is verdere verduurzaming van het bedrijf expliciet onderdeel van het bedrijfsplan. In 2025 wil het bedrijf CO2-neutraal zijn, geen fossiele brandstoffen meer gebruiken en alleen nog maar schoon water lozen. Volledig emissieloos telen dus. Om deze doelstelling te behalen lanceert Koppert Cress een nieuw zusterbedrijf: Division Q.

Name: She Grows Veg Ltd
Description:
Everything you need to thrive, from seed to table. Shop our flavour-packed, heirloom vegetable seeds and explore our range of eco-friendly garden tools, organic pest control, natural feeds and a thoughtfully curated selection of gifts for green thumbs of all kinds.

We make growing your own easy with free, jargon-free advice to guide you from first shoot to final harvest.  Happy growing!

Name: Klaver Flowers
Description: Klaver Flowers. Grower of Lilium, Gypsophila, Limonium, Moluccella. Smartly serving customers with finest flowers. By thinking, daring and doing best. Lily nursery in Heerhugowaard (The Netherlands) and summer flower farm in Hawassa (Ethiopia).

Name: Champignondagen
Description: The international exhibition 'De Champignondagen' will take place every 3 years  in the Netherlands.

Name: Brown Grow (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
At Brown Grow, we take pride in being a leading exporter of premium coconut coir products from Sri Lanka, dedicated to advancing sustainable solutions for horticulture, agriculture, and eco-conscious industries worldwide.

Rooted in a deep respect for nature and an unwavering commitment to quality, we offer eco-friendly products like coco coir grow bags, coir discs, and coir briquettes, tailored to meet the rising global demand for sustainable growing mediums.

Why Partner with Brown Grow?

 Sustainability at Heart: Our processes are eco-conscious, minimizing waste and utilizing renewable resources.
 Uncompromising Quality: We uphold the highest quality standards to deliver products that exceed expectations.
 Global Reach: Trusted by clients around the world, we cater to clients in diverse regions around the world.

Driven by our passion for quality and sustainability, we’re committed to nurturing growth, empowering growers, and inspiring a greener future for all.

Let’s Grow Together!
Discover how Brown Grow can support your crops and help you cultivate success. 
Connect with us today to start the journey toward sustainable growth.

Name: Van der Starre
Description: Van der Starre provides retailers all over the world with successful sales concepts for climbing plants and small fruit. Van der Starre was founded in 1982. Van der Starre is Europe's market leader for climbing plants and operates from 6 locations in Boskoop, Ridderkerk and Waddinxveen. The company's head office is located in Boskoop.

Name: Centre of Excellence for Horticulture Skills in India- CEHSI
Description: The Centre of Excellence for Horticulture Skills in India (CEHSI) working under Centre of Excellence for Agriculture Skills in India (CEASI), aims to enhance sustainability and profitability in the horticulture sector through skill development, capacity building, policy advocacy, knowledge management, and research. CEHSI collaborates with various stakeholders within the horticulture ecosystem, including horticulture farmers, wage workers, horticulture corporates, research institutions, academia, and both central and state governments. With a commitment to being a pioneering organisation in the horticulture skilling domain worldwide, CEHSI undertakes and facilitates applied manpower research in the horticulture sector, fosters capacity development in various skill areas, and provides valuable policy inputs at the national and state levels to strengthen the skill upgradation efforts.

Name: BeterBoompje
Description: Ieder jaar gooien we in Nederland zo’n 2,5 miljoen kerstbomen weg. Zielig voor de bomen en alles behalve duurzaam!
