Hiermee kunnen we de transitie van wegwerpkerstbomen naar een herbruikbare variant in een stroomversnelling brengen.

Name: Dewar Nurseries
Description: We grow flowers and fruit plants for major retailers across more than 20 states. As a wholesale nursery rooted in tradition, quality, and innovation, our 61 years of expertise have instilled within us the skills to make your world a more beautiful place – one flower at a time.

Name: Chimi Group Company Limited
Description:
Chimi Group Co. Ltd. is a Tanzanian-based agricultural company dedicated to providing premium-quality, sustainably sourced produce to customers both locally and worldwide. 

Building on the success of Chimi Fresh Produce, we have established ourselves as a trusted provider of fruits, vegetables, cereals, and legumes. Our vertically integrated supply chain allows us to collaborate closely with certified farmers, ensuring that our products consistently meet international standards for taste, nutrition, and quality.

Name: Pligt Professionals B.V.
Description:
Mensen blij maken met een plant, dat is onze missie.

Pligt Professionals kenmerkt zich als een dynamisch familiebedrijf met een no-nonsense mentaliteit en constante drive om zich te ontwikkelen en handhaven als één van de meest toonaangevende producenten van bloeiende planten in Nederland.

Bij Pligt Professionals staan de klant, eigen mensen en de omgeving centraal. Persoonlijke ontwikkeling, kwaliteit, service en maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen hebben een hoge prioriteit. Op onze hypermoderne kwekerijen zijn allerlei nieuwe en hoogwaardige technieken toegepast om productieprocessen te stroomlijnen en producten van top kwaliteit de kweken.

Pligt Professionals | Driven by Passion

Name: W.Legutko
Description:
Od ponad 30 lat produkujemy nasiona warzyw, kwiatów i ziół najwyższej jakości.
Jesteśmy jedną z największych ogrodniczych firm nasiennych. Nasze laboratorium jest akredytowane- dbamy o jak najwyższą jakość naszych nasion.
Dostarczamy nasze produkty do ponad 65 krajów na całym świecie.
Na polach produkcyjnych o powierzchni ponad 1300 ha powstaje  materiał siewny najwyższej.Stworzyliśmy ponad 250 autorskich odmian.
Wykorzystujemy 18.000 m² powierzchni produkcyjno-magazynowych.
Nasi kontrahenci to m.in.: firmy nasienne na całym świecie, sieci handlowe, hurtownie, centra i sklepy ogrodnicze.

Współpraca z W.Legutko to znacznie więcej niż sprzedaż produktów. To partnerstwo. Wspieramy naszych kontrahentów poprzez:  

-Dobór optymalnego asortymentu produktów;
-Projektowanie opakowań dostosowanych do  potrzeb kontrahenta;
-Wsparcie marketingowe; 
-Doradztwo w zakresie ekspozycji produktów w punktach sprzedaży;
-Tworzenie nowych marek dla naszych klientów. 

Nasze 30-letnie doświadczenie w branży pokazuje, że wymagania kontrahentów w Polsce i za granicą zmieniają się, wraz nowymi oczekiwaniami klientów indywidualnych. Z tego powodu nieustannie obserwujemy trendy na rynku i podążamy za nimi tworząc nasze produkty. 

Zachęcamy do odwiedzenia naszej strony internetowej: www.legutko.com.pl

Name: Advancing Cultivation Technology (ACT)
Description: ACT is an educational platform dedicated to the needs of the high tech cultivation industry. We bring together industry suppliers and cultivators with deep rooted horticultural expertise who provide education on the latest cutting-edge technologies and best practices.

Name: Dutch Tulips Group
Description: Dutch Tulips is een groep van bedrijven met een groot hart voor tulpen. We geloven in de vrolijke overtuigingskracht van dit oer-Hollandse product. Daarom investeren wij in bedrijven in de tulpenbranche die elkaar versterken. Door onderling kennis te delen en samen te werken, zijn onze bedrijven uitgegroeid tot de meest toonaangevende in de markt. Samen oogsten we tulpengeluk en een glimlach op het gezicht van de consument.

Name: PFLANZENTHEKE GmbH
Description:
Die Pflanzentheke GmbH entwickelt, produziert und vertreibt vertikale Farmen für den hydroponischen (erdlosen) Anbau von Obst und Gemüse. 

Wir verfügen über Spezialisten in der hydroponischen Kultivierungstechnik, welche hydroponische Farmen für Landwirte, öffentliche Einrichtungen, Firmen und Wohngemeinschaften entwickeln. 

Aufgrund vermehrter Extremwetterereignisse, Ernteausfällen durch Dürre, zunehmender Ressourcenknappheit und der Notwendigkeit einer unabhängigen Nahrungsmittelproduktion, verfolgen wir bei der Pflanzentheke den Ansatz, die lokale Nahrungsmittelversorgung sicherzustellen, Stoffkreisläufe zu schließen, die Produktionseffizienz zu optimieren, Ressourcen nachhaltig einzusetzen und die erdlose Nahrungsmittelproduktion im ländlichen und urbanen Raum zu etablieren. 

Mit unseren Farmen sparen wir 90% Wasser und 85% Dünger verglichen mit dem konventionellen Anbau. Wasser und Dünger versickern nicht im Boden, sondern bleiben im geschlossenen Kreislauf. Düngeverordnungen und Fruchtfolgen müssen bei unseren Farmen nicht beachtet werden.

Unsere Farmen laufen autark, sparen damit Zeit und Personal, vereinfachen die Ernte und generieren wetterunabhängig ein Vielfaches an Ertrag.

Unsere Farmen sind zudem skalierbar, schon mit geringen Startinvestitionen gelingt so der Einstieg in den erdlosen, klimaresilienten, lokalen und sicheren Anbau.

Auf unserer Forschungsfarm in Osnabrück entwickeln wir unsere Systeme kontinuierlich weiter und machen eine Vielzahl an Kulturen hydroponisch anbau- und vermarktungsfähig.

Wir laden alle herzlich ein, uns an unseren Standorten in Lorsch (Hessen) und Osnabrück zu besuchen :-)

Let´s get ready for future farming!

Name: Waterfarmers Aquaponics
Description:
Making Food Security Your Business!

WaterFarmers are International Consultants for the Design and Development of Aquaponic Food Production Systems.

WaterFarmers Aquaponics, is at the heart of the innovation through re-invention paradigm of the Sustainnovation venture. Formed on the principle to promote commerce through food security. It's simple vision is to ensure the same through absolute sustainability, designed with the expectation that each aspect of the food production life cycle be optimized to encourage only that innovation which effectively and positively impacts human and environment health. 

With active projects and partnerships in 10 countries across 4 continents, the WaterFarmers label has secured a reputation that rivals the best in the business.

Name: Palmer Nurseries
Description: Established Since 1982 Palmer Nurseries -  The horticultural hub for over 40 years.

Name: Miksgrow
Description:
At Miksgrow, we’re redefining what it means to grow responsibly—without peat. With over 30 years of expertise in developing high-quality professional substrates, we create sustainable solutions by using locally sourced wood to produce our peat-free products. From the extra-fine start to the final potting phase, our innovative solutions are designed to maximize plant growth while minimizing environmental impact.

But we don’t stop at substrates. Our cutting-edge sensors and the Mikspilot platform empower growers to optimize conditions, improve results, and significantly reduce water consumption.

Join us in growing smarter, greener, and better for the planet.

Name: Patron Agri Systems
Description:
The national and international greenhouse horticulture sector is innovative, dynamic and dealing with increasingly complex issues. Patron Agri Systems designs and installs a complete range of electrical installations, climate computers, lighting and water technical installations (such as irrigation, mist and sprinkler installations), and ebb and flow systems for greenhouse horticulture.

We provide the right solution for every issue, specifically for the customer, using high-quality technical installations. We take care of the automation of these installations and systems and advise our customers. Patron Agri Systems International designs is part of Van der Hoeven Horticultural Projects, and together we form a full-service partner for high-tech turn-key horticultural projects.

Name: L'Arbre Local
Description:
Bienvenue chez L'Arbre Local, votre pépinière spécialisée dans la culture d'arbres et arbustes locaux, située au cœur de l'Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, à Saint-Georges-les-Bains et Soyons.

Nos arbres et arbustes locaux, résilients face aux changements climatiques, sont des atouts précieux pour la biodiversité, qu'ils soient en milieu urbain, naturel ou agricole.

Nous proposons des solutions durables pour tous vos projets paysagers. Notre expertise et nos conseils vous aideront à créer des espaces verts harmonieux et résilients.

En tant qu'acteur de proximité, nous nous engageons avec passion à rendre accessibles à tous ces trésors de biodiversité, à préserver les ressources et à développer des techniques de culture innovantes et responsables.

Proches de grandes villes comme Lyon, Valence et Avignon, nous sommes ravis de collaborer avec tous les acteurs de la filière pour créer des paysages durables et résilients.

Découvrez notre sélection de végétaux de qualité et bénéficiez de notre savoir-faire pour transformer vos espaces en véritables havres de nature.

Ensemble, cultivons un avenir plus vert et plus durable !

Name: Splendor Plant AB
Description:
Splendor Plant är Nordens ledande partiplantskola och leverantör av trädgårdsväxter. Med djupa rötter i odlingstradition och en stark drivkraft för innovation, erbjuder vi ett brett sortiment av friska, livskraftiga växter som är anpassade för svenska förhållanden.

Ni hittar oss i Kullabygden, strax utanför Höganäs, i Skåne. Här produceras årligen över 900 000 st växter, för garden centers, anläggare, kommuner, kyrkogårdsförvaltningar och andra kunder. Vi har som mål att leda vägen till en levande jord och en grönare framtid.

Name: Athikan Greenscaping
Description:
Athikan Greenscaping, a horticulture company, is dedicated to transforming spaces into vibrant, eco-friendly landscapes that inspire healthier lifestyles and promote environmental balance. We offer a full spectrum of services, including professional landscaping, terrace and kitchen garden setups, microgreens cultivation, sustainable farming models, organic soil and manure solutions, and expert agricultural consultancy for individuals, businesses, and institutions.

Our team combines horticultural expertise with innovative techniques—such as smart irrigation systems, organic cultivation practices, and climate-appropriate crop planning—to deliver results that are both aesthetically pleasing and agriculturally productive. Whether it’s designing a serene garden, establishing a high-yield organic farm, or setting up an urban green space, we approach each project with a commitment to sustainability, quality, and long-term value.

With Athikan Greenscaping, every project is more than just greenery—it’s a step toward a greener planet, healthier food systems, and a better quality of life for our clients and communities.

Name: The Dirt Horticulture News
Description: The Dirt brings together all things that matter to the horticultural industry. News, insights, trends, events, product launches, book releases on a single, compact platform available to all.  We sift through everything, from trade magazines, scientific journals, newspapers, press releases – you name it. A short and sharp, easily digestible news service for the green-fingered.

Name: Weston Nurseries
Description:
We are a family-owned home and garden center in business over 100 years in Massachusetts with retail locations in Hopkinton, Chelmsford, Hingham and Lincoln (coming soon!) and wholesale division with locations across Middlesex and Plymouth counties. Started in 1923, Weston has established itself as a premier source of quality plants in New England, and introduced many original varieties of Azalea, Rhododendron, and Lilacs to the market. Our staff consists of some of the top experts in the Horticultural field.

What's it like to work here?

Our employees love plants, and they love what they do. We attract individuals who are not only passionate about horticulture, but eagerly engage in expanding their knowledge, and sharing what they have learned with their coworkers and our customers. 

You’ll find opportunities for career development, leadership, and some of the best mentors in the industry. We’re fortunate to have many employees who have made their livelihoods and careers here, which is a testament to the opportunities we can provide.

With competitive pay, training and advancement opportunities, fun coworkers, and great employee discounts, expect to come to work every day knowing that you’re working toward something great.

Consider Weston Nurseries and become part of a 100-year legacy of providing high quality plants and horticultural wisdom.  It may just be the “best job you’ve ever had”.

Please visit our Careers page, under the About Us tab at www.westonnurseries.com to learn about current part- and full-time opportunities.

Name: Thehealingflora
Description:

We would like to invite you to visit "The healing flora" and heal your soul and life. 
Just leap in the dark with the glossiness of plants greenery.
Bring your natural therapist to your home.

Name: DMS Progrowers Ltd
Description:
About us
From humble origins back in 1989, DMS has evolved into what many consider to be pound-for-pound the most highly performing Kiwifruit Management and Processing operation in the country.

What we do
The secret to DMS’s success is having owners who are also the company’s biggest customers, and a working reputation that attracts the very best people. With an ownership structure that genuinely puts growers first, and the very best people on board, it’s no surprise DMS continues to go from strength to strength.
As well as operating two major post-harvest facilities, DMS also manages over 100 orchards on behalf of DMS’s owners and clients.
Alongside its Kiwifruit interests, DMS is also committed to the avocado industry with picking, packing, management and lease options available. Underpinned by the philosophy that it’s our job to maximise all our clients returns, our avocado growers benefit from a performance focussed approach typically reserved for kiwifruit growers.
The standard gets set high at DMS, and that’s why more and more growers refuse to settle for anything less than DMS.

Name: BHR - Bureau Horticole Régional
Description:
Conseils et services technique, économique, communication, événementiel et développement durable… ce sont plus de 80 horticulteurs et pépiniéristes qui bénéficient de l’expertise privilégiée du BHR.

Une histoire basée sur la force du collectif.
Location: Les Ponts-de-Cé, Pays de la Loire

Name: Vereniging Potgrond- en Substraatfabrikanten Nederland (VPN)
Description:
Substraten vormen letterlijk en figuurlijk de onmisbare voedingsbodem voor een betrouwbare voedselvoorziening en een gezonde groene leefomgeving.

De VPN vertegenwoordigt ruim 98% van de potgrond- en substraatproducenten in Nederland. Samen met onze klanten en partners staan we daarmee aan de basis van een tweetal belangrijke thema’s:

-	duurzame voedselproductie (groente, fruit en paddenstoelen) en 
-	een gezonde groene leefomgeving (sierteelt, landschapsprojecten, hoveniers en particulieren).

 
Missie VPN:
De VPN is een proactieve belangenbehartiger voor de potgrond- en substraat-sector in  Nederland. 
Wij verenigen, verbinden en ondersteunen de leden.
Binnen de VPN werken de leden samen aan de collectieve belangen, zoals kennisverhoging en verbeteren van de (product)kwaliteit van de sector.
Wij staan voor een duurzame keten, voor plant- en voedselveiligheid en voor MVO.  
Hierbij onderschrijven wij de duurzaamheidsdoelen van de VN.
Wij streven er naar de prestaties van onze producten in de gehele waardeketen continu  te verbeteren.

Name: Stofbergen Plant Company
Description:
Stofbergen Plant Company heeft een passie voor bromelia’s. Wij leveren al meer dan 30 jaar een assortiment met een grote diversiteit in vormen, kleuren en potmaten. En om u voortdurend van dienst te zijn met onderscheidende producten investeren wij samen met onze klanten continue in product- en marktontwikkeling. Onze bromelia’s zijn verdeeld in een aantal productlijnen zoals de alom bekende bromelia’s en guzmania’s, de nieuwe compact-types en een aantal unieke specials zoals de tillandsia en ananasplant. 

Ons bedrijf is gevestigd in Bergschenhoek, centraal gelegen in het Nederlandse tuinbouwcluster, van waaruit wij onze klanten dagelijks meerdere keren kunnen beleveren. Sinds 1 januari 2013 hebben wij onze tweede locatie in gebruik genomen. Hier vindt in eigen beheer de productontwikkeling, opkweek en productie van onze specials plaats. Met een gedreven team en twee moderne locaties zijn wij in staat onze klanten jaarrond te voorzien van een breed scala prachtige planten.

Onze passie willen wij graag met u delen. Wij zijn constant op zoek naar nieuwe bromelia’s, waarmee wij u in staat stellen onderscheidend vermogen te creëren. Wij nodigen u graag uit om ons bedrijf en de planten zelf te komen bekijken.

Name: Alaster Anderson - THE PLANTING EXPERTS
Description:
PLANTS & PLANTING DESIGN - Specialist Expertise

We have a passion for plants, understand their aesthetic potential and love designing, creating and maintaining beautiful sustainable gardens.

Carefully considered planting has the power to transform outdoor spaces. We provide advice on all aspects of planting from planning, design and specimen sourcing, to soil management and garden recovery.

LANDSCAPING & MAINTENANCE - Detail Matters

From the size of brick-wall pointing joints to moving large trees and shrubs a few
centimetres, attention to detail matters to us and we do whatever it takes to deliver the aesthetic vision

Name: Home and Garden Inspirations
Description: Home and Garden Inspirations is dé bron van inspiratie voor tuincentra, bloemisten, groenspeciaalzaken & woonwinkels.

Name: Frestia
Description:
Smaak. Daar draait alles om bij Frestia. Al 4 generaties lang, proef je onze heerlijk zoete paprika’s en tomaten! Dan proef je onze passie voor de lekkerste smaak, veredeld en geteeld van de beste rassen. En je proeft onze commitment om zomer, herfst, winter en lente het allerbeste dat we oogsten met je te delen. Want alleen zo blijven we connected. 

Strong roots, make tasteful fruits, zo zien wij dat.

Name: The Functional Plant Company
Description:
We are a mission based micropropagation company and supplier of functional plants displaying a range of phytonutrients with proven benefits for human health.

Our lab is based in central Scotland where we scale high-quality tissue culture plants for the controlled environment agriculture industry. 

We sell and export a number of high value functional plants. 

We are one of only a handful of commercial suppliers in  Europe and North America specialising in unique Wasabi Japonica clones. 

We sell four rare strains of Wasabi, two Mazuma strains (hot and spicy) and two Daruma strains (high rhizome yields). All our varieties are supplied as virus free sterile starter plants. We support new and experienced growers to successfully establish new nursery stock ensuring successful harvests up to two years. We partner with farms for mutual benefits.

We advise growers on hydroponics, fertilisers, lighting, additional technology and integrated pest management to guarantee successful acclimation of propagules. 

Our wider range of plants for sales includes strawberries, blueberries, raspberries, turmerics, myoga ginger, ginseng, ashwaghanda, yuzu, menthe, hops, spilanthes, physalis, pepper and cherry tomato. 

As experienced crop agronomists, we provide after sales support including IPM strategies for long term maintenance.

Name: West Africa Horticulture Innovation Hub
Description:
The Feed the Future Innovation Lab for Horticulture, West Africa Regional Hub based at the University of Ghana is one of four regional hubs of the Feed the Future Innovation Lab for Horticulture, also known as the Horticulture Innovation Lab, which is funded by the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) as part of the Feed the Future global hunger and food security initiative program at the University of California, Davis.

The Horticulture Innovation Lab’s global and regional research network partners with and promotes local leadership to advance horticulture and social innovations, empowering small-scale producers to earn more income while better nourishing their communities in the West African sub-region and beyond. 
Our work is locally led and spread across the West African sub-region, bringing together key stakeholders for horticultural development activities. The West Africa Regional Hub conducts research, builds networks, and serves as contacts for local organizations and USAID Missions, responsible for in-country management of projects and Principal Investigator (PI) support in the sub-region.

This content is made possible by the generous support of the American people through the United States Agency for International Development (USAID). The contents are the responsibility of the Feed the Future Innovation Lab for Horticulture, West Africa Regional Hub and do not necessarily reflect the views of USAID or the United States Government.

Through tailored solutions such as hail protection, bird exclusion, and improved water efficiency, we've significantly boosted the productivity and quality for our clients' agricultural investments.

We’re committed to protecting the future of agriculture with premium netting solutions that not only secure our clients crops but also create environments that strengthen the vitality of produce. Our custom designed systems mitigate risks, boost yields and improve overall crop quality, so our clients’ investments stay strong.

With a comprehensive range of services on offer, from consultation and tailored design to expert installation and ongoing support, we ensure that every system is optimised for your specific agricultural needs. Name: Hummert International
Description:
Hummert International's rich history originates far before emerging as a leading horticulture supply wholesaler. In 1932 with a humble German immigrant establishing his roots in downtown St. Louis, August H. Hummert Sr. made his start by providing seed and supplies for St. Louis growers on the famous “Florist Row,” along the banks of the Mississippi River under the name A. H. Hummert Seed Co.

Throughout the ‘30s and ‘40s, business grew after the company’s first catalog was produced in 1936.
Over time, Hummert Seed’s catalog and business would grow from a humble seed store to a global distributor. The company headquarters later relocated to Earth City to expand its warehouse in 1995, while adopting the company name Hummert International, to complement its world-wide role.

Today, Hummert International remains family-oriented and fourth generational, along with a 60+ person staff operating out of our Earth City, MO and Topeka, KS warehouses. As an industry leader in horticulture product knowledge with unparalleled world-class customer service, Hummert International continues to see growth with established business in all 50 states, export of products to 70 foreign countries, and an expansive catalog of more than 32,000 horticulture product and equipment offerings. We realize, now more than ever, that having a reliable source for supply distribution is key to keeping your business operations running smoothly. With expertise today’s growers can rely on, Hummert International is proud to serve the greater growing community.

Name: Den Boschkant
Description:
Welkom bij Den Boschkant: Toptomaten het hele jaar door! 

Bij Den Boschkant draait alles om tomaten, maar voor ons zijn het niet zomaar tomaten - het zijn onze passie, ons vakmanschap en onze belofte aan jou. Als jonge Belgische telers van de vierde generatie laten we tradities achter ons en omarmen we een nieuwe benadering van tomatenteelt: eerlijk, transparant en met een tikje rebelsheid.

Onze tomaten hebben stuk voor stuk een unieke persoonlijkheid. Van de energieke Pablo tot de elegante Suzanne, elke tomaat brengt een eigen verhaal en smaak naar jouw bord. Bij Den Boschkant geloven we in meer dan alleen het leveren van een product; we willen een gemeenschap opbouwen van tomatenliefhebbers die samen met ons genieten van de pure, onvervalste smaak van onze tomaten.

Sluit je aan bij Den Boschkant en ontdek een wereld waar tomaten niet alleen ingrediënten zijn, maar sterren van de show.  #DenBoschkant #Tomaten #Passie #SmaakvolleRevolutie

Name: Plant Empowerment Academy
Description:
Plant Empowerment is an integrated approach to the cultivation process that is based on the natural vigor of plants and uses physiological and physical principles instead of green fingers and feeling. Moreover, Plant Empowerment is universally applicable for all crops, all occurring climate zones, and various types of greenhouses.
A plant strives under all circumstances to keep its three balances in equilibrium to become strong and healthy. By supporting these balances, the plants make more efficient use of water, nutrients, and energy.
In nature, plants are resistant to most diseases and pests. Plant Empowerment uses these natural properties to optimize the plant’s resilience and growth.
Since Plant Empowerment is based on data and rules of Physics and Physiology it is the proven method for autonomous greenhouse control.

Die RAL-Gütesicherung Substrate für Pflanzen ist ein angesehenes Qualitätssicherungssystem, das die Seriosität und Verantwortung von Unternehmen, die Erden, Substrate und Mulche herstellen unterstreicht. Damit sich diese Unternehmen mit dem RAL-Gütezeichen ausweisen können, werden umfangreiche, neutrale Kontrollen durchgeführt.

Das Gütezeichen dokumentiert dem Verbraucher die Einhaltung der festgelegten Qualitätsstandards, den Güte- und Prüfbestimmungen, unter der Kontrolle unabhängiger Aufsicht. Dies ist ein Meilenstein für die Anwendersicherheit und für das Vertrauen des Verbrauchers in die Blumenerden, das Substrat oder dem Mulch.

Die GGS bietet RAL Gütesicherungen für: 
Rinde, Kultursubstrate, Blumenerden, Substratausgangsstoffe, Blähton als Kultursubstrat, Dachsubstrate, Baumsubstrate.

Name: Anderson Injectors
Description:
Manufactures of the highest quality fertilizer and chemical injection pumps in the horticulture industry.

Since 1955, H.E. Anderson Company has been producing the most reliable and accurate chemical pumps in the horticulture industry. Each product is proudly manufactured in the USA.

We value customer satisfaction above all else and strive to help them be successful. To meet this goal, we manufacture and sell the highest quality chemical injection equipment available. We concentrate on greenhouse and nursery markets though our equipment is used in a wide variety of other applications such as turf management, chicken and swine operations, industrial applications, blueberry and cranberry farms and many other agricultural uses.

Anderson Injectors are world renowned for their reliability, accuracy and unmatched quality. Many customers have Anderson Injectors that are still operating after 30 years. We take quality control very seriously. Our belief is that the cost of a quality injector up front will save more long term than purchasing a cheap injector over and over again. If you are looking to buy rest assured you will get a time tested design that we are happy to stand behind.

Name: Snack Products
Description:
Snack Products was in 2005 de eerste teler die zich gespecialiseerd heeft in het telen en verpakken van smaakvolle snackkomkommers. Door de jaren heen heeft Snack Products zich uitgebreid van één naar drie moderne teeltlocaties en één verpaklocatie welke zijn gevestigd in Asten, Heusden en Grashoek en worden gerund door de broers Willy en Gert van Bussel en Peter Maessen.

Bij Snack Products hebben we een innovatief en duurzaam karakter en zijn daardoor continu in beweging. Werken aan een topproduct is dan ook onze passie. Zo worden de snackkomkommers in onze eigen verpakkingsafdeling verwerkt en verpakt in door de opdrachtgever gewenste verpakkingen. Daarnaast wordt er op onze teeltlocaties gewerkt met de nieuwste ontwikkelingen en innovaties zoals LED verlichting, biomassa en hightech sorteer- en verpakkingslijnen. 

Bij Snack Products ondernemen we verantwoord met passie voor het product en gevoel voor natuur en omgeving. We zijn een glastuinbouwbedrijf waar geen bulkproduct wordt gemaakt, maar waar we gaan voor smaak en kwaliteit. Met ons hele team zetten we ons elke dag in om zowel binnen als buitenland te voorzien van snackkomkommers met de beste smaak, vorm en houdbaarheid.

Name: EAZY PLUG USA
Description:
WHY CHOOSE EAZY PLUG?

Improved Profitability: A revolution in cycle time of up to 3 weeks with a 20% savings in fertilizer, while achieving bigger crops and yields.

More plant available water and reduced water use: The unique structure of EAZY PLUG substrate provides a more uniform moisture distribution throughout the substrate, regardless of its degree of saturation. As a result, a more constant amount of water and nutrients are available to the plant during the whole cultivation period, ensuring balance rooting throughout the entire substrate resulting in healthier plants with less water usage.

Superior air pruning effect: Since Eazy Plug doesn't require a pot or plastic sleeve, maximum air pruning takes place. This results in a huge root structure with an enormous huge root mass which provides maximum uptake capacity of the plant.

Rapid Capillary Action: The water uptake of the material is extremely fast. No long waits before you can get started.

Limitless shelf life: Eazy Plug substrates are delivered dried, making them vey lightweight and reducing the chance of molds. That makes the shelf life of the products practically unlimited.

Fast and vigorous root development: Eazy Plug substrates all have a predetermined pH and EC value and a fixed air-to-water ratio. This ensures that propagating and growing conditions are always optimized. Consequently, Eazy Plug provides amazingly fast and powerful germination and rooting.

Organic Materials: All Eazy Plug substrates are made of RHP-certified organic material of only the highest quality. These organic materials are bonded and stabilized, creating an airy structure with a superb water holding capacity.

Compostable: Eazy Plug materials are 100% compostable in Industrial composting conditions. There is no discernible effect on the composting process due to the bonding components.

Name: Koroneiki Developments

With farming at the centre of the New Zealand economy the team at Koroneiki want to see farms and farmers succeed together with the environment by improving farm diversity and water quality.

Providing a trusted solution for native planting services in New Zealand is what we’re all about.

Name: TODD'S NURSERY LIMITED
Description:
Our beautiful nursery is situated in idyllic rural Bedfordshire offering convenient access to the whole of the UK. As a family run business we have been growing across 160 acres of production land for over 50 years. The quality of our British grown stock speaks for itself as does our valued client base which we have built upon over time with our attention to detail and genuine interest in the customers needs. 

We have over 25,000 trees in stock ranging from 6-8cm girth trees and hedging plants up to 130cm+ girth specimens. Our containerised tree unit holds several thousand fantastic specimen trees grown in airpots. The quality of growing in this manner offers our clients a robust root system that they can trust in. 

We pride ourselves on our level of engagement with our clients. We are happy to consult with you at every stage of your project from early procurement through to handling and planting the trees. We currently take on several contract-grows annually for clients and feel that this service is the best way for the UK landscaping industry to guarantee the availability, quality and price of their trees ahead of time.

We also offer a handling and planting service for our trees. Moving trees that can weigh in excess of 10 tonnes is not a skillset that everyone is comfortable taking on, but to us it is an every day task that we are experienced, equipped and trained to carry out.

We welcome any enquiries no matter how large or small and look forward to helping you with your tree supply needs.

Name: New Wood Trees Ltd.
Description:
Field-Grown Multistem Trees | British-Grown, Sculpturally Shaped | Supporting Designers, Landscapes & Biodiversity|

Based on 80 acres of rolling South Devon countryside, we are one of the UK’s only specialist nurseries dedicated to field-grown, hand-sculpted multi-stem trees and shrubs. Every tree we grow is nurtured on-site from the ground up, carefully pruned, transplanted, and shaped over five or more years to develop a strong root system and a distinct, architectural form.

Founded by Philip Nieuwoudt in 2008, New Wood Trees was born from a simple but powerful vision: to grow trees that are climate-appropriate, beautifully structured, and full of individuality, trees that bring something truly special to British gardens and landscapes.

We grow species that are native or well-suited to the UK’s conditions, thrive in our soils, and encourage biodiversity. Our trees are peat-free, UK grown, and delivered with care and attention to home gardeners, designers, landscape architects, estates, and developers across the south of the UK.

No two trees at New Wood Trees are ever the same.
Each one is carefully crafted to be a living sculpture providing something individual and distinctive that enhances the spaces it grows into, both aesthetically and ecologically.


 We Stand For

* Supporting British horticulture through climate-adapted, homegrown trees
* Encouraging biodiversity and sustainable planting practices
* Providing designers with beautiful and characterful forms that are aesthetically pleasing but also thrive in their environments
* Growing trees that are as unique as the places they’re planted

We'd love to welcome you to our world. We warmly encourage you to visit our nursery in person. To immerse yourself and experience our trees in a way that you simply can't from websites and photographs.  (Visits by appointment only - please visit our website for more info).

Name: Gardening Responsibly
Description:
The goal of the Gardening Responsibly Initiative is to make it easy to garden responsibly so we can all enjoy beautiful gardens and healthy Australian landscapes.

At the heart of this is our Certified Gardening Responsibly eco-label — the gardening responsibly tick of approval!

Only ornamental plants that have been assessed through our Research Portal as having a low future-invasive risk can get the tick, and only our member suppliers who have joined the Plant Sure Scheme can sell or provide plants with the tick.

The result? You can feel confident that when you choose a Certified Gardening Responsibly plant for your garden or project it will look great in place — and it will stay in place!

We are currently trialling the Gardening Responsibly Initiative and Plant Sure Scheme, with our official launch planned for spring/September this year. 

To keep up to date with the Gardening Responsibly Initiative and to be among the first to hear when our eco-labelled plants will become available in store, simply join our mailing list (https://www.gardeningresponsibly.org.au/join-our-mailing-list/).

You can also follow us on Facebook and Instagram.

L'azienda costruisce solide relazioni basate su principi etici che hanno sempre contraddistinto le persone che operano all'interno e quindi lealtà, correttezza e onestà sono le linee guida adottate con i principali attori della filiera, fornendo supporto tecnico in fase di programmazione e assistenza durante il ciclo produttivo.

Name: Horti Academy
Description:
Een bedrijf is toekomstbestendig indien het meegroeit met de veranderende omgeving. Hoe implementeer je nieuwe ontwikkelingen, zoals digitalisering, circulair ondernemen en energieneutraal telen? 
Hoe ga je om met vergrijzing en de veranderde behoeftes van je personeel? Sluit je personeelsbeleid aan bij de jongere generatie? Hoe is de interne communicatie en samenwerking? Wordt er van elkaar geleerd?

Al deze ontwikkelingen en vraagstukken hebben ook gevolgen voor je (nieuwe) medewerkers op het bedrijf. 
Misschien is het nodig medewerkers te betrekken bij innovatie, is er training nodig of moet je de organisatie anders inrichten. 
Hoe neem je de medewerkers mee in deze transitie? Welke kennis en vaardigheden zijn belangrijk en hoe ontwikkelen we dat?
Horti Academy helpt ondernemers, HR-professionals en medewerkers hierin inzicht te krijgen.

Over de Horti Academy
De Horti Academy is een samenwerking tussen Greenport West-Holland, Glastuinbouw Nederland, Horti Heroes, Lentiz | Cursus & Consult, Kasgroeit en InHolland Academy. De Horti Academy zet zich in voor de ontwikkeling van het glastuinbouwcluster. Ga naar de pagina over onze partners.

Name: Helleborus BV
Description:
Helleborus BV is a Belgian nursery and breeding company specialized exclusively in Helleborus — one of the most enchanting winter-flowering plants. For us, Hellebores are symbols of resilience, natural elegance, and life during the darkest months of the year.

We supply young plants and finished / flowering plants to growers, wholesalers, and garden centers worldwide, supporting professionals with high-quality plant material and a reliable assortment.

As breeders, we continuously develop new varieties that meet the highest standards of quality, uniformity, and durability. With more than 125 varieties in our range and our own breeding programme, we are shaping the future of Helleborus every day.

Sustainability is at the heart  of everything we do. All our Helleborus are grown naturally, with respect for people, the planet, and the natural rhythm of the plant itself. By reducing our ecological footprint and focusing on soil health, we cultivate strong, healthy plants that contribute to a greener future.

---

Helleborus BV is een Belgische kwekerij- en veredelingsbedrijf dat zich exclusief toelegt op Helleborus — één van de meest betoverende winterbloeiende planten. Voor ons staan helleborussen symbool voor veerkracht, natuurlijke elegantie en leven tijdens de donkerste maanden van het jaar.

Wij leveren jongplanten en afgewerkte / bloeiende planten aan kwekers, groothandelaars en tuincentra wereldwijd, en ondersteunen professionals met hoogwaardig plantmateriaal en een betrouwbaar assortiment.

Als veredelaar ontwikkelen wij continu nieuwe rassen die voldoen aan de hoogste normen op het vlak van kwaliteit, uniformiteit en duurzaamheid. Met meer dan 125 variëteiten in ons assortiment en een eigen veredelingsprogramma bouwen wij elke dag verder aan de toekomst van Helleborus.

Duurzaamheid staat centraal  in alles wat we doen. Al onze Helleborus worden op natuurlijke wijze gekweekt, met respect voor mens, planeet en het natuurlijke ritme van de plant zelf.

Name: Best Seeds Horticulturals Africa Ltd
Description:
Best Seeds and Horticulturals Africa Ltd is an online platform for inputs, market, and consultancy services to agricultural value chain actors. It adopts the e-commerce framework as the supply chain system where ordering is done online for products and or services. It also has a key focus on climate smart solutions advocacy to agricultural players  with the key aim of reducing the carbon footprint through the efficient supply chain, precision inputs application, and climate smart products. The services and products we offer are as illustrated. 
Our mission is to ensure sustainable farmer productivity that assures climate conservation for future generations.

1. Agronomy services:
We offer agronomy support and link up with veterinary practitioners to support farmers in the crop and animal industry to efficiently utilize their resources
2. Seeds
We supply a wide range of seeds from hybrid tomatoes, onions, watermelon, leafy vegetables, forage seeds that are climate smart, maize, sorghum, pearl millet, Hybrid Okra, etc from assorted certified companies in Africa
3. Agro-chemicals
We offer efficient farmer access to agrochemicals through local agronomists doing the last mile delivery in the various Kenyan counties. The farmer can focus on the farm as we deliver inputs and advisory timely and efficiently.
4. Climate Smart Technologies Adoption Advocacy. 
We continue to fight for farmer adoption of climate smart solutions to productivity. We affirm on choices like regenerative agriculture, matters circular economy to reduce wastage and reduce carbon footprint.
5. Market linkages. 
The 90% Kenyan fresh produce market remains unstructured with intermediaries reaping big from this supply chain menace. We are creating a platform that binds farmers and buyers directly so that they can benefit from their farm efforts. 
Farmers can also be able to acquire information on export needs, and exporters on the platform to expand their reach, diversify and boost their earnings.

Name: Salamander Naturgarten AG
Description:
Willkommen bei Salamander Naturgarten AG – Die Gartengestalter und Schwimmteichbauer aus Leidenschaft

Salamander Naturgarten steht für ästhetische und qualitativ hochwertige Gartengestaltungen mit hohem ökologischem Wert. Wir planen, bauen und pflegen seit 1998 Naturgärten, Schwimmteiche, Naturpools und Biopools für unsere Kundschaft. Eine eigenständige Planungsabteilung entwirft, kreiert und projektiert Gartenlösungen, massgeschneidert zugeschnitten auf die gestalterischen und funktionalen Vorstellungen unserer Kunden. Ausgebildete Profis bauen handwerklich geschickt und mit modernster Infrastruktur Gartenbauten aller Art,  in einer ökologisch vertretbaren Bauweise. Spezialisten der Gartenpflege sind besorgt für die Qualitätssicherung. Sie unterhalten und pflegen die unterschiedlichen Pflanzenwelten, selbstredend biologisch und frei von chemischen und synthetischen Mitteln.

So entstehen Gärten voller Qualität und Lebensfreude, welche zugleich Inspirationsquelle und Erholungsraum sind. Jeder Garten von Salamander Naturgarten AG ist ein individuell für die Gartenbenutzer gestaltetes Unikat, aber auch ein natürlicher Lebensraum mit nachhaltigem Wert. Dazu verarbeiten wir Naturstein, Holz, Metall, Erde, Wasser und natürlich Pflanzen zu einzigartigen Gartenkreationen. Wir planen und bauen Naturgärten und Schwimmteiche sowie Naturpools und Biopools in der ganzen Schweiz.

Name: Modell- und Demonstrationsvorhaben HOT
Description:
Jährlich werden zwischen 4 und 5 Mio m³ Blumenerden für den deutschen Markt produziert. Der Anteil von Torfersatzstoffen liegt aktuell bei etwa 50%. Gemäß den im Rahmen der Torfminderungsstrategie formulierten Ziele soll dieser Anteil bis 2026 annähernd auf auf null sinken. Das Ziel des Modell- und Demonstrationsvorhabens HOT ist es, den Ersatz von Torfprodukten im Hobby-Gartenbau durch torfreduzierte und -freie Substrate auf Basis nachwachsender Rohstoffe zu beschleunigen und effektiv zu begleiten. 

Dazu sollen folgende Aktivitäten verfolgt werden:

1. Kommunikation vorbereiten: Differenziert nach verschiedenen Hobbygärtner*innen-Zielgruppen die Entscheidungsprozesse und die Einflussfaktoren auf die Entscheidung für die Substratwahl untersuchen,

2. Kommunikation durchführen und Veränderungen bewirken: die Faktoren positiv beeinflussen, die eine Entscheidung für Torfalternativen und torfreduzierte Produkte stark bestimmen und

3. Anbauerfolg mit Torfersatzprodukten durch Anwendungsbegleitung sichern: Mögliche Anwendungsfehler präventiv identifizieren und durch Schulungen und eine App den Hobby-Gärtner*innen Hilfestellung bei der Anwendung leisten.

HOT ist ein Verbundvorhaben, das gemeinschaftlich von der Hochschule für Wirtschaft und Umwelt Nürtingen-Geislingen (Konsortialleitung), der Hochschule Weihenstephan-Triesdorf und Green Survey – Institut für Marktforschung Prof. Dr. Menrad GmbH durchgeführt wird.

Förderung:
Bundesministerium für Ernährung und Landwirtschaft (BMEL), Förderkennzeichen: 2221MT018

Projektträger:
Fachagentur Nachwachsende Rohstoffe (FNR)

Datenschutz:

Name: RootPro
Description:
At RootPro, we know healthy roots grow healthy plants.
We are a Canadian supplier of premium fabric grow bags engineered for tree nurseries, farms, reforestation projects, cannabis producers, organic fruit and vegetable growers who demand stronger, more resilient plants.

Our proprietary non-woven fabric, designed and engineered in Ontario, Canada, promotes natural root pruning — preventing root circling, improving oxygen exchange, and creating dense, fibrous root systems that establish faster and grow stronger.

•Root Pruning Technology – Naturally prunes roots to boost nutrient uptake and eliminate circling.
•Durability & Reusability – Built to withstand multiple growing seasons, both indoors and outdoors.
•Transplant Success – Plants transition seamlessly when upsizing or to field.
•Canadian Owned – Designed for professional growers and harsh northern conditions.
•Eco-Friendly Alternative – Reduce plastic use while improving plant performance.

From commercial tree farms to licensed cannabis facilities, RootPro products are trusted by growers who want to increase productivity, reduce transplant loss, and grow more sustainably.

Let’s Grow Together
If you’re a nursery, farm, or cultivation facility looking to improve plant health and operational efficiency, connect with us or visit RootPro.ca to learn more about our line of Fabric Grow Bags.

Name: ZAHRADNICI.sk - garden centrum

V našej škôlke a záhradnom centre sa zaoberáme pestovaním a predajom okrasných drevín, ihličnanov, ovocných stromov, kríkov, kvetov, trvaliek, letničiek, nádherných mrazuvzdorných paliem, citrusov, subtropických ovocných stromov a mnohých iných rastlín, ktoré pútajú pozornosť každého návštevníka nášho záhradníctva.

Pestujeme rastliny, ktoré svojou kvalitou a odolnosťou uspokojujú potreby našich zákazníkov. V našej škôlke celoročne pestujeme kvalitný materiál, ktorý je dokonale prispôsobený pre naše klimatické podmienky. Klientmi našej škôlky sú maloobchodní zákazníci, veľkoobchodní odberatelia, realizátori záhrad a záhradné centrá.

Okrem pestovania a predaja rastlín sa taktiež venujeme projektovaniu, realizáciam a skrášľovaniu okolí bytových domov, parkov, rôznych areálov pre samosprávy, ale aj pre súkromných investorov a developerov.

Name: Keder Greenhouse
Description:
Keder Greenhouse is a leading UK-based designer, manufacturer, and installer of high-performance commercial greenhouses - engineered to meet the exacting needs of the professional horticultural industry.           

With over 35 years of innovation and proven results, we deliver structures that combine cutting-edge materials with advanced engineering to create exceptional growing environments, year-round.

At the heart of every Keder greenhouse is our unique 9-layer, ultra-strong bubble laminate - a patented sheeting system that sets us apart from traditional glass and single-layer plastic cladding. This advanced material forms hundreds of light prisms per square metre, ensuring no scorch, no shadows, and the perfect balance of light diffusion for optimal plant growth. In addition to delivering outstanding light control, the system offers superior thermal insulation, drastically reducing heating costs and supporting consistent internal climate conditions regardless of external weather.

However, the innovation doesn’t stop at the cladding. Our greenhouses are built on a superior-strength, corrosion-resistant frame made from ZN35 high-tensile structural steel, locally sourced for quality and sustainability. With a minimum yield strength of 350 N/mm² and a tensile strength of 450 N/mm², this robust steel framework provides unmatched resilience and stability, even in the most challenging UK environments. This means our structures can confidently withstand heavy winds, snow, and other extremes - making them ideal for exposed rural sites, coastal farms, and high-altitude operations.

This combination of durability, energy efficiency, and crop-optimised design makes Keder greenhouses a smart, future-proof investment for commercial growers.

In the diagnostic laboratory pac Biotec we test our own material and also cultures on customer order for diseases. Furthermore, we test irrigation water samples for pathogen contamination and run nutrient analyses of substrate and soil samples. In the tissue culture laboratory, plants are treated, kept in depots and propagated in vitro as required.

We supply healthy cuttings worldwide from our mother plant locations in Kenya and Portugal.

Join us for our Build A Plant Workshops!  See you soon!

Liqui-Dirt:
Liqui-Dirt is different then anything else out there in the world. We take over 18 ingredients and put them through 40 stages of bio digestion for 5 years so by the end it's completely broken down to the raw elements. So it's no longer the same as before. It never goes bad and now plants do not have to wait for it to be digested because we have already done it for them. And we repair the damaged soils from pollution by adding the micro fungi and beneficial bacteria so the plants can continue the symbiosis process long term with all the nutrients we added back into the soils.

It's A full Vitamin and Mineral Supplement, with Microbial and Beneficial Bacteria complex. Complete Micro-fungi, pH Balanced formula to increase growth and nutrition for all plants Indoor Houseplants to Gardens, even Lawns. Yes Flowers, Trees and Shrubs too!

100% Pet Safe, No odors, No Chemicals, Non-GMO, Naturally Organic. Proudly Made by hand in the USA. From Our farm to you.

We service over 36 countries with Liqui-Dirt!

Name: SOUTH AND SOUTH EAST IN BLOOM
Description:
South & South East in Bloom is part of Britain in Bloom and runs annual competitions across the counties of Kent, Surrey, East & West Sussex, Hampshire and the Isle of Wight, East & North Dorset and East Wiltshire. 

Each year entries participate from Villages, Parishes, Towns, Cities, Coastal Towns, Town & City Centres, Urban Communities and Business Improvement Districts. Our judges/ assessors visit communities and awards are presented to recognise the entries achievements.

We also run and organise the RHS Its Your Neighbourhood campaign (Community Gardening) on their behalf in our region.

There are many misconceptions about “Bloom” the main one being that as the name implies its all about Summer bedding displays, Hanging Baskets and Window Boxes but that was bloom decades ago. 

So, while gardening, planting and creating attractive places is an important element, it is now as much about caring for our environment and wishing to see the community and community volunteers becoming involved in caring for their place 

Participating communities are asked to focus their initiatives on three main areas:

Horticultural Achievement
Environmental Responsibility
Community Participation

Communities that participate in South & South in Bloom benefit in a variety of ways but the most common benefits are:

Cleaner and greener surroundings

Creating a sense of community through improvement of public spaces and positive interaction between community members

An increase in civic pride and sense of community empowerment by engaging people in the improvement of their own community

Safer environments for the enjoyment of local people

Long term improvement for the environment by addressing issues such as sustainability, resource management, conservation, litter, graffiti etc.

Reduction in anti-social behaviour

Positive effects on the local economy such as increased commercial enterprise and increased tourism

Regeneration of run down and/or disadvantaged areas

Name: Controlled Environment Agriculture Association of Alberta (CEA3)
Description:
Controlled Environment Agriculture Association of Alberta (CEA3) is at the forefront of transforming Alberta's agricultural landscape through innovation and sustainability. Our association focuses on optimizing growing environments for year-round indoor production of plants, mushrooms, fish, and insects, utilizing a blend of agricultural science, engineering, and cutting-edge technologies. CEA3 aims to promote local food security, sovereignty, and environmental sustainability for the citizens of Alberta.

Our mission is to foster rewarding careers in Controlled Environment Agriculture while contributing to local food security and sovereignty. We strive to educate stakeholders, de-risk the sector, and facilitate its growth through collaboration and continuous improvement.

CEA3 provides a platform for industry stakeholders to come together, identify key issues, inform and transfer knowledge, and work collectively to promote responsible corporate citizenship. By advocating for investments in the sector and promoting collaboration with research providers, we aim to unlock the full potential of Controlled Environment Agriculture in Alberta.

As a not-for-profit association, CEA3 offers various sector services, including a visible online presence, collective advocacy for government engagement, coordination of educational initiatives, and collaboration on research priorities. Our working groups, led by dedicated directors and assisted by member volunteers, drive these initiatives forward.

Membership in CEA3 is open to CEA producers, equipment and service providers, architectural and engineering firms, educational institutions, research organizations, and government bodies. We offer different membership tiers to accommodate various stakeholders, ensuring inclusivity and representation across the sector.

CEA3 is supported by a team of dedicated founding directors and a network of individuals and organizations committed to advancing the Controlled Environment Agriculture

Name: African Roots B.V.
Description:
African Roots BV is de verkoopmaatschappij van Highlands Plants Ltd. in Kenia. De naam zegt het al: onze aangeboden jonge planten komen van Afrikaanse bodem. Via African Roots BV in Nederland leveren wij uitgangsmateriaal van stekperkgoed, vaste planten en (sier)grassen.
Naast de produktie van bewortelde en onbewortelde stekken van perkgoed, vaste planten en grassen produceert Highlands Plants een grote hoeveelheid snijkruiden en bewortelde kruidenstekken. Voor deze kruiden, die voor de voedselconsumptie zijn, beschikt zij over alle benodigde certicificaten (KFC, Global GAP, Sedex, etc.). Deze kruiden worden door Highlands Plants direct aan haar afnemers geleverd. Het bedrijf is inmiddels duidelijk de pioniersfase voorbij en met onze 350 medewerkers is er een degelijke organisatie opgebouwd, die volledig gericht is op het optimaliseren van de kwaliteit en productie. 
Met de verschillende productgroepen is veel ervaring opgedaan op zowel lokaal als op internationaal niveau. Iedere productgroep vraagt om een gedegen teeltaanpak en door kennis en ervaring te combineren zijn er optimale teeltplannen ontwikkeld. Hierdoor zijn leverzekerheid en kwaliteit belangrijke pijlers geworden van Highlands Plants Ltd. en dus ook van African Roots BV. Wij nodigen u van harte uit om kennis te maken met ons rijke assortiment en hopen uw interesse te wekken voor de grote mogelijkheden die de Afrikaanse bodem te bieden heeft. Afrika en Europa kunnen elkaar positief beïnvloeden en wij geloven dat jonge planten kweken in Afrika een goed voorbeeld is, van waar twee werelddelen elkaar kunnen versterken.

Name: Mondo Verde Ltd
Description: Mondo Verde specialise in soil improvement using the revolutionary Geo-injector. We inject compressed air up to 1 metre into the ground. The compressed air breaks the compaction within the sub soil and creates voids and cracks in the soil. These voids are then filled with a long-lasting drainage material creating lots of small soakaways that are all linked together. During this process a soil improver may be added in the form of enriched biochar.  Biochar has several benifits, including, providing improved drainage, nutrient retention, aeration and improved soil structure. The stable nature of Biochar means one application remains effective for many, many years.

Name: Australian Society of Horticultural Science
Description:
The mission of the AuSHS is to promote excellence in Australian Horticultural Science through the representation and development of the professional interests of members, the encouragement of innovation, science and technology in horticulture and the development of strong links to kindred associations both national and international.

We will achieve our mission through the following objectives.

-Encourage the scientific and scholarly study of horticulture
-Advance the introduction of scientific principles and practices into horticulture
-Promote the profession of horticultural science
-Introduce and implement codes of management and ethics for the profession
-Provide scientific and technical advice to government and industry organisations
-Foster communication with the international society for horticultural science and 
 other kindred societies both national and international

Name: Ramya Horticulture (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
Ramya Horticulture (Pvt) Ltd. is an export-oriented company established in 1998, specializing in the production and export of rooted plants, un-rooted cuttings, cut foliage and tissue culture-raised plants. We are able to meet an ever-increasing demand for superior quality plants that we grow in state-of-the-art nurseries and tissue culture production facility in Sri Lanka. Our nurseries are located in Walpita, Wellawa and Kalugalla; regions specifically picked for the optimal climatic conditions needed for the production of our extensive range of tropical ornamental plants.
We regularly ship a wide variety of high-quality tropical plants to markets in Canada, Europe, the Middle East, Australia, and South East Asia. Our years of technical expertise and knowledge enable us to adhere to the requisite international quarantine standards worldwide and handle all necessary export documentation for overseas shipments. Professionalism is a byword in all aspects of our business, and we do not believe in compromising on the quality of our products or services.
In recognition of our good agricultural practices that comply with internationally accepted criteria for safe and sustainable production methods, worker welfare, responsible use of water, plant propagation materials and greater efficiency in production, we were accredited a GlobalG.A.P company in 2008. In 2011, this prestigious certification was also awarded to us for our advanced tissue culture production facility and tissue culture propagation methods.

Name: AvaGro
Description:
At AvaGro, we are transforming horticulture in Namibia. Since our founding, we have been dedicated to overcoming the challenges of Namibia's arid climate to produce high-quality vegetables, flowers, seedlings, young plants, and fruit trees. 

We believe that agriculture, education, and healthcare are the cornerstones of sustainable development and prosperity in Africa. Our mission is to increase food security and improve social, environmental, and economic outcomes in Namibia and beyond. 

Namibia's climatic conditions present unique challenges for horticulture, but at AvaGro we embrace innovation to turn these challenges into opportunities. Our state-of-the-art technologies include a tissue culture laboratory, water desalination plant, drip irrigation and greenhouses to create optimal growing conditions in the harshest of climates. 

Today, as a leading horticultural producer and service provider in Namibia, AvaGro has become a major supplier of fresh, high-quality, GLOBAL G.A.P. certified produce to the local market.

Name: Littywood Farm
Description:
Littywood Farm Ltd is managed by Steven Busby and his wife Helen Busby with a dedicated team who have worked for the farm for many years. We are proud of our farming heritage and are passionate about producing high quality fruit and have a strong sense of sustainable land stewardship. We reflect that passion in the way we do business with our customers, suppliers, and colleagues. The farm is owned by George, Steven, & Timothy Busby who have been growing soft fruit for over 40 years.

Littywood Farm is located in the heart of England, Staffordshire and are proud to be part of Berry Gardens Growers Ltd, the UK’s leading grower-owned co-operative, who support us with an expert team of Agronomists who work closely with us throughout the growing season.  We market our fruit through Driscoll’s, who are a Californian-based global berry company, the biggest in the world who breed new patented varieties that give us a competitive advantage within the marketplace.

Littywood Farm lends itself to produce the finest quality fruit using Driscoll’s varieties with south facing fields, an excellent growing infrastructure and irrigated with on farm harvested rainwater, allowing us to become more efficient in the way we grow our crops.  We work closely with Driscoll's trialling there unique varieties to ensure we have access to the best plant material that produces berries that are delightful to our customers with their exceptional quality and flavour.

Name: Viyaat Agro
Description:
Viyaat Agro is at the forefront of the agri-business sector, driving the transformation of traditional farming practices. Our mission is to revolutionize how farmlands are used by implementing integrated farming techniques, which include crop production, cultivation, and animal husbandry. We aim to achieve this by focusing on operating and managing unutilized and poorly managed lands, thereby creating a mutually beneficial scenario for landowners and consumers.

At the core of our approach are the SQuID Principles: Sustainability, Quality, Innovation, and Diversity. By leveraging these principles, we aim to enhance profitability and environmental sustainability across the agricultural sector.

Our success speaks for itself. In a short period, we have amassed a significant amount of acreage, and we have ambitious plans to expand.

Are you an agricultural professional or innovator looking to join a rapidly growing agri-startup? We're seeking passionate individuals to help us shape the future of farming. Join us and be part of this exciting journey!

Name: DragonFlora Farms LLP
Description:
Welcome to DragonFlora Farms LLP!
DragonFlora Farms LLP is a leading provider of dragon fruit farming solutions and value-added products. With a team of experts at the helm, the startup is dedicated to revolutionizing the dragon fruit industry. From cultivation to post-harvest management and everything in between, DragonFlora Farms offers a comprehensive approach to dragon fruit farming that is both sustainable and innovative. With a commitment to providing top-quality products and services, the company is poised to become the go-to source for all things dragon fruit. We specialize in the development of commercial, scientific, and sustainable dragon fruit farms that offer high returns on investment and the best quality planting material and agronomic support. Connect with us to learn more about our passion for dragon fruit and how we're making a difference in the industry.

Stover’s thermal nursery labels are engineered to perform in harsh conditions. Options for customization and branding help you deliver labels that are both functional and visually appealing.

What makes Stover different is our commitment to service and support. We maintain one of the most extensive year-round inventories in the industry, ship most orders within 24 hours, and back our printers with a free two-year warranty. Our dedicated team is available to answer questions, resolve issues, and keep your tagging program running smoothly.

Stover Manufacturing is more than a supplier—we are a trusted partner helping growers, retailers, and garden centers across the country print smarter, tag faster, and grow stronger.

Stefan Knecht (knechtgarten.ch), Claude Perrinjaquet (ihregartenwelt.ch), Martin Maurer (wetzelgartenbau.ch) und Werner Looser (germann-gärten.ch) haben sich zum Ziel gesetzt, ihr Wissen und ihre Leidenschaft für ausserordentliche Gärten und Gartengestaltungen zu bündeln und den gemeinsamen Erfahrungsschatz für jeden der einzelnen Betriebe nutzbar zu machen. Neue Erkenntnisse aus Forschungsprojekten, Weiterentwicklungen in diversen Bereichen und Know-how tauschen wir regelmässig aus und gewinnen so das Optimum für die Gärten unserer Kundinnen und Kunden.

Name: Responsible Sourcing Scheme
Description:
The Responsible Sourcing Scheme for Growing Media is an industry-driven initiative that empowers consumers to make informed decisions about the environmental responsibility of the growing media products they purchase and use. By utilising an easy-to-understand traffic light system, consumers can quickly compare the environmental responsibility ratings of various products and assess their impact on the environment. This enables buyers to confidently choose more sustainably produced products, such as those with a green 'A' rating over a yellow 'C' rated item.

The scheme was created in response to the government's planned proposal to ban peat for amateur gardening by 2024. As peat alternatives were introduced, it became crucial to evaluate the environmental responsibility of these new substrates. The Responsible Sourcing Scheme, developed over a decade and launched in 2022, assesses each growing media substrate against a stringent set of criteria in collaboration with key industry stakeholders.

Our scoring system evaluates products based on seven criteria: Energy Use, Water Use, Social Compliance, Habitat & Biodiversity, Pollution, Resource Use Efficiency, and Renewability. Manufacturers provide evidence for each criterion to an independent auditor, who then assigns a score between 0 and 20 based on the environmental responsibility of the production process. The individual scores are combined to create an overall score displayed on product packaging.

The goal of the Responsible Sourcing Scheme is to enable consumers to make the most responsible decisions when choosing their growing media without demonising peat or any other substrate. It also encourages retailers and growers to consider the most efficient and environmentally responsible substrates for their products.

The scheme is open to any manufacturer, grower, or retailer who produces, uses, or sells growing media. 

To learn more at responsiblesourcingscheme.org or email us at info@responsiblesourcing.org.uk.

TRIAS ALU

Schnell, unkompliziert und solide – mit dem TRIAS ALU Terrassensystem sind Außenbereiche in kürzester Zeit begehbar und laden in schönster Form zu entspannten Sommertagen ein. Und das alle Jahre wieder – denn die Alu-Unterkonstruktion hält jedem Wetter stand.

TRIAS WABIC

Mit dem System TRIAS WABIC lassen sich Plattenbeläge schnell und einfach verlegen. Es entsteht eine gleichmäßige, stabile Auflagefläche. Die Gitterroste schützen effektiv vor Durchbruch - ein wesentliches Plus an Sicherheit.

TRIAS SICHTSCHUTZ

Windschutz, Sichtschutz, Schatten – was soll der Sichtschutz können? Und wie soll er aussehen? Das Material und die Struktur der Elemente unterscheiden sich in ihrer Funktion und Ästhetik und lassen sich beliebig kombinieren. Dank der farblich abgestimmten Anbaumodule, welche die jeweilige Materialfläche einfassen, sind die Elemente in wenigen Schritten mit Sichtschutzpfosten und Trägern montiert. Das Baukastenprinzip erleichtert die Auswahl der Module, die zueinander gehören. Der TRIAS Sichtschutz ist in wenigen Schritten passgenau zusammengestellt.

Description:
We're an export-oriented exotic tropical fruits orchard with lots of goats, some sheep, about a dozen beehives, and a whole lot of happiness. 

In 2024, we're making our maiden voyage with the export debut of our Great Rift Valley Purple Passion Fruit! This Passiflora Edulis pilot crop features the Misty Gems subvarietal known to be the tastiest of all purple passion fruits - a gem true to its name. The pulp varies in color from bright yellow to more of a pumpkin color, and it has all the tell-tale small, hard, black seeds of passion fruit's own eponym. The inside wall of the Misty Gem is white. Its flavor profile is refreshing, guava-like and tangy. Eaten by the spoonful directly from the shell, the pulp can also be used on pavlovas, cheesecakes, fruit flans and icing. Passion fruit mojitos are our personal favorite way to make use of its lush tropical appeal...

After so much time off the grid in paradise, we can't wait to make new friends on the grid! If you're an exotic fruit importer across Europe or the Middle East, we have jokes to tell, sagas to narrate, and personality to entertain - we promise! DM us to learn more about our projected production volumes, export logistics, or simply about how our resident giraffes Ferdinand, Beatrice, and Fluffybutt are doing. Or, if you're just a lover for the sweet tang of passion fruit, we'd love for you to follow us here too so you can get your daily fix. ;)

Name: Sports Turf Association (WA)
Description:
The Sports Turf Association, WA Incorporated, is a not-for-profit association, managed by a dedicated committee of volunteers representing all persons working in the turf industry of WA. The STA (WA) can trace it’s establishment in Western Australia to 1946, when an association of Grounds Curators and like minded turf managers regularly met at the WACA ground to discuss the development of quality sports turf surfaces in and about post war Perth.

From those humble beginnings, the Grounds Managers Association of WA (GMA) was established in the early 1980’s and primarily included Turf Managers and Grounds Maintenance personnel from the majority of Perth’s leading Sports Turf Facilities and Private Schools. Members would meet regularly throughout the year for sponsored field days and social gatherings.

In July 2000 the GMA members voted to become an incorporated association tied nationally with the Turf Grass Associations of Australia. Richard Winter, then Head Curator of wickets at the WACA ground became the inaugural President for the TGAA(WA) Inc.

At the August 2012 Annual General Meeting, following consultation with fellow Turf Grass Associations from the other states and territories in Australia, the TGAA(WA) members voted to once again change the association’s name, becoming the Sports Turf Association (WA) Incorporated.

Name: Fruition Horticulture (HB) Ltd
Description:
We specialise in consultancy, technical services and applied research and development at our Fruition Hawkes Bay office.

Our technical services teams pride themselves on providing reliable and robust technical data and decision support. These services include monitoring of soil moisture, pests and diseases and fruit size and maturity. 

We’re excited to be offering crop and canopy scanning in conjunction with the Green Atlas Cartographer to count dormant buds, flowers, fruitlets and fruit in apples, kiwifruit, and grapes. Geo-PDF enabled heat maps allow in-field navigation for better decision making and labour management.

Precision Horticulture is coming of age with our partnership with the Waatic Smart Spraying System which enables for variable rate spraying using prescription maps.

Fruition also has offices in Tauranga and Nelson. For more information please visit our website.

Het bedrijf is echt een familiebedrijf sinds 1989 omvat vandaag de dag acht verschillende locaties, in Zevenbergen, Etten-Leur en Prinsenbeek. Naast de 30 ha aan productielocaties, is 7 hectare gereserveerd voor de opkweek van trayplanten. Kwaliteit staat hoog in het vaandel. Zoveel mogelijk in eigen beheer zorgt voor maximale controle en optimale kwaliteit van zowel product als bedrijfsvoering. O.a. door heel klant specifiek samen te werken en breder palet aan rassen binden we afnemers en werknemers aan ons bedrijf.

Name: VollegrondsGroente Organisatie (VGO)
Description:
Vollegrondsgroente Organisatie (VGO) is het samenwerkingsverband van tenminste 70% van de Nederlandse vollegrondsgroentetelers, van bloemkool tot spinazie en van witlof tot broccoli. Wij bundelen onze krachten zodat we nog vele decennia lekkere, gezonde en duurzaam geteelde vollegrondsgroenten in Nederland kunnen blijven produceren, met oog voor de wensen van consument, maatschappij en overheid.
Met ons meerjarenprogramma werken we aan innovatie en verduurzaming op het gebied van technologie & arbeid, plantgezondheid, bodemweerbaarheid, water & omgeving en imago & positionering. 
Samen maken we de Nederlandse vollegrondsgroenteteelt toekomstbestendig en onmisbaar voor heel Nederland.

Name: Kwekerij Verboom
Description:
Kwekerij Verboom is a solid nursery in the Netherlands.
The nursery specialises in the cultivation and selling of the Skimmia and Helleborus.
For both products we guarantee the high quality end. To be sure of the quality of our plants we cultivate our Skimmia's in one year, so we have always good healthy plants with enough growing power.
For our Helleborus pot plants we use youngplants out of the tissue culture.

From leafy greens to tomatoes by way of any number of other crops, we look at what the foundations of the challenges are, ensuring that a combined and reasoned solution is sought and actioned for our customers.

Name: SPIN-FERT EU
Description: SPIN-FERT Consortium, the project funded by the European Commission under Horizon Europe, aims to revolutionize soil management in horticulture. It transforms agricultural by-products into high-quality fertilizers and peat-free substrates, promoting eco-friendly farming. SPIN-FERT integrates biostimulants and agro-industrial wastes to enhance soil fertility, employing AI-supported soil assessment tools, lab-on-chip devices, automated image analysis, and precision irrigation systems. The project develops policy recommendations for sustainable practices and fosters collaboration among 20 European partners. Through community engagement and knowledge transfer, SPIN-FERT promotes healthy soil management for a greener, sustainable future.

Name: Victoria's Plant Designs

Victoria’s Plant Designs has been South Florida’s trusted partner in luxury plant design and large-scale holiday décor for over 25 years. From 6–18 foot commercial tree installations to corporate orchid programs, we bring beauty, efficiency, and professionalism to every space we touch.

Our clients include property managers, corporate offices, hotels, luxury retailers, and select residential clients who want turnkey décor solutions without the stress. With a leasing model that eliminates the cost and hassle of storage, we make it easy for businesses and homeowners to enjoy stunning seasonal displays year after year.

What sets us apart? Speed, scale, and experience. Our team specializes in large commercial installations, regardless of size we execute flawlessly and on schedule. From Palm Beach to Key West, we are known for creating breathtaking environments that leave lasting impressions.

Name: Natural State Medicinals
Description:
Natural State Medicinals (NSM) is a leading vertically integrated medical cannabis company based in Arkansas. Founded to elevate patient care through science-driven cultivation, product innovation, and regulatory integrity, we were among the first licensed producers in the state and are proud to have made the first legal cannabis sale in the Southern United States. Our portfolio includes premium flower, concentrates, and infused products developed by a team of experts in cannabis science and healthcare.

At NSM, our mission is to help patients find their natural state — of wellness, balance, and relief — through safe, effective, and thoughtfully crafted cannabis products. We combine passion with precision, serving the Arkansas cannabis community with compassion and care, while supporting our team, community, and industry with integrity and purpose across every step – from seed to soul.

Name: Carol's Seedlings & Vegetables
Description:
At Carol's Seedlings & Vegetables, we specialize in providing high-quality vegetable seedlings and comprehensive support to farmers. Our mission is to ensure every farmer, from beginners to seasoned growers, has the tools and guidance necessary to cultivate thriving crops sustainably. Many emerging farmers lack the expertise to build sustainable farming systems. They face challenges in crop management, cultivation methods, and accessing healthy quality seedlings. Carol's Seedlings & Vegetables addresses these gaps by offering not only top-tier seedlings but also personalized support and educational resources. We have the farmers' success at heart.
We also aim to inspire and empower individuals to embrace healthier lifestyles through the enjoyment of fresh, nutrient-rich vegetables that we offer.

Name: CDArend Consulting LLC
Description: Whether it is tree issues, your landscape is looking out of date, in need of some upkeep, or you just want to know what is wrong, we are here to help. Our services are here to help you make the best decision for your trees and landscape.

Name: Rare Plant Fairy
Description:
Born in the guest bedroom of a downtown Detroit apartment in 2020 Rare Plant Fairy has quickly become Michigan’s premier grower of rare aroids, hoyas, and other exotic tropical plants.

We started as avid rare plant collectors — we know what excites other collectors and are always ahead of the latest trends. Most of our plants are grown and propagated in-house, but we also collaborate with growers worldwide to bring new, sustainably sourced cultivars and species to market.

We pride ourselves on catering to the needs of customers in every climate. Our expert packers carefully wrap every plant to ensure they arrive in the best possible condition. Are they going to the Rockies in December? Insulation and heat packs it is. How about Paris in the spring? We’ll make sure the phytosanitary certificate is in order. Our indoor nursery replicates most collectors’ home environmental conditions to reduce stress on our leafy friends

Name: Allico Systems
Description:
