Name: Rockwell Farms
Description:
Founded in 1979 by Tom Abramowski, Rockwell Farms is a family owned and operated, commercial greenhouse located in the heart of North Carolina. With 36 acres of modern greenhouses, we are recognized by Greenhouse Grower Magazine as a Top 100 Grower in the United States.

Our focus is to provide convenient floral solutions that enhance your everyday life.  In the spring and fall we focus on flowering containers and hanging baskets that add instant impact to any outdoor living space.  Our porch and patio ready flowering annuals can be found in supermarkets across the Southeast and Mid-Atlantic regions.

During the Holiday Season, our attention turns to holiday decorations for the interior of your home with over 500,000 poinsettias grown each year.  Learn more about our wide array of beautiful offerings by visiting our products page

Name: Graf Gartenbau AG
Description:
Die Graf Gartenbau AG steht seit 1950 für professionellen Gartenbau und nachhaltige Betreuung von Grünräumen.

1986 übernahm Ueli Graf das von seinem Vater gegründete Unternehmen. Seit 2015 wird die Firma von André Fellmann geführt und ist Teil der Gardenholding Gruppe. Mit rund 18 bis 20 spezialisierten Fachkräften verbindet die Graf Gartenbau AG Know-how, Tradition und moderne Methoden im Gartenbau, in der Gartenpflege, in der Gartenplanung und in der Gartengestaltung.

Unsere Dienstleistungen decken den gesamten Prozess der Gartenentwicklung ab. Von der ersten Gartenplanung über die kreative Gartengestaltung bis hin zur präzisen Umsetzung im Gartenbau und der langfristigen Gartenpflege. 

Wir betreuen private, gewerbliche und öffentliche Grünflächen im Limmattal sowie in der Region Zürich, Aargau und Zug.

Ein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der professionellen Gartenplanung und Gartengestaltung für Neu- und Umgestaltungen. Wir entwickeln Bepflanzungskonzepte, erstellen Baueingaben und gestalten naturnahe Gärten, Aussenräume und langlebige Gartenstrukturen. 
Im Gartenbau realisieren wir Natursteinmauern, Sitzplätze aus Keramikplatten, Wege, Sichtschutzlösungen und individuelle Elemente, die Funktionalität und Ästhetik verbinden.

Die Gartenpflege ist ein zentraler Bestandteil unseres Angebots. Dazu gehören Rasenpflege, Hecken- und Strauchschnitt, saisonale Pflegearbeiten, Unkrautkontrolle, biologische Schädlingsbekämpfung mit Nützlingen sowie Winterschnitt und Sommerschnitt. Auch die Pflege naturnaher Anlagen und die professionelle Friedhofspflege zählen zu unseren Kernkompetenzen.

Die Graf Gartenbau AG steht für Qualität, langfristige Nachhaltigkeit und individuelle Lösungen im Gartenbau, in der Gartenpflege, in der Gartenplanung und in der Gartengestaltung.

Unser Ziel ist es, Gärten und Grünräume so zu entwickeln und zu pflegen, dass sie dauerhaft gesund, ästhetisch und funktional bleiben.

wir beleben grün

Name: Sentier urbain
Description: Par son action, Sentier Urbain contribue simultanément et de façon concrète au développement écoresponsable de l’individu, à la sensibilisation environnementale, à l’embellissement des milieux de vie et à l’affiliation sociale des personnes.

Name: Australian Vanilla Plantations
Description:
Follow us on instagram!   @australianvanillaplantations

Australian Vanilla Plantations has successfully created a unique greenhouse dome system for growing vanilla in Australia, this can also be applied to many different regions as well as countries. 

The proven technology successfully grows vanilla, has produce flowers and high quality vanilla beans. It is completely organic with beans over 24cm long. We have achieved our sustainability goals of very low water and electricity usage, very low labor input whilst achieving very high yield as well as very high quality.

The vanilla domes will allow many people to grow vanilla themselves and achieve their vanilla dreams and either own their own plantations or be a partner in one at a very affordable price. 

We are also working on multiple flowers per year and early results to achieve this goal have been very promising. 

Our company continues to invest in research and development to ensure the outcomes are repeatable and we have amongst the best organically grown vanilla beans in the world. 

Our work is not limited to Australian either, we have been working to form partnerships with Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, Uganda, Brazil and Peru. With increasing knowledge we are able to support farmers in these regions and provide the best prices for their vanilla. 

We seek collaboration as we believe it doesn't matter how much vanilla farmers produce it will never be enough. The market potential for vanilla is essentially untapped with new research into applications beyond food such as pharmaceutical, beauty and fragrances, aromatherapy etc.

We are working with overseas farmers to assist them increase their yield per square meter, quality, get paid fairer prices as well as contribute to various sustainability goals to assist their communities.

Name: Garten- und Landschaftsbau Alfred GmbH
Description:
Die Gartenbau Alfred GmbH ist Ihr kompetenter Ansprechpartner für Gartenplanung, Gartenbau und Beratung. 

Wir realisieren nachhaltige Gärten mit besonderem Charakter und individueller Gestaltung.  Mit unserer langjährigen Erfahrung, fachlicher Kompetenz und kreativen Ideen sorgen wir dafür, dass Sie Ihr Wohngold im Garten behalten.

Unser Ziel ist es, Ihnen einen perfekten Garten zu gestalten – ganz nach Ihren Vorstellungen und Bedürfnissen. Dabei legen wir besonderen Wert auf Nachhaltigkeit und Qualität. So entstehen individuelle Traumgärten, in denen Sie sich rundum wohlfühlen können – ein Ort der Erholung für die Seele und ein Juwel für die Umgebung. 

Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen Ihren Traumgarten zu gestalten!

Name: Agrotivate
Description: Plant nutrition

Name: MITERA
Description:
At Mitera, we are committed to caring for the Earth through innovative solutions rooted in the carbon cycle. We specialize in the artisanal production of biochar, using the Kon-Tiki kiln methodology to transform residual biomass into a highly effective soil enhancer.

Our process not only efficiently captures carbon, disrupting the carbon cycle to benefit the environment, but also returns valuable nutrients to the soil. This enriches the soil and allows plants to thrive, even in the face of the current climate crisis. Our commitment to environmental stewardship and sustainable practices positions us as disruptive artisans in the field of biochar, offering our clients—ranging from gardening enthusiasts and forward-thinking farmers to environmentally conscious companies—a product that not only improves soil fertility and contributes to carbon sequestration but also supports the development of carbon-negative technologies designed to remove more CO₂ equivalent from the atmosphere than they emit during production and application.

Join us on our journey to enrich soils and sustain the environment, one handful of biochar at a time.

Mitera | Climate Action From Your Garden | Artisanal Biochar Producers

With a large network or growers and suppliers we are capable of creating tailor-made solutions for our customers. Combined with our great expertise on added value and the knowledge of trendlogic we can fullfill every need.

Name: Vera's Nursery, Inc
Description: In 2001 the Vera family, of Vera’s Nursery, arrived from Cuba, running away from a regimen that had no room for freedom of speech, liberty, and much less the ability of someone to own a business. Leaving behind everything except a dream, the “American Dream”, they brought with them hard working ethics that later turned out to be the very key to their success. Two years after their arrival the family business was born. The family worked seven days a week, often from 7 in the morning until 5 at night, on only two acres of land. They named their business Vera’s Nursery and continued to work hard, never taking a day off, fueled by their passion to grow plants.

Name: ORO wolkorrel
Description:
Wij zijn verbijsterd over de lage waarde die ruwe wol momenteel kent. Hoe meer je met dit materiaal in aanraking komt hoe mooier het wordt. Wist je dat wol vuurdovend en brandvertragend is? Als isolatie gebruikt kan worden? Vochtregulerend? Anti allergeen? Temperatuur kan reguleren? Slakken hebben er een hekel aan en ook nog eens goed dient als plantenvoeding?

Geïnspireerd door onze eigen schapen en gestimuleerd om de wereld een beetje mooier te maken. De wolstapel van het jaarlijks schapenscheren roept om een toepassing zonder poespas. Wat blijkt? Deze multifunctioneel inzetbare grazers blijken een super groene jas te dragen! Onze missie is om de jaarlijkse miljoenen kilo’s aan overtollige schapenwol in te zetten als plantenvoeding.

Name: Edens Plants & Creations
Description:
Edens Plants & Creations is a plant breeding company and nursery based in Wezep (The Netherlands). The main breeding activities are classical breeding within the species Calluna vulgaris, also known as heath, Hebe and Conifers. Started in 1972, Edens Plants & Creations now provides more than 100 growers in Western-Europe, Eastern-Europe, Japan, The United States and Canada, controlled by agents. 

During long test phases, all selected varieties are tested for resistance of diseases, durability, luminosity, uniformity and a wide range of other quality characteristics.  In the early nineties, we developed the red filled-flowering Calluna vulgaris Dark Beauty, this variety is still popular. 
In 2013 our assortment includes more than 50 protected bud-blooming Calluna varieties. These bud-blooming varieties are very special because the closed flower-bud which results in a very long flowering time. The bud-blooming Calluna's are protected under the name Beauty Ladies.

Our latest innovation is the Skyline Serie. These Calluna varieties are characterized by an intense distinguishable foliage color, thick branches and square looking shoots. In the coming years we will expand and intensify our breeding activities.

Name: Riedrich und Dremel GmbH Garten- & Landschaftsbau Gärtner von Eden
Description:
Als Experte für Garten und Landschaft sind wir Ihr Ansprechpartner für die Anlage und Umgestaltung Ihres Gartens.

Ihren Garten:
von der Beratung und Gestaltung Ihres Gartens mit Pflanzungen, Pflaster- und Terrassenflächen über den Bau von Car-ports und Teichen sowie dem Einbau von Bewässerungsanlagen bis hin zu individuellen Beleuch-tungskonzepten für die Highlights Ihres Gartens.

Name: Haars Nursery
Description:
As a leading wholesale plant producer in Australia, Haars is dedicated to supplying high quality flowering indoor and outdoor plants to retailers, landscapers, growers, and gardening enthusiasts across the nation. Our commitment to excellence is underscored by our accreditation from Fair Farms, a testament to our ethical and sustainable practices.

At Haars, our propagation team meticulously selects and cultivates clean virus-indexed material sourced from trusted breeding partners. By adhering to rigorous hygiene protocols, we ensure that Haars and our partner growers have access to resilient young plant material, guaranteeing exceptional garden performance for Australian gardeners.

Join us in shaping the future of horticulture with quality, integrity, and innovation.

Name: Cacti Youngplants
Description: Supplier of quality succulent and cactus unrooted cuttings and plants to professional growers all over the world. Strong partnerships with farms in Africa and Central America in order to offer growers the best products. Leaf cacti, grafted cacti, clumped cacti and many more. Together with our partner HFT Seedservices (Guatemala) we present the best cacti cuttings in the market. Zimflora P/L (Zimbabwe) and Floramo S.A. (Costa Rica) are our exclusive succulent production partners.

Name: bluegardens AG
Description:
bluegardens stands for progress and strong partnerships. As a European network, bluegardens brings together pool builders, garden and landscape specialists, architects, suppliers and industry associations in one shared space. This environment enables open exchange, new perspectives and real economic opportunities.

Our aim is to strengthen collaboration within each profession while creating new connections between pool construction and garden design. This cross sector bridge is a core part of our mission and forms the foundation for a modern and future oriented platform.

Over the coming months we are building a marketplace that creates clear benefits for both businesses and suppliers.

For businesses: improved procurement options, practical digital tools, better visibility and effective support in marketing. This combination increases operational efficiency and helps companies stay competitive.

For suppliers: access to a growing network, direct connections to pool and garden companies as well as architects, and a transparent marketplace for new business relationships.

At the heart of bluegardens lies the network itself. This is where knowledge grows, trust develops and new cooperation emerges. We are building a community that creates economic value while placing people and collaboration at the centre.

Step by step we are developing solutions that meet the modern needs of the sector. Digital processes, clear communication and reliable support are essential elements. Our ambition is to drive sustainable development in the market, supported by partnership and transparency.

bluegardens sees itself as a network that reaches far beyond traditional marketplaces.

Name: FarmBazaar
Description:
FarmBazaar is a B2B platform for Small & Micro Enterprises (SMEs like retailers, kirana & kitchens) to source fresh fruits & vegetables. We help SMEs to earn more through the right mix of products, prices & information. We simplify the sourcing process through easy ordering, direct store delivery & dedicated customer support. 

The platform brings together verified sellers like farmers, farm aggregators & importers to supply to SMEs and assist them to digitise the supply chain, transactions payments and settlements. 

FarmBazaar was founded to develop a sustainable ecosystem, we support small farmers, local produce, local communities and the nature. Our intent is to up skill, uplift and positively impact 1+ million marginal communities across the fresh produce value chain in India.

Name: The Guernsey Clematis Nursery Ltd
Description:
Guernsey Clematis the home of Raymond Evison Clematis. 

We are breeders of high quality clematis and a producer of young plants to wholesale nurseries across the world.

Many of you will know us from our gold winning displays at The RHS Chelsea Flower Show with our Raymond Evison Clematis.

If you are looking for a volume supplier of young plants mainly offered in 7cm liners or if required bare root washed plants please do get in contact.

Name: Power2Plants
Description:
Power2Plants werd in 2021 opgericht door Mark van der Werf om telers te ondersteunen in hun zoektocht naar gezondere en weerbare planten. Power2Plants combineert haar uitgebreide kennis en ervaring op het gebied van plantgezondheid met metingen en data van jouw teelt in het Plant Prestatie Concept. Binnen dit concept ligt de focus op het creëren van de ideale omstandigheden voor planten op het gebied van voeding, klimaat en bodem/substraat, waardoor planten zo optimaal mogelijk energie kunnen genereren. Dit versterkt de natuurlijke weerbaarheid van planten tegen ziekten en plagen, verhoogt de opbrengst en verbetert de kwaliteit. 
Het bepalen van de streefwaarden, meten, bijsturen en evalueren vormen hierbij de groene draad. 

Benieuwd wat het Plant Prestatie Concept voor jouw teelt kan betekenen? Neem dan contact met ons op of neem een kijkje op www.power2plants.nl voor meer informatie.

Name: Hydro Oasis
Description:
At Hydro Oasis, we are passionate about all things hydroponics and rare exotic plants. We proudly offer a diverse range of hydroponic equipment, nutrients, and accessories, catering to everyone from home growers to commercial cultivators. Located in the heart of Youngtown, Tasmania, our mission is to provide sustainable and innovative solutions to help you grow healthier, stronger plants—whether you're cultivating vegetables, herbs, or rare exotic species.

We offer a wide range of hydroponic equipment and systems, from entry-level kits to advanced setups designed to optimize your growing potential. Our comprehensive selection of high-quality nutrients and additives ensures your plants receive the perfect balance for optimum growth. For plant enthusiasts, we also stock a variety of rare and exotic plants, including striking specimens like Nepenthes, orchids, and terrarium plants. Additionally, we provide terrarium supplies for creating beautiful displays and thriving micro-environments.

At Hydro Oasis, our team is committed to providing expert guidance and support throughout your growing journey. With years of experience in the hydroponics industry, we offer personalized consultations to help you select the right equipment and troubleshoot any challenges. We believe in building strong relationships with our customers and strive to be your go-to resource for all things hydroponics and plant care.

Our vision is to empower individuals and businesses by making innovative growing techniques accessible, sustainable, and rewarding. Whether you’re a seasoned grower or just starting, Hydro Oasis is here to support you with premium products and expert knowledge. Visit our showroom at 322 Hobart Road, Youngtown TAS 7249, and discover how we can help you grow more efficiently and sustainably. You can also connect with us online to stay updated on our latest products, offers, and growing tips.

Let’s grow together at Hydro Oasis!

Name: Richters Herbs
Description: 1000 varieties of culinary, medicinal and aromatic herbs. Plants, seeds, dried herbs, books, videos, software, seminars, workshops, conferences. For home gardeners and commercial growers. Shipped worldwide.

Name: Joseph Rochford Gardens Ltd.
Description:
Established in 1974 Joseph Rochford Gardens is one of the UK’s leading wholesale nurseries supplying the landscape and gardening industries, and many local authorities. 
Buying your plants couldn’t be easier, everything you need is available or quickly sourced. Rochford’s Cash & Carry is one of the largest in the UK; friendly and helpful, with no minimum orders for Landscape and Garden professionals, just drive in, register, use the app, and load up.

In buying from Rochfords you can source your plants with peace of mind, knowing they have been grown in house or selected from quality nurseries throughout the UK and Europe. Rochfords have taken the time to visit their suppliers thus ensuring that quality products to the right specification and price are delivered. 

With OHAS (BOPP) accreditation you can source your plants with confidence.

Name: Horti Inside
Description: Horti Inside contributes to knowledge exchange in international protected horticulture. The focus is on modern greenhouse technology.

Name: Gruber & Söhne GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ihr Partner rund um Haus und Garten! 
Wir bauen Pools und Poollandschaften zum Wohlfühlen, Pflastern Terrassen und Einfahrten, gestalten den Garten oder installieren Regenwasserzisternen. Fragen Sie uns einfach, wir setzen Ihre Wünsche um!

Name: Firma-Thomas
Description:
Wij bieden u landbouwmachines aan die behoren tot de top. Enkel op deze manier kunnen wij u bedrijfszekerheid en een perfecte service garanderen.

Wij vertegenwoordigen een volledig programma aan tuin & park machines en machines voor het onderhoud en de renovatie van sportterreinen en golfcourts. Naast de Invoerder van de New Holland compact tractoren, Rotadairon, Trimax, Redexim, Ino,..  voor Belgiê , zijn wij ook exclusief invoerder en verdeler van Timberwolf voor de BeNeLux.

Nous vous proposons des machines agricoles parmi les meilleures. Ce n'est qu'ainsi que nous pouvons vous garantir une sécurité de fonctionnement et un service parfait.

Nous représentons une gamme complète de machines pour le jardin et le parc et de machines pour l'entretien et la rénovation de terrains de sport et de golf. En plus d'être l'importateur des tracteurs compacts New Holland, Rotadairon, Trimax, Redexim, Ino,...  pour la Belgique, sommes-nous également l'importateur et le distributeur exclusif de Timberwolf pour le BeNeLux.

Name: Kwekerij Overgaag
Description: Kwekerij Overgaag is gespecialiseerd in de teelt en verwerking van rode paprika’s. Wij zijn gevestigd in Westland en Midden Delfland. Ons bedrijf bestaat uit drie productielocaties en een geconditioneerde verwerkingsloods. Tevens beschikt het bedrijf over verschillende certificaten om de Duitse en Engelse markt te kunnen bedienen, dit zijn o.a. GlobalGap, Nature’s Choise, Q-S en PlanetProof. Hierdoor zijn wij in staat de wensen van onze klanten volgens de gestelde kwaliteitsnormen in te vullen.

Name: Active Grow
Description: Active Grow is a horticultural LED lighting manufacturer whose mission is to empower growers to become self-sustainable by helping them grow healthier plants and reduce their carbon footprint. We understand the importance of plants as food, medicine, a way to brighten up a space or as a means to connect with nature. We research and develop commercial and residential LED grow lighting products, grow tents and smart controls and are constantly pushing the envelope in technology, efficiency and design for growers and their plants.

Name: June Trading and Consultancy
Description:
June T&C is an internationally oriented company that combines trade in fast-moving grower goods with specialized cultivation consultancy.

With a strong network in greenhouse horticulture and expertise in areas such as soft fruit, leafy greens, and high-tech greenhouses, the company supports growers and partners from design to execution.

By leveraging AI in trading activities and customer communication, June T&C contributes to efficient, innovative, and future-focused solutions for the sector.

Name: Agrisano Fresh
Description:
Agrisano Fresh is a farmer and a developer.  

We build and operate state of the art greenhouses out of our headquarters in Mallala South Australia. We provide high quality, affordable fresh leafy greens that have been grown in optimized conditions that are sustainable and socially responsible.  

We use technology to ensure the best quality produce and work with our partners to develop a range of products through our development at Mallala. We are customer centric, partnering with our customers to build their businesses.

Name: HOLLAND GREENTECH BENIN
Description:
Société spécialisée dans la durabilité agricole, dans
l’innovation et dans la formation des différents acteurs de sa chaine de valeur.

Name: The Gallard Group
Description:
Gallard Group is a multi-generational, family-led horticulture and agriculture business committed to delivering measurable value and long-term improvement — for our clients and our industry.

While our roots are in the Riverland and Sunraysia, our reach and relationships extend Australia-wide. We’re not just in the business of services and machinery — we’re here to drive innovative progress in Australian agriculture. From mechanical pruning, industry-leading machinery supply through to our involvement in developing Ag autonomy with vision-steer technology.

Our reputation is built on more than what we do — it’s built on why we do it:
- Using our decades of experience to help our clients’ properties thrive
- To leave the land better than we found it
- To find smarter, more sustainable, innovative ways forward

Our partners choose Gallard not just because we get the job done, but because they trust the way we do it.

Name: Cannabiomedic
Description:
Nous sommes des producteurs de fleurs de cannabis de haute qualité.
Pour nous, la qualité passe avant la quantité!

Name: NZPPI (New Zealand Plant Producers Inc.)
Description:
New Zealand Plant Producers Incorporated is the industry body for plant producers and our industry partners. 
Our members are the nursery businesses that propagate and grow plants for forests, ecology, food, wine and greenlife plantings.

Name: AGUAS URUGUAY
Description:
En Aguas Uruguay, apostamos por una producción eficiente con tecnologías innovadoras. 
Somos una empresa líder en el mercado de invernaderos, hidroponía, fertirrigación, climatización y más. 
Ofrecemos soluciones integrales para la producción de alimentos de alta calidad. 
Con nuestros productos y servicios, brindamos a nuestros clientes la capacidad de mejorar su producción y aumentar la rentabilidad. 
Nos comprometemos a proporcionar productos de calidad y un servicio excepcional a nuestros clientes, para ayudarlos a alcanzar sus objetivos de producción y hacer crecer sus negocios.

Name: Koos Buitenhuis Boomkwekerij BV
Description:
Koos Buitenhuis Boomkwekerij is een familiebedrijf dat sinds 1972 gespecialiseerd in het kweken van hoogwaardige tuinplanten. Met een breed assortiment aan Coniferen, Buxus, Euonymus, Berberis en verschillende haagconcepten willen wij voorzien in al uw groene wensen. 

Dagelijks werkt een enthousiast team om de producten te verzorgen en verzendklaar te maken. Als bedrijf dragen wij verantwoordelijkheid voor onze medemens. Daarom hebben we oog voor de medewerker en werken we samen met verschillende sociale ondernemingen.

Wij onderscheiden ons graag op een innovatieve manier. Duurzaamheid is daarbij een uitgangspunt. Zo kweken wij volgens de nieuwste productietechnieken en gebruiken mest bij de productie. Hiermee ondersteunen wij de boeren en verhogen de kwaliteit van het product op een natuurlijke manier.

Als bedrijf zijn wij MPS-A en MPS GAP gecertificeerd.

Name: Durston Garden Products Ltd
Description:
For over 150 years we’ve been innovating, evolving and diversifying our Somerset-based business to meet the demands of our customers.

Today we’re focused on paving the way for the future of compost. And the results speak for themselves with our peat-free range proven to deliver up to 70% more growth than standard mixes.

This performance is thanks to our passion for a sustainable, cost-effective product for customers alongside our no compromise approach to quality.

Name: Organic Earth
Description:
Organic Earth | Sustainable Urban Farming + Clean Air Solutions
We’re turning cities into green havens—one plant at a time.

What We Offer:

Air-Purifying Plants: Scientifically backed varieties (like peace lilies, snake plants, and more) that filter toxins and boost indoor air quality.

Smart Urban Farms: Hydroponic kits and AI-powered gardens for growing fresh food on rooftops, balconies, and in classrooms.

Climate-Resilient Crops: Designed to thrive in urban environments, reducing water use and pesticide dependence.

Why It Matters:
By 2050, 80% of food will be eaten in cities—but today’s systems are fragile. Our solutions tackle two crises at once:
 Food Security: Decentralized, hyperlocal growing.
 Clean Air: Plants that absorb pollutants (VOCs, CO2) while you harvest.

Join the Movement:
 Explore our plants and partnerships: organicearth.co

Name: George Sant and Sons Greenhouses
Description: At George Sant & Sons, we are committed to providing our customers with top quality young and finished plant material, as well as some of the best service in the industry throughout Canada and North America. Located just north of Toronto, Ontario, we grow finished plant material for Nurseries throughout Ontario and have made a name for ourselves throughout North America as a Gold supplier of young plant material for Ball Horticulture.

Name: Greenport Horti Campus Katapult-programma
Description: Greenport West-Holland is de meest vooruitstrevende glastuinbouwregio ter wereld. Hier vind je de beste bedrijven en opleidingen rondom teelt, techniek, verslogistiek, vershandel en veredeling. Zij werken samen aan een nóg duurzamere toekomst voor de regio gericht op gezondheid, welbevinden en energieneutraal. Dat doen ze binnen Greenport Horti Campus. Deze netwerkcampus heeft verspreid in de regio 3 campussen. Daar vind je de toekomst op het gebied van kennis & innovatie in het glastuinbouw-cluster.

Name: Rosewood Living Walls
Description:
We are Rosewood Living Walls Ltd, the experts in vertical gardens for residential and commercial properties.  We install living walls outside, even in tiny spaces like balconies, and we also provide interior versions to create the wow factor inside your home or office.
Sister company to Rosewood Irrigation Services Ltd, which has nearly a decade of glowing testimonials and a reputation for the quality of its work and service, we are committed to maintaining the same high standards.

Name: The Tattooed Gardener Inc.
Description:
A passionate life-long horticulturist, Paul was featured on the award-winning television documentary series ‘Visionary Gardeners’.   He is the former Director of Horticulture at the Toronto Botanical Garden, and the former Curatorial Gardener at The Toronto Zoo overseeing one of Canada’s largest tropical plant collections.
 
Many online garden lovers may know Paul through his strong online presence as The Tattooed Gardener, with social media posts reaching 30-35 million people per month. He is an avid collector of rare and unusual plants with a personal collection of over 800 tropical plants. As an experienced hybridizer of daylilies, with 66 registrations with the American Hemerocallis Society.  Paul is the recipient of the 2022 Douglas Lycett award for the daylily now registered ‘Oscar Peterson’

Although gardening has been a life-long passion, (He was a Director of the Waterloo Horticultural Society at 16 years old); he entered horticulture as a profession just over a decade ago. Paul started part time at Plant World in their perennial department. He then accepted a position as gardener / grower for the City of Toronto, maintaining historical gardens in the west end of Toronto, (Sunnyside Pavilion / James Gardens) He also spent time as an estate gardener for a Trillium award-winning garden in Carlisle Ontario. Paul’s podcast ‘Life in the Garden, can be listened to monthly on Focal Point E-News, in addition to his guest appearances on Podcasts and Radio shows, in Newspapers and Magazines.  His former home garden, which held an eclectic mixture of plants, is featured in Tara Nolan’s book: Gardening Your Front Yard: Projects and Ideas for Big and Small Spaces.

The Tattooed Gardener Inc.  draws from all of those experiences to offer: One of a kind Garden Coaching, Garden Consulting, Design Services, Quality Garden Maintenance, Dynamic Planters, Rare plants and seeds, and more!  Uniting a community of Plant lovers around the world.

Name: Gartenbau Bongartz GmbH
Description:
Gartenbau Bongartz GmbH is a young plant producer in the fields of bedding plants, perennials and poinsettias. The focus is on a high quality young plant with good genetics. In addition to the young plants, Bongartz is also producing and selling paper pots.

Gartenbau Bongartz GmbH ist ein Jungpflanzenunternehmen in den Bereichen Beet- und Balkonpflanzen, Stauden und Poinsettien. Der Focus von Gartenbau Bongartz liegt auf qualitativ hochwertige Jungpflanzen mit einer guten Genetik. Neben den Jungpflanzen produziert und verkauft Bongartz auch noch Vliestöpfe.

Name: AvoNest Kenya
Description:
At AvoNest Kenya, we are dedicated to transforming the avocado industry in Kenya. 

With expertise in propagation, orchard establishment and management, pest and disease management, farmer trainings, market access and exports, we serve as one stop solution for avocado growers, exporters and enthusiasts.

Our mission is to create sustainable value chains while empowering local communities.

Through innovation and a commitment to quality, we aim to support orchards to exports to the global arena.

Name: FutureProp
Description: Multi-Layer Precision Propagation

Name: Solisplant
Description: Solisplant es un referente en la producción y distribución de plantas de calidad en Europa. Nuestra pasión por la sostenibilidad y la innovación nos impulsa a liderar el sector. Te invitamos a ser parte de nuestro compromiso verde.

Name: Manbulloo Ltd
Description:
When Marie Piccone signed the lease on three mango farms in early 2005 she could not have anticipated the crazy journey of highs and lows, victories and losses, and above all – hard work
she was about to embark on.

Marie attributes Manbulloo’s growth and success over the past 14 years to the passion and
dedication of her team, which boasts world-class knowledge, training and experience in mango growing, harvesting, export and supply chain management…The team’s hard work and success has
been recognised with numerous accolades over the years and Marie herself was awarded the
Telstra Business Women’s Entrepreneur Award in 2015.

Manbulloo has expanded in recent years and now owns seven farms spanning the Queensland and Northern Territory regions of Northern Australia. Manbulloo also exports a portion of its crop each year to numerous overseas customers through its subsidiary company, Mango Road.

As Australia’s largest growers of Australia’s favourite mango variety – Kensington Pride – Manbulloo feels a great responsibility to deliver the best tasting mangoes to consumers both in Australia and overseas each year.

Name: GroundsFest Academy
Description: The GroundsFest Academy is an exciting educational initiative designed for professionals in the groundscare and landscaping industries. With expert-led sessions and real-world learning, it’s your chance to gain skills, discover new techniques, and connect with industry leaders.

Name: POOL-SYSTEMS GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Pool vom Marktführer & mehrfachen Testsieger

Wir machen Ihren Pooltraum zum Traumpool: Als Deutschlands Marktführer und führender Pool-Fachhändler sind wir die perfekte Anlaufstelle für alle, die nicht länger vom Pool zuhause träumen wollen.

Vertrauen auch Sie bei Ihrem Pool-Projekt auf den Marktführer & mehrfachen Testsieger: Deutschlands Pool-Fachhändler mit der höchsten Kundenzufriedenheit - denn Kundenservice und VorOrt-Betreuung sind in den Jahren nach dem Kauf genauso wichtig wie vor dem Kauf.

Ohne Aufwand und Kosten über Zwischenhändler bieten wir Ihnen eine umfassende Auswahl an individuellen Pool-Komplettsets (Pool + Abdeckung + Technik), die fertig montiert, verrohrt und verkabelt geliefert werden. So machen Sie Ihre Poolträume ganz einfach wahr – egal ob mit unseren attraktiven Einsteigermodellen oder Pool-Modellen für ganz besondere Ansprüche.

Beratung und Service werden bei POOL-SYSTEMS groß geschrieben: In der Firmenzentrale im Bayerischen Wald können Sie sich vor Ort in unserer Ausstellung von der Qualität unserer Produkte überzeugen. Die persönliche, individuelle Beratung ist dabei selbstverständlich. Gerne besuchen Sie unsere Außendienst-Mitarbeiter auch bei Ihnen zuhause. Außerdem ermöglicht Ihnen unser Referenzkundenmodell die Besichtigung bereits realisierter Pools in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz. Unser einmaliges Produkt- und Serviceangebot überzeugt jedes Jahr mehrere Tausend Kunden und macht uns zu Deutschlands bestem Pool-Fachhändler mit der höchsten Kundenzufriedenheit.

Mit POOL-SYSTEMS entscheiden Sie sich für garantierte Qualität: Auf die Dichtigkeit unserer Becken erhalten Sie 15 Jahre Garantie. Zudem sind wir mehrfach zertifiziert: von Trusted Shops, TÜV und EHI. Auf Lieferung, Montage und Inbetriebnahme durch Pool-Systems ist ebenso Verlass wie auf den anschließenden Kundenservice.

Erfüllen Sie sich Ihre Poolträume und sind Sie für immer zuhause im Urlaub!

Name: Huejay Group Of Companies
Description:
Constantly challenging boundaries and concepts, Shirohana is the leader in Sri Lanka’s cut-flower industry since its inception in 1983. Renowned for recognizing the power of flowers to awake a range of emotions, our highly acclaimed chain of flower shops can be found around the island – in Colombo and Negombo.

As the most reputable chain of flower shops in Sri Lanka, it has been our signature individuality and distinction in quality that has driven our success over the years, emerging as the ultimate flower shop experience, par none. Using only the finest flowers and foliage that captures the essence of each passing season, we offer customers a variety of bespoke bouquets, helping you deliver the message you want, whether it’s a gesture of love, luck or a simple thank you. Our designs inspire with its bright vibrant hues, reflecting its natural beauty while exuding sophistication, elegance and charm.
The greatest advantage of Shirohana is that we grow our own flowers, which enables us to offer customers a diverse variety of fresh flowers at very competitive prices. Recognized for our generosity in hand-crafting every floral creation we do, our aim is offer custom-made floral arrangements based on your needs – whether it’s a fashionable flower arrangement or a romantic, intimate bouquet you require. Each arrangement is delivered with personalized cards for your own individual message.

Name: MUZI Garden fabric pot grow bag
Description:
MUZI Garden is the leading fabric pot and tool bag manufacturer located in Shenzhen, China. Our product range includes all types of fabric pots, hanging wall bags, fabric raised beds and grow tents. Every year, we strive to develop innovative and creative designs, some of which become instant hits such as our potato growing bags. 

Founded by Mr. Zhang in 2008, we have since grown to become one of the most reliable and respected fabric pot makers in the world. Our products have been exported to North America, South America, Middle East and EU, and have earned us a strong reputation in the market. 

We are well-equipped with the latest and most advanced machinery, such as laser cutting machines, computer stitching machines, vacuum processes, and other small machines, to ensure high accuracy and efficiency. All designs are tested on our own farm in Zhongshan, Guangdong before being presented to our customers. 

We strive to provide our customers with the most competitive products and superior customer service.
MUZI Garden has professionally produced many fabric pot designs for customers from North America, South America, the Middle East and EU with very good market reputation.

We are dedicated to providing the most competitive product and superior customer service.

Name: Zwivhuya Agricultural Foundation
Description:
Empowering Communities through Sustainable Agriculture at Zwivhuya Agricultural Foundation

At Zwivhuya Agricultural Foundation, we're the architects of agricultural transformation, weaving together a tapestry of sustainable practices and community empowerment. Rooted in the belief that the future of agriculture lies in its sustainability, we embark on a mission to nurture and cultivate resilient communities through innovative agricultural solutions.

Our foundation is built upon the pillars of education, empowerment, and environmental stewardship. We stand as champions for small-scale subsistence farmers, offering a mosaic of educational programs, workshops, and hands-on training sessions. Through these initiatives, we equip farmers with cutting-edge knowledge and practical skills, empowering them to adopt sustainable farming practices that amplify yields while preserving the integrity of the land.

Collaboration is our cornerstone; we forge partnerships with local communities, governmental bodies, and industry stakeholders, fostering a collaborative ecosystem that drives sustainable change. Together, we implement initiatives that promote soil conservation, water management, and biodiversity preservation, safeguarding the delicate balance between agricultural productivity and ecological harmony.

Innovation is our guiding star. We embrace technological advancements, introducing farmers to modern agricultural methodologies, precision farming techniques, and the integration of renewable energy sources. Our commitment to innovation extends to fostering research and development initiatives, exploring the frontiers of agricultural science to unearth novel solutions for the challenges of tomorrow.

Our outreach programs extend beyond farming techniques; we advocate for economic empowerment, gender equality, and social inclusion within agricultural communities. By promoting entrepreneurship and providing access to markets and resources, we empower individuals to break bar

Name: Eternal Fresh
Description:
Eternal Fresh is a leading vertically integrated horticulture business. We invest in new genetics, farming and packing, export, and marketing to premium customers globally.

We are an innovative business, acquiring new varieties, adopting new automation technologies in picking and packing, Brix sorting, AI and drone technology. Striving for and delivering best practice is in our DNA. Our logistics capability excels in extracting the time value of the perishable cargo via our streamlined supply chain. We strive to understand and deliver exceptional value in a consistent, sustainable manner.

Our company motto is “A Fruitful Experience” for all of our partners. We work with our stakeholders to GROW – to be Genuine, Reliable, Open and, Warm.

We grow a fruitful future. We believe every good tree bears good fruit.

Our mission is to renew and refresh ourselves from within to add value to our customers, community and society. We believe the reason we exist is because we create a value for others.

Our Head Office is based in Gosford, New South Wales and our production sites are in South Australia and Victoria. We also have a global presence in Chile, China, New Zealand, Taiwan, Vietnam, Singapore and South Africa.

Eternal Fresh. A fruitful experience.

Name: Intaba Flowers Pty Ltd
Description:
Intaba Flowers Pty Ltd is dedicated to bringing the stunning beauty of the Cape Floral Kingdom to both retail and wholesale markets, both locally and internationally. Our name, 'Intaba', meaning 'mountain' in isiXhosa, represents the famous Table Mountain in Cape Town, as well as the mountain ranges in the Western and Eastern Cape that are home to one of the most diverse floral kingdoms in the world.

As a company, we are committed to sourcing the highest quality of Cape Flora, which includes both cultivated and wild-harvested Cut Flowers such as Proteas, Pincushions, Leucadendrons, Brunias, and a wide variety of flowering and Indigenous Greens. We work closely with our growers to maintain strong relationships and meaningful partnerships, ensuring that we can deliver the best flora and exceptional service to our customers worldwide.

Our passion for the beautiful Floral Kingdom runs deep, and we are acutely aware of the impact this industry has on local job creation. By supporting and sustaining many impoverished communities in and around the Western Cape, we strive to make a positive difference in the world.

Name: BC Plant Health Care, SavATree Canada
Description:
Since 2000, BC Plant Health Care has been the trusted choice for professional arboriculture and plant health services in Greater Vancouver and the Fraser Valley. Our team of certified arborists delivers expert solutions across every aspect of tree and landscape management — from consultation to hands-on care — with precision, safety, and accountability.

We offer a comprehensive suite of services designed to protect your property, reduce risk, and maintain healthy, safe, and attractive trees:
- Arboriculture Consulting & Risk Assessment – professional guidance for safe, informed decision-making.
- Tree Health & Plant Diagnostics – soil analysis, pest & disease management, and plant care strategies.
- Tree Work – pruning, crown maintenance, structural support, and hazard mitigation.
- Hazardous Tree Removals & Stump Grinding – safe, efficient, and fully insured solutions.
- Root Management & Soil Care – ensuring tree stability and longevity on every site.
- Education & Training – customized arborist safety courses and programs for property managers, staff, and communities.

With over two decades of experience, BC Plant Health Care is committed to delivering meticulous, reliable service — combining technical expertise, certified professionals, and state-of-the-art methods to protect your investment and keep your trees performing safely and beautifully.

When you work with us, you get more than tree care — you get peace of mind, professional oversight, and a team that treats every property with the precision and attention it deserves.

Name: Breugem Plants B.V.
Description:
Breugem Plants teelt grootbloemige Anthuriums in de potmaten 12, 14 en 17 cm. Potmaat 24 cm kan op aanvraag worden geleverd. 
De slogan van Breugem Plants is "Grown with love". De planten worden met veel liefde, zorg en passie geteeld. Dit geeft zware royale planten als resultaat. Daarom hebben wij de 'Royal' lijn opgezet. Hiermee laten wij zien dat deze planten grote 'royale' bloemen hebben die mooi op de plant staan. 

Uiteraard wordt er milieubewust geproduceerd door onder andere gebruik te maken van aardwarmte ROCA en CO2, maximaal biologische bestrijding en gesloten waterhuishouding.

Name: Anleolife

Name: Plant Select
Description:
Plant Select is the country’s leading brand of plants designed to thrive in the high plains and intermountain regions. We offer plants that provide more beauty with less work, so gardeners of all levels can achieve smart, stunning and successful gardens using fewer resources and with a more positive environmental impact.

Plant Select is a non-profit collaboration between Colorado State University, Denver Botanic Gardens and the professional horticulture industry (growers, garden centers, landscape professionals and beyond).

Name: Floragran BV
Description: Over 40 years of experience in production and sales of both hybrid and open pollinated varieties have made us the well-known and trusted partner in the flower seed market. Our products are available worldwide through renowned distribution channels.

Name: Cropsphere
Description:
Cropsphere is building India’s regenerative agriculture and climate-nutrition ecosystem.

We are rebuilding the food system from the soil upward — where farmers earn better, consumers eat cleaner, and every acre contributes to a healthier planet.

Our platform integrates the full chain:

 HarvestHQ — an agriculture operating system with AI crop planning, soil intelligence, satellite verification, and regenerative scoring.
 Regenerative Clusters — activated farmlands that follow biodiversity, soil-health, and low-input practices to create high-quality, consistent supply.

Located in Kericho in the highlands to the west of the Kenya’s Great Rift Valley at an altitude of approximately 2,100 meters above the sea level, Murara Plants Kenya is situated against the edge of The Mau Forest and surrounded by Tea Plantations. Kericho has a warm and temperate climate. The average annual rainfall is between 1800 and 2000 mm of rain, with a constant 12-hour average daylight. The temperatures range between 20 and 26 degrees Celsius during the day and 10 to 12 degrees Celsius during the night throughout the year making it an ideal location for the propagation of high-quality cuttings which meet all international phytosanitary standards.

Our staff has the necessary knowledge, experience and training to handle a wide variety of plant species. Name: Prairie Friends
Description:
Prairie Friends Native Plant Nursery specializes in perennials which are indigenous species, all of them grown directly from seed. We source seeds from the Upper Midwest as well as gathering them locally for germination. Our plants represent the original species which have co-evolved with prairie insects over the past 12,000 years. They are not cloned, started from cuttings or grown as native cultivars (also known as 'nativars'). The perennials we help bring to life are as authentic as they are enduring.

Our plant nursery is genuinely committed to promoting biodiversity, conserving natural resources, practicing sustainability, excluding pesticides (including neonics) and — most importantly — nourishing the pollinators which help nourish us. Further, our operation uses recycled, repurposed and recovered materials wherever possible. For example, our growing medium does not use peat moss which is non-renewable and extracted from Canadian bogs and wetlands. Instead, we use PittMoss, an organic, peat-free product made from recycled paper.

Prairie Friends exclusively grows and sells native plants so collectively we can help restore a small part of the natural ecosystem that thrived here for thousands of years. By planting flowering perennials, each of us can provide permanent habitat and food sources for the many species of bees, butterflies, birds, and other native wildlife living near our homes. Our business, our work and our learning are inspired by the shared values of reverence, joy and curiosity about the native plants which are keystone species of our regional ecosystem and its food web.

 Transform your workplace into a greener, healthier environment with Onuà World.

Name: Chenlist
Description:
In the year 1878 I took my degree of Doctor of Medicine of the University of London, and proceeded to Netley to go through the course prescribed for surgeons in the army. Having completed my studies there, I was duly attached to the Fifth Northumberland Fusiliers as Assistant Surgeon. The regiment was stationed in India at the time, and before I could join it, the second Afghan war had broken out. On landing at Bombay, I learned that my corps had advanced through the passes, and was already deep in the enemy's country. I followed, however, with many other officers who were in the same situation as myself, and succeeded in reaching Candahar in safety, where I found my regiment, and at once entered upon my new duties.

The campaign brought honours and promotion to many, but for me it had nothing but misfortune and disaster. I was removed from my brigade and attached to the Berkshires, with whom I served at the fatal battle of Maiwand. There I was struck on the shoulder by a Jezail bullet, which shattered the bone and grazed the subclavian artery. I should have fallen into the hands of the murderous Ghazis had it not been for the devotion and courage shown by Murray, my orderly, who threw me across a pack-horse, and succeeded in bringing me safely to the British lines....

Name: Mendi, le jardin de tous
Description:
Mendi, le jardin de tous est une entreprise horticole familiale créée en 1969 par Arnaud Mendiburu à Anglet.

C'est en 1969, après un séjour au Canada, que la famille Mendiburu revient aux sources dans le Pays basque, région réputée pour son patrimoine agricole et se consacre à la production de roses.
Passionnés d'horticulture, ils ont créé un jardin à l'image de leur amour des plantes.

Au fil des ans, le jardin est devenu le théâtre de nombreuses histoires, formant une communauté unie autour d'une passion commune pour l'horticulture.

Les installations d'aujourd'hui témoignent de leur volonté d'excellence et offrent un havre de paix avec une impressionnante collection de plantes.

Tout en s'agrandissant, la famille reste fidèle à sa vision de créer un jardin qui célèbre la beauté de la nature et la diversité culturelle au-delà des frontières.

Depuis 2023, Mendi s'est diversifiée et propose une offre d'agro-tourisme en plein cœur de ses serres. 
Le restaurant Chez Maritxu fait désormais parti du lieu, et des ateliers créatifs et visites sont proposées pour faire découvrir notre uni-vert.

 15 rue de Louillot, 64600 Anglet
 05 59 03 80 41
 mendi@mendiburu.eu

Name: Moriah Flores
Description:
A nossa empresa é especializada na criação de belos arranjos de flores secas com fragrâncias inspiradas na história e na simbologia bíblica. Com uma paixão pela natureza e um profundo respeito pela espiritualidade, combinamos esses elementos de uma maneira única e significativa para oferecer aos nossos clientes uma experiência verdadeiramente especial.

O que realmente diferencia os nossos arranjos é a inclusão de fragrâncias bíblicas. Trabalhamos com óleos essenciais de alta qualidade, cuidadosamente selecionados para evocar os aromas mencionados nas escrituras sagradas. Ao combinar essas fragrâncias com as flores secas, criamos uma experiência sensorial única, que pode proporcionar um ambiente de paz, reflexão e espiritualidade. Além disso, nossos arranjos sustentáveis prolongam a beleza da natureza. 

Os nossos arranjos são perfeitos para uma variedade de ocasiões, como decoração de ambiente, de igrejas, eventos religiosos, presentes significativos, ou mesmo para desfrutar em casa como uma lembrança constante da espiritualidade.

Valorizamos a expressão da fé e a inspiração bíblica na arte floral. Convidamos você a compartilhar essa jornada espiritual e trazer paz e significado aos seus espaços.
Location: São Caetano do Sul, São Paulo

Name: Dutch Horti Support
Description:
My name is Johan Bruins. After years of experience in horticulture, I've started my own consulting company as a self-employed entrepeneur in January 2023. 
My goal is to improve quality and supervise/help set up new crops. 

After working in floriculture for a number of years, I made a switch to a propagation company. Here I mainly gained experience in growing both organic and conventional warm vegetable plants. 
In the organic department, we worked under the certifications SKAL, BIO SUISSE (CH), Naturland (DE) and USDA Organic (USA/CA).
Especially in organic cultivation, we have grafted on many different rootstocks, in the interest of the right resistance in the open ground. 

In addition to the cultivation and organisation at the cultivation locations in the Netherlands, I was also able to gain a lot of (international) experience at several foreign locations, with different circumstances.

I can support your company in various areas: 

- Cultivation and organisation
- Application of different grafting techniques
- Grafting and cultivation of:
     * Tomato
     * Paprika/pepper
     * Eggplant
     * Cucumber
     * Zucchini
     * Watermelon
     * Melon
     * Bitter gourd (ampalaya)
- Use of various rootstocks
- (Biological) Pest management
- Improving quality
- Optimising sowing, grafting, transplanting, pinching, propagation

For questions please contact me at johan@dutchhortisupport.com or by phone

Name: Biolchim New Zealand
Description:
Biolchim S.p.A. is a leading company in the production and commercialization of biostimulants, whose function is to stimulate natural processes to enhance nutrient uptake, nutrient efficiency, tolerance to abiotic stress, and crop quality in full respect of sustainable agriculture values and practices. Thanks to the experience acquired in 40 years of activity, the strong relationship with the greatest worldwide producers of raw materials, and the collaboration with important Universities and Research Centres, Biolchim offers a complete portfolio of biostimulants that maximize the performance of any crop, anywhere in the world. The Headquarters is based in Italy, where the production lines and the extraction units are located, Biolchim is active in more than 50 countries in Europe, Africa, Asia, South America. In Brazil, Germany, and Hungary, New Zealand, and Australia.
Biolchim operates directly through subsidiaries; in other countries, Biolchim is active through a strong and reliable network of partnerships with independent distributors and importers. Biolchim is considered among the most dynamic companies on the international markets.

Met onze nieuwe kwekerij hebben wij ruimte om mee te groeien met onze klanten en zijn wij klaar voor de toekomst. 

Met ons product, willen we meer dan alleen een goed gekweekt product leveren. Wij zien het als een totaal plaatje. Een goede relatie met onze leveranciers, levert ons goed uitgangsmateriaal op. Met onze kennis van het telen, maken we daar een kwalitatief hoogwaardig product van. De hoge eisen die wij stellen bij het afleveren, maken dat uiteindelijk een compleet verzorgd product bij ons de deur uitgaat.

Op die manier ben je wat je wilt zijn: leverancier van meer dan alleen een goed gekweekt product!

Vállaljuk irodák, bankok, szállodák, éttermek, stb.  növényekkel való ellátását, átfogó szolgáltatásunkkal az irodai növényeket betervezzük, telepítjük, igény szerint karbantartjuk.
Támogatjuk azokat az előnyöket, amelyeket a növények hoznak az épített környezetbe, beleértve az egészség, a jólét, a termelékenység és a kreativitás javítását a munkahelyen.

A padlón álló növényektől a friss virágszállításig, az élő/ műnövény falakon, a függő növényeken, a növénypolcokon és még sok máson át – büszkék vagyunk arra, hogy a vállalati növények szakértői lehetünk.

A VandaDesign szolgáltatásai a következők:
• Iroda növény kereskedelem
• Élő/ műnövény falak ( zöld falak )
• Kültéri növényfalak 
• Borostyánpanel ( városi zöld megoldás)

Name: Lucas Greenhouses
Description:
On April 7, 1979, Lucas Greenhouses was officially open for business. Our product line spoke for itself, excellence was always our first priority, and it paid off. After only one year, we had more demand than we had product. So up went four more gutter connected greenhouses, so that we could better serve our existing customers and reach out to new ones.

This pattern of, producing a high quality product resulting in our need to increase production space, has continued ever since.  While the types of structures we now build to grow in have changed, the standard for which we grow has remained constant.

Our focus is on Excellence.

We gear our product toward the Independent Garden Center, striving to give them the very best in both plant material and service.  For over 40 years, Lucas Greenhouses has been on the cutting edge of the latest trends in greenhouse technology, methods, efficiencies, and plant culture

We look forward to continuing to partner with our customers in the future to bring them the very best.

«Быть земледельцем - значит бережно обращаться, беречь, взращивать, создавать устойчивым, сохранять. Старые обычаи говорят нам, что существует также обработка земли, почвы, домашних растений и животных - очевидно, из-за важности всего этого для домашнего хозяйства. И были времена, одно из которых наступило сейчас, когда некоторые люди начинают поступать так же с природой, с не домашними животными, тем самым признавая зависимость наших домашних хозяйств и домашней жизни от дикой природы. Земледелие - это название всякой деятельности, которая поддерживает жизнь, сохраняя связь с нашими местами и нашим миром; это умение держать на связи все нити живой сети, которая поддерживает нас.

Таким образом, похоже, что большинство, а возможно, и все явные неудачи промышленного сельского хозяйства являются результатом попытки сделать землю плодородной без земледелия».  (Уэнделл Берри)

Description:
At Terrafibre Europe we have a sustainable mission to complete. It is our aim to create a fully sustainable and circular way of growing baby greens, plants, vegetables and herbs, both in the homegrown as the professional market. We achieve this by using only 100% natural ingredients in our products. The waste of industrial grown hemp is our base, so all of our products are made from 100% natural fibres. After composting, all our products contribute to a healthy and fertile soil. In this way, the products of Terrafibre Europe contribute to a CO2 zero emission society.
We have many different products such as growmats, rolls, cubes, blocks, slabs, grow enhancement mats, loose fill and more.

Name: Gfeller Gartenbau AG
Description:
Unser Leitbild
Die Gfeller Gartenbau AG ist eine bedeutende, weitgehend regional tätige Unternehmung mit Sitz in Lützelflüh-Goldbach. Wir planen, gestalten, bauen, unterhalten und pflegen Gärten und Aussenanlagen in der ganzen Region Emmental – Bern.

Kundenorientierung
Jeder Garten spiegelt den Charakter seiner Besitzerin, seines Besitzers, wider. Darum ist Gartenplanung ein filigranes Zusammenspiel zwischen Kunde und Planer; Ihre Wünsche, Vorstellungen und Nutzungsziele haben dabei erste Priorität. 

Partnerschaft
Wir denken und handeln partnerschaftlich und wollen die Beziehung zu unseren Kunden und Partnern fördern und pflegen. Gegenseitige Unterstützung, Respekt, Vertrauen und Engagement sind für uns keine leeren Worte, sondern Tatsache.

Umwelt-Engagement
Wir bauen Gärten, in denen eine Symbiose zwischen Gestaltung und Ökologie stattfindet. Dünger, Pflanzenschutz- und Schädlingsbekämpfungsmittel setzen wir deshalb nur gezielt und so wenig wie möglich ein.

Fairness
Wir beraten Sie als Kunde ehrlich und kompetent, denn Ihr Vertrauen ist uns wichtig.
Sie können sich bei uns auf qualitativ hochstehende Arbeiten und transparente Angebote verlassen.

Erfolg
Unser Erfolg sind zufriedene Kunden und Partner, die unsere Arbeiten weiterempfehlen und schätzen. Die Freude an unserer Tätigkeit, wirtschaftliche Entwicklung und tagtäglich wertvolle menschliche Kontakte runden das Paket ab.

Team
Alle Mitarbeitenden tragen mit ihrem Einsatz und persönlichen Engagement massgeblich zu unserem Erfolg bei. Diesen Beitrag anerkennen und schätzen wir. Das Wohlergehen unserer Mitarbeitenden ist uns wichtig: Deshalb unterstützen wir Aus- und Weiterbildungen, bieten fortschrittliche Anstellungsbedingungen und fördern die Stärken jedes Einzelnen.

Om dit te bereiken is een hoge mate van transparantie over de afgesproken kwaliteit en de wijze waarop deze gecontroleerd wordt essentieel. De dienstverlening van Floricon is volledig gericht op deze twee zaken. Met onze kwaliteitssoftware (Fris) en het uitvoeren van onafhankelijke kwaliteitscontroles, zorgen we voor de benodigde transparantie binnen de keten.

inds 2004 zijn wij MPS-GAP gecertificeerd en sinds 2016 zijn wij ook MPS A+ gecertificeerd.

Na Floraviva, acreditamos que cada flor tem uma história para contar, e é por isso que nos dedicamos a oferecer apenas flores frescas e de alta qualidade, selecionadas cuidadosamente para garantir a satisfação e encantamento dos nossos clientes.

Nossos serviços e produtos incluem:

Arranjos Florais Personalizados: Criamos composições únicas que refletem sentimentos e ocasiões especiais, seja um aniversário, casamento, formatura ou qualquer momento que mereça celebração.

Assinatura de Flores: Para ambientes corporativos ou residenciais, oferecemos o serviço de assinatura de flores, garantindo que seu espaço esteja sempre embelezado com arranjos frescos e renovados regularmente.

Decoração de Eventos: Especializados na decoração floral para todo tipo de evento, transformamos espaços com elegância e sofisticação, criando atmosferas memoráveis.

Entrega de Flores: Com nosso serviço de entrega rápida e eficiente, você pode surpreender alguém especial em Goiânia e região, garantindo que seu gesto de carinho chegue no momento certo.

Na Floraviva Floricultura Goiânia, nossa missão é conectar pessoas através da beleza e da emoção das flores.

A network of 400 producers across France and Europe

This footprint allows us to source the best varieties based on each region's specialties and secure your supplies even during peak demand periods.
No middlemen, no inventory: every order is custom-prepared and shipped directly from the producer to your farm.

17 specialized websites by crop
Strawberries, asparagus, soft fruits, fruit trees, kiwis… Each crop has its own requirements. That's why we've developed dedicated platforms (Fraisiverse, Aspergiverse, Arboriverse, Bairiverse, Kiwiverse…) to provide focused technical expertise and variety selection tailored to each production, both organic and conventional.

Delivery throughout France and export to Europe and worldwide. Shipping within 10 to 15 days, temperature-controlled transport when needed, rigorous tracking until delivery. Our shipping conditions ensure plant freshness and successful establishment in the field.

Free quotes within 48 hours, advice on variety selection, recommendations tailored to your soil, climate and yield objectives.
Whether you're a market gardener, orchardist or nurseryman, we adapt our solutions to your volumes, planting schedule and production requirements.

Name: Knox Horticulture LLC
Description:
Knox Horticulture began in 1962 as Knox Nursery, when Jim and Nadine Knox began growing cuttings in a mist box on their patio. These first plants were for home use, but in the summer of 1962, the Knox’s made their first commercial sale.

Over the years, Knox Horticulture has grown considerably from that modest start, expanding their operation as they grew. As the 1980’s drew to a close, Jim and Nadine began relinquishing their roles at the nursery to their sons, Bruce and Monty.

The current nursery is located on 33 acres of former orange groves on Avalon Road in Winter Garden. Dutch rolling benches are incorporated throughout the entire facility for efficient transport of material throughout the greenhouses.

Our production processes make extensive use of automation and computer technology. We use the Eco-friendly EZ-Pot System to significantly reduce the use of traditional plastic pots and saving money, while providing our customers with plants that have a healthier root system, resulting in faster finish times after transplant.

An established second-generation family-run business, Knox Horticulture produces a wide range of Finished Products for landscapers and area theme parks. We are Your Bedding Plant Specialist, and have been for 61 years.

Made from a special mesh that is resistant to mold, mildew, and algae, these grow bags facilitate air root pruning, which helps in developing a more extensive root system for better nutrient and water absorption. Rain Science growbags maintainoptimal soil moisture levels, even in wet environments, making them perfect for a number of growing systems including hydroponics, Flood and drain and living soil. Available in multiple sizes, RS bags are durable, reusable, and come with a lifetime warranty for retail products, ensuring long-term use for both home gardeners and commercial growers. Rain Science Grow Bags grow bigger, healthier plants in less time, thanks to their advanced design and material quality.

Name: Lepaa-näyttely
Description:
Lepaa-näyttelyä on järjestetty vuosittain vuodesta 1964. Seuraavan kerran puutarha- ja viheralan ammattinäyttely järjestetään Hattulassa Lepaan 

Pitkien perinteiden Lepaa-näyttely kerää vuosi toisensa jälkeen tyytyväisiä näytteilleasettajia ja kävijöitä. Monet tulevat joka vuosi päivittämään tietonsa, tapaamaan kollegoita ja yhteistyökumppaneita ja vanhoja tuttuja sekä viettämään mukavan kesäpäivän. Moni näytteilleasettajakin sanoo, että Lepaan tapahtuma on kuin loma vielä jatkuisi, vaikka kauppoja tehokkaasti hierotaankin.

Näytteilleasettajia on vuosittain 160–200: suuria, kansainvälisten edustusten yrityksiä, notkealiikkeisiä keskikastin yrittäjiä ja pieniä, innovatiivisia pajoja sekä käsityöläisiä, kauppiaita, järjestöjä, viranomaisia… Kävijöitä tapahtuma kerää 7 000–10 000, ja millaisia! Kaikilla on aikaa kiertää koko alue, tarjonta tutkitaan tarkkaan ja ostoksia tehdään. Kiire tai välinpitämättömyys ei kuulu Lepaalle.

Lepaa tarjoaa tänäkin vuonna kohtauspaikan puutarha- ja viheralan kaikille sektoreille: kasvihuoneyrittäjät, marjan- ja vihannestenviljelijät, taimistoviljelijät, puutarhakauppiaat, kaupunkien, kuntien ja seurakuntien viherväki ja golfkentänhoitajat sekä alan urakoitsijat löytävät alan uutuudet ja kuumat puheenaiheet Lepaa-tapahtumasta. Mukaan mahtuu myös maanviljelijöitä, kotipuutarhureita, alan opiskelijoita, tutkijoita ja viranomaisia.

Name: The Davidson Ranch
Description:
thedavidsonranch.com
Native American strong!

My journey into the world of cannabis began with a profound personal struggle. Having faced a serious illness while in conservation law enforcement, I turned to cannabis as a last resort and it became a lifeline. Despite dire predictions, cannabis not only saved me but transformed my outlook on life. Determined to pursue this path, I carry the legacy of my father, who paid a heavy price for his involvement in cannabis when it was not legal. My mission is to honor his memory by navigating the industry’s challenges with integrity and purpose. For me, cannabis represents more than profit; it symbolizes sacrifice, resilience, and a commitment to providing healing and hope to others. Transitioning from a past shadowed by stigma and hate to a future focused on empowerment, I see cannabis not as a commodity but as a source of sustenance and support, a testament to the sacrifices made to bring it into the light.

With a background in Wildlife Biology and a degree in conservation law enforcement, my journey into the cannabis industry has been shaped by diverse experiences and expertise. Over the past eight years, I have honed my skills in cultivation, traversing states like Oklahoma, North and South Carolina, Illinois and now establishing roots in Georgia. Attending cannabis conferences across the United States has enriched my knowledge and network within the industry. Drawing on my background as a wildlife biologist, I bring a unique all natural and truly organic perspective to the cultivation process, focusing on the intricacies of phenotyping and environment. It is a platform to build a lasting legacy rooted in passion, dedication, and a commitment to excellence in the cannabis space.

Resilient

Name: FarmTech Conclave
Description:
The rise in start-up culture across the country has not overlooked the agriculture sector. Several ventures, particularly in Karnataka, have undertaken the task of using technology to grow out of traditional agricultural practices. Their main focus is to provide useful, affordable and innovative solutions to a number of challenges faced across the agricultural value chain. These start-ups act as a platform for networking between farmers, input dealers, wholesalers, retailers and consumers thereby providing growers with access to a strong and well-established market.

The agri-tech start-up sector is also creating several market opportunities, primarily in digitizing agriculture, improving farmers' access to real-time information, increasing transparency across the value chain, providing farmers with higher-quality implements to increase yields, and providing farmers with micro-financing options to manage risks.

The technologies that have the potential to revolutionize decision-making and optimize yields, ultimately leading to improved economic outcomes for farmers. Hence, FarmTech Conclave 2023 has created the cohesive platform required to bring all the stakeholders in the farming ecosystem together and provide opportunity to network, share insights, and identify potential partnerships which will drive innovation and progress within the industry.

The Department of Horticulture, Government of Karnataka is organising a two-day FarmTech Conclave 2023 from 9th-10th March 2023 at Dr. Rajendra Prasad International Convention Center, GKVK Campus, Bengaluru with the theme being "Creating Networks for Collaboration and Growth". The FarmTech Conclave 2023 will showcase the best products, services, and technologies that will power agriculture and drive its future. In addition to the stakeholders of the farming community, key government representatives discuss, deliberate, identify priorities and propose an agenda for the growth of the agriculture sector in the country.
