Name: Grunewald GmbH Garten- und Landschaftsbau
Description: Willkommen bei Grunewald, Ihrem innovativen Partner im Garten- und Landschaftsbau für das Münsterland und das Ruhrgebiet. Als Traditionsbetrieb und inhabergeführtes GaLaBau-Unternehmen aus Werne widmen wir uns seit über 70 Jahren der Gestaltung grüner Oasen für Privat- und Firmenkunden. Zudem sind wir Gründungsmitglied der internationalen Schwimmteich-Genossenschaft Pool for Nature, weshalb besonders der Bau von Schwimmteichen, Natur- und Biopools zu unserer Expertise gehört.
Location: Werne an der Lippe, North Rhine-Westphalia

Name: Agrinova Australia & NZ
Description:
Agrinova is an 3rd Generation Italian based company that has been operating in over 50 Countries around the world since 1958 and manufacture all of their own netting and components including all structural components in their European factories, both for their own structures and for other very well-known clients around the world.  

Agrinova has recently teamed up with MWT Agri PTY Ltd to bring these high-quality European structures and experience to the greater Australian and New Zealand Markets and although Agrinova already had a presence in the Australian market with Large multi hectare structures but this partnership now allows us to spread into all areas of Agriculture in this market and achieve the same great cropping and crop protection results that we have achieved overseas.

Name: Specialty Tag & Label, Inc.
Description: For 27 years, Specialty Tag & Label, Inc. has led the horticultural industry in identification solutions. We offer a fleet of high-performance thermal printers that can print on plastics that range from 10 mil slip-on tags to 23 mil thick pot tags. Our family-owned business allows us to have that personal touch with each of our customers, but our decades of experience in the growing industry gives us the expertise you will need to succeed. We know what it takes to identify your seeds, your plants, and your harvest, and we have your solution. Our customers know they can trust us as well as our product line. That is our specialty, so let us know how we can help you grow! Products include: Printers, Software, RFID, Thermal & Laser media.

Name: Knechtgarten
Description: Spezialist für Schwimmteiche, Pools und Wassergärten wie auch Natursteinprojekte und abwechsungsreiche Pflanzungen. Knecht AG, Naturnahe Gärten, Berner Oberland und Mittelland

Name: AutoPot Watering Systems USA
Description: AutoPot Watering Systems manufacture simple-to-use automated sub-irrigation systems that are passively powered by gravity. Our focus is plant-driven automated watering with conservation of water, fertilizer and energy.

Name: Nübling AG Gartenbau und Landschaftsarchitektur
Description: Im Jahre 1941 gründete Emil Nübling-Reck im Rigacher eine Gärtnerei, diese wird in der 3. Generation von Fabienne Schoch-Nübling geführt. Die Firma hat sich in den letzten Jahre zu einem regionalen Garten- und Landschaftsbauunternehmen entwickelt. Durch die vielen Pflanzungen und Umgebungsgestaltungen während der vielen Jahren leistete der Betrieb bei Wohn-, Industrie-Schulbauten und Renaturierungen Projekten einen wesentlichen Anteil an grünem Lebensraum und Verbesserung der Lebensqualität in den Regionen Aarau, Seetal, Wohlen und Bremgarten. Ob Naturgartenbau, Gartenplanung oder Landschaftsbau, wir setzen Gartenarbeiten mit Herzblut um. Wir sind Ihre Gartenprofis, die Ihnen und Ihren Grünflächen mit Rat und Tat zur Seite stehen.

Name: Sunripe Pty Ltd
Description: Sunripe is an award-winning, family-owned agribusiness and the largest producer of field-grown snacking tomatoes in Australia.

Name: Pipp Horticulture | Outgrow the Competition — Literally.
Description:
At Pipp Horticulture, we help growers get the most out of their space with mobile vertical racking systems that can double or even triple your canopy. 

We’re part of Pipp Mobile Storage Systems, Inc., a company with 40+ years of experience designing smart storage solutions for the nation’s top retailers. Now, we bring that same expertise to cultivation.

All of our racks are made with corrosion-resistant materials and use an ADA-compliant, seismically approved track and anchoring system, so they’re built to last. 

Our goal is simple: help you grow more, save more, and operate more efficiently.

 Pipp Horticulture = growth, efficiency, savings, and service.

Name: HortiNigeria Program
Description: The HortiNigeria program, funded by the Embassy of the Kingdom of the Netherlands (EKN) in Nigeria, aims to facilitate the development of a sustainable and inclusive horticulture sector.

Name: Chrysal International BV
Description: Chrysal is a main driving force in the flower and plant industry and worldwide market leader in flower food. Whether you grow, transport, sell, or simply enjoy the beauty of cut flowers and potted plants in your own home, Chrysal offers the best solutions to keep them looking fresh for longer. We think sustainable, it’s in our nature since 1929, so we gladly share knowledge for a healthy and beautiful planet, where flowers can be enjoyed longer every day, with zero emission.

Name: AIPH
Description:
The International Association of Horticultural Producers is the world’s champion for the power of plants

Since 1948, AIPH has united horticultural producers in an international community that thrives to
this day. Much has changed in that time.

Technologies advanced, cities rose from the ground, and we have become more connected than
ever. As a result, our essential bond with nature has been weakened.

AIPH strives to reignite and uphold an appreciation of plants that we believe is a basic human
instinct.

We support the work of grower associations globally and together we champion a prosperous
industry, growing plants that enhance lives, advance societies and sustain our planet, for this
generation and the next.

Name: Volmary
Description: Volmary GmbH is an independent, medium-sized family business in the horticulture sector and a leading European plant breeding company. We are a strong, innovative partner in professional horticulture and we develop plant brand concepts for garden centres and food retailers.

Name: Van der Avoird Trayplant BV
Description: Van der Avoird Trayplant is a leading, sustainable and innovative company in the soft fruit sector. We specialise in growing strawberry and raspberry propagating material.

Name: Vertically Urban
Description:
Vertically Urban - a UK based horticultural lighting specialist of LED lighting solutions.

We design and manufacture our products in the United Kingdom with the highest photon yielding LEDs available.  Offering solutions for :

* Top Lighting
* Inter Lighting
* Vertical Farming 

We work with a carefully selected portfolio of quality electronic component suppliers and as a result deliver some of the highest yields in PPF on the market. 

Our R&D team are experts at designing luminaries and electronics. Our mission is to deliver efficient lighting solutions that are easy to install and setup. 

We work hand in hand with our grower partners to deliver metrics that stand up to the requirement for either flexible tuneable solutions or to a recipe. We deliver bespoke solutions to meet specific crop needs. 

Boasting a range of LED products to suit a variety of needs from leafy greens, micro greens, tomatoes, lettuce, cucumber and others grows, we also offer solutions for medicinal cannabis growers as our spectrum driven solutions provide a perfect footprint into indoor growing requirements.

To find out more visit our website, and speak with the team at Vertically Urban. Here to help you grow your crops to perfection!

Name: Qul Fruits
Description: A tech-enabled integrated platform for horticultural farmers which covers the entire value chain from orchard installation, development and maintenance to controlled atmospheric storage facilities to digital supply chain integration with the national market.

Name: Fargro Limited
Description:
Growing businesses like yours need support. Whether that means quick delivery of the highest quality and of the most reliable growing media, materials and equipment, advice on increasing yield, protecting your plants from pests, access to flexible financial solutions and energy services, we can support you. 
 
With more than 80 years’ experience of supporting growers, we have developed deep knowledge and expertise across every horticultural sector. 
 
Professional growers in the Fargro community can tap into this specialist expertise by calling our team to get tailored advice by phone, requesting an expert visit to your premises, or by coming along to meet us at one of our talks or events. 

This depth of knowledge combined with our commitment to providing first class customer service and an excellent product range make us the first choice for growers. 

Please contact our Customer Services Team on 01903 726100 or email ask@fargro.co.uk if you would like to get in touch.

Name: Saint-Gobain Cultilene
Description: Cultilene is an expert that inspires greenhouse growers to grow crops sustainably with clever water and root management. We offer innovative solutions to maximise production of top quality food using as little water and energy as possible. We do this by supplying circular substrate and substrate systems with a matching irrigation strategy. We also supply sensors for collecting big data that delivers real-time insights into the root environment via a wireless platform. Our goal is to provide the world with healthy, safe food.

Name: Orchard Growers
Description:
Welcome to ORCHARD GROWERS PRIVATE LIMITED 
Hello Growers, Farmers, and Investors,
We welcome you to Orchard Growers Private Limited, India’s 1st one-stop solution for all orchard-related needs.
Incorporated on 12th May 2022, under CIN: U01100HP2022PTC009319, we are a Startup India-recognized and MSME-registered company, working to empower farmers and grow sustainable orchards across India.

Founded by Pawan Kumar (B.Pharm) – Executive Director (DIN: 09604901) and Kamla Thakur (M.A. Political Science) – Director (DIN: 09604902), the company is based in Musrani, Gohar, Mandi, Himachal Pradesh.

Although new on paper, we bring over 10 years of hands-on experience in plant cultivation, grafting, pruning, orchard planning, and both organic and natural farming practices. Backed by a team of skilled professionals and agricultural scientists, we combine traditional wisdom with modern eco-friendly technologies to offer affordable, chemical-free orchard solutions.

 Our Mission:
To promote natural, organic farming and create self-reliant orchardists by providing plants, services, training, and knowledge – all under one roof.

 Why Choose Us?
 One-stop orchard solutions
 Experienced, professional team
 Eco-friendly and affordable methods
 Farmer education & training
 Scientific support & innovation

We aim to grow not only plants but also trust, sustainability, and awareness. Whether you're a farmer looking to start an orchard or an investor supporting green innovation – let's build a healthier future together.

 Visit us at: www.orchardgrowers.in
 CIN: U01100HP2022PTC009319 | PAN: AADCO7784R | TAN: PTLO11293C
 MSME No: UDYAM-HP-08-0006135 | DIPP No: DIPP112124

Name: Hortiplan NV
Description:
Hortiplan NV is active in the professional horticulture niche and belongs to Arvesta, the full service provider and market leader to agriculture and horticulture in Belgium. 

Technical facilities:
Hortiplan NV guarantees reliable and durable technical installations and the related service for modern horticultural businesses, such as MGS, a high-tech Mobile gutters system for lettuce and herbs. We have been building this system since 1994 at top horticulture companies in Belgium, Netherlands, Chile, the Baltic States, Russia, the US and Australia. We are also distributor of climate computers for horticulture. 

The team of Hortiplan offers a 24 hour service, 7 days a week. 


The growth that we knew in recent years, is entirely due to the dynamics of the team, that daily delivers an extremely customer-oriented approach thanks to: 
- great flexibility 
- solutions tailor made to each of our customers
- continuous training of highly qualified personnel 
- an ideal mix of technical knowledge and affinity with horticulture 

Would you like to meet the companies of Arvesta, check out www.arvesta.eu or https://www.linkedin.com/company/arvesta/

Our values? Our staff are customer-oriented, high-quality, honest, innovative and focus on sustainability.
Would you like to work at Arvesta or Hortiplan, surf to www.arvestajobs.eu and apply right away!

Name: Qualitree
Description:
We are a team of passionate individuals driven by our vision: Growing Partnerships, Delivering Excellence!

Our product is decorative ornamentals that require specialized skills built through partnerships with European growers and extensive R&D by our team.   We add value to wholesalers and growers' existing supply chains through partnership, collaboration and trust.

Name: Powerplants
Description:
Established in 1994, Powerplants has a proven history of working with growers, wholesalers, researchers and government authorities to advance plant production.

From providing greater support for farmers and growers, to improving food quality, our goals have always been centred around the betterment of others.
Our innovative horticultural solutions combine extensive industry knowledge with the latest developments in global products and services. Past projects have seen us working to improve Government Policy, developing industry-leading facilities, and helping prepare industry in the face of unexpected climate hazards.

It’s this commitment to innovation and collaboration that has seen us become a key enabler to food sustainability and plant production across Australia, New Zealand and South-East Asia.

Thanks to global leaders such as PB tec and Atrium Agri, Powerplants has access to a platform for wider industry knowledge, connection and support - allowing us to expand our service network across the southern hemisphere.
Our greenhouse technologies cover controlled climate solutions, fertigation and recycling systems, and labour-saving technologies to suit any condition. And with local hands-on specialists, our customers all have access to 24/7 service and spare parts.

Together, we work with our clients to create custom, targeted solutions that allow their businesses to continue to thrive.

Name: Grow Glide Innovations
Description:
Grow Glide creates vertical racking solutions for cannabis cultivators across the globe. Built by growers, for growers.

Our best-in-class racks are fully customizable and include modular grow tables that allow you to scale your grow over time.

Name: Oreon
Description: Oreon is a Dutch innovative developer and manufacturer of high-tech LED grow lights. More than 15 years ago Oreon started with years and years of research. Throughout these years many tests have been implemented. The first commercial project with water-cooled LED fixtures of Oreon was installed back in 2009. Now, the LED fixtures are widely deployed in the horticulture industry worldwide above various types of crops. Oreon stands for innovation, quality and flexibility. "Our mission is to offer growers customized LED lighting solutions, to further optimize their growth and business case."

Name: Green Simplicity
Description:
Green Simplicity, located in Andijk, is part of GreenV, a group of companies worldwide active in horticulture. 

Green Simplicity Research's research systems enable growers and breeders to conduct plant-based research to test the maximum potential of crops in a (fully) controlled environment, with various variables such as LED lighting, humidity, irrigation, CO2 and temperature. 

Green Simplicity Concepts then offers a suitable solution for the next steps to scaleup the total production. Whether it concerns scaling up one variable, such as climate or lighting in the greenhouse, or a complete controlled automated multi-layer cultivation system without daylight. Green Simplicity Concepts helps the grower with the development and construction of an optimal cultivation system that is tailor made to the needs of the crop.

Name: Greenhouse Sustainability
Description:
At Greenhouse Sustainability, environmental footprint Calculation, Reduction, Offsetting and Storytelling come together and we help you towards a sustainable future. Think climate positive!

Calculation
You can make sustainability concrete with the help of a life cycle analysis. The insights help you to achieve future-proof business operations. Do it yourself with the Flori Footprint Tool or let one of our LCA specialists help you with a custom tool or calculation.

Reduction
Time to act. Once your company's footprint has been calculated, you can effectively start reducing it. Our consultants connect you with the most innovative companies of their kind to reduce your footprint.

Offsetting
All the efforts and investments in sustainability will not yet help you move directly towards climate neutrality. Do you want to make a difference to the climate now and be climate neutral or maybe even climate positive? Then offset your emissions by investing in fair climate projects.

Storytelling
Of course, you also want to (re)communicate your company’s sustainability to your customers. We help you create content to give your sustainable story the attention it deserves. Be good and tell it!

Name: Sprinklr Planten
Description:
Biodiversiteit versterken, da’s de missie van Sprinklr!

Dat er bij biologische teelt geen pesticiden in de lucht, de bodem en ons grondwater terecht komen is een enorme winst voor iedereen.
Daarom doet Sprinklr er alles aan om de afzet van de pionierende biologische kwekers en boeren te vergroten. Want zij laten zien dat het kan: tuinplanten en bollen telen zonder gif en kunstmest.

Door tuinieren met biologische planten zo leuk en toegankelijk mogelijk te maken hopen we samen met de consument de markt te veranderen. Want gif moet weg!

Vanaf 2023 is de bedrijfsstructuur van Sprinklr zo ingericht dat alle winst naar de missie gaat. Sprinklr is steward owned. Oprichters Suzanne en Liedewij hebben hun aandelen gedoneerd. Elke beslissing wordt genomen met de missie in gedachten: het vergroten van biodiversiteit.

Name: Greenhouse Formula
Description: Greenhouse Formula is a digital tool for planning commercial greenhouses, estimating future profitability and getting professional business plan reports for optimization, investment decision making and getting finances for implementation.

Name: Cultivators
Description: Our specialized knowledge in the cannabis and hydroponic leafy greens industries ensures that your venture from concept to thriving enterprise is expertly guided and managed. Focused on innovation, sustainable methods, and tailored solutions, we are committed to elevating your business. Visit www.cultivators.nl and start shaping the future of your cannabis & hydroponic leafy cultivation today.

Name: Lubera
Description: Lubera is a vertically integrated company in the green industry. We specialize in edible plants with a focus on tree fruits, berries, and outdoor vegetables. We breed, cultivate, and sell our varieties for the home garden market.

Name: VERDIR
Description:
Fédération Nationale des Producteurs de l'#Horticulture et des #Pépinières
Syndicat horticole, reconnu par les pouvoirs publics, nous assurons la défense de l'intérêt général de tous les producteurs de végétaux d'ornement. Nous sommes une des associations spécialisées de la FNSEA.

Name: Morel Flowers
Description: For over a century, our passion for Cyclamen persicum has driven us to become experts and innovators in floriculture. Founded in France in 1919 by Pierre Morel, our company has grown from a family business into a global leader, offering over 350 F1 hybrid cyclamen varieties—ranging from mini to large-flowered—and exporting seeds to more than 70 countries. Since joining EVOLEM in 2022, we’ve expanded into new segments, including Helleborus and botanical cyclamen. Committed to sustainable innovation, we develop varieties adapted to climate challenges and efficient to grow. Active across research, breeding, production, and marketing, we proudly support distributors and growers worldwide with high-quality, resilient plant genetics.

Name: Deliflor Chrysanten B.V.
Description: Deliflor is the largest chrysanthemum breeder worldwide for more than 300 spray chrysanthemums, disbudded chrysanthemums and Santinis. The company produces cuttings and issues licences for cut flower production.

Name: NXT Bioscience
Description: NXT Bioscience is disrupting global propagation supply chains by automating the plant tissue culture process. Our ground-breaking TC+ and AX technology platform dramatically reduces labour, and enables the distribution of high-health, virus-free plant genetics on behalf of breeders to the global agricultural, horticultural, and bio-industrial sectors.

Name: The Farplants Group
Description:
The Farplants Group is the largest wholesale supplier of outdoor plants to Garden Centres and Garden Centre chains in the UK. 

We're a co-operative of four West Sussex growers and a sales & distribution business, proudly located on the South Downs national park border. Each nursery specialises in different ranges. From small beginnings in 1972, the group now produces over 11 million plants yearly on 70 hectares (170 acres) of mixed facilities with a retail value of over £50 million.

Feel free to drop us a message. We'd love to say hello.

Name: Decorum Company
Description:
We are Decorum

Decorum is the premium brand of over fifty Dutch growers. All family owned businesses, many third or fourth generation grower. These growers work together to create a strong brand which stands for quality, innovation and sustainability. That brand is Decorum. With hundreds of innovations each year, the assortment of Decorum is always changing and always exciting. 

Decorum growers invest in sustainability. From natural energy projects to the most advanced growing techniques, Decorum growers work hard to make the world a better place. Less plastic and a lower CO2 footprint are key in our sustainability goals.

It goes without saying that only the best plants and flowers are selected for the Decorum brand. Our growers have a great passion for plants and flowers. Just like you. The Decorum quality label is our promise that all the products are premium quality with a longer lifespan.

Name: FlowerTrials
Description: 59 Breeding companies in three regions present their latest innovations and future developments in pot and bedding plants.

Name: Biophi
Description: Biophi, formerly known as the  Center for Horticultural Innovation, is a dynamic institution committed to advancing horticultural sciences, fostering innovation, and supporting sustainable practices within the horticulture industry. Our facility is made up of a genetics team with an in-house lab, a Growing/crop trial development department, a plant science/propagation department, data science department, and a nutrition lab.

Name: Nordagri
Description:
Nord Agri brand was created in 2009. As an innovative, progressive, and high-quality professional Substrate and Peat product supplier. One of our key priorities is sustainable peatland management and efficient cultivation to preserve our nature. We aim to supply our customers with ecological and innovative peat moss products for professional and hobby growers all over the world. 

We highly value quality, respect, responsibility, long-term relationships, and business development. Our approach has allowed us to develop partnerships with industry leaders in more than 40 countries. 
We have established our export market presence in Sout East Asia, South America, Europe, and the Middle East.  

Every year we work together with our partners and engineers to perfect our production capabilities so that we can offer tailored solutions to our customers' needs. We cooperate directly with greenhouses/nurseries, substrate manufacturers, landscaping service providers, and agricultural product distributors. 

Our product range includes Natural Peat Moss and Professional Peat Moss Substrates for seeding, potting, containers, large plants, etc. We also offer a specific hobby substrate for all your gardening needs. Our experience always allows us to find the best solutions for your specific business needs. 

For more information, you can visit our website and we are looking forward to establishing a long-term partnership based on mutual trust & respect. Our team is always ready to help.

Name: Yorkshire Garden Centres
Description:
Set in 17 acres of beautiful Yorkshire countryside, Tong Garden Centre welcomes you to enjoy shopping for your garden and home here in the heart of Yorkshire!

As one of the biggest independently-owned garden centres in Yorkshire, you can enjoy spending time with us, browsing the extensive outdoor plant department, an enviable range of gift and home accessories as well as garden furniture, all you need to keep your garden looking great all year round and leading brands including Mountain Warehouse and Bonmarché.

And a trip to Tong would not be complete without calling into either our relaxed new look Restaurant for a perfectly hand-crafted coffee, delicious cooked breakfast, daily special or tasty treat.

Families are always welcome to visit Grass Hoppers to have fun in our outdoor adventure playground.

Name: GrowDirector
Description:
For over 10 years, GrowDirector has been the trusted partner for greenhouse growers worldwide seeking to cut costs and simplify operations. Today, we introduce our most advanced solution yet: the GrowDirector 4 PRO. It's an intelligent automation system engineered to make your greenhouse more profitable and easier to manage.

The GrowDirector 4 PRO is designed to solve the real-world challenges of commercial horticulture by delivering practical, cost-effective automation that works with your existing setup.

Why Growers Choose GrowDirector 4 PRO:

Effortless Installation & Integration: Our fully wireless, modular system is plug-and-play. It works seamlessly with your current equipment—no complex rewiring or new infrastructure required.

Simplified Daily Operations: Control irrigation, fertigation, climate, and lighting from any device, anywhere. The intuitive interface requires no IT expertise or steep learning curve, empowering your entire team.

Unmatched Value & ROI: GrowDirector is a one-time investment with zero subscription fees. All future software updates are included, ensuring the lowest total cost of ownership and the highest return.

Proven Results: Our systems consistently help growers reduce expenses on labor, water, energy, and fertilizer while increasing yield consistency and overall crop quality.

Visit our website to learn more.

Contact us:
contact@growdirector.com 
www.growdirector.com 
Tel/SMS - 1-516-990-6536

Name: Genson Group
Description:
Genson Group is a leading company in the horticultural sector, specializing in the sustainable cultivation of fresh, flavourful strawberries, raspberries and leeks, and the propagation of high-quality strawberry and raspberry plants. 

Our strength lies in the combination of craftsmanship, innovation, and collaboration. We invest in people, technology, and sustainability – enabling us to build a healthy, green future for today and tomorrow.

Genson Group includes Genson Quality Plants and Genson Fresh Fruits & Vegetables. Together, we ensure a reliable supply chain – from plant to customer.

Together we grow!

Name: Southern Roots Education
Description: At Southern Roots Genetics, we pride ourselves on creating digital resources for growers of all sizes to help improve the efficiency and productivity of their space

Name: British Tomato Growers' Association
Description:
Established in 1997, the British Tomato Growers’ Association champions the British tomato and represents commercial growers in the UK. 

The British Tomato Growers’ Association is the foremost protected crops grower Association in Great Britain. Steered by a board of Tomato producing company owners and supported by a team of experts - The TGA Technical committee, our work raises awareness of Britain’s tasty tomatoes and showcases the fruit in all its glory.

From spreading the word about health benefits to explaining the sustainability of supply, our aim is simple: encourage more consumers to buy British tomatoes and support our local British growers - the best in the world.

And with the British tomato season running from March to October, and with some growers producing all year round, there’s plenty of time to indulge in this tasty all-round superfood.

Name: Rovero Systems B.V.
Description:
Sustainable agriculture and food production is something that concerns us all. Rovero contributes to that goal by offering solutions that extend growing periods, reduces electricity consumption and improves product quality. More available light during a longer periode in the greenhouse with poly filters for every climate is helping you to use natural elements for a more sustainable cultivation of your products.
At Rovero, quality and sustainability go hand in hand. For more then 65 years we increase the efficiency of your greenhouses. That is why we proudly say: 
Rovero: the smart way to grow!

Name: Biota Nutri
Las Limas S.A.
Description:
Located in Esteli, Nicaragua, our offshore cutting farm Las Limas offers the optimal growing climate and altitude for our product selection, making it our most reliable source of unrooted cuttings.

Impressive 99.9% order fill rate.
Previous winner of Innovator of the Year by the Nicaraguan Export Producers Association, putting us at the top of Nicaraguan industry.
MPS-A certified for responsible use of crop protection agents, fertilizers, energy, and waste.
It is also MPS GAP certified to promote good agricultural practices.
Las Limas is a state-of-the-art facility designed to prevent insect, diseases and bacteria from entering the greenhouses. It uses cutting-edge production software, MPRISE Agriware, to improve the speed of communication to our grower customers and prepare us for future expansion.

We employ a highly skilled labor force that make sure every bag of cuttings is tracked and inspected for accuracy of count and quality. The goal is to deliver cuttings within 36 to 48 hours of harvest! To do that, Ball FloraPlant has secured a delivery service out of Nicaragua to supply the North American marketplace and reliably serve our customers.

In an effort to increase sustainability, the Las Limas farm grows in reusable, sterilized volcanic rock, and recycles and sterilizes its water before reuse. The farm is also free of neonicotinoid-based pet management chemicals and relies on alternative, environmentally friendly means to provide cuttings insect-free.

Name: MBS Grounds Maintenance Ltd
Description:
We provide exceptional maintenance and landscaping services to a wide range of commercial and residential properties, including large corporate environments, schools social housing and parks.

Our experienced and skilled workforce set a high standard each day in landscape design, paving, fencing, lawn care, vegetation clearance, tree surgery and everything in-between.

Name: ECOstyle | B Corp
Description: “ECOstyle is gespecialiseerd in de ontwikkeling en het vermarkten van ecologisch verantwoorde producten en concepten voor bodem en plant voor particuliere en beroepsmatige toepassing. Hierbij staat zorg voor het milieu, innovatie, duurzaamheid en kennisoverdracht centraal.”

Name: AVAG GREENHOUSE TECHNOLOGY CENTER
Description:
AVAG is the association of the Dutch greenhouse construction and technology industry. We represent the common interests of our members and support them in the areas of 

- Quality (HortiQ)
- Innovation (Hortivation)
- Internationalization

The Netherlands is a globally respected supplier of integrated growing systems, components and associated services. The AVAG affiliated companies sucessfully export their products worldwide and form the basis of years of experience and knowledge that has become invaluable for the industry. 

Suppliers that are member of AVAG can provide Dutch integrated growing systems for any market, any crop and any climate!

Name: Center for Horticultural Innovation
Description: As a Division of South Essex Fabricating, the Center for Horticultural Innovation is a dynamic institution committed to advancing horticultural sciences, fostering innovation, and supporting sustainable practices within the horticulture industry. Our facility is made up of a genetics team with an in-house lab, a Growing/crop trial development department, a plant science/propagation department, data science/AI department, and a nutrition lab.

Name: MOREL DIFFUSION - CYCLAMEN MOREL
Description:
A CYCLAMEN'S STORY since 1919

Breeder and creator of cyclamen since 1919, Morel is a French family business, driven by a continuous entrepreneurial spirit and constant high standards.

The company has historically placed innovation and creation at the heart of its fundamental values and has invested significantly in human resources, research and development, while respecting people and nature.
For more than 100 years, the men and women of Morel have cultivated the same spirit of excellence and passion, reaffirming their know-how every day, throughout the world.  Explore, develop, innovate, create...

Twenty or so craft trades irrigate the creativity of the company, whose varieties are found in over 70 countries.
In all climates and under all growing conditions, indoors and outdoors, each Morel F1 hybrid cyclamen is unique. Today, Morel invites you to discover yours.

With this experience, Morel is now the pilot company of the Hortus "Nature et Horticulture" subsidiary of Evolem, a French family office. Under the aegis of the Managing Director, Eric Beaude, and thanks to the men who make up the company, it is resolutely turned towards the future. Innovation and diversity are more than ever its DNA!

Name: Lively Root
Description:
At Lively Root, we are horticultural experts passionate about empowering our customers to create green spaces. Our team has over a century of experience as growers, retailers, and landscapers. We know with so many new consumers to home gardening, the learning curve can be steep. That is precisely why we not only provide pristine plants for the best possible start, but we also offer education and coaching. By equipping our customers with knowledge, we hope not only to guide but to inspire.

Lively Root is committed to providing eco-friendly products and responsibly grown plants. All of our orders come to our customer’s doorstep carefully packaged from one of our nurseries to ensure quality at every step. Our direct fulfillment further expedites shipping and processing so we can provide the freshest plants anywhere.

Plants improve air quality, soothe stress, and even promote creativity. However, we know purchasing plants can be thorny. The ability to shop directly is a huge step forward in making gardening accessible to everyone. Through our handcrafted process, we want everyone to feel comfortable ordering, whether it’s their first plant or hundredth!

Name: Holland Greentech Uganda
Description: At Holland Greentech, we are dedicated to revolutionizing agriculture through cutting-edge technology and sustainable practices. Our mission is to empower farmers, enhance crop yield, and contribute to a more sustainable and resilient food supply chain in all cities across Africa.

Name: Sunripe(1976)Limited
Description: Producers & Exporters of Fresh Produce, Organic Vegetables & Avocados and amazing range of Frozen Food.

Name: Compaqpeat
Description:
Substrates are our passion.

For more than 20 years, we have dedicated ourselves to the production of high-quality substrates for the professional horticulture industry serving a wide range of applications and crops.

In order to sustainably safeguard our raw materials, we particularly focus on managing our own peat fields as well as increasing the use of alternative raw materials such as wood fiber and perlite.

Being a German capital company with headquarters in Latvia, we supply customers in almost 70 countries worldwide with the finest substrates. The needs of our customers as well as a cooperative partnership based on trust and reliability are our top priorities. As a family-owned company, we stand by our products for quality, transparency and crop safety.

Our team includes experienced experts from the international horticulture industry as well as from the industrial and commercial sectors. Dedicated specialists and executives can look forward to interesting tasks and extensive development opportunities at our company.

Name: Polymorph
Description:
Polymorph is a plant tissue culture laboratory that specializes in micropropagation and germplasm banking of many species.  

Our lab is operated by passionate scientists dedicated to providing high-quality and disease-free plants to breeders, nurseries, and growers. 

Healthy, pathogen-tested, data-backed varieties do not just make growing easier, they are the foundation of agriculture.

Name: Apata Group Limited
Description:
Apata Group Limited is a specialist service provider for New Zealand kiwifruit and avocado growers.  We harvest, pack and store fruit in our industry leading packhouses and coolstores which are strategically situated in the heart of kiwifruit and avocado growing country, the Bay of Plenty.

We provide a comprehensive range of services specifically for the New Zealand avocado and kiwifruit industries. We provide our growers with expert technical support on all aspects of orchard production, leasing and manage orchards, and are industry leaders in packing and coolstorage. 

Apata Group Limited is one of the kiwifruit industry’s largest fully integrated post-harvest operators. Our main facilities are conveniently located in Te Puke and Tauranga, providing our growers the capability and capacity to pack, coolstore and ship their fruit at optimum times.

With over 30 years experience we pride ourself on having industry leading technology, systems and personnel.

Name: Winseed
Description: From our headquarters in New Zealand, and subsidiary operations in Hyderabad India, we drive innovation in vegetable seed development through research, plant breeding, production, and marketing, bringing quality vegetable seeds to growers around the world.

Name: Light Science Technologies
Description:
Light Science Technologies (LST) provides growers with a full turnkey solution, including lighting, science, sensors, software, control systems and much more to the AgTech (AGT) industry. The solutions are suitable for applications in Controlled Environment Agriculture, such as polytunnels, vertical farms, glasshouses and medicinal growers, and also open agriculture, providing key data to farmers. 

Vertical farming is a game changer in the shift from traditional agriculture to modern 'AgTech'. Vertical farming looks to address key global challenges such as growing population, increasing urbanisation, climate change, shift in diet trends and more awareness of how far our food travels. 

Our vision is for the world to 'grow more with less' by helping growers create profitable and sustainable crops using technology and data.

Name: CNC Grondstoffen
Description:
CNC is one of Europe’s largest suppliers of compost and casing soil for mushroom growing. With our expertise, commitment and focus on results, we offer reliable, top-quality growing substrates and services for our customers. And because the world moves forward, we are constantly improving and enhancing our products and services.

CNC employs approximately 350 people, with branches in Milsbeek, Moerdijk and Ammerzoden in the Netherlands. We also produce phase III compost at our company Holpol-Compost (link: http://www.holpol.com.pl/) in Gościejewo, Poland.  

Our subsidiary CNC Exotic Mushrooms (link:www.cncexoticmushrooms.com) produces wood and compost substrates for growing exotic mushrooms like Shiitake, king oyster mushrooms, Nameko and sun mushrooms. CNC Exotic Mushrooms is the European market leader in this industry.

CNC is part of C4C Holding (link: www.c4cholding.com),  a group of leading companies in the European mushroom sector.

Name: Lensli Substrates
Description:
Als substraatspecialist ontwikkelen en produceren wij al meer dan 120 jaar kwalitatief hoogwaardige substraten en aanverwante producten voor de professionele tuinbouw in binnen- en buitenland. Wij zetten ons volledig in om duurzame groei te faciliteren voor onze klanten. Dankzij een sterke focus op het gebruik van hernieuwbare grondstoffen, de inzet van onze eigen productiefaciliteiten én een jarenlange expertise maken wij dit mogelijk. Samen met telers en kwekers willen wij direct profiteren van innovatieve en duurzame oplossingen die steeds betere resultaten geven. Alles voor een gezonde toekomst en groei. 

Met een productielocatie in Bleiswijk (ZH) en een productiefaciliteit in Katwijk, Cuijk (NB) bedienen wij met ca. 50 medewerkers onze klanten in heel Europa en daarbuiten.

Lensli Substrates houdt zich bezig met groei; dat is wat we doen, waar ons hart ligt en waar we goed in zijn. "Have Fun Growing" is wat wij iedere dag nastreven en realiseren. Voor onszelf en voor onze klanten. Nu en in de toekomst.

Name: Benary
Description:
Our core business is the development and distribution of seed raised bedding ornamentals. Today Benary is one of the leading breeding companies worldwide in this field.

Our professional quality products are offered to growers and young plant producers through our wide network of distributors and brokers around the world. Today we export more than 85 % of the seeds into 120 countries worldwide.
 
Benary stands for premium quality flower seed for efficient young plant production and extraordinary garden performance. 

Benary was founded by Ernst Benary in 1843 in Erfurt (former Eastern Germany), which was the center of the European Ornamental Industry.

How it all began anew...
After World War II our family business was completely disowned by the socialist government and was refounded by Friedrich Benary in Hann. Münden, Lower Saxony, in 1946. Friedrich started from scratch and traveled all over Europe on his bike to collect seed for his new business. 
 
Benary operates three breeding facilities in USA, the Netherlands, and Germany!

In 2017, Benary+ was launched in North America to offer an alternative way to market its products to growers in North America by making transactions more direct and efficient, as well as to increase the value for our grower customers. To learn more, visit the Benary+ website: http://benaryplus.com.

Name: Kroptek
Description:
Kroptek is an early-stage UK-based Agritech group. Its vision is to grow high-quality crops sustainably and profitably all year round, at the lowest possible cost to consumers and the environment.

The company is building the Kroptek Network, a diversified and connected international network of local urban farms spanning a broad range of crops and countries, supplying fresh and high quality produce to consumers. Kroptek supports its network by sharing grower know-how, supplying innovative technology, and providing human and financial resources to help scale the businesses.

The Kroptek Solutions engineering platform offers customised Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) and LED horticulture lighting solutions to urban farms in over 20 countries. Kroptek’s global client base includes food, ornamentals and commercial growers, as well as research organizations and universities.

Name: Avocado Solutions Africa Ltd
Description: Avocado Solutions Africa empowers farmers, exporters, and agribusiness investors across the avocado value chain. We offer end-to-end solutions including farm site assessments, quality seedlings, orchard establishment, agronomic support, post-harvest handling, market intelligence and market linkage. We walk with farmers, investors, and exporters to ensure productivity, quality, and profitability in avocado farming, export and processing.

Name: Freshcare Ltd
Description:
Freshcare provides assurance standards, training and support services to the Australian fresh produce, wine grape and supply chain industries.

Freshcare certification is recognised in the domestic and international supply chain as evidence that products have been produced in a safe, sustainable manner.
Location: Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Hobart, Adelaide, Canberra, Darwin

Name: Kekkilä Garden
Description:
Kekkilä valmistaa korkealaatuisia multatuotteita, lannoitteita ja puutarhatarvikkeita kotipuutarhoihin. Viherrakentamiseen Kekkilä tarjoaa orgaanisten ja epäorgaanisten jätteiden kierrätyspalveluita ja kierrätyspohjaisia kasvualustoja. Kekkilä on osa Kekkilä-BVB -yhtiötä, ja sen omistaa Neova Group. Kekkilä Garden toimii kuluttaja- ja viherrakennusliiketoiminnassa Suomessa ja Baltiassa. Kasvattaminen on intohimomme ja haluamme kasvaa yhdessä asiakkaidemme kanssa.   

Kekkilä manufactures high-quality soil products, fertilisers and garden accessories for home gardens. For landscaping, Kekkilä offers organic and non-organic waste recycling services and recycled-based growing media. Kekkilä is part of Kekkilä-BVB and is owned by Neova Group. Kekkilä Garden is active in the consumer and landscaping business in Finland and the Baltic countries. Growth is our passion, and we want to grow together with our customers.

Name: Double H Nurseries Ltd
Description:
Double H Nurseries Ltd is the largest indoor potted plant grower in the UK. We grow Orchids, Chrysanthemums and foliage plants that bring happiness to thousands of consumers each week.

We are an award winning, environmentally aware business with over 250 employees based in New Milton, Hampshire. Using established lean manufacturing principles and innovative growing technology we are the UK’s largest producer of indoor ornamental pot plants and supply over 8 million plants to major retailers across the country. We are extremely proud to have been credited with Investors in People 'Gold'.


We grow Orchids, Chrysanthemums and Roses to supply major supermarkets with products that bring happiness to thousands of consumers each week. We combine our plant growing expertise with an in-house creative capability to design and develop packaging for great value, fashionable products which we then assembly and dispatch through our fast moving, efficient packing facilities.


Double H is a family run business operating for over 50 years and we have seen our sales turnover double to £24 million in the last 5 years. We continue to achieve sales growth and currently grow and deliver over 4.5 million house plants to UK supermarkets each year. We have invested heavily in the most modern plant production facilities in the UK, and are leading the industry with innovative, sustainable and efficient manufacturing practices.

Our vision and values run through our ‘family’ business, they are what bind us together, strengthens us as a business and enables us to achieve far more together as a team. Double H is proud to be a British plant grower.

Name: Botanical Interests
Description:
Botanical Interests was founded in 1995 out of the garage of co-owners Judy Seaborn and Curtis Jones. Their first season included 98 varieties and one employee. Now in its almost 30th year, a lot has changed, but our values of providing high-quality products and information to consumers and attentive customer service to retailers have stayed the same.
 
Now offering more than 650+ dependable varieties of certified organic, heirloom, non-GMO, untreated, and responsibly produced hybrid vegetable, herb, and flower seeds. Our goal is to inspire and educate so home gardeners can create beautiful and productive gardens. Our packets contain a wealth of information, inside and out, and every seed is Non-GMO Project Verified. Seeds are available for purchase online, at independent garden centers, gourmet grocers, and health food stores throughout the United States.

Name: HortBio Technologies PVT LTD
Description:
HortBio Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is known for
1) Next generation growing media substrates manufacturing 
2) Micropropagation of high value horticultural plant varieties 
3) Production of agriculturally valuable microbial cultures
4) Offering plant pathogen diagnostics and genetic fingerprinting services

Name: Priva América Latina
Description: PRIVA es líder mundial en automatización de invernaderos. Brindamos soluciones de clima, riego, desinfección y mano de obra para la horticultura desde hace 64 años, enfocándonos en la combinación única de software, hardware y servicios.

Name: Kerklaan Greenhouses & Horti Materials
Description: With over 25 years of experience, Kerklaan is a household name when it comes to greenhouse construction and greenhouse demolition. Competitive prices, professional teams and a proper delivery of the project are the pillars on which our company is built.

Name: Vreugdenhil Young Plants
Description:
Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in de opkweek van warme groenteplanten en een grote verscheidenheid aan sierteeltproducten, zowel jonge plant als eindproduct. Naast deze producten hebben we met het merk Pick-&-Joy gericht op de consument ontwikkeld. Een groot assortiment heerlijk eetbare plukgroenten gericht op de consument.

Met circa 120 vaste medewerkers ondersteunt door 100-500 uitzendkrachten is een positief werkklimaat van essentieel belang. We streven dan ook continue naar een plezierige bedrijfscultuur en persoonlijke ontwikkelingsmogelijkheden van onze medewerkers. Dit in combinatie met de juiste vakkundigheid en instelling willen we het optimale resultaat voor onze klant behalen. Door middel van korte lijnen en een sterke organisatie zijn wij in staat om zowel grote als kleine orders in korte tijd te verwerken.

Met een kasoppervlak van 47 hectare verspreid over 5 productielocaties in het Westland behoort Vreugdenhil Young Plants tot de top van de Nederlandse tuinbouwsector in de plantenkwekerswereld.

Name: Advanced Green Solutions - AGS
Description:
Vision
To be the markets prime provider of agronomy variant requirements and major contributor in Eco-Friendly plant health products by transforming our experience & knowledge into a tangible business module and solutions that would develop and add value to our clients and to the industry.

Mission
To provide our clients with all their agronomy needs and requirements and assure them the most applicable products for their requirements at the most competitive sets and solutions.

Name: Bloemteknik
Description: Bloem designs, manufactures and deploys high quality, modular lighting solutions for vertical farms & greenhouses. All solutions are collaboratively customised with our growers to maximise productivity and optimise cost-of-ownership.

Name: Grodan101
Description:
Since 1969 Grodan has been the world-wide leader in supplying innovative and sustainable stone wool growing media solutions. Over the last 50 years, customers from commercial hydroponic growers to home-based gardeners have been using Grodan products to cultivate safe, healthy and high quality-vegetables, cannabis and plants.

The Grodan name is synonymous with quality horticultural stone wool- an inert medium discovered near volcanoes in the 1800’s and later created in factories by Grodan to facilitate growing plants without soil. Our Precision Growing principles, combined with our cutting-edge products, solutions and advice, allow us to help growers of all levels to reach the goal of producing more with less.

Producing more with less is in our roots. Since we invented hydroponic stone wool growing in 1969 we have continuously evolved the Grodan approach to sustainable growing. Our growing media enables growers to provide their plants with water and fertilizer much more precisely and efficiently. By doing so, yield and quality can increase, while at the same time saving water and fertilizer and decreasing overall costs.

Today, our growers make use of a wide range of innovative products for the entire growing cycle, from the start of propagation till harvesting. At Grodan, we are driven to continue developing revolutionary products and technology to support Precision Growing for generations to come.

Name: OVATA Succulents
Description:
We have more than 50 different species of succulents and 70% of the product range is protected by breeder right. We are constantly expanding our assortment. We cultivate our succulents according to their unique auras and the power to live lang in-store and at home. They are survivors.

OVATA offer a wide range of labels and ceramics. Develop trendy and authentic designs that fit our plants. Ceramics are available in pot sizes 5.5cm, 8.5cm, 12cm & 13cm. Our labels are stylish and useful due to the Plant Passport and product information.

Name: Voorwinden Group
Description: Turnkey greenhouse builder out of Holland who can install greenhouses worldwide,  but is focused on Canada and the USA, where it is licensed as a general contractor in TN, VA and WV.

Name: A Lighter Touch (New Zealand)
Description:
Consumers are searching out produce from reputable sources - that’s safe with a sound provenance - and they’re willing to pay a premium for it. 

Our Agroecology programme with the plant-based food sector aims to make New Zealand the preferred supplier of sustainably produced food to this expanding world market.

We’re changing crop production, accelerating the transition from agrichemical pest management to agroecological crop protection.

Based on crop protection practices that go back centuries, enhanced by the latest science, agroecology produces food the way modern consumers want it.

Agroecology also brings producers substantial gains in profitability, crop diversity and market competitiveness. 

All with a lighter touch on the land.

Sign up to our monthly newsletter In Touch
https://a-lighter-touch.co.nz/keep-updated/

Name: PLANTARIUM|GROEN-Direkt
Description:
With a visit to PLANTARIUM|GROEN-Direkt, in one go you will be completely up to date with all that is going on in the business. You will get to meet the most influential growers from the Netherlands and abroad, but also those smaller growers with surprising products. In the trolley and layer section, many thousands of samples in all shapes and sizes are on display, where you can directly place an order. Ordering at the fair often means having the products delivered the very next week. But you will not only find leading companies in the green sector, you can also get to know their suppliers and the people behind the source materials.

In addition, there is a wonderful selection of hardware suppliers whose products would not be out of place in any garden centre.

In addition to the extensive and international offer at the fair, there are numerous events where you can brush up your knowledge and expand your network. The presentation of the best and most promising innovations will also take place here. We would like to welcome you as our guest and provide you with lunch and a beverage.

Name: Express Seed Company
Description: Express Seed Company offers the most experienced, knowledgeable and technically skilled Distribution Sales Team in the US & Canada to provide hands on product and growing expertise to add value to all growing operations.

Name: Growtec Solutions
Description: You’re in the business of growing. We’re in the business of helping you do it as efficiently and productively as possible, by providing the best horticultural technology, services, and solutions. From cultivation optimization to drip irrigation and growing systems, learn why Growtec is simply a better way to grow.

Name: Amigo Plant BV
Description:
Wat begon als een onschuldige passie voor succulenten, groeide uit tot een professionele onderneming met een uitgebreid en hoogwaardig assortiment Echeveria’s, Crassula’s, Haworthia’s, Aloe’s en Peperomia
en meer. Sinds 2005 zijn ze te koop onder de naam Amigo Plant.
Nog net zo bevlogen en betrokken als toen we begonnen, telt ons bedrijf inmiddels meerdere locaties in Nederland en een in Portugal. Groeien door groen geluk: voor onszelf geldt dat net zo goed.


ENG: What began as an innocent love of succulents, grew into a professional business offering a wide range of high-quality Echeverias, Crassulas, Haworthias, Aloes, Peperomias and more, which we have been selling under the name Amigo Plant since 2005.

Just as driven and committed as when we
started, our company now has several locations
in the Netherlands and one in Portugal.
“Growing green, growing happiness”also applies to ourselves!

Name: Meadow
Description:
Sustainability and performance → that’s the Meadow promise. 

As a family-run manufacturer of coir and cocopeat growing media, we combine 45+ years of agricultural expertise with large-scale, low-impact production globally.

We practice responsible water management (rainwater harvesting) and field-test innovations by growing blueberries on our own substrates and grow bags. Our vertical integration ensures traceability and consistent quality from farm to finished product.

We now supply partners across the EU, USA, New Zealand, China, Mexico, Peru, Spain and Australia, proudly ranking among India’s top 15 coir exporters.

If you’re exploring renewable growing media or looking to move away from peat, we’re here to help you find a sustainable, high-performing solution.

Name: National Horticulture Board
Description: The National Horticulture Board (NHB) was set up by the Government of India in 1984 as an Autonomous organization under the administrative control of Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare and registered as a society under Societies Registration Act with its headquarters at Gurugram. Presently, NHB has 29 field offices located all over the country. The broad aims and objectives of the Board are to develop production clusters/hubs for integrated Hi-tech commercial horticulture, development of Post-harvest and cold chain infrastructure, ensuring availability of quality planting material and to promote adoption of new technologies/tools/ techniques for Hi-tech commercial horticulture etc.

Name: Globe Planter
Description:
Dans le Monde Entier, le travail patient des créateurs de nouvelles variétés fait constamment évoluer les plantes :

Silhouette plus harmonieuse, meilleure résistance aux maladies, aux intempéries de toutes sortes, coloris jamais vus...

Attentif et respectueux de ces travaux de longue haleine, Globe Planter développe et protège l’œuvre de ces artisans du vivant et vous propose leurs créations les mieux adaptées à notre climat et nos conditions de culture pour donner un nouveau visage aux jardins, terrasses et balcons.

Name: Jagtap Horticulture Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Jagtap Horticulture Pvt.Ltd. is a parent company of Jagtap Nursery (Production wing), Jagtap Nursery's Garden Center (Retail wing), Lansol Landscape Solutions (Design & Development wing), Groundcare (landscape maintenance wing) & MyFlorist (Natural & Artificial Bouquet). We have grown in last 40 years from being a small production unit to one of India's largest integrated landscape company.

Name: GreenV
Description: GreenV is your portal to world-leading complete greenhouse projects, knowledge and experience. With our family of companies, we provide integrated solutions around the world for professional crop production: from vegetables to ornamentals; from super foods to soft fruits. Our team of horticulture experts understands your unique needs and the local circumstances that shape them.

Name: Afriflora
Description:
The rose farm Afrilora - Sher is located next to Lake Ziway, at a height of 1650 meter above sea level and approximately 3 hours’ drive from the capital, Addis Ababa. Besides the farm in Ziway, “Sher roses” are also cultivated at 2 other locations: Koka farm, which is an hour’s drive from Ziway, and a farm in the village of Adami Tulu, which is near to Ziway.

The total area of these greenhouse complexes is some 500 hectares.

More than 65 different types of roses are grown at Sher Ethiopia. Large and small-flowered roses and spray roses in many different colors.

Cuttings, plants, harvesting, processing, packing, transport, all work is carried out by local employees.

For the processing of the roses, special processing halls have been built, connected to the 38 greenhouses, where every day about 3 to 4 million roses are processed. The roses are processed into ready-made bunches, depending on the wishes of the customer, to reduce the costs for the customer.

Name: OVATA Succulents
Description:
We have more than 50 different species of succulents and 70% of the product range is protected by breeder right. We are constantly expanding our assortment. We cultivate our succulents according to their unique auras and the power to live lang in-store and at home. They are survivors.

OVATA offer a wide range of labels and ceramics. Develop trendy and authentic designs that fit our plants. Ceramics are available in pot sizes 5.5cm, 8.5cm, 12cm & 13cm. Our labels are stylish and useful due to the Plant Passport and product information.

Name: Australian Mangoes
Description:
Australian Mango Industry Association (AMIA) is the peak industry body representing the Australian mango industry. Established in 2000, AMIA was created to unite mango growers and allied businesses, ensuring a strong and cohesive voice for the industry.

Our primary focus is to advocate for the interests of our members and drive the sustainable growth and development of the industry. We collaborate closely with key organisations, including Hort Innovation, government agencies, and commercial businesses, to achieve these goals. AMIA's members include mango growers, wholesalers, processors, and other related businesses.

Name: Indo-Dutch Horticulture Technologies
Description:
Indo Dutch Horticulture Technologies P. Ltd. Is a private company working towards bringing change in Fruit and Flower industry for hill farmers to stop migration and provide farmers a better life. As a prosperous outcome of this, IDHT has become one of the commanding horticulture and floriculture businesses in India with an ability to match up to international standards.

IDHTPL is one of the leading producer of quality planting material of various Fruit Trees & Flower Bulbs for Global & Indian Market. Apart from bringing a varieties and Dutch technologies to India, we are pushing the boundaries by using India's economic land and labor rates to produce superior planting material at competitive price.

Name: greenhub solutions GmbH
Description:
greenhub delivers precision-controlled vertical farming solutions powered by GreenFarm OS, our proprietary ‘growing algorithm’. We help growers, researchers and agri-tech innovators optimize yield, reduce risk, and drive future-ready production.

From reproducible R&D in lab-scale systems to scalable commercial farms and retrofit installations, our modular hardware and data-driven software deliver plant-centric automation.

Join our network to unlock real-time crop intelligence, proven crop recipes, and expert-horticultural support.

 Based in Leipzig, Germany – partnering globally.

Our expertise lies in innovative indoor farming solutions, particularly in developing automation for the controlled environment agriculture (CEA) sector. Our long-term vision includes creating a modular product kit comprising both hardware and software solutions.

We are excited to introduce our first product, the GreenResearcher. This compact, plug-and-play system is specifically designed for standardized experiments and data collection in vertical farming. The GreenResearcher facilitates the gathering of consistent and informative data, aiming to enhance efficiency and productivity. This system is powered by GreenFarm OS 1.0, an operating system tailored for controlling, monitoring, and analyzing data from farming systems. It offers detailed insights into plant growth, helping to refine cultivation methods. To learn more about the GreenResearcher and its alignment with your needs, please visit our online brochure at https://sway.cloud.microsoft/bDar4cmoC6YOiVa8?ref=LinkedIn&loc=play.

Name: Tom Angel Studio | Ecological Horticulture: Design, Consultancy & Planting
Description:
Consultancy and design services for commercial and residential clients - providing real world green space solutions embedded in the principles of biodiversity-focused environmental horticulture. Services include planting design, green space consultancy, landscape & garden design, maintenance specifications, japanese knotweed surveys and more. 

About me:
I'm a Chartered Horticulturist, Master of Horticulture (RHS) and award-winning garden designer. As a former contractor, I am able to find practical, real world solutions that help to maximise your environmental, social and biodiversity as well as cosmetic aspirations. Call me for an informal chat on 07547 525601.

For commercial clients: 
Landscape management and maintenance consultancy, with services including individual site reviews, partial or complete redesigns, and comprehensive assessments of nationwide property portfolios. The focus of the reports is the living elements of the areas being inspected – how they can be maintained, redesigned, recovered or repaired, depending upon your requirements. Typical documents delivered are soft landscape reports, grounds maintenance schedules, invasive weed surveys, and planting plans.

For residential customers:
Garden design and consultancy for gardens of any size, from suburban gardens to private estates to communal residents' gardens. In addition to garden design, consultancy services can be one-off visits to tackle specific issues or provide garden management plans, or long term relationships involving regular visits.

Name: Vertical Agro(EPZ)Limited
Description: Vertical Agro is a privately owned company based in Kenya, that grows, processes and packs fresh and frozen vegetables and fruits.

Name: The Plant Company
Description:
The Plant Company was started in 2019 to reinvent the houseplant industry. This may sound a bit audacious, but it truly is at the heart of everything our team does every day of the year.

While The Plant Company is a young business, horticulture runs in our veins as we’ve been in this industry nearly our entire lives. As we built The Plant Company, we recognized that garden centers deserved innovative, high-quality houseplants that were easier to source and didn’t require buying a whole truckload at a time. We also realized that while consumers love houseplants, many are stripped of caring for them because the traditional houseplant suppliers didn’t give them the essential support needed for success.

We built a state-of-the-art 5-acre greenhouse in the beautiful Blue Ridge Mountains of Virginia, providing us with an optimal growing environment near major shipping lanes. We produce our young plants and finish them to the highest quality standards in North America. We are working with breeders worldwide to source the best performing and innovative houseplants. We have an unwavering commitment to giving consumers the best houseplant experience possible, from buying the plant in your store to supporting them after bringing their legacy plant home.

As we set out to reinvent the houseplant industry, we want to partner with you to help us bring the leafjoy experience to your customers. Between our innovative plants and marketing program from Proven Winners, we’re confident leafjoy will add value to your business. So give us a call or, even better, visit us and see what we’re doing for you!

Name: Beauty Express Inc.
Description:
Our purpose:

BETTER FOR THE ENVIRONMENT....
BETTER FOR YOUR GARDEN.

Manufacturer of coconut based horticultural products that provide products that enhance water retention and both reduce, Global warming,  AND assist with the impacts it has on all aspects of horticulture, both for agriculture and home lawn & garden.

Name: UMDIS Mushroom Agency
Description:
UMDIS Mushroom Agency works since 2012. We provide group trainings and private consultancy for mushroom business. UMDIS is situated in Poland and United Kingdom - we train worldwide.
UMDIS gives you:
- courses on mushroom growing and harvesting
- private consulting on farm set up, mushroom growing, harvesting, composting and exotic mushroom production
- online webinars with experts on mushroom topics
- group tours to see farms worldwide
- website with MUSHROOM Industry main NEWS https://umdis.org/ and social media
- promotion for mushroom industry supplier
To reach us: +48577253132 WhatsApp

Name: British Growers Association
Description: British Growers Association is a grower owned, grower led, not for profit umbrella group comprising a range of organisations operating in the UK horticulture industry and fresh produce sector. The membership includes Crop Associations, Producer Organisations, marketing groups and professional membership groups. We are a small dedicated team based in Louth, Lincolnshire. The organisation is governed by a Board of Directors drawn from all sectors of the horticulture industry.  More information on the work of British Growers can be found at www.britishgrowers.org.

Name: Oboya Horticulture
Description:
We are Oboya Horticulture Solutions. A global partner for reliable, effective, and traceable horticultural supplies.

Smart, sustainable and global. We design horticultural solutions that grow with you.

From biodegradable trays to IoT-enabled logistics systems, we help growers, distributors, and retailers thrive across the entire value chain. Our integrated portfolio covers planting, post-harvest, logistics, and retail. With sustainability and innovation at the core of everything we do.

Name: Peatman
Description:

Name: Palms 360
Description:
Integrative Palm Tree Health Care. We focus on the whole Palm, including the soils they grow in. Nutrition, Pathology, Soil Microbe Function Analysis, Abiotic conditions and environment, Irrigation needs, etc...

We work with landscape companies, architects, public works entities, developers as well as individual property owners. We assess project sites and individual palms to diagnose the soil microbiology, nutritional needs, pathogens, irrigation and soil productivity. We prescribe treatment plans based on the specific site and needs of the palms using the most current science. We assess soil and tree nutrition levels based on DNA & lab testing and then compound nutrition formulas specifically for that project. We prescribe the most appropriate biologicals for the needs of the site and soil based on a massive database of soil organisms and their functions in the soil and plants. We diagnose pathogenic infection, prescribe and implement treatment plans to reverse or suppress disease infection, rebuild the palm’s immune response and restore health to the trees. We are uniquely qualified in this field having worked in the realm of both agriculture and horticulture to learn the best of both worlds and bring them together into our knowledge base and skill set.

The incorporation of Soil & Root DNA testing & analysis, safe, yet extremely effective biologicals, targeted nutrition & OMRI Certified Organic products into our Palms 360 treatment plans Is an absolute game changer for the landscape and horticulture fields. Large Scale Agriculture has been using these methods for quite some time, however they are very hush about their practices due to looking for competitive advantages. 

Our passion is restoring balance to the Urban Forests through cutting edge science. The latest AI is advancing our cause by increasing the options in our tool box at an increasing rate. I am excited to progress our industry into the future through this technology.

Name: BaumpflegeFischer
Description: Bäume auf Ihre Stand- und Bruchsicherheit hin zu beurteilen ist eine meiner wichtigen Kernkompetenzen. Im Rahmen der Baumkontrolle wende ich diese regelmäßig im Raum Berlin und Brandenburg an. Dafür richte ich mich an die FLL-Baumkontrollrichtlinien. Baumkatierung für Privateigentümer, Immobilienverwaltungen oder öffentliche Träger führe ich digital aus und erfasse dabei standartisierte  und individuell gewünschte Daten zu den Bäumen und deren Umfeld. Durch die Baumkatierung und die Baumkontrolle ergeben sich Datengrundlagen aus denen Baumpflegemaßnahmen abgeleitet werden können. Grundlage für die fachgerechte Baumpflege. So sind Sie immer auf der sicheren Seite um die Verkehrsicherheit ihrer Bäume zu gewährleisten und behalten den Überblick.  Kommt es trotz aller baumerhaltenden Maßnahmen doch zur Entscheidung, dass ein Baum gefällt werden muss, bin ich auch für schwierige Baumfällung Ihr kompetenter Dienstleister.

Bei unserer Arbeit setzen wir auf emissionsarme Betriebsmittel, da es unser Ziel ist, jegliche negativen Umweltauswirkung zu vermeiden. Dies zieht im Regelfall auch eine Effizienzsteigerung nach sich. Name: TUIN.KLIMAAT
Description:
Onze visie is:

Iedereen een tuin

De fysieke uitdagingen zoals hitte, droogte en overstromingen creëren omstandigheden waar mensen moeilijk mee kunnen omgaan. Maar naast beperkingen bieden ze ook kansen en mogelijkheden. Vanuit die overtuiging wil ‘Tuinen VDB’ zich richten op de directe omgeving van de mensen. Deze omgeving speelt een belangrijke rol in ons leven, of we ons daar nu bewust van zijn of niet. De genoemde ongemakken kunnen psychologisch worden aangepakt door de directe omgeving van mensen zo aangenaam mogelijk in te richten. Zowel kleine als grote veranderingen kunnen een positief effect hebben op ons welzijn. Daarom raden we iedereen aan, ongeacht de grootte ervan, om een ‘tuin’ te hebben voor hun eigen gemoedsrust en die van hun naasten.

At Hedge Nursery, we understand the importance of quality in living plants. Our commitment to delivering top-notch products is reflected in our impressive Feefo rating of 4.8 out of 5, based on nearly 5,000 independent reviews. This exceptional feedback demonstrates our dedication to customer satisfaction and plant quality.

We pride ourselves on competitive pricing, offering discounts for bulk orders and special rates for high-value purchases. Our knowledgeable team is always ready to discuss your specific requirements and provide tailored solutions for the best value.

Whether you're a homeowner enhancing garden privacy, a landscaper seeking reliable suppliers, a business undertaking a large greening project, or a farmer planting a hedgerow, Hedge Nursery is your go-to source for quality hedging plants and trees. Name: K. van Bourgondien
Description:
K. van Bourgondien has offered Dutch bulbs and perennials for more than 175 years. The family-owned company was started in Hillegom, Holland, in 1845 as a grower of tulips and other flower bulbs. By the 1880s, the family offered bulbs through commercial catalogs.

Very early in the 20th century, the van Bourgondien family started a mail-order company in the United States that supplied greenhouses and cut-flower growers, making us one of the first bulb-by-mail suppliers. Over time, K. van Bourgondien became one of the world's leading wholesale distributors of Dutch bulbs and perennials.

Bulbs could not be imported from Holland during World War II, so we temporarily grew ours in the U.S. until after the war, when bulb cultivation returned to the Netherlands. We still maintain a strong presence there with a full-time staff of buyers and experts there who regularly visit Dutch growers and hybridizers to inspect their products.

Today, K. van Bourgondien serves thousands of customers annually, ranging from weekend gardeners to professional landscapers. We offer top-quality products at low prices backed by outstanding customer service and our No-Risk Guarantee.You can be confident that we use only the most conscientious and trusted growers to provide you with the most exquisite results in your landscaping projects, every time. From our newest floral finds, to tried-and-true old favorites, our trademark remains—providing you with the quality, selection and service you deserve the first time, and every time.

Name: macGARDENS

Post-pandemic our role has been refined to specialist pruning, general (seasonal) garden maintenance, and planning consultation services. 
macGARDENS has been a Principal Contractor and Preferred Supplier to the City of Ballarat since 2003.
Since 2001, macGARDENS has developed from a sole tradership whose primary focus was dismantling trees in restricted areas, to building and keeping domestic gardens and public landscapes. 
The integrated nature of the business came about from demand, and our core work is pruning and planting; soft landscaping. If we are to plant a tree, the job can come with the requirement to firstly remove other features, remediate soil to accommodate the chosen species, then possibly irrigate and illuminate the feature in what effectively becomes a new garden space. 
If your job has anything to do with plants, its entirely likely that we can do it. Please ask.

Description:

Name: AzoLem
Description:
In 2023 AzoLem started doing business. Our purpose is to make livestock farming sustainable and autonomous.

How? By growing Azolla and duckweed as protein sources for livestock feeds. Both are fast-growing aquatic plants, high in protein content and as such a viable replacement for soymeal in livestock feeds. We grow locally, close nutrient cycles and meanwhile we reduce deforestation of rainforests and pollution during transport.

AzoLem helps consumers to reduce the environmental impact of eating meat.
---

In 2023 is AzoLem gestart. Onze missie is om veehouderij duurzamer en autonoom te maken.

Hoe? Door het kweken van Azolla en eendenkroos als een eiwitbron voor veevoeders. Beide zijn snelgroeiende waterplanten, hoog in eiwitgehalte en als zodanig een goede vervanging voor sojaschroot in veevoeder. Wij kweken lokaal, sluiten de kringloop en tegelijkertijd verminderen we de kap van regenwouden en vervuiling gedurende transport.

AzoLem helpt consumenten om de ecologische voetafdruk van het eten van vlees te verminderen.
