Name: ParXtra
Description:
Working mechanism

Technology : 
- RF-EM – Radio Frequency Electromagnetic Fields
- not harmful for humans or animals

Initial scientific facts : 	
- wider opening of the stomata causes more evaporation 
- the leaf temperature is lower

Characteristics :	
- uses little energy 	: 3-5 watts of energy / modulator
- easy to apply and requires no maintenance

Crops with proven results :
- Potplants -  Anthurium – Bromelia – Amaryllis - Cordyline
- Vegetables – Lettuce – Pak-Choi – Cucumber
- Grasses

Contribution to growers opbjectives :

Increased production :
- balancing the growing demand for fresh produce with sustainable practices is crucial to avoid overusing resources and harming the environment

Sustainable production :
- producing more sustainably in horticultural firms presents the challenge of minimizing environmental impact while meeting growing consumer needs.

Local for local and market-oriented production :
- tailoring production to meet demand timely and on a local for local basis drives profitability and low footprint production

Cost reduction in production :
- aim to increase profitability through cost efficiencies is a key strategic goal for many companies in horti. 

ROI :
- in 2/3 years

The ParXtra is not a substitute for light, as light will always be necessary for plant growth. 
The added value of the ParXtramodulator, specifically kicks in when the plant is not yet at maximum assimilation.

Name: Vitalis Organic Seeds Europe
Description:
Since its founding in 1994, Vitalis has grown into a global leader in the organic seed market. Originating from the fertile soils of Voorst, Netherlands, the vision was to collaborate with like-minded individuals, institutions, and customers to shape the future of organic agriculture. Today, as part of the Enza Zaden family, Vitalis combines extensive organic farming knowledge with cutting-edge technology. This partnership has been pivotal in driving innovation and sustainability, not just in the organic market but across the entire agricultural sector.

Vitalis has continually adapted to the ever-changing demands of the organic market. From humble beginnings, the brand has expanded its reach globally through its partnership with Enza Zaden. This collaboration has fostered mutual growth, allowing Vitalis to refine and enhance organic seed varieties now used by growers worldwide. The knowledge accumulated over decades has transformed the Voorst site into an international center of expertise in organic agriculture, making it a trusted partner for all those dedicated to this field.

In an organic market that continues to grow and evolve, Vitalis remains committed to sustainability and innovation. We are dedicated to staying at the forefront of the organic seed industry, offering 100% certified organic products that embody resilience, adaptability, and a deep respect for organic principles. We believe that new technologies can address the challenges of organic farming while maintaining harmony with the environment.

Vitalis provides a complete package for professional growers, from developing varieties with the right traits to producing high-quality organic seeds. Whether you are transitioning from conventional farming or are already committed to organic practices, Vitalis offers the expertise and support necessary for success. With innovative solutions and reliable products, we help our customers thrive in the organic market.

Name: Floratom
Description:
We have been growing tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers and gerberas for over 30 years. Our market is operated by a dedicated trading company, Floratom-Ker Szövetkezet.

Since 1991, we have implemented several improvements and increased our volume. At the beginning of 2018, we had more than 20 hectares of greenhouses, providing jobs for over 250 employees.

As one of the pioneers of soilless cultivation, we believe in environmentally friendly production. We only use chemical-free treatment with biological crop protection. All of our sites are heated by geothermal energy and we are eager to produce more electricity with solar panels year by year.

At the beginning of 2022, our company decided to increase production and execute an overall reorganization. Thanks to this vast development, by early 2023, we're handling more than 30 hectares of high tech greenhouses and employ nearly 350 people, which is going to reposition us among the top producers of the Hungarian market.

Our brand-new, 12.7-hectare greenhouses is operated by automated technologies to achieve the best quality and high level of precision. Our main goal is traceability, quality control, and smooth customer service. Therefore, we are also implementing a logistic center with a packaging site and high-capacity cooling chambers connected directly to the greenhouses.

Thanks to our advanced logistic hub, we can serve several customers at the same time, mainly wholesale markets, traders, and multinational stores.

Considering last year, we sold more than 10.000 tonnes of tomato and 1.000 tonnes of peppers. We aim to adapt the production to the needs of our customers, following market research that takes packaging into account as well. We supply a wide range of tomato and pepper varieties with several kind of packaging types.

Name: My Backyard Garden!
Description:
We were made for the garden. 

The garden originates as a place of refuge and wholeness in God's presence. It continues as a setting for seeking God the Father as Jesus agonizes in the Garden of Gethsemane. And, lastly, God promises an eternal dwelling place (garden included!) where all is made new. 

But in the meantime, we live in the "here and not yet" where working the garden can sometimes be hard and full of toil. Drought, disease, fungus, blight and all manner of insects- to name a few- can weaken our resolve to keep cultivating.  "But this is gain for a land in every way; a king committed to cultivated fields." (Ecclesiastes 5:9) Woah! In EVERY way? Really? With affirmation like this, we press on. 

I help people flourish as gardeners by bringing more than 10 years of professional experience providing thousands of evidence-based Integrated Pest Management (IPM) recommendations to home gardeners and implementing youth and adult gardening programs, as well as over 20 years of professional experience as an educator.

I enjoy helping people wherever they are on their gardening journey with:
*Distance Diagnostics (online plant problem diagnostics with local insight!)
*Site Visits/Consults
*Garden Planning and
*Education (workshops and regular programs)

Do you have a gardening question or plant problem to solve? or
Do you want to grow a garden but don't know where to start? or
Do you have a group that would enjoy gardening education or hands-on workshops?  
I'd love to hear from you!

We were made for the garden.

Social and Therapeutic Horticulture uses plants and gardens to improve physical and mental health, as well as communication and thinking skills. Gardens provide a safe and secure place to develop someone's ability to mix socially, improve fitness and learn practical skills which will help them to be more independent.

We inspire and encourage our participants by focusing on what they can do - not on what they can't do. We offer on site programs, field trips and travel programs.

Visit Good to Grow at www.gtog.org

Entreprise familiale et innovante, nous avons développé un savoir-faire reconnu autour de supports de culture brevetés, pensés pour faciliter la mise en place, optimiser l’entretien et garantir un impact esthétique instantané.
Notre force réside dans une maîtrise globale de la chaîne horticole : sélection soignée des terreaux amendés & des jeunes plants, conception des palettes végétales et suivi de leur évolution.
Nous construisons des espaces qui renforcent l’identité visuelle de chaque site. 
Notre approche allie créativité, technicité et conseil sur mesure pour offrir un fleurissement à la fois audacieux, cohérent et respectueux de l’environnement.
À travers une approche créative et exigeante, nous imaginons des solutions horticoles qui valorisent durablement les espaces, renforcent l’identité des territoires et offrent une qualité visuelle haute couture. 
Chez Floriades de l’Arnon, l’innovation n’est pas une option : c’est notre ADN.

Description:
At HydroPonic.se, we provide smart and sustainable growing solutions for everything from homes and restaurants to schools, municipalities, and large-scale food production. Our products range from compact greenhouses for kitchens and educational environments to modular systems for professional growers.

Through hydroponic farming, we deliver fresh, nutrient-rich produce year-round – directly where it is needed – using up to 90% less water and without pesticides. Name: Pflanzenschau AG
Description:
Fachberatung. Qualität. Grosse Auswahl. – Pflanzen, die lange Freude bereiten

Mit persönlicher Beratung, erstklassigen Pflanzen und dem richtigen Know-how begleiten wir Sie von Anfang an. Für Gartenträume, die gesund wachsen – nachhaltig, vital und für die Zukunft. Gestalten Sie mit uns lebendige Räume voller Leben und Charakter.

Bei uns erwartet Sie ein reichhaltiges 'Vollsortiment' an Gehölzen: Laubgehölze, Nadelgehölze, Heckenpflanzen, Blütensträucher, Rhododendren, Alleebäume, Moorbeetpflanzen, Kletterpflanzen. Unsere Spezialitäten wie Japanische Ahorne, Magnolien, Blütenhartriegel, kleinwüchsige Bäume und Solitärpflanzen, Gartenbonsais, Formgehölze sowie Schirm-/Dachformen setzen wunderschöne Akzente in Ihrem Garten. Unsere Stärke liegt bei der grossen Auswahl an schönen, teils grossen Einzelpflanzen, den Solitärgehölzen. Die Solitärgehölze gibt es als Schirmform, Charakter-Pflanze oder frei gewachsen in vielen Arten und Sorten.

Wir legen höchsten Wert auf Qualität, daher ziehen wir viele Pflanzen selbst in unserer Baumschule in Hombrechtikon, Feldbach und Uerikon gross. Für besondere Gehölze und Baumarten greifen wir auf spezialisierte Lieferanten zurück.

Spazieren Sie das ganze Jahr über in unser grünes Paradies, denn unsere Baumschule mit Schau-/Verkaufsgarten ist jederzeit frei zugänglich für Entdeckungen und Inspiration. Bei uns wird Ihr Pflanzenkauf zu einem unvergesslichen Erlebnis – tauchen Sie ein in die Faszination unseres Pflanzenreichs und gestalten Sie Ihren Garten mit besonderen Bäumen und Pflanzen aus der Pflanzenschau AG am Lützelsee!

Wir beraten Sie gerne!

Raphael Stirnimann & Team

Im Bereich Gebäudeunterhalt kümmern wir uns um die Reinigung und Pflege Ihr Treppenhaus, Fenster und Garagen. Wir sorgen dafür, dass Ihr Gebäude stets sauber und gepflegt aussieht. Zudem bieten wir auch Reparatur- und Renovierungsarbeiten an, um sicherzustellen, dass Ihr Gebäude in bestem Zustand bleibt.

Unser Unternehmen legt großen Wert auf Kundenzufriedenheit. Wir arbeiten eng mit Ihnen zusammen, um Ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse zu verstehen und maßgeschneiderte Lösungen anzubieten. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihre Erwartungen zu übertreffen und Ihnen einen erstklassigen Service zu bieten.

Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute, um mehr über unsere Dienstleistungen zu erfahren und ein unverbindliches Angebot zu erhalten. Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen bei der Pflege und Instandhaltung Ihrer Gärten und Gebäude zu helfen!

Name: TODDINGTON NURSERIES LIMITED
Description: Toddington Nurseries Ltd was established in 1963 to grow chrysanthemum mother stock. The Company then expanded into cut flower production, and subsequently into shrub and nursery stock. Yoder Brothers, an American chrysanthemum breeder purchased the company in the mid eighties and renamed it Yoder Toddington. In 1998, Kirin Agribio, an offshoot of a Japanese beer business bought the Company as part of their diversification into Biotechnology, and Yoder Toddington became part of the Southern Glasshouse Group (SGP).  At the time SGP had established a chrysanthemum breeding business under the stewardship of Dr Barrie Machin, breeder of such famous varieties as Snowdon, Pink Gin and the Snapper range. In 2010 Kirin sold the business to H2, a Dutch private equity company who decided to sell all the businesses in the UK in the SGP group. The Company is now owned by Jeff Hooper.

Description:
TerraCottem is the world's leading soil conditioning technology that helps you succeed in all planting and turfing projects despite the challenging effects of poor soils and climate change. 

Soil is life, but not all soils are conducive to good plant growth. Many soils need to be amended or conditioned. TerraCottem produces all-in-one soil conditioners for all types of plants and soils to enhance your work and reduce risk factors. 

TerraCottem soil conditioners work at the plant's root level. They are mixed with the soil when planting. Each TerraCottem soil conditioner contains nutritive, growth-stimulating and water-absorbing components. It works, in synergy, to stimulate root development and plant growth, even in poor and degraded soils. 

TerraCottem provides a constant water supply and nutrients around the root system reducing drought stress and plant mortality. It has a dual effect: you get sustainable, healthy plant growth and savings of up to 50% in irrigation water, even in challenging conditions. It also reduces nutrient leaching. TerraCottem makes greenery thrive with fewer inputs. 

A win-win situation for you, your clients and the environment.

Name: Creek Valley Farm
Description:
Creek Valley Farm (known as Valley Farm as well) is one of the family owns plantations located in Bertam Valley, Cameron Highlands. We have more than 35 years of farming experience.

More than 100 years ago, the ancestors of Creek Valley Fram (known as Valley Farm as well) were traveling from South China and landed in a small village located north of West Malaysia. In the 1950-1960s, the economic situation has been threatening the family of nine, and once again the elder son of the family decided to leave home, and finally, he has found a job as a machinery driver in a highlands - Cameron Highlands. A few years later, the rest of the brothers were following the elder brother, and with the hard work of everyone, they started farming with a small land and expanded to flower plantations.

In the past few decades, all the harvested crops solely relied on business to business approach, and Covid-19 has impacted the supply chain and affected the income of the family. The family understands this pandemic not going to just go in a month or two, potentially it could dragging till next year. Without thinking much, the family is venturing into business to consumer business. Every Monday and Thursday, the family is harvesting and packing fresh vegetables ordered by the customers. The process was all done in Cameron Highlands and then deliver to the customers’ doorstep directly on the same day. 

Our milestone will continue because of your support. Thank you for reading.

Name: Managing the Green Planet
Description:
Green careers are often invisible, yet environmental industries contribute over £38 billion to the UK economy. Our CIC exists to make these careers visible, viable and valued.
We are tackling some of the UK’s most pressing challenges:

 Youth disconnection: Nearly one million young people are not in education, employment or training. We are using virtual reality to bring green careers to life, allowing young people to explore roles in sustainability, conservation and clean technology in an interactive and engaging way. These immersive experiences help them to see the real-world impact of their choices and inspire meaningful career journeys that support both climate action and community wellbeing.

 Barriers to re-entry: With 81% of single parents struggling to return to work, we provide flexible and supportive training and career services that fit around real-life circumstances.

 Sector resilience: By co-designing training with employers and integrating VR learning tools, we ensure green skills are future proof, inclusive and aligned with workforce needs.

 Community impact: This is not just about jobs. It is about biodiversity, sustainability and shared prosperity. We turn environmental action into local empowerment.
Together, we are building a workforce, and a world, where people and planet thrive side by side.

Name: KINARA Gemüse
Description:
Unsere Philosophie
Was nicht industrietauglich und wirtschaftlich rentabel ist, verschwindet vom Lebensmittelmarkt. Die Vielfalt der Feldfrüchte, die heutzutage nahezu verloren gegangen ist, und damit auch die Vielfalt des Geschmacks sind uns eine Herzensangelegenheit. Aus diesen Gründen setzen wir auf Vielfalt statt auf Massenware. Durch die Liebe zu historischen Tomaten, alten Gemüsesorten, seltenen Kressen und Kräutern stehen der besondere Geschmack und der ökologisch korrekte Anbau für uns an erster Stelle.

Vielfalt auf dem Teller. Vielfalt beim Geschmack.
Wir alle kennen das Dilemma: Die modernen Industriestandards in der Landwirtschaft haben dazu geführt, dass Biodiversität heute schon lange keine Selbstverständlichkeit mehr ist. Was nicht dem Geschmack der Masse entspricht und deshalb wirtschaftlich unrentabel erscheint, verschwindet vom Lebensmittelmarkt. So sind binnen 150 Jahren zum Beispiel drei Viertel aller Gemüsesorten verschwunden. Und nur neun Prozent der ursprünglichen Arten und Sorten werden bis heute durchgehend gehandelt. Auch das Wissen über besondere Kressen, Kräuter und essbare Blüten geht immer weiter verloren. Deshalb haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, die Vielfalt der Natur wieder zurück auf unsere Teller zu holen – und einen Beitrag dafür zu leisten, dass wir uns alle wieder an der ursprünglichen Geschmacksvielfalt erfreuen, die unser Planet für uns einmal bereitgehalten hat.

Unsere Produkte.
Wir setzen auf Vielfalt statt auf Massenware. Für mich stehen bei meiner Tätigkeit nicht der maximal mögliche Profit und die damit einhergehende Ausbeutung von Natur und Ressourcen im Mittelpunkt – sondern der Erhalt von Geschmacks- und Artenvielfalt. Unsere Produkte, wie unser selbstgezogenes Saatgut, unsere vielen Jungpflanzen, die besonderen Kressen, Kräuter und essbaren Blüten für die gehobene Spitzengastronomie sind mit viel Liebe und in Handarbeit rein biologisch erzeugt. Die alten und speziellen Sorten bieten vor allem Feinschmeckern ein

Name: Randijk Bamboe & Hoveniers
Description:
Randijk Hoveniers | Bamboe.nl

In 1998 begon Erwin Kooijman samen met zijn vader Ad het bedrijf Randijk Hoveniers op boerderij Groot Randijk in Amersfoort. Vier jaar later, in 2002, sloeg het 'bamboevirus' toe en verhuisde het bedrijf naar de huidige locatie aan de Laapeerseweg in Leusden.

De bamboe-inspiratie
De doorslag kwam door bamboedeskundige Charley Younge, die mij in 2002 inspireerde en adviseerde. Hij had bamboe naar Nederland gehaald en raadde mij aan om niet-woekerende bamboe te gaan telen. Nu, meer dan 25 jaar later, staat er naast ons zelf gebouwde duurzame bedrijfsgebouw een collectie van ruim 5000 bamboeplanten in meer dan 30 verschillende soorten.

Unieke positie
Randijk is de enige biologische bamboekwekerij in Nederland en levert niet alleen aan particulieren via www.bamboe.nl maar steeds meer aan hoveniersbedrijven en tuincentra die Randijk als hun biologische bamboeleverancier zien.

Waarom bamboe?
Bamboe is voor mij dé ideale duurzame plant. Het blijft het hele jaar groen, stelt geen hoge eisen aan de grond en is volledig ziektevrij. Je kunt bamboe snoeien wanneer en hoe je wilt, het bevordert de biodiversiteit enorm en produceert dat rustgevende ruisende geluid.

Het grote verschil met bomen: waar je bij een boom 50 tot 100 jaar moet wachten voordat je er profijt van hebt, kun je bij bamboe al om de vijf jaar de stammen oogsten. Dit maakt bamboe een serieuze vervanger voor tropisch hardhout. Door de groeiende markt voor bamboeproducten verbetert de levenskwaliteit wereldwijd voor veel mensen dankzij de inkomsten die hieruit voortvloeien.

Bamboe is bovendien een enorme CO2-opnemer en voorkomt erosie. Waar bij grootschalige bomenkap erosie ontstaat, blijven bij bamboeoogst de wortels altijd in de grond. Al met al is bamboe een echte wereldverbeteraar.

www.bamboe.nl

Community Services

Services for Organizations

Out of this experience, Fishcer Farms Technology is now building scalable, price-effective CEA/precision growing modular farming solutions for 3rd party customers.  Our core solution is centred on a trolley system which connects to an ebb and flow irrigation and fertigation system.  Trolleys can be accommodated in climate-controlled grow modules or in open spaces where the environment fits the crop that is being grown.  

Our mission is to empower growers to grow year-round, healthy, consistently high-quality plants.   We do that by providing scalable and affordable infrastructure with maximum environmental control and crop know-how born out of running one of Europe's largest indoor farms.

Our modular farms are built in Birmingham (UK) and can be shipped around the globe.

Name: Monavale Blueberries Ltd
Description:

Our 40-hectare orchard is situated on beautiful peat soils in the heart of the Waikato, on the Moanatuatua Plains with views to Pirongia, Maungatautari and Kakepuku, and is the largest certified organic  blueberry orchard in Australasia.

Our business supplies fresh and frozen berries all over New Zealand, and exports to Australia, South-East Asia, and the USA. We supply all major supermarkets in New Zealand, and many smaller and boutique retailers.

On the orchard, our family-owned and operated hospitality venue - Café Irresistiblue - celebrates 15 years in 2024. We showcase produce from our farm and from other New Zealand producers, organic and local wherever possible.

We also produce and supply value-added products, and are always on the lookout for new ideas and collaborations. We make our own chutneys and jams, sauces and juices. We also produce our own gin, 'Blue', and our own wine in three styles. In collaboration with another New Zealand company, we produce a blueberry-infused gouda cheese. We even have our own range of blueberry dog biscuits!

We strive to produce the most premium fruit possible, and provide healthy berries across an extended harvest season from late October until April. We employ more than 300 people each year. We are always seeking the most cutting-edge methods to improve our processes and increase our impact, while staying true to the principles and practices of organic agriculture and soil health.

Please get in touch with wholesale, retail or collaboration enquiries.

Cet acte officiel, qui a pris forme au mois de février 2011, était de ce fait une nécessité.

Les horticulteurs des trois cantons réunis sous une même entité reconnaissent à l’unisson qu’ils ont, comme tout jardinier, la chance de pratiquer un métier de passionnés et souhaitent approfondir leurs connaissances. Dans un même élan, ils accordent beaucoup d’importance à la formation et à la formation continue.

Finalement, le métier est trop souvent usurpé par une concurrence dépourvue de connaissances, de compétences ou pire de respect de la nature. De ce fait, l’association est là pour défendre la nature et notre métier.

Name: HortiSustain
Description:
Impr.: https://www.hortisustain.de/impressum
DSE: https://www.hortisustain.de/datenschutz

Die Reduktion chemisch-synthetischer Pflanzenschutzmittel auf das notwendige Maß ist eine politische Forderung der EU und auch im deutschen Pflanzenschutzgesetz rechtlich verankert. Nicht-chemische Pflanzenschutzverfahren haben im Rahmen des IPM Vorrang. Gründe hierfür sind u. a. negative Nebenwirkungen chemisch-synthetischer Pflanzenschutzmittel (PSM) auf die Gesundheit von Menschen, Tier und Umwelt sowie die Entwicklung von Wirkstoffresistenzen bzw. -toleranzen bei mikrobiellen Krankheitserregern und Schädlingen. Um diesem Trend entgegenzuwirken, konzentriert sich die Agrarforschung unter anderem auf praktikable Pflanzenschutzkonzepte mit einem Schwerpunkt auf nicht-chemischen Maßnahmen wie biologische, biotechnische und mechanische Verfahren. Diese Strategie wird auch durch den den Nationalen Aktionsplan zur nachhaltigen Anwendung von Pflanzenschutzmitteln (NAP) unterstützt. Zur Realisierung des NAP unterstützt das Bundesministerium für Ernährung und Landwirtschaft (BMEL) bzw. die Bundesanstalt für Landwirtschaft und Ernährung (BLE) mit dem Programm zur Innovationsförderung die Entwicklung von Innovationen in den Bereichen Ernährung, Landwirtschaft und Verbraucherschutz, und mit dem Bundesprogramm Ökologischer Landbau (BÖL) die Verbesserung der Rahmenbedingungen für die ökologische Land- und Lebensmittelwirtschaft in Deutschland und die Schaffung der Voraussetzungen für ein gleichgewichtiges Wachstum von Angebot und Nachfrage.

Im Rahmen der Maßnahmen zur Förderung von Innovationen nicht-chemischer Pflanzenschutzverfahren im Gartenbau verfolgt das BMEL bzw. die BLE das Ziel, den Gartenbausektor im Hinblick auf eine nachhaltige Pflanzenproduktion zu stärken.

Zur Begleitung der genannten Fördermaßnahme ist ein ist ein Vernetzungs-, Transfer- und Evaluierungsprogramm (VTE) vorgesehen.
Diese VTE-Aktivitäten werden vom HortiSustain-Konsortium durchgeführt.

Name: Peeters Mertens Bio
Description:
Bij Peeters-Mertens zijn we gespecialiseerd in de teelt van hoogwaardige biologische vollegrondsgroenten in Neer. Sinds 2002 telen we met passie voor bodem en natuur, wat resulteert in verse, voedzame producten van de hoogste kwaliteit. Onze jarenlange ervaring en diverse certificeringen maken ons een betrouwbare partner voor biologische groenten.

Van gangbaar naar biologisch: Wim en Ellen Peeters begonnen in 1990 met gangbare teelt, maar al snel realiseerden ze zich dat chemische bestrijdingsmiddelen en een onzekere afzetmarkt niet de toekomst waren die ze voor ogen hadden. In 2000 maakten ze de overstap naar biologische teelt, een beslissing die geleid heeft tot een indrukwekkende groei van 6 naar 60 hectare, met 9 verschillende groentegewassen. Nu, onder leiding van zoon Robin, blijven we duurzame landbouwtechnieken toepassen en zetten we ons in voor biodiversiteit door middel van vruchtwisseling en zorgvuldige gewaskeuze.

Met diverse certificeringen garanderen we groenten die met zorg en passie zijn geteeld. Bij Peeters-Mertens geloven we in duurzaamheid en innovatie in de biologische landbouw, en zetten we ons in om onze klanten van gezonde en smakelijke producten te voorzien.

Name: Oropi Management Services LTD
Description:
Our Story

Oropi Management Services Limited has its roots firmly planted in the rich soil of New Zealand's kiwifruit industry. Our story began in 1977, with the establishment of "Waimapu Management Services", a kiwifruit management company operating under the umbrella of "Waimapu Packhouse".

In 2007, we evolved from "Waimapu Management Services" into the independent entity now known as “Oropi Management Services Ltd”. Over the decades, we've remained a family owned and operated company, cultivating the same level of care, commitment, and closeness in our relationships with clients as we do with our own kin.

Our Mission

At Oropi Management Services LTD (OMS LTD), our mission extends beyond merely offering services. We partner with our clients to facilitate the growth and prosperity of their kiwifruit orchards. Our expertise spans Conventional and Organic orchard services, including Orchard Management, Orchard Development, Maintenance, Machinery Operations, and Harvest Operations. Our commitment is to walk alongside you throughout every stage of your orchard's lifecycle, eliminating the need for additional external support.

We believe in "Creating greatness, together". Our passion drives us – passion for kiwifruit, passion for enabling our clients to realise their orchards' fullest potential, and passion for making a positive impact on our communities.

While we might appear as just a kiwifruit management company, at OMS LTD, we are in the business of shaping futures. Our clients are not merely purchasing orchards; they are investing in their future and aligning with our shared vision of "Creating Greatness, Together". We are dedicated to enriching our communities and ensuring New Zealand remains a thriving place for generations to come.

Name: Wool Pots
Description:
Wool Pots are an environmentally friendly alternative to plastic plant pots. 
Wool Pots are manufactured using British wool that might otherwise not find a home. Some of the benefits of using Wool Pots are:-
•	Natural slug and snail barrier
•	Air pruning creates stronger roots and less root disturbance
•	Wool insulates and retains water so they use between 20-30% less water
•	Strong and flexible easy to use
•	Once planted in soil they degrade and all nutrients in the wool feeds the plants
•	A truly zero waste natural plant pot 

We have created a product which helps farmers, helps reduce the “mountain” of unwanted wool, protects plants and helps save the planet – not bad for a plant pot!
The problem we are trying to solve…500 million plastic plant pots are sent to landfill in the UK every year, a similar number are incinerated. It takes 450 years for a plastic pot to degrade into micro plastics.
We use British Wool and are members of the Campaign for Wool.

The fresh produce industry often places significant financial risks on growers’ while others capture most of the profits. All Aussie Farmers is dedicated to shifting this dynamic by providing fairer returns to growers while ensuring customers receive premium, consistently high-quality produce that delivers exceptional value.

With a core team boasting over 40 years of experience in the fruit and vegetable industry, our business was founded on the principle of transparency and integrity. Over the past two decades, it became increasingly evident that traditional marketing agents and big supermarkets prioritized their own profits over grower returns, and often lacking transparency. Recognizing this gap, we established All Aussie Farmers as a trustworthy, long-term partner for Australian growers, ensuring fair pricing, honest dealings, and strong financial security.

stablished in 1998, Mad About Plants is a leading wholesale and production nursery located on 16 acres just a 15-minute drive from Cairns City, in the heart of Far North Queensland. Name: Katre Garden
Description:
We are a team that was interested in gardening and horticulture only as a hobby in our offices and homes and we didn’t even know much about it. However, after a while of hobby gardening, we took this seriously on a whole different level than a hobby should be taken. It didn't take much time (only 6 months) for us to adopt it as a lifestyle rather than a hobby and turn it into the Katre Garden project, leaving our other works aside. 

We have grown some ideas, just like seeds, with devotion by asking each other the question 'yes, we can do agriculture for ourselves, good or bad, but how can we be more beneficial to humanity and our nature?' during our sprouting process. As a result of it, we are now experiencing the happiness of carrying our agricultural culture to today's conditions and reaching to you with our organic seeds, coco discs (natural coconut soil) and coco pots (recycled coconut pots) in a user-friendly way.

In this special project of ours, we also aimed to show that conscious agriculture can be learned easily, and that you can quickly experience what you have learned by applying with the kits and sets that you have. Without derailing from our aim, we are growing Katre Agriculture Academy in a way that will never stop developing, like the rest of our project.

Katre Garden is just a baby now, who will make the daily life of each individual and the whole world greener as it grows older…

Name: Fridge Grow by Plantalytix
Description:
We are an Austrian company founded 2016 and we provide the first sealed (no exhaust ventilation) grow box with 100% climate control and plug and play grow tech for monitoring and automation of indoor farms. 

Our technology is used in over 10 countries and we also received awards and the Seal of Excellence by EU-commission for our disruptive approach. Fridge Grow is a self-regulated and self-watering home grow system with climate recipes for each stage of growth including drying. All parameters relevant for plant growing (CO2, Temperature, Humidity, Light) can be freely selected. No matter where it is placed. 

For aerated systems we use programmable smart sockets, smart fans and light controller. 

All our devices are plug and play and have monitoring and automation features on board.
Remote access, climate control, alerts and in integrated analysis tool makes the app and the whole process easy to use. 

We enable everybody to upgrade their existing farm without expensive changes of the hardware and also enable people to grow plants under stable conditions in fully controlled environments.

Name: LRF TRÄDGÅRD
Description:
LRF Trädgård är en branschavdelning inom LRF som arbetar med att tillvarata intressen för svenska producenter av grönsaker, frukt och bär, potatis samt prydnads- och plantskoleväxter. Syftet är att skapa förutsättningar för konkurrenskraft och lönsamhet i medlemsföretagen

Det här gör LRF Trädgård för sina medlemmar
- Organiserar odlarträffar, fältvandringar och resor för medlemmarna. 
- Arbetar för ökad tillgänglighet av växtskyddsmedel utifrån trädgårdsnäringens behov. 
- Värnar medlemmarnas intressen vid ny lagstiftning och i kontakt med myndigheter. 
- Främjar konsumtionen av svenskodlade trädgårdsprodukter. 
- Värnar om trädgårdsnäringens forskningsbehov och attraktionskraft. 
- Producerar Trädgårdsbrevet, LRF Trädgårds digitala nyhetsbrev. 
- Informerar om vad som är på gång via LRF Trädgårds sida i tidningen Viola. 

Påverkansarbete och opinionsbildning
LRF Trädgård lägger ned mycket arbete för att aktivt medvetandegöra såväl politiker som myndigheter om trädgårdsnäringen i Sverige och dess förutsättningar för en bibehållen och stärkt konkurrenskraft. 

Ständigt aktuella frågor är arbetskraftsförsörjning, tillgång till växtskyddsmetoder, energi, utbildning, forskning och marknad. Det kan handla om att verka för enklare regelverk, utökade forskningssatsningar eller nya marknadssamarbeten. 

Via Säsongens Bästa guidas konsumenter till att välja svenskodlade produkter när de handlar och ger inspiration till hur man kan använda dem för maximal upplevelse.

Det finns även satsningar för att lyfta fram specifika produktgrupper, Blomsterfrämjandet för prydnadsväxter och Växtforum för plantskoleväxter. LRF Trädgårds medlemmar arbetar även själva med främjande av sin produkter i Perennagruppen och Blomsterlöksgruppen.

Name: Planters' Choice LLC
Description:
For over 50 years, Planters’ Choice has provided nothing but the best for the cultivated landscape.

Here at Planters’ Choice we grow a variety of materials on our farms, by cuttings, bare root liners and container shifts. These northern grown plants are cold hardy and well adapted for the southern New England area. We also provide plants carefully sourced from other top tier nurseries. There are a variety of native plants, including those known to be native to all of New England, New York, New Jersey and Pennsylvania, and native to Ecoregion 59.

Name: The Crop Club
Description:
The Crop Club is a social enterprise which is based in East Nottingham. Our mission is to reconnect communities through the joy of growing food, encouraging biodiversity, and inspiring healthy happy lifestyles.
We make eco-growing kits for homes and community projects. We make eco-promotional gifts for businesses and charities.

We provide sustainable gardening packs to allow adults and children to grow their own food in small spaces. We upcycle coffee sacks to create planter bags so you don’t need a garden. We go to great lengths to source ethical, renewable, recycled and recyclable products which are educational in their own right. Our packs use companion planting combining vegetables, herbs and flowers to naturally deter pests whilst being beneficial for insects like bees and butterflies.

Along with our educational packs, we will deliver talks and workshops, offering hands-on learning experiences to schools and community groups. We are finding a growing demand for these workshops, particularly within schools. The main social benefits are improved community engagement and cohesion as well as reconnecting people with nature, home grown food and improving education on sustainability.

Name: SharedLands LLC
Description:
SharedLands offers products (herbs, fruits, vegetables, ornamentals and native plants) and services (consultation and fast garden design) grounded in sustainable specialty horticulture. This base of knowledge and experience is central to our work. We employ organic approaches and practices in our production and advisory work.
- We grow plants at small scale and are certified nurserymen with the State of Illinois.
- We help create private residential gardens as well as community projects and programs.
Our work spans the gamut from ornamental to productive and native plants and the environments in which they coexist and thrive . . .often considering beauty, sustenance and sustainability in integrated ways to create uniquely restorative landscapes. As a people-planet-profit company, we try to focus on how greenspace can help encourage the spirit, heal the mind and nourish the body--so that, collectively, we can all strengthen, restore and care for our local communities now and long into the future.

SharedLands began life on a farm in Princeton, and moved to Tiskilwa in 2020. We no longer operate farmland; we now operate a plant nursery on a smaller footprint, and still uses regenerative organic methods whenever it is realistic to do so. We are not open to the public. Please reach out if you require assistance. 
Reviews can be accessed on alignable.com

Name: Masagana Flower Farm & Studio Inc
Description:
Recipient of Travel Manitoba's Tourism Innovation and Relief Fund, New Experience Development Category. Small-scale flower farm, dye studio and new tourism destination near La Broquerie, Manitoba. 

In this immigrant, Filipina-lead small business, we place our priority on sustainable growing practices. We grow seasonal blooms, dye plants and makes hand made, small batch naturally dyed textile goods. We grow crops without synthetic fertilizers in garden beds where lawns previously existed. 

In summer, we offer experiential tours called “Tinta. A Dye Your Own Wearable Art Experience”, a three-hour engagement at the farm where guests participate in a multi-faceted experience on flower farming, dye plants cultivation, flower u-pick and natural dyeing. 

We advocate for an eco-conscious lifestyle and inspires others to re-imagine their greenspaces. We believe that growing joy (through flowers) and creating magic (through dye plants) is right at our fingertips and our gardens present opportunities to respond positively to the climate emergency.

Name: Fachverbände Garten-, Landschafts- und Sportplatzbau Schleswig-Holstein und Hamburg
Description:
Unsere Lieblingsfarbe? Natürlich Grün! In unseren Landesverbänden sind 221 Fachbetriebe der gärtnerischen Fachrichtung Garten-, Landschafts- und Sportplatzbau organisiert. Als Wirtschafts- und Arbeitgeberverbände machen wir uns für die Zukunftsfähigkeit des GaLaBaus im Norden stark und vertreten die Interessen unserer Mitglieder gegenüber Politik, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft. Denn: Landschaftsgärtner:innen sind Klimaheld:innen aus Profession - nie war ihre gestalterische Rolle und Expertise wichtiger als heute.

Unser Job? Klimaheld:in! 

Landschaftsgärtner:innen sind Überzeugungstäter:innen. Ihr Beruf zeugt von größtem Respekt für unsere natürliche Umgebung, Natur- und Umweltschutz haben oberste Priorität. Indem sie die grüne-blaue Infrastruktur voranbringen und Erholungs- sowie Lebensräume für Menschen, Tiere und Pflanzen erschaffen, kompensieren sie effektiv den CO2-Ausstoß, verbessern das Klima in Städten, erhalten die Biodiversität und mildern die Auswirkungen des Klimawandels.

Unser Rückgrat? Eine starke Gemeinschaft

Als Fachverbände Garten-, Landschafts- und Sportplatzbau der Länder Schleswig-Holstein und Hamburg sind wir überzeugt: Heute gewinnt nicht der Einzelkämpfer, sondern derjenige, der Ressourcen bündelt, Netzwerke schafft und so noch mehr Kräfte freisetzt! Genau das tun wir als starke Leistungsgemeinschaft gemeinsam mit unseren Mitgliedsunternehmen! Das gemeinsame Erkennungszeichen unserer Mitglieder ist das geschützte Signum, das sie als qualifizierte, kompetente Expertinnen und Experten für Garten und Landschaft ausweist.

Whether you're looking for plants for your home or office, The green boutique.in has everything you need to get started. With a wide selection of indoor and outdoor plants, pots, and planters, we've got you covered. So come on in and let us show you how easy it is to get started with plants!

Our mission is to help preserve the natural beauty of our world and make it easier for everyone to get involved in agriculture. Nach den selben Grundsätzen gestalten wir auch alle weiteren Bauteile eines Gartens. So bauen wir ausschliesslich sickerfähige Belagsflächen, vorwiegend aus regionalem Naturstein, wassergebundenem Kies oder rezyklierten Baustoffen.
Unsere Bepflanzungskonzepte beinhalten immer eine einheimische und vor allem standortgerechte Pflanzenwahl.
Gemäss unserer Bioterra-Zertifizierung bevorzugen wir die Verwendung von biologisch produzierten Pflanzen sofern dies möglich ist.
Wir leben ein familiäres Betriebsklima und sind stolz auf unsere Arbeit.
Unsere Kunden schätzen uns als zuverlässig, höflich und exakt.

Ramm Botanicals supplies quality plants to a vast network of wholesale growers throughout Australia. All species are trialled and tested to ensure success in a variety of conditions and applications, from home gardens to mass plantings in landscape projects.

Name: Kifu Bonsai
Description:
Robert “Bob” Mahler discovered his passion for bonsai early in life. By the age of fifteen, Bob was apprenticing under the direction of bonsai artist Chase Rosage of Rosade Bonsai Studios in New Hope, Pennsylvania. From there, he traveled to Tochigi-Ken, Japan, where he would spend the next four years under the exclusive direction of world-renowned bonsai artist Susumo Sudo.

Bob returned to the States in 1993. For the following eleven years, he served as the curator of bonsai at the Brooklyn Botanic Garden in Brooklyn, New York.

Bob opened Kifu Bonsai in 2017 and continues to consult for horticultural institutions. As president of the Pennsylvania Bonsai Society, he oversees the bonsai exhibit at the Pennsylvania Horticultural Society’s annual Philadelphia Flower Show.

Bob’s personal favorites are Japanese White Pines, Satsuki Azaleas, and Japanese Flowering Apricots. Bob resides in a small farming community north of Philadelphia with his wife Jesseca and their dogs.

Services include: Private bonsai instruction @ the studio or on location. Individual or group demonstrations and workshops. Private bonsai collection maintenance. Japanese landscape design services. Koi pond design and installation. For immediate assistance please call 215.432.4982 and ask for Bob.

Name: The HAB
Description:
The HAB is a social enterprise founded by a team of students from Wageningen University & Research, combining space-inspired innovation with climate-smart agriculture. Our first product, AstroGel, is a biodegradable, reusable plant growth medium made from carbon-sequestering seaweed. Designed to replace peat—a soon-to-be-banned agricultural substrate in the EU—AstroGel addresses urgent needs in both commercial indoor farming and household food production. AstroGel is shipped in lightweight powdered form, expanding with water into a self-watering, mess-free substrate. It reduces CO₂ emissions by 65% compared to peat, supports marine biodiversity, and avoids land conversion to agriculture. It also lowers labor costs by eliminating the need for watering during the plant cycle.

Hydrogels have been utilized aboard the International Space Station (ISS) to grow fresh greens in microgravity . As astronauts are busy with numerous tasks and are not specialized plant scientists, hydrogels were designed to be extremely low maintenance. AstroGel is: 
●	Non-toxic, food-grade, and edible
●	Low cost
●	Low labor/low maintenance
●	Lightweight and compact
●	Reusable
●	Based on a renewable, carbon-sequestering ingredient

Name: Flury Gartenbau AG
Description:
Als Gartenspezialist an Ihrer Seite legen wir grossen Wert auf ein fundiertes Konzept, auf zuverlässige Projektbetreuung und die überzeugende Umsetzung innovativer Ideen. Ob Traumgarten, Pflanzenpflege oder Sichtschutz – wir freuen uns, mit Ihnen zusammenzuarbeiten! Erfahren Sie mehr zu unserem Angebot oder kontaktieren Sie uns.

Im Grünen daheim
Ein Traumgarten ist ein grünes Puzzle; jedes Teil trägt zum stimmigen Ganzen bei. Das gepflegte Steinbeet umsäumt den gemütlich angelegten Sitzplatz, ein schöner Plattenweg führt vorbei an Pflanzenrabatten zum idyllischen Teich. Oder stellen Sie sich Sommerabende in Ihrer lauschigen Gartenlaube vor! Egal, wie Sie sich Ihren Traumgarten vorstellen: Wir sind da für Sie und helfen Ihnen gerne bei der Planung und Umsetzung!

Die richtige Pflege für Ihren Traumgarten
Pflegen bedeutet schützen – und das lohnt sich bei jedem Garten. Wir analysieren die Situation in Ihrem Garten und geben Ihnen Tipps. Zusammen entwickeln wir ein Konzept, wie Ihr Traumgarten seine Leuchtkraft lange behält.

Von der Idee zur Umsetzung
Am Anfang steht die Vision von einem Traumgarten. Unser Planungskonzept lässt eine Idee reifen, berücksichtigt den Zeitplan und das Budget. Bereits in der Startphase wird an die Möglichkeiten der Pflege gedacht und auf eine reibungslose Umsetzung in allen Stadien können Sie sich verlassen. Was auch immer Ihr nächstes Projekt ist, wir helfen Ihnen gerne von der Planung bis zur Umsetzung.

Für Fragen rund um Ihren Garten
Vom Freizeitgärtner bis zum Immobilienbewirtschafter – der Gartencoach hilft Ihnen dabei, sich im Garten professionell zu bewegen. Das Angebot richtet sich ganz nach Ihren Wünschen und Bedürfnissen.
Dabei können viele Fragen beantwortet werden. Gerne erstellen wir Ihnen auch ein Konzept für die Jahrespflege Ihres Gartens.

With our technology, farmers gain real-time insights into their land's health, enabling proactive decision-making for optimal crop growth and yield.

Description:

Als Fachverband vertreten wir die Interessen der grünen Branche und der Fachbetriebe - in der Politik, in Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft. Unsere über 1000 Mitgliedsbetriebe sind die Experten für Garten und Landschaft. Sie arbeiten in der Natur, gestalten und pflegen privates Grün, öffentliche und gewerbliche Anlagen. 

Unsere Arbeit wird von unserem Präsidium, den Bezirksverbänden sowie einem Bildungs- und einem Öffentlichkeitsausschuss getragen. In Arbeitskreisen zu speziellen Themen - ob Digitalisierung oder Energieeffizienz, ob GaLaBau Women oder Juniorenkreis - werden ebenfalls beispielhafte Lösungen für aktuelle Herausforderungen entwickelt, von denen später alle Verbandsmitglieder profitieren.

Unsere Geschäftsstelle unterstützt die Gremien und unsere Mitglieder auf operativer Ebene. Zu den Aufgaben gehören die Nachwuchswerbung und Fachkräftesicherung, Unterstützung bei fachlichen und rechtlichen Fragen sowie Marketing und Kommunikation.

Der Garten- und Landschaftsbau in NRW generiert im Jahr rund 1,6 Mrd. Euro Umsatz. Davon erwirtschaften die über 1000 Mitgliedsbetriebe des VGL NRW ca. 65 % des Marktvolumens. Hinsichtlich der Auftraggeberstruktur werden rund 56 % des Branchenumsatzes durch Privatkunden, 26 % durch gewerbliche und Kunden der Wohnungswirtschaft sowie 19 % durch öffentliche Kunden erzielt.

Description:

Our farms benefit from the cool climate in the famously beautiful Granite Belt located in Southern Queensland. Because of our subtropical highland climate, we grow the most diverse range of fresh Summer produce in Queensland.

For growers on the Granite Belt, farming has always been more than just about earning a living – it’s a way of life. Most produce on the Granite Belt is grown on farms that have been owned and operated by the same families for generations, and growing fresh, high-quality produce has been a continuing passion for these families.

While the traditions of these farms have been preserved, the most innovative farming practices have also been adopted to guarantee the future sustainability of our farms and the industry.

In der Ostschweiz sind ausgebildete Baumpflegespezialisten mit eidgenössischem Fachausweis noch rar. Die Baumwelt AG ist das einzige Unternehmen im Appenzellerland, das ganz auf die professionelle Baumpflege spezialisiert ist.

Die Nachfrage an den typischen Aufgaben wie Baumkontrolle, Baumschnitt oder Baumfällungen ist entsprechend gross. Einen Schwerpunkt der Arbeit bilden die verschiedenen Pflegemassnahmen, wie etwa der Begrenzungsschnitt, um die Baumkrone zu kürzen; der Pflegeschnitt, um den Baum von Totholz und Bruchästen zu befreien und partiell zu entlasten; oder der Aufbauschnitt, um dem Baum wieder seine arttypische Baumkrone zurückzugeben.

Our professional team of qualified tree surgeons carries out all work in accordance with BS 3998:2010 Tree Work Recommendations, ensuring best practices in safety, tree health, and environmental care. From complex dismantles and crown reductions to veteran tree management and woodland maintenance, we take pride in delivering high-quality, sustainable solutions.
In addition to operational tree work, we provide detailed arboricultural consultancy, helping clients navigate planning applications, tree surveys (BS5837), tree risk management, development constraints, and long-term tree care planning. Our consultants bring over 50 years of combined industry experience, offering a commercially aware, pragmatic approach that supports both compliance and conservation.
Our in-house ecology team enhances our services further—conducting habitat assessments, protected species surveys, and biodiversity net gain strategies. This integrated approach ensures clients receive cohesive, cost-effective advice across arboriculture and ecology, particularly in development and land management projects.
Whether you're a local authority needing ongoing tree inspections, a developer working through the planning process, or a private client seeking professional tree care, we’re here to help—safely, professionally, and sustainably.

Name: NIFAM
Description:
The NIFAM (Nutrition Intervention Forecasting and Modeling) project is part of the Institute for Horticultural Sciences, University of Bonn and funded by the Federal Ministry for Food and Agriculture (BMEL).

Our main objective is to develop decision recommendations for policy-makers concerning nutrition and food environment problems in Vietnam and Myanmar. The two countries have highly dynamic food environments, both struggle with food safety and food security issues. The understanding of food environments can give insights into the complex problem of malnutrition that affects all countries around the world. 	
The transdisciplinary alternative approaches used in this project offer support by both forecasting and monitoring different interventions. 	
Our partners from Vietnam and Myanmar,
•	the Vietnam National University of Agriculture (VNUA)
•	the Hanoi University of Public Health (HUPH)
•	the Fruits and Vegetables Research Institute (FAVRI)
•	the Center for Organic Agriculture (CODAS)
•	the Social Policy Ecology Research Institute (SPERI)
•	the Sustainable Development Knowledge Network (Spectrum) (Myanmar),
support the project with their exceptional knowledge about the local food environment, problems, and restrictions, and an immense motivation to implement the developed recommendations and nutrition interventions. 	
Together we are developing mathematical models for possible nutrition interventions, analyzing the outcome to support decision-makers and stakeholders, and implementing these nutrition interventions.	
Examples of our intervention models are creating a school garden and its impact on children and teachers, installing a vegetable selling point at a factory in Hanoi to provide fresh and safe vegetables for workers, or evaluating the land use choices for peri-urban farmers. 
You will find more on our activities and achievements on our website!
https://www.gartenbauwissenschaften.uni-bonn.de/en/research/hollistic-modeling/nifam

Name: eGrowth Corporation
Description:
eGrowth Corporation is a Canadian agtech innovator revolutionizing year-round produce cultivation through Next Generation Greenhouses (NGGs) — modular, geothermally heated and cooled, vertical hydroponic facilities that operate with 99% less water, a fraction of the land, and a net-zero carbon footprint.

Headquartered in Alberta, we’re solving critical global challenges: food insecurity, rising energy prices, water scarcity, arable land shortages, and the growing demand for local, nutritious produce. Our technology suite integrates AI climate control, dynamic lighting, geothermal heating and cooling, and vertical hydroponic towers into a smart, scalable greenhouse platform capable of producing 100x more per square foot than traditional farms.

Each NGG is engineered for non-arable land and extreme climates, using a high-performance tensile membrane structure and climate-adaptive design. Our flagship 60,000 ft² facility will produce 6M heads of lettuce annually, displacing imports and stabilizing local food supply.

We’ve secured multiple project sites and municipal support, including incentives such as free land, tax exemptions, and fast-track permitting.

Led by experts in energy, finance, agriculture, and Indigenous development, eGrowth is more than a greenhouse company — it’s a platform for resilient communities, sustainable food systems, and scalable climate solutions.

Description:

Over 42,000 trees and shrubs were planted, alongside 35 native wildflower species. This is part of a vision to create a thriving ecosystem to benefit pollinators, birds and a diverse range of native wildlife.

We now collect wildflower seeds across our meadows in order to support others with habitat creation and to improve environmental credentials. We can support bespoke requirements, such as personalised seed packets for corporate events. 

We also host sessions for groups to experience and learn more about wildlife. Our site is a hotspot for butterflies, birds, amphibians, bees, dragonflies and much more. Our products and services help to raise funds to support the management of the nature reserve, with our aim to offer maximum benefit to nature. We hope to inspire and educate others in the process, supporting them in their own projects of any size by offering wildflower seeds.

Name: Dominion Federation of NZ Chinese Commercial Growers Incorporated
Description:
A rich history of success through adversity

The Dominion Federation of New Zealand Chinese Commercial Growers Inc. was established on 15th January 1943 at the suggestion of Prime Minister Peter Fraser. This incorporated society was formed to support New Zealand’s wartime effort by supplying vegetables to the Allied forces. The New Zealand government required a national Chinese organisation to negotiate the supply of green leafy vegetables, leading to the creation of the Federation, the world's only national Chinese growers’ organisation.

The Federation's mission is to protect the rights of Chinese growers and farmers in New Zealand, unite their efforts, and promote their commercial interests. It plays a crucial role in exchanging information, informing growers of new developments in the horticulture and agriculture industry, and representing their interests in all dealings with the government, retailers, and market organisations.

The Federation supports sustainable farming practices in NZ, encourages farming among its members, and stays updated with agricultural technology innovations. It is dedicated to enhancing the Kiwi farming community by fostering agricultural innovation and promoting sustainable crop production and management. 

The Federation's mission is not just a goal but a calling. It aims to unite the efforts of Chinese growers, promote their commercial interests in New Zealand, foster camaraderie among members, exchange information and keep them informed of new developments in the industry, and represent their interests in all dealings with the government, retailers, and market organizations.

Gemeinsam mit den Anbauern und in Partnerschaft mit der Natur arbeiten wir daran, Landwirtschaft und Gartenbau nachhaltiger, sicherer und produktiver zu gestalten. Dies erreichen wir, indem wir Nützlinge zur Bekämpfung von Schädlingen, Hummeln zur natürlichen Bestäubung und Biostimulanzien zur Unterstützung und Stärkung der Kulturpflanzen sowohl über dem Boden als auch im Wurzelbereich einsetzen. Darüber hinaus bieten wir umfassendes Know-how und kompetente Beratungsleistungen. Aus diesem Grunde sehen uns immer mehr Anbauer als einen Partner, mit dem sie ihre Ziele verwirklichen können. 
Mit gut 25 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern an den Standorten Straelen und Reichenau sind wir verantwortlich für die DACH-Region.

Name: INADCO
Description:
Specialty is measuring the moisture content and determining the bulk density during the process and weighing product flows with a low bulk density (20 g/l – 1500 g/l) with a (calibrated) belt weigher. Because we ourselves are the developer and producer of the measuring equipment, we can adapt the equipment to the circumstances if necessary. Our moisture meters therefore achieve excellent reproducibility and accuracy which is better than any other system in measuring inhomogeneous bulk goods. 

Because we are the developer and manufacturer of the measuring equipment, we can advise you well on a solution that meets your process and your requirements. This can be done by using our standard solutions, but also by adapting our equipment to the specific requirements for your application.

Every product is hand-packed in the UK using sustainable materials, with carefully curated seeds and step-by-step guidance to help you grow with confidence. Whether you’re looking for a thoughtful eco-friendly gift, starting a new hobby, or joining one of our team workshops to de-stress and reconnect with nature, Seed Folk makes growing accessible, joyful, and rewarding.

Name: Moraitis Group of Companies
Description:
Moraitis was the largest integrated fruit and vegetable fresh produce business in Australia.

Moraitis was founded by Nicholas Moraitis in 1959 as a sourcing and distribution agency of potatoes to retail greengrocers and corner stores in Sydney. The Moraitis family continued to develop the grower aggregator business model and grew the business substantially to become the largest supplier of fresh produce to the Australian retail community.

An early pioneer of category management in Australia, Moraitis assisted Australian retailers to grow fresh produce sales and profit through maximising synergies and minimising unproductive competition across the supply chain.

Moraitis was an established Category Leader in the fresh potato, onion, hydroponic tomato and banana categories.

Moraitis sold approximately 350,000 tonnes of produce per year to all major retailers and independent grocers from a large network of quality farm sources, adding value throughout the supply chain with expertise and substantial country-wide packing, warehousing and ripening infrastructure.

Moraitis’ product range included; bananas, berries, cherries, citrus, avocados, hydroponic tomatoes, organic produce and hard produce.

Further, Moraitis invested significantly in, and was the owner of, numerous exclusive Plant Breeding Rights (PBR) variety selections within its key product lines, including the ‘Delight’ Potato Range, Onions, Berries and Hydroponic Tomatoes.

Name: Horta Urbana Preservation Nature Green Life ltda
Description:
Visão da Preservation Nature Green Life Ltda:
“Ser referência global em sustentabilidade e inovação, integrando o ambiente urbano à natureza por meio de hortas orgânicas. Nosso objetivo é transformar cidades em ecossistemas saudáveis e equilibrados, promovendo práticas sustentáveis, preservação ambiental e alimentação consciente. Inspiramos comunidades a adotar um estilo de vida mais verde, conectando pessoas à natureza e criando soluções que beneficiem gerações atuais e futuras.”

Pilares Essenciais:

Sustentabilidade e Agricultura Orgânica: Hortas urbanas que respeitem o meio ambiente, com práticas naturais e sem agrotóxicos.

Conexão Humano-Natureza: Aproveitamento de espaços urbanos para criar áreas verdes produtivas, incentivando a reconexão com a natureza.

Educação Ambiental: Oferecer cursos e programas de conscientização sobre cultivo orgânico, compostagem e redução de resíduos.

Comunidade e Inclusão: Estimular hortas comunitárias, fortalecendo laços sociais e promovendo a colaboração local.

Inovação no Cultivo Urbano: Aplicar tecnologias como hortas verticais e sistemas de irrigação sustentável, facilitando o cultivo em pequenos espaços.

Autossuficiência e Consumo Local: Reduzir a dependência de cadeias industriais, incentivando a produção local e impactando positivamente o meio ambiente.

Compromisso:
A Preservation Nature Green Life Ltda. se dedica a criar cidades mais verdes, onde o desenvolvimento urbano e a natureza coexistam em harmonia. Valorizamos o cultivo orgânico como solução prática para os desafios modernos e um estilo de vida que promove equilíbrio, saúde e respeito ao planeta.

For this purpose, we invented water emitters, called root flasks, soil sensors and auto motor controllers. With the help of the above devices water, minerals power and labor will be saved up to 80 % and encourage crops yield by 60% in all horticultural crops and flower gardens. Name: Salsabiila Nursery
Description:
CV. Salsabiila Nursery is a company engaged in the agricultural industry, especially floriculture. This company was established in Indonesia in 2002. At first, Salsabiila Nursery was only involved in retailing ornamental plants. However, over time, our company is growing. It is in terms of quantity, quality, and the provision of the products and services we provide.

Currently, CV. Salsabiila Nursery has two Showroom locations in East Jakarta and Cianjur. Apart from the Showroom, we also have a production site for ornamental plants or a nursery in Cianjur, West Java. Ornamental plants produce there are of various types. The types of ornamental plants that we have and supply are bedding plants, cut flowers, ornamental leaf plants, potted ornamental plants, and others. Apart from providing these products, we also offer various services related to landscape design, garden maintenance, and flower arrangement services. Not only that, but we also accept orders from abroad, or more precisely, exports.

CV. Salsabiila Nursery has been running for 21 years. We have received orders from abroad several times. Some destination countries that have previously exported our products include Kuwait, Riyadh, Qatar, the Netherlands, Singapore, and Myanmar. The product that was most frequently shipped before was Bougainvillea. Apart from Bougainvillea, the other products we exported back then were Kalanchoe and Poinsettia. We produce around 20,000-50,000 pots of ornamental plants per month. It is because we have marketed our products not only to Jakarta, the capital city of Indonesia on the island of Java, but we also sold our products to other provinces on the island of Java, even to some outside of Java.

Name: PalmPeat
Description:
PalmPeat is the world’s first soilless growing media made from date palm agricultural residues, offering a renewable and sustainable alternative to sphagnum peat moss.

Developed using patented technology, PalmPeat provides excellent water-holding capacity, aeration, biological stability, and expansion power, making it ideal for horticulture, hydroponics, nurseries, and Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) systems.

Available in pith, chips, and mulch, PalmPeat is 100% biobased, free from harmful pathogens, and supports low-carbon, regionally sourced supply chains across the MENA region and Europe. By transforming agricultural waste into high-quality growing media, PalmPeat helps preserve sensitive peatland ecosystems and enables a more sustainable future for global agriculture.

Description:

We have been propagating fruit trees for nearly twenty years and work in partnership with the National Fruit Collection at Brogdale.  We’re striving to help protect our planet with our carbon offset programme – partnering with sustainability conscious companies looking to do their bit for the environment and communities in need.

Our ambition is to create a living map of heritage fruit tree varieties across the country, while helping businesses reduce their carbon footprint, and giving people access to delicious fresh fruit.

Our beautiful fruit trees are available for you to buy and grow at home and our expert team can assist you with bigger projects too.

Name: Borneo Exotics
Description:
Borneo Exotics (Pvt) Ltd is a globally recognised horticultural nursery based in Sri Lanka, specialising in the propagation and cultivation of Nepenthes (tropical pitcher plants). Established in 1997, the company is widely regarded as the world’s leading specialist producer of these unique carnivorous plants.

Operating from state of the art tissue culture labs and multiple climate specific facilities, Borneo Exotics has developed over 2,000 unique Nepenthes hybrids and cultivars. The nursery supplies wholesale customers, botanical institutions, and collectors worldwide, with a strong emphasis on conservation through sustainable cultivation.

Borneo Exotics has earned numerous international accolades, including multiple Gold Medals at the RHS Chelsea Flower Show, in recognition of its innovation and excellence in plant breeding and display. The company is also noted for its role in rescuing and preserving endangered Nepenthes species, contributing significantly to ex-situ conservation efforts.

Garten- Landschaftsbau, Renovationen und neubau von Gartenhäuser & Carports.
Räumungen & Entsorgung

Ist etwas nicht aufgeführt, dann fragen Sie nur nach.
Ich lerne immer neues dazu, dank meiner Einstellung! 
GEHT NICHT GIBT`s NICHT, dies verhilft mir immer eine Lösung zu finden.
Das schätzen auch meine Kunden sehr.

Da ich in so vielen Bereichen & Branchen erfolgreiche Arbeiten abliefere, 
kann ich mich mit recht die Spezialeinheit / Special Force nennen.
Zusätzlich bin ich ein Kind aus den 80er Jahren, somit habe ich das Handwerkliche Können nach der alten schule / Oldschool gelernt.

Zusätzlich fördere ich Reparaturen und Occ. Teile. 
Warum immer gleich alles wegschmeißen und Neu Kaufen.
Aus Alt mach Neu.
Meine Favoriten Brocki hat so gut wie alles oder Alternativen. 

überzeugt euch selbst und nimmt mit mir Kontakt auf.

Gerne können wir Ihr Projekt auch gleich vor Ort besprechen.

Ihr Special Force Oldschool.

Name: Kyoga SAHs Labs
Description:
Kyoga SAHs Labs will provide biodegradable and environment-friendly superabsorbent hydrogels (SAHs) made with innovative technologies which will boost water absorption and retention qualities and delay the release of fertilizers in the soil, allowing the plant to access the nutrients over a longer time thus increasing plant productivity.

Kyoga SAHs Labs manufactures biodegradable and sustainable superabsorbent hydrogels (SAHs) with the help of cellulose-based polymers, which are biocompatible and non-toxic. With the use of next-generation technology solutions, the company will be solving the current pain points of the customers involved in agriculture by improving productivity, enhancing the plants' yield, and reducing the loss of nutrients. It will be using natural char nanoparticles and natural cross-linking to enhance the water retention capacity and slow the release of fertilizer.

Name: Atlantic Garden
Description:
Atlantic Garden is proud to deliver the world’s first 100% peat-free AND 100% plastic packaging free organic seaweed compost.

Enriched with organic seaweed gathered from the nutrient-rich waters of the Scottish coastline, this compost is high performing for the most discerning gardeners – the nutrients and minerals present are proven to deliver a range of benefits, including:
Deeper and stronger root growth
Faster-growing, healthier and hardier plants
Tastier fruit and vegetables with a longer shelf-life
Improved water retention enabling less frequent watering

Our founder, Guy Grieve says: “For twelve years, as a scallop diver, I swam through Kelp forests in the pure beautiful waters of the North Atlantic around my home off the coast of the West of Scotland. I used to gather seaweed on the beach beside my house to fertilise a little veggie patch on the Isle of Mull. The results were always wonderful. It got me thinking…”

And so, Atlantic Garden was born.

Name: Winfluential Technology
Description:
Winfluential Technology, based in Delhi, is a trusted leader in the field of water restoration and rejuvenation. We specialize in restoring and enhancing water bodies through sustainable, eco-friendly solutions that promote long-term environmental health. With a focus on using natural processes and bio-enzyme-based treatments, our proprietary solution, Neerveda, harnesses the power of herbal extracts and bio-enzymes to restore water bodies effectively without harming the environment.

Having successfully restored over 65 water bodies, including high-profile sites such as Hauz Khas Lake and Prasad Nagar Lake, we’ve proven our ability to improve water quality, restore biodiversity, and create sustainable ecosystems in both urban and rural areas. Our clients, including Delhi Development Authority (DDA), Noida Development Authority (NDA), and prominent PSUs like ONGC, IOCL, GAIL, and Coal India, trust us for our ability to deliver consistent, reliable, and impactful results.

At Winfluential Technology, we pride ourselves on our commitment to cost-effectiveness, reliability, and long-term sustainability. Our solutions offer low capital expenditure (CapEx), providing a more affordable approach to water body restoration compared to traditional methods. Additionally, our unique processes significantly reduce long-term maintenance costs, ensuring that the restored water bodies remain healthy with minimal intervention over time. This makes our services a highly economical choice for both immediate restoration and ongoing maintenance.

With a footprint across Delhi, Haryana, Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, and Rajasthan, we are continually expanding our impact, restoring critical water resources, and helping clients achieve their environmental goals. At Winfluential Technology, we don’t just restore water bodies—we create thriving, sustainable ecosystems for generations to come.

Name: Adaptable Gardens
Description:
“We are limited only by our imagination and our will to act”

This quote by Ron Garan is by far the best quote when it comes to thinking about gardening. Our society has been driven by consumerism for such a long time that we have forgotten what it is to be self-sufficient. As restrictive as the recent pandemic has been and with the cost of living increasing dramatically, it has come with many positives too. It has seen a return to home cooked dinners and families sitting around a dinner table again. It has forced us to rethink the money we spend on takeaway food and the nutrients that we put into our bodies. The lockdowns saw gardening centres sell out of vegetable seedlings time and time again. Gardening became not only about growing food, but a source of therapy that helped with our mental health.

Our business is simple. "Gardening For Everyone". 

Whether you would like to become more self sufficient, or have a disability that prevents you from being able to garden at ground level, we have a solution to help you. We specialise in vertical gardens and Adaptable Gardens that not only look great, but are practical and adjustable. This means that no matter what challenge you face, we have a solution.

Name: TuinspecialistXL
Description:
Welkom bij TuinspecialistXL, waar we gewone tuinen omtoveren tot buitengewone buitenleefruimtes. Sinds onze oprichting hebben we op maat gemaakte veranda's gemaakt, waarmee we een oase in het hart van uw tuin creëren die is afgestemd op uw stijl en ruimte.

Onze passie voor het creëren van prachtige buitenruimtes is diep geworteld, net als de tuinen die we transformeren. Hoe uw tuin er ook uitziet, wij kunnen een perfecte veranda ontwerpen die niet alleen bij uw huis past, maar ook uw persoonlijke smaak weerspiegelt.

Bij ons gaat het niet alleen om het toevoegen van een veranda aan uw tuin. Het gaat om het verbeteren van uw levensstijl, het bieden van een nieuwe ruimte voor ontspanning, plezier en het maken van herinneringen. Uw veranda wordt een uniek verlengstuk van uw leefruimte, waar u familie en vrienden kunt ontvangen, 's ochtends van een kopje koffie kunt genieten of gewoon achterover kunt leunen en van het uitzicht kunt genieten.

Ons ervaren en deskundige team meet en ontwerpt elke veranda met precisie, zodat deze perfect bij uw tuin past. Wij zijn trots op onze toewijding aan kwaliteit en leveren veranda's die niet alleen mooi zijn, maar ook duurzaam en ontworpen om de tand des tijds te doorstaan.

Sluit u aan bij de TuinspecialistXL familie en laten we samen uw droomveranda maken! Blijf op de hoogte van onze nieuwste ontwerpen en projecten door ons te volgen op LinkedIn. Ontdek vandaag nog het TuinspecialistXL verschil en verander uw tuin in een betoverende buitenruimte!

Extragezond Veenendaal is een innitiatief van All Care BV

Name: Marvellous CIC
Description:
Marvellous CIC: Cultivating Growth, Education and Opportunity.

At its heart, Marvellous CIC is a forward-thinking organization dedicated to fostering community well-being and environmental sustainability through a unique and resourceful approach. They achieve this through interconnected pillars, all underpinned by a commitment to upcycling and innovation:

Sustainable Food Production through Upcycled Micro Domes:

Marvellous CIC pioneers a novel method of growing food within upcycled micro domes. This ingenious approach allows for controlled environments, potentially extending growing seasons, reducing water usage, and minimizing land requirements. By repurposing materials into these growing spaces, they champion resourcefulness and waste reduction, providing a local and sustainable source of fresh produce for the community.



Expanding the Upcycling Horizon:

Beyond their innovative micro domes, Marvellous CIC demonstrates a remarkable commitment to the circular economy through a diverse range of other upcycled projects. These initiatives showcase their ingenuity and dedication to finding new life for discarded materials:

They are involved in making 3D printer filament from recycled plastics, transforming waste into a valuable resource for innovation and creation. This not only reduces plastic waste but also supports the growing field of 3D printing with sustainable materials.

Upcycled fish tanks are another fascinating project, likely repurposing plastic containers into functional and aesthetically pleasing aquatic habitats. This highlights their ability to find creative and practical applications for discarded items.

Furthermore, Marvellous CIC is exploring vertical hydroponics systems built from upcycled materials. This combines their expertise in sustainable food production with their upcycling ethos, creating efficient and space-saving methods for growing food in urban environment.

Name: GP Powerplants
Description:
Wat gebeurt er als je honderd procent inzet op de kwaliteit van de plant en de wens van de klant?

In de wereld van de plantenteelt zien we dat exporteurs en kwekerijen zich voornamelijk richten op een prijs die marktconform is. Veel kwekerijen zetten daarom niet alleen in op mensen met verstand van de plant, maar op medewerkers die de wereld van verkoop snappen.

Maar wat zou er gebeuren als we minder in gaan zetten op sales, en meer op het opbouwen van een goede relatie met de klant en de kwaliteit van de plant?

GP Powerplants heeft meer mensen op het land, dan verkopers bij de klant. Onze mensen staan dichter op het proces van stek tot volgroeide plant, dan in de verkoopmodus bij de klant.

Wij geloven dat onze producten zichzelf verkopen, omdat we onze volledige focus leggen op enerzijds plantvriendelijkheid, en anderzijds klantvriendelijkheid.

Name: Equinox Horticulture Ltd
Description:
Located on the slopes of Mount Kenya, just 8 km north of Nanyuki town, Equinox Horticulture is a leading rose production facility established in 2008. Positioned at 2,000m above sea level on the Equator, we benefit from an ideal year-round climate—cool nights, warm days, and consistent daylight—to produce high-quality roses primarily for export to auctions in Holland.
Our innovative practices include:
•	Bi-colour Roses: Taking advantage of high light levels to grow vibrant, intensely coloured varieties.
•	Efficiency-Driven Systems: A 3 km cableway "skytrain transport system" ensures roses are transported swiftly from greenhouses to grading sheds, preserving quality and freshness.
•	Advanced Climate Control: Greenhouse fogging systems regulate humidity, creating optimal conditions for consistent colour and quality.
•	Sustainability Leadership: Carbon Neutral certified since 2020, we are proud members of the Climate Neutral Now initiative, demonstrating our commitment to environmental stewardship.

We pride ourselves on producing roses that are not only beautiful but also grown with care for the environment and the community.

Description:
Flyinge Plantshop ligger ca. 10 km öster om Lund och är ett av de ledande företagen i Sverige när det gäller växter och trädgårdsprodukter. 

Våra olika inriktningar
Vi har sedan starten 1969 haft tre inriktningar:

GardenCentret är ett av Skånes största och där tillhandahåller vi ett brett sortiment av växter samt även krukor, jord, gödning, verktyg/redskap, dammprodukter, granitsten, inredningsdetaljer, dekoration, presentartiklar, m.m.

Partiförsäljning riktar sig till kundkategorier så som anläggningsföretag, kommuner, kyrkoförvaltningar, fastighetsbolag, andra plantskolor, m.fl.

Vår egen odling är en viktig del av företagets verksamhet för att kunna leverera så mycket som möjligt svenskodlat.

För oss har alltid kunskap, kvalitet och service varit en självklarhet. Vår kunniga personal är nyckeln till att kunna leverera detta och de finns här för att se till att du får rätt växt på rätt plats. Vi strävar också alltid efter att ha en så stor del svenskodlat som möjligt och erbjuda ett brett utbud av E-plantor. Vi vill helt enkelt sälja plantor som du har största möjligheter att lyckas med.

Ett utflyktsmål för hela familjen
Sedan våren 2015 driver vi även Café Smedjan. Ett kafé med fika och lunch som ligger i anslutning till vårt GardenCenter. Här sitter du mysigt inne i rustik miljö eller på uteserveringen under ett tak av murgröna och blåregn. Det finns även en lekplats i anslutning till vår uteservering där barnen kan leka.
