Name: BMI A/S
Description:
BMI A/S er en butik med lange stolte traditioner. For langt over 30 år siden blev firmaet startet af, nu pensionerede, Jørgen Bjørklund. I dag drives firmaet af sønnen Jan Bjørklund og barnebarnet Mads Bjørklund.

BMI A/S er en ægte fagbutik, hvor vi sætter en stor ære i at rådgive kunden om valg at de rette produkter. Alle maskiner bliver startet op og evt. justeret inden de forlader forretningen. På den måde sikre vi os at maskinen fungerer optimalt når den skal tages i brug. Vi tilbyder også gerne en instruktion i hvordan produktet skal bruges. 

Vi forsøger hele tiden at tilpasse butikkens sortiment, så vi kan tilbyde de bedste produkter på markedet, som kan klare vore kunders behov.  Det er typisk pleje og de grønne områder ved boligejendomme, til gartnere, skoventreprenører og landskabsplejere, ved kommuner og kirkegårde m.m. samt til private der ønsker gode produkter til pleje af villahaven og sommerhuset.

Vi er en af landets største specialbutikker inden for produkter til det grønne område og vi har de fleste af de førende mærker inden for denne branche.
Husqvarna og Stihl fylder meget i vores butik med håndholdte maskiner og maskiner til plæneklipning. Men vi suppleres også med udvalgte produkter fra andre førende leverandører.

I butikken finder du også et stort udvalg af sikkerhedsudstyr, værktøj og skæreudstyr og så er vi landets største butik med salg af den miljøvenlige Aspen benzin.
Ars, Felco og Silky til manuelle beskæringsopgaver samt Pellenc og Volpi, som batteridrevne beskæringsværktøj. Vi har absolut hovedstadens største udvalg af beskæringsværktøj.
Du finder ligeledes et stort udvalg af haveredskaber fra de gode gamle Lysbro Classic (som nu hedder Fiskars), suppleret med haveredskaber fra andre førende leverandører.
Ukrudtsbrændere, højtryksrensere, affaldsopsamler, trillebøre og masser af andre praktiske produkter er ligeledes en del af vores butik.

Ønsker du selv at servicere dine maskiner, så hjælper vi med at skaffe reservedelene for dig.

Name: Midfresh B.V.
Description:
MidFresh is een bedrijf dat zich heeft gespecialiseerd in het sorteren en verpakken van alle kleuren paprika’s. Door middel van zeer geavanceerde sorteerapparatuur zijn we in staat om grote partijen paprika gesorteerd en verpakt te krijgen.
MidFresh sorteert op jaarbasis alleen al ruim 9.000.000 kg paprika afkomstig van de 3 bedrijven die eigenaar zijn van MidFresh. Daarnaast heeft MidFresh een Flowpacklijn ( 4 miljoen stuks per jaar) en een seal productie lijn (filmen van paprika's). MidFresh heeft de mogelijkheid ook paprika’s van andere productiebedrijven te sorteren.

Naast het hyper moderne sorteer- en verpakgedeelte heeft MidFresh ook alle faciliteiten voor keuring, opslag, koeling en verlading. Daardoor kan bijna alles direct verladen en getransporteerd worden naar de klant(supermarkt)
MidFresh is gevestigd in Harmelen wat ten westen van Utrecht ligt en vlakbij de snelwegen A2 en A12. De paprika’s die bij MidFresh vandaan komen gaan naar klanten in heel Europa en zelfs ver daar buiten naar landen zoals: USA, Rusland en Japan.

Alle partijen kunnen naar klantspecifieke eisen gesorteerd en verpakt worden.
Door de korte lijnen tussen productie en de klant is de traceerbaarheid van het product helemaal gewaarborgd. Door de grote flexibiliteit en betrouwbaarheid is MidFresh na verloop van de jaren een niet meer weg te denken dienstverlener in paprikaland. Naast de certificeringen zoals Globalgap IFS en Milieukeur, is MidFresh continu bezig haar betrouwbaarheid en flexibiliteit te versterken zodat ook in de toekomst MidFresh een partij blijft die voor deze speerpunten staat.

Name: Cinnabar Valley Farms
Description:
Cinnabar Valley Farms takes great pride in producing soils of superior quality that are made with all-natural and organic premium ingredients. Our commitment to quality starts with the careful selection of ingredients that are known for their optimal plant growth and health benefits. We are a family-run business that loves what we do, and we are passionate about continuing our tradition of excellence in farming for generations to come.

Our soils are produced at the same British Columbia location where we've been for over 50 years. We use sustainable and environmentally-friendly practices to protect the soil and preserve its natural nutrients. Our commitment to quality means that our soils are richer, which translates to healthier plants and higher yields. Whether you're an experienced gardener or just starting, our premium soils will help you grow the healthiest plants possible. Trust us to deliver consistent, reliable results for all your gardening needs, and experience the difference that our passion for gardening and commitment to excellence can make.

At Cinnabar Valley Farms, we are always looking for ways to meet the needs of our customers. A few years ago, we noticed that many gardeners were asking us for more high-quality gardening products, so we decided to create the myGarden essential line.

This line includes a range of products designed to meet the needs of gardeners of all levels. From myGarden Fertilizer to myGarden Landscaping Fabric, myGarden Plant Support, myGarden Netting, myGarden Fencing, and myGarden Watering, we offer a complete range of gardening essentials that are made with the same care and attention to quality as our premium soils.

Name: Eden & Okra Gardenscaping Club
Description:
Eden & Okra is more than a garden club  it is a sanctuary where Black women gather to reclaim rest, wellness, and joy through connection to the earth and to each other. We envision a world where intentional slowing down is not a luxury, but a deeply rooted practice one that honors our cultural and historical traditions of self-care, healing, and ancestral wisdom.

At the heart of Eden & Okra is a celebration of legacy. We honor the rituals and knowledge passed down through generations, infusing them into every gathering, every garden bed, and every botanical blend we share. Our handcrafted botanical drinks and wellness additions are designed to transport you to a space of stillness  a place where you can reconnect with yourself, your community, and the natural world.

As we grow, we carry with us a vision of becoming a global symbol of mindful living — one that uplifts and nourishes all communities through the power of cultural heritage, nature, and intentional care.

Welcome to Eden & Okra  where we are gracefully rooted, and gently blooming.

Name: Balkan Saints
Description:
Our story begins in the center of Balkan peninsula, halfway between Belgrade and Athens, in Skopje, on the outskirts of capitol of North Macedonia. The facility is located just next to the Skopje International Airport, 20 minutes by car  from the center of Skopje.

Name: Tangikaroro Native Nursery
Description:
I grow native plants from seeds eco-sourced from Tangikaroro Native Reserve, Te Araroa, my papakainga (homeland).  I have witnessed the life of this remnant forest for the past 52 years.  I am now 54.  

The rich biodiversity of Tangikaroro allows opportunities for me to grow in season, what ever is naturally occurring in the ngahere (forest) throughout the year.  It's a privilege and a pleasure to share, grow and debate this lived knowledge with clients who may wish to retire areas of land into native bush.

Tangikaroro is literally a blueprint for what can happen across the East Coast.  I am happy to advise whanau, hapu, iwi, and communities in Te Tairawhiti, on what can work for you in your area, depending on your taiao (environment).

With Cyclone Gabrielle having brought a lot of devastation and destruction to Te Tairawhiti, I wish to support the wellbeing of East Coast communities by growing native trees and plants that will help beautify neighbourhoods again, and return greenery and vibrant colour that is enduring and authentically "Ngati Porou".  This includes plants for local kohanga, kura, kindergartens and schools.

I live in Te Araroa and am available to support your community project or local business initative.  My email is tangikaroro.native.nursery@gmail.com.  My direct dial number is 021-193-1912 with the best time to ring being 9am to 5pm on weekdays.

Habbag Biodegradable Nursery Systems was born from the acknowledgment of nursery owners about the amount of plastic used in their industry.

Within the nursery industry throughout the world there is a heavy reliance of plastic planter bags, plastic pots and synthetic weed matting for many decades now.

Habbag Biodegradable Nursery Systems is the brain child of long time The Gorge Nursery owner Sarah (Sis) Johnston and Jean-Michel Libeau the man behind some the world’s most technologically advanced performance yarns and fabrics.

HEMP, the miracle plant.  Retted hemp is one of the most environmentally friendly fabrics currently available. It is fully biodregradable. Hemp fibre is one of the strongest and most durable of all-natural textile fibres

WOOL is a perfect material to use in our nursery systems. It is a natural and fully biodregradable fiber and in New Zealand is from a readily available and renewable source. Perfect for small and large scale planting projects where soil conservation and weed suppression are required.

Nos estructuramos como un Cash & Carry de flor, abierto de lunes a sábado, ofreciendo nuestros servicios tanto a mayoristas como a particulares y autónomos.

Con más de 40 años de experiencia, nos especializamos en la venta, almacenaje y distribución de flor cortada, flor preservada y artículos relacionados. Trabajamos principalmente con productos nacionales, defendiendo con orgullo la calidad y competitividad de nuestra tierra.

Creemos en un futuro más verde, por eso apostamos por la sostenibilidad en cada paso. Desde nuestro almacén, aplicamos prácticas responsables que respetan el medioambiente.

Apostamos por el producto nacional, apoyando el sector agrícola y contribuyendo al desarrollo de nuestra comunidad, Andalucía. Cada flor que llega a nuestros clientes es fruto del esfuerzo y la pasión de productores locales.

En Proflor Flores, cada flor cuenta una historia.  Descubre la nuestra visitándonos!

Wie zin heeft zich onder te dompelen in het groen, raden we aan om eens kennis te maken met “De Roode Hoeve” in Kapellen. Deze prachtige plantenkwekerij aan het natuurgebied Het Rood beschikt over een uitzonderlijke collectie buxussen, buxuswolken, grassen, vaste planten en bomen met een maatje meer. U kunt er eveneens de kleurrijke, design plantenbakken van WALFiLii bewonderen.

Ons aanbod is groot, maar niet zo groot als wat de natuur ons allemaal schenkt. Op vraag zorgen wij ervoor dat uw keuze bij ons voorradig is.

Our state-of-the-art vermicomposting process ensures the highest quality product, packed with essential nutrients, beneficial microorganisms, and improved soil structure.

 What Sets Us Apart:
 Sustainability: We are committed to sustainable practices that contribute to a greener and healthier environment.
 Quality Assurance: Rigorous quality control measures guarantee the purity and effectiveness of our vermicompost.
 Custom Solutions: Tailored vermicomposting solutions for various industries, including agriculture, landscaping, and gardening.

 Why Choose Diddly Squat Worm Fams Vermicast?

Enhance soil fertility and structure.
Boost plant growth and yield naturally.
Reduce dependency on synthetic fertilizers.
Contribute to a circular economy and reduce waste.
 Join the Green Revolution:
Connect with Diddly Squat Worm Farm on LinkedIn for the latest updates, industry insights, and sustainable farming tips. Together, let's cultivate a future where agriculture thrives in harmony with nature.



#SustainableAgriculture #Vermicompost #GreenRevolution #OrganicFarming

Name: Verband Garten-, Landschafts- und Sportplatzbau Nordrhein-Westfalen e. V.
Description:
Der Verband Garten-, Landschafts- und Sportplatzbau NRW e. V. hat seinen Sitz in Oberhausen. Als Fachverband vertreten wir die Interessen der grünen Branche und der Fachbetriebe - in der Politik, in Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft. Unsere über 1000 Mitgliedsbetriebe sind die Experten für Garten und Landschaft. Sie arbeiten in der Natur, gestalten und pflegen privates Grün, öffentliche und gewerbliche Anlagen. 

Unsere Arbeit wird von unserem Präsidium, den Bezirksverbänden sowie einem Bildungs- und einem Öffentlichkeitsausschuss getragen. In Arbeitskreisen zu speziellen Themen - ob Digitalisierung oder Energieeffizienz, ob GaLaBau Women oder Juniorenkreis - werden ebenfalls beispielhafte Lösungen für aktuelle Herausforderungen entwickelt, von denen später alle Verbandsmitglieder profitieren.

Unsere Geschäftsstelle unterstützt die Gremien und unsere Mitglieder auf operativer Ebene. Zu den Aufgaben gehören die Nachwuchswerbung und Fachkräftesicherung, Unterstützung bei fachlichen und rechtlichen Fragen sowie Marketing und Kommunikation.

Der Garten- und Landschaftsbau in NRW generiert im Jahr rund 1,6 Mrd. Euro Umsatz. Davon erwirtschaften die über 1000 Mitgliedsbetriebe des VGL NRW ca. 65 % des Marktvolumens. Hinsichtlich der Auftraggeberstruktur werden rund 56 % des Branchenumsatzes durch Privatkunden, 26 % durch gewerbliche und Kunden der Wohnungswirtschaft sowie 19 % durch öffentliche Kunden erzielt.

Name: Hyderabad Flora
Description:
At Hyderabad Flora, we believe in transforming everyday spaces into green sanctuaries that inspire and uplift. For over 35 years, we've been at the forefront of sustainable landscaping and greenery solutions, working with top corporates across Hyderabad and beyond. Our mission is simple: to bring nature closer to where people live and work, creating environments that enhance not only aesthetics but also well-being.

With a sprawling 10+ acre nursery near Gandipet, we cultivate and source the highest quality plants for our clients. From corporate offices and luxury hotels to bustling hospitals and iconic film studios, our work spans a wide range of projects, all tailored to meet unique client needs.

What sets us apart? It’s our deep-rooted commitment to sustainability and the environment. We don’t just design spaces; we create ecosystems that thrive. Our modular green infrastructure solutions, edible plant systems, and sustainable plant subscription services ensure that greenery is not only beautiful but purposeful. Whether it’s pollution-absorbing green walls, vertical farming, or climate-resilient landscapes, our solutions are designed to benefit both people and the planet.

We are proud of the long-lasting relationships we've built with our clients, including industry leaders like Google, Apollo Hospital, and Annapurna Studios. At Hyderabad Flora, every project is an opportunity to make a lasting impact.

Ready to bring nature into your space? Click the link to explore our services and see how Hyderabad Flora can transform your environment into a lush, green oasis. 

#SustainableLandscaping #GreeneryAsAService #HyderabadFlora

Transporte | Erdbau | Gartenbau | Pflasterbau I Poolbau

Entdecken Sie die Welt der Ausserbrunner GmbH – Ihr vertrauenswürdiger Partner seit über 50 Jahren!

Seit unserer Gründung haben wir uns als Familienunternehmen im Vorarlberger Unterland etabliert und bieten spezialisierte Dienstleistungen in den Bereichen Gartenbau, Stein- und Pflasterarbeiten sowie Transporte und Erdbewegungen. Mit einer tief verwurzelten Leidenschaft für Qualität und einer unerschütterlichen Verpflichtung zu höchster Kompetenz in allem, was wir tun, haben wir uns einen Namen gemacht.

Unser umfangreiches Angebot umfasst:

Transporte & Erdbau: Mit modernem Fuhrpark und professioneller Ausrüstung erfüllen wir Ihre Anforderungen effizient und zuverlässig.

Gartenbau: Verwandeln Sie Ihren Außenbereich in ein grünes Paradies mit unserer kreativen und fachlichen Expertise.

Pflasterbau: Individualisieren Sie Ihren Außenbereich mit hochwertigen Pflasterlösungen, die sowohl ästhetisch ansprechend als auch funktional sind.

Poolbau: Genießen Sie pure Entspannung in Ihrem eigenen Pool, maßgeschneidert nach Ihren Wünschen für perfekte Integration in Ihren Garten.

Unser Ansatz ist einfach: Ihre Wünsche zu verstehen und mit Leidenschaft und Fachkenntnis umzusetzen. Vom ersten Beratungsgespräch bis zur finalen Realisierung Ihres Projekts stehen wir Ihnen mit Rat und Tat zur Seite, um sicherzustellen, dass Ihr Außenbereich genau so wird, wie Sie es sich vorstellen.

Name: Hort Buddy
Description:
At Hort Buddy, we believe that people are the roots of every successful horticulture business. 

From garden centres and nurseries to landscaping companies and private estates, staff are the driving force behind quality, customer service, and growth. But retention and training can be costly, time-consuming, and often inconsistent.

That’s where we come in.

Hort Buddy provides an affordable, flexible mentoring and training solution designed specifically for the horticulture industry. We help businesses support their staff, reduce turnover, and build skills for the future.

 1:1 Mentoring via WhatsApp & Zoom – direct access to a mentor with replies within 12 hours.
 Affordable Membership – just £500/year (or £50/month) per staff member, with a lighter £100/year group option.
 Employer Reports – quarterly updates on staff progress and challenges (confidential but designed to support business growth).
 On-Demand Training – additional sessions via Zoom or in-person (with travel expenses).

Our mission is simple: to make horticulture careers more rewarding, supported, and sustainable.

We’re new — but we’re passionate, ambitious, and ready to help the industry grow stronger, one person at a time.

Name: Thorp Perrow
Description: Thorp Perrow is home to one of the UKs most important collections of trees, shrubs and birds of prey - a leading light for arboricultural biodiversity and raptor conservation. The arboretum holds the UK National Collections of Ash (Fraxinus), Walnut (Juglans), Lime (Tilia), Laburnum and Smoke Bush (Cotinus). The earliest parts of the arboretum date from 1840 with a significant proportion of the collection planted from the 1930s. The bird of prey centre is committed to raptor conservation - actively involved in the reintroduction of endangered birds of prey into their natural habitat.

Name: Yn'e Sinne Farm
Description:
Yn’e Sinne Farm is een CSA-tuinderij (gemeenschaopstuinderij) in Friesland waar we lokaal en seizoensgebonden voedsel telen in samenwerking met de natuur.

Onze teeltwijze is gericht op het opbouwen van een levende, gezonde bodem en het versterken van biodiversiteit, met aandacht voor de lange termijn.

Onze leden nemen deel via een oogstaandeel en kiezen zelf uit de geoogste en gewassen groenten. Zo ervaren zij de voordelen van een eigen moestuin, zonder de tijdsinvestering.
Daarnaast zijn we een boerderijwinkel waar we (h)eerlijke, ambachtelijke producten van andere makers uit de regio samenbrengen, zoals fruit, eieren, zuivel, honing en bloemen.

Met Yn’e Sinne Farm bouwen we aan een veerkrachtig, lokaal voedselsysteem waarin zorg voor de aarde, gezond eten en gemeenschap centraal staan.

Name: Kipou Ergon

Our team of expert designers and gardeners specialise in creating bespoke garden designs that are tailored to meet the unique needs and preferences of our clients, while also incorporating sustainable practices and eco-friendly materials. From organic soil enrichment to water conservation techniques, we prioritize sustainability and ecology in every aspect of our work. We believe that gardens can be more than just beautiful spaces – they can also be powerful contributors to a healthy, thriving planet. Whether you're looking for a small urban garden or a sprawling estate landscape, we have the expertise and creativity to bring your vision to life while minimising our impact on the environment. Get in touch with us today to learn more about our sustainable garden solutions and how we can help you create a garden that is both beautiful and responsible.

Description: Garten- & Landschaftspflege Willi Möller, einer der traditionsreichsten Fachbetriebe unserer Branche. Wir bieten einzigartige Lösungen, die speziell auf die Bedürfnisse von Privatpersonen, Unternehmen und Kleingartenbesitzern zugeschnitten sind. Name: Branching Out, Inc.
Description:
Branching Out offers customizable grafted fruit trees straight to your front porch.

We utilize dwarf varieties which stay under 6 feet to allow for indoor growth and our customization process means you get to pick the fruit on your tree!

The possibilities are endless. Will you go for a lemon, lime, and orange tree? Perhaps apple, cherry and peach? 

Join us today on our mission to connect people with their food, grow a more sustainable tomorrow, and inspire people to wonder.

Name: Farmer Bailey
Description:
Farmer Bailey Inc. brokers the sale of young plants to growers in the lower 48 United States and Alaska. We work with expert horticulturalists throughout the US and Europe to deliver premium quality starter plants. Satisfaction with your healthy plants upon arrival is guaranteed. 

Farmer Bailey’s mission is to inspire greatness in growers of all sizes by providing superior starter plants, extraordinary customer service, and expert educational resources. 

Now in its eighth season, Farmer Bailey, Inc. is the evolution of farmer Bailey Hale's quest to bring industry-leading cut flower varieties to small and medium sized growers in the United States. 

"I couldn't understand why plug growers weren't quickly producing what is popular and trending right now. In the fall of 2015, I put together a group order for six Lisianthus varieties, and got an overwhelming response.  I see the trends coming to the US from Asia and Europe, I know what grows well here in the US, and I'm determined to get those items in the hands of the folks who need them while they are still relevant. Floral trends change rapidly and being able to respond quickly is key for the American flower farmer." 

Farmer Bailey is your growing partner, providing multimedia educational materials and ongoing support to all customers. Your success is our first priority!

Name: Arnold Gartenbau AG
Description:
Our mission: Perfectly built gardens and terraces – your dream comes true
We want to build a perfect and beautiful exterior living area for you.

Your well being is our first goal. Our company Arnold Gartenbau AG has more then 30 years of experience in planning, building and maintaining of professionally designed gardens and terraces. It doesn’t matter whether your garden is big or small, sophisticated or simple – our goal is to build the garden of your dreams.

Our speciality are manually trimmed natural stones. Our workers have long-standing knowledge in trimming and hewing all the different kind of natural stones.

Do you have any questions? Just hit the contact buttons – we are glad to help you and to show you the great variety of possibilities that slumber in your garden right now.

Name: Hanenberg Champignons bv
Description:
Hanenberg Champignons b.v. is een toonaangevend bedrijf in de paddenstoelenteelt, gevestigd in het pittoreske dorpje Erp, Nederland. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in de teelt en oogst van hoogwaardige champignons. Onze missie is om de meest verse en smaakvolle champignons aan onze klanten te leveren, met oog voor kwaliteit en duurzaamheid.

Bij Hanenberg Champignons combineren we traditionele teeltmethoden met moderne technologieën zoals ons geavanceerde slangensysteem voor efficiënt watergeven. Deze innovatieve aanpak helpt ons om een optimaal groeiklimaat voor onze champignons te creëren, wat resulteert in een consistent hoogwaardig product.

Ons toegewijde team werkt dagelijks aan het zorgvuldig oogsten en selecteren van champignons, zodat onze klanten kunnen genieten van een vers en gezond product. Flexibiliteit en klanttevredenheid staan bij ons centraal, waardoor we in staat zijn om op maat gemaakte oplossingen te bieden voor diverse markten.

Kies voor Hanenberg Champignons en proef het verschil van champignons die met zorg en toewijding zijn geteeld.

Yore Permaculture biedt meerdere services aan op het gebied van tuinbouw en stadslandbouw. Yore Permaculture is gespecialiseerd in permacultuur, biologische en biodynamische landbouw, kleinschalige landbouw, stadslandbouw, bodemvruchtbaarheid, educatie en werk op jouw tuinderij.

Name: Vijverberg B.V.
Description:
“Vijverberg BV is een voortrekker in de teelt van paprika's, waar innovatie en automatisering de grondslag vormen van elke knapperige, kleurrijke vrucht die wij telen. Onze kassen zijn geen gewone kassen; het zijn laboratoria van vooruitgang, waar elke plant een testament is van een toewijding aan vernieuwing.

De kracht van ons bedrijf ligt niet alleen in de eindeloze rijen smetteloze paprikaplanten, maar in een voortdurende zoektocht naar slimmere, efficiëntere methoden. Hier worden traditionele technieken gecombineerd met cutting-edge technologieën. Oogstwagens rijden autonoom door de kassen, terwijl geavanceerde systemen voor klimaatbeheersing zorgen voor de perfecte groeiomstandigheden, tot in de kleinste nuance geregeld.

Innovatie is onze levensader. Elke stap voorwaarts, elke nieuwe machine die wordt geïmplementeerd, is ontwikkeld met het streven naar beter, sneller en duurzamer. De automatisering die wij omarmen, strekt zich uit van het planten tot aan de oogst, waar elke handeling en ieder proces is opgezet om de kwaliteit te maximaliseren, de kosten te verlagen en het werken prettiger te maken.

Maar bovenal staat Vijverberg BV voor verandering. Wij zijn niet alleen gericht op onze eigen groei, maar ook op het veranderen van de normen in de agrarische sector. Met onze inzet voor innovatie en automatisering hopen we anderen in de sector te inspireren, om te geloven dat de toekomst van onze sector meer is dan alleen maar planten en oogsten.

Met elke sappige paprika die wij leveren, vertelt Vijverberg BV een verhaal van vooruitgang, een verhaal dat geschreven wordt door de samenwerking tussen mens en technologie. Wij hopen niet alleen trendsetters te zijn in de paprikateelt, maar ook pioniers die laten zien dat de weg naar een bloeiende toekomst in de agrarische sector geplaveid is met innovatie en automatisering.”

Name: grünwert Bremen GmbH
Description:
Gepflegte Außenanlagen und saubere Freiflächen sind die Visitenkarte Ihrer Immobilie – sei es bei Gewerbeobjekten, Bürokomplexen oder Wohnanlagen. Wir sorgen dafür, dass Ihre Grünflächen und Außenbereiche das ganze Jahr über in einwandfreiem Zustand bleiben – zuverlässig, effizient und budgetgerecht.

Umfassende Pflege für Außenanlagen & Freiflächen:
Unsere Leistungen umfassen die regelmäßige Rasenpflege, den fachgerechten Gehölzschnitt sowie die professionelle Pflege von Beeten, Pflanzflächen und Grünstreifen. Darüber hinaus übernehmen wir die Reinigung von Parkplätzen, Zufahrten und Gehwegen, damit auch diese Flächen jederzeit einen gepflegten Eindruck hinterlassen.

Hygienestandards & Werterhalt durch gepflegte Außenbereiche:
Saubere und gepflegte Außenanlagen tragen maßgeblich zur Einhaltung von Hygienestandards bei. Verschmutzungen, Laub oder Wildkraut bieten ideale Bedingungen für Ungeziefer und beeinträchtigen die Gesamthygiene – besonders in Bereichen mit hoher Publikumsfrequenz oder sensibler Nutzung.

Individuelle Pflegekonzepte für nachhaltige Außenanlagen:
Gemeinsam mit Ihnen entwickeln wir ein maßgeschneidertes Pflegekonzept, das genau auf Ihre Anforderungen, die Gegebenheiten vor Ort und Ihr Budget abgestimmt ist. Mit transparenten Kalkulationen, einem fairen Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis und einem Fokus auf wirtschaftliche, pflegeleichte Lösungen sorgen wir für langfristig attraktive Außenbereiche – sowohl optisch als auch wirtschaftlich.

Name: TimberFiber
Description:
TimberFiber provides high-quality engineered wood fiber solutions for the horticulture industry. Made from 100% natural yellow pine, our products contain no added dyes or synthetic additives and are OMRI-listed, offering a sustainable alternative for growing media.

TimberFiber serves two key sectors:

Professional Growers
Our engineered wood fiber is designed to maintain predictable pot volumes, minimizing collapse after watering. With year-round availability and efficient fulfillment, growers can order as needed, reducing storage concerns. Additionally, TimberFiber’s composition allows for the potential replacement of perlite, streamlining inventory management while supporting environmentally conscious practices.

Soil Blenders
TimberFiber offers lower bulk density compared to traditional soil amendments, reducing shipping costs and increasing transportation efficiency. Its structure enhances soil aeration and water retention, providing a valuable addition to growing media. With a dedicated wood fiber production facility, TimberFiber ensures a reliable and consistent supply, including rush service when required.

Committed to innovation, reliability, and sustainability, TimberFiber aims to support growers and soil blenders with high-performance solutions tailored to their needs.

Description:
PLANTEO to firma produkcyjno-handlowa specjalizująca się w produkcji rozchodników (sedum) przeznaczonych na zielone dachy. W Pomorskiej Wsi na Warmii – w malowniczym i czystym ekologicznie regionie północnej Polski, prowadzimy własną plantację rozchodników z przeznaczeniem do budowy dachów zielonych.
Dachy zielone to nowoczesne, proekologiczne rozwiązanie, opierające się z reguły na systemie stropodachu odwróconego, znajdujące coraz większą rzeszę zwolenników nie tylko w osobie świadomych, prywatnych inwestorów – zielone dachy są rozwiązaniem, propagowanym przez instytucje publiczne. Nadają się zarówno do zastosowania na dachach domów jednorodzinnych jak i na wielkopowierzchniowych dachach obiektów biurowych. Zastosowanie zielonego dachu zalicza się w 50% do powierzchni biologicznie czynnej projektowanej nieruchomości. Rośliny, którymi jest obsadzony, korzystnie wpływają na jakość powietrza, redukują ryzyko przegrzewania się lub wychładzania się budynku, zwiększają szczelność dachu a nawet pozytywnie wpływają na jego izolację akustyczną.

Name: 9point67 Vermiculture Farm
Description:
9point67 Vermiculture Farm is a home based, family owned and run worm farm based in Pretoria East; started in the last quarter of 2025. 

Our Waste to Value mission is to use vermiculture to process food, plant and other carbon based waste we have identified and to produce increasing volumes of vermicompost (worm compost) and worm tea (vermileachate). As a byproduct, we also sell worms to fishermen and new entries into the worm farm business.

The primary source of food is kitchen waste - all fruit and vegetable peels, cores, eggs shells, tea bags, used coffee grinds - basically everything you discard during food prep except meat, dairy, onions and anything spicy. Although we try and limit smells and flies etc., the worms do not mind (they actually prefer) if any of these are a bit off or moldy

Contact me if you are in Gauteng and your kitchen waste is currently going to a landfill - perhaps my worms can help!

Worm Farms are a sustainable eco-friendly solution to convert organic waste going to landfills into high nutrient compost and compost products and as such reduce real waste through regenerative agriculture. 

Vermicompost products are a natural way to enrich the soil, reduce chemical use and increase plant growth and health. Vermicompost creates a vibrant ecosystem for your plants by improving aeration, water retention, and microbial activity. This improves plant health, growth and yield.

Our workforce has grown from a start with 2500 worms in late October 2025 to over 20 000 worms at the end of 2025. We are working to at least double again by March 2026 and are projected to exceed 100 000 workers by the end of 2026.

#vermiculture #vermicompost #compost #earthworms #worms #horticulture #wormcastings #wormcompost #wormtea #organicfarming #vermileachate #redwigglers #rooikariba #smallbusiness #kitchenwaste

Dissenyem projectes sostenibles per dur a terme canvis en la realitat social d’una comunitat treballant al voltant de 5 àmbits d’acció:

Agricultura social: Creiem en l’agricultura com una eina amb un gran potencial educatiu, terapèutic i de cohesió social.

Gestió participativa de residus: proposem alternatives per gestionar els residus de forma local i descentralitzada, complementant i millorant el model centralitzat dominant.

Economia social: Impulsem iniciatives amb criteris de l’ESS a través de la cooperació, la innovació, la proximitat, la sostenibilitat, la comunitat, la solidaritat, la producció i el consum responsable.

Tarpuna Lab: Treballem per resoldre de problemes socials i ambientals tenint en compte les noves possibilitats d’implicació que ofereixen les tecnologies digitals, la major conscienciació ciutadana i la creativitat experta aplicada al bé comú.

Educació: Generem processos d’ensenyament i aprenentatge que porten cap a experiències autènticament transformadores amb utilitat social.

Name: Garten und Landschaftsgestaltung Hain GmbH
Description:
Erfolgreich seit vier Generationen
Als Familienbetrieb profitieren wir von der langjährigen Erfahrung aus vier Generationen Gartenbau in der gesamten Rhein-Main-Region. Zugleich richten wir den Blick stets auch auf aktuelle Trends und neue Techniken. In der Verbindung aus Tradition und Innovation sehen wir die klare Stärke unseres Unternehmens.
Unsere Kunden schätzen die individuelle Beratungskompetenz unseres Planungsteams und den Blick fürs Detail – vom ersten Bleistiftstrich über die Planung am PC bis hin zur Umsetzung und Pflege behalten wir Ihre Wünsche und den besprochenen Kosten- und Zeitrahmen stets im Auge. Eine kompetente Bauleitung vor Ort und der kontinuierliche Dialog mit den Kunden zeichnet unser Arbeiten aus.

Bei unseren Mitarbeitern setzen wir von Beginn an auf Qualität. Wir legen großen Wert auf eine gute Ausbildung des Nachwuchses, bilden selbst aus und engagieren uns ehrenamtlich im Prüfungsausschuss für Gesellenprüfungen sowie Meisterprüfungen des Landesbetrieb Landwirtschaft Hessen. Wir beschäftigen ca. 30 Mitarbeiter – darunter Gartenbau-Techniker, Meister, Facharbeiter der Fachrichtungen Gartenbau, Hochbau und Tiefbau und mehrere Azubis in allen Ausbildungsjahren.
Um stets auf dem Laufenden zu bleiben und zugleich die Qualität des deutschen Garten- und Landschaftsbaus zu stärken, sind wir nicht nur Mitglied im Fachverband Garten-, Landschafts- und Sportplatzbau und dort in verschiedenen Ausschüssen aktiv, sondern vertreten die Interessen der Branche durch Karsten Hain als Präsident des FGL. Außerdem agiert Karsten Hain auch ehrenamtlich als Preisrichter, sowohl bei internationalen als auch bei Bundesgartenschauen. Durch seine langjährige Berufserfahrung ist er nicht nur eine Bereicherung für die Jury, sondern lässt sich immer wieder neu inspirieren und erweitert somit seine Kenntnisse.

Description:
Sopta Farms Pvt. Ltd. is a pioneering agri-tech and orchard development company transforming the future of apple farming in India by blending a rich legacy with modern innovation. Established on the strong roots of JMD Orchards — a family legacy that began in the 1960s — Sopta Farms has evolved into a forward-looking enterprise dedicated to building world-class high-density apple orchards from the ground up. We specialize in complete turnkey solutions, from land transformation, soil preparation, and scientific plantation to orchard management, harvesting, packaging, branding, and sales — creating a seamless ecosystem that ensures long-term productivity and profitability.

At Sopta Farms, we partner with investors, HNIs, and businesses who want to participate in the future of sustainable agriculture. Our investment plans offer a unique opportunity to own a part of a premium apple orchard, generate consistent passive income, and enjoy strong long-term returns with professional end-to-end management handled entirely by our expert team. Beyond farming, we also provide exclusive luxury staycations in the heart of the Himalayas, offering investors and their families the chance to experience the beauty of their orchards while enjoying nature and mountain life at no additional cost.

We are driven by a simple yet powerful mission — to transform barren mountain land into thriving, profitable orchards, to bring global standards of apple farming to India, and to make agriculture not just a business, but a lifestyle and a legacy. With Sopta Farms, farming is no longer just about cultivation — it’s about innovation, opportunity, and generational wealth creation.

Jesteśmy jedną z największych firm w kraju z siedzibą w woj. opolskim, chociaż granice współpracy sięgają nie tylko Polski, ale również krajów UE. Zajmujemy się uprawą chryzantem doniczkowych i ciętych oraz hurtową sprzedażą ciętych tulipanów.

W naszej produkcji stawiamy na rzetelność oraz rozwój technologiczny. Firmy Pychyński to nowoczesne szklarnie, doświadczona załoga i wysoka jakość jako znak rozpoznawalny. Tworzymy najlepsze środowisko pracy dla naszych pracowników, zachęcając ich do inicjatywy i kreatywności, dzięki czemu wielu z nich jest z nami od lat.


Wszystkie obiekty wyposażone są w systemy kontroli temperatury, dzięki czemu sadzonki, cebule i kwiaty zachowują długą świeżość.

Nasze rośliny podczas transportu odpowiednio zabezpieczamy, aby dotarły do Klientów w idealnym stanie. Dostosowujemy się do oczekiwań naszych partnerów, aby zagwarantować satysfakcję i zbudować trwałe relacje.


Misja naszej firmy to:
Twój sukces w biznesie jest
naszym sukcesem. Wysoka jakość
to nasz znak rozpoznawalny.

Name: Snoek Breeding B.V.
Description:
Snoek Breeding B.V. houdt zich bezig met de veredeling van tulp en gladiool.

In het gewas tulp is het doel een goede, zware broeitulp te maken die geschikt is voor de waterbroei cultuur. Dit gekoppeld aan een sterk vaasleven. Alle zaailingen worden meerdere jaren getest in de eigen water broeierij. Dit geeft een goede kijk op de kansen in de praktijk. Snoek Breeding BV verzorgt de opkweek van de nieuwe zaailingen met potentie. De verdere vermeerdering wordt verzorgd door de coöperatieve vereniging Tuliko.

In het gewas gladiool is het doel een zware aar die niet verbrand in de hitte en niet gevoelig is voor Burkholderia aantasting. Dit gekoppeld aan een sprekende kleur en bloemen met een dikke textuur. Alle zaailingen met potentie worden op locatie bij de bloemen producenten wereldwijd getest. Snoek Breeding BV verzorgt de opkweek van de nieuwe zaailingen met potentie. De verdere vermeerdering wordt door Stichting Glaco.

Name: HortiCam - Vision Platform
Description:
Smart Cameras for Better Horticulture

At HortiCam.com, we develop advanced cameras tailored for the horticulture industry, providing growers with the data they need to improve crop health and increase yields.

Why Choose HortiCam.com?

    Precision Agriculture: Our cameras use AI and computer vision to detect diseases early, predict yields, and monitor crop health. This helps growers address issues before they become problems, ensuring healthier crops and better harvests.

    Easy to Use: Our cameras are simple to install and operate, integrating seamlessly into your existing setup. Spend less time on setup and more time focusing on your crops.

    Real-Time Monitoring: Get instant access to critical data from your fields or greenhouses. Monitor plant health, soil conditions, and environmental factors in real-time, enabling quick and informed decisions.

    Sustainability: By providing accurate data, HortiCam helps reduce resource waste. Optimize water usage and minimize chemical inputs, leading to more sustainable farming practices.

    Custom Solutions: Every crop and environment is different. Our cameras are adaptable to various horticultural settings, providing relevant and actionable insights for your specific needs.

Our Mission

We aim to support growers by delivering technology that enhances productivity, reduces costs, and promotes sustainable practices. We understand the challenges you face and are committed to providing tools that make a real difference.

Join Us

Discover how HortiCam can help you achieve better results with your crops. Whether you're a small grower or a large agricultural operation, our smart camera solutions are here to help you succeed. Connect with us on LinkedIn to learn more about our products and see how we can support your horticultural goals.

Name: Plukkerz
Description:
Plukkerz is een kleinschalige biologische bloementuin waar wij in samenwerking met de natuur prachtige bloemen telen. Van opkweek tot aan oogst krijgen onze bloemen de grootste zorg en aandacht om uit te groeien tot stevige, gezonde planten. In onze werkwijze is geen plaats voor de schadelijke chemicaliën die gebruikelijk zijn in de bloemenindustrie omdat dit indruist tegen onze waarden. Wij raken de bloemen aan en jij ook. Onze bloemen groeien in de volle grond, genieten natuurlijke bemesting en bieden onderdak aan vele nuttige insecten.

Ferplast, plastik bahçe ve duvar korkulukları ile bir yeniliğe imza atarak, Ferplast Plastik – Ferforje Çit Sistemleri markası altında modüler çitler üretmektedir. Ferplast’ın bu ürünleri, duvar korkuluklarının en büyük sorunu olan boyama ve bakım gereksinimine son vermektedir. Ferplast, bu özelliği sayesinde kamu ve özel sektör tarafından tercih edilmektedir.

Ferplast, TEMA Grup bünyesinde faaliyet göstermektedir. Yaklaşık 30.000 m² kapalı alana sahip modern bir tesisinde üretim yapmaktadır. Ferplast’ın Plastik Ferforje buluşu, yurt içi ve yurt dışı pazarlarında benzersiz bir ürün haline gelmiştir.

Ferplast, yenilikçi ve kaliteli ürünleri ile sektördeki lider konumunu sürdürmektedir. Ferplast’ın ürünleri, müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına yönelik olarak tasarlanmıştır ve yüksek kalite standartlarına uygun olarak üretilmektedir.

Ferplast’ın başarısı, çalışanlarına ve müşterilerine olan bağlılığına dayanmaktadır. Ferplast, müşterilerinin beklentilerini aşmak için sürekli olarak Ar-Ge çalışmalarına yatırım yapmakta ve ürünlerini geliştirmektedir.

Ferplast, sektördeki başarısı ve yenilikçi ürünleri ile öncü bir firma olmaya devam etmektedir. Ferplast’ın müşterilerine sunduğu ürünler, estetik tasarımları, dayanıklılıkları ve kolay montaj özellikleri ile dikkat çekmektedir. Ferplast’ın müşteri odaklı yaklaşımı, firma için en önemli değerlerinden biridir.

Sonuç olarak, Ferplast, yenilikçi ürünleri ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımı ile sektörde lider bir firma konumundadır. Ferplast, müşterilerine estetik ve kaliteli ürünler sunarken, aynı zamanda sektöre öncülük eden yenilikçi ürünleriyle de dikkat çekmektedir.

Name: Bokashi-Pellets Manufaktur
Description:
Unser Pferdemist-Dünger ist das perfekte Produkt für alle, die ihre Pflanzen auf natürliche Weise düngen möchten. Hergestellt nach der Bokashi-Methode, wird der Pferdemist fermentiert und zu einem nährstoffreichen Dünger verarbeitet, der Ihre Pflanzen mit allen notwendigen Mineralien und Spurenelementen versorgt.

Die Bokashi-Methode ist eine bewährte Methode, bei der organische Materialien fermentiert werden, um einen hochwertigen Dünger herzustellen. Der Pferdemist wird mit einer Mischung aus effektiven Mikroorganismen und Urgesteinsmehl behandelt, die den Fermentationsprozess unterstützen und die Nährstoffe im Dünger optimal aufbereiten.

Unser Pferdemist-Dünger ist nicht nur umweltfreundlich, sondern auch sehr effektiv. Er enthält eine Vielzahl von Nährstoffen wie Stickstoff, Phosphor und Kalium, die für das Wachstum und die Entwicklung von Pflanzen unerlässlich sind. Durch seine langsame Freisetzung der Nährstoffe wird eine gleichmäßige Versorgung Ihrer Pflanzen gewährleistet. Zudem speichert er das Wasser im Boden, da die Pellets enorm aufquellen und Feuchtigkeit aufnehmen.

Durch die Verwendung unseres Pferdemist-Düngers können Sie sicher sein, dass Ihre Pflanzen auf natürliche Weise gedüngt werden und keine schädlichen Chemikalien in den Boden gelangen. Das Ergebnis sind gesunde Pflanzen mit einer hohen Widerstandsfähigkeit gegen Schädlinge und Krankheiten.

Probieren Sie unseren Pferdemist-Dünger noch heute aus und überzeugen Sie sich selbst von der Wirksamkeit dieses hochwertigen Produkts!

Name: iCultivate
Description:
iCultivate was born out of a belief that life is often far too complicated and overly materialistic. We believe that there is much to be learnt from such things as Permaculture, organic gardening and self-sufficiency. However, to adhere to the principles that guide each of these requires a significant lifestyle choice.

Much of our philosophy is based around:

"Look after family, friends and community. Want quality, not quantity. Let quality not be measured by a label. Give back to the earth more than you take."

For us this means:

* The maintenance of an organic garden and growing what produce we are able
* Living a life that minimises our impact on the earth that we all depend on - as much as possible, utilise organically produced materials and implement sustainable practices.
* Recycle, re-use and produce our own requirements rather than consume.
* Looking after Body, Mind and Spirit through eating and living more healthily.

It is also our belief that this is something we all need to be in together. So it is our hope, that you will join the iCultivate community and be a part of the sharing of ideas, thoughts, knowledge and understandings that we all can benefit from.

Unser Anspruch: Bäume fachlich korrekt, sicher und mit Respekt behandeln.

Wir arbeiten mit ausgebildeten Fachkräften, übernehmen Verantwortung – und kommunizieren klar. Wir sehen den Baum nicht als „Problem“, sondern als lebendigen Teil unserer Umwelt, den es zu erhalten gilt. Wenn das nicht mehr möglich ist, handeln wir konsequent und transparent.

Unsere Schwerpunkte:

Baumpflege (Jung- & Altbaum)

Baumkontrolle & Gutachten

Spezialfällungen & Risikoarbeiten

Baumschutz bei Bauprojekten

Beratung & Begleitung in anspruchsvollen Situationen

Ausbildung, Mitarbeiterschulung & öffentliche Vorträge

Was uns unterscheidet:

Wir nehmen uns Zeit für eine fundierte Einschätzung – vor Ort, nicht am Telefon.

Wir arbeiten mit Haltung: sauber, lösungsorientiert, vorausschauend.

Wir sind nicht die Günstigsten – aber die Richtigen, wenn Qualität zählt.

Baumpflege ist für uns nicht nur Handwerk, sondern Verantwortung.
Für Menschen, Bäume, Städte und Landschaften.

I am an Expert Consultant in Vegetable Seeds and Crop Production at Summit Views and Insights, with over 40 years of global experience in the vegetable seed and produce industry. I am also a course instructor at the UC Davis Seed Biotechnology Center.

My career is defined by a deep commitment to the vegetable produce industry and sustainable agriculture, driving innovation and growth through strategic planning, futuristic market insights, and product management excellence. 

At BASF Nunhems, I led the largest crop-group business unit, achieving sustainable, profitable growth for over a decade. Notable achievements include developing the go-to-market strategy for SUNIONS, the world's first tearless onion, and implementing the global organic seed strategy.

With key leadership roles at BASF, Bayer CropScience, and Limagrain, my core skills encompass people leadership, strategic and product marketing, and international sales management. I have extensive hands-on experience with all major vegetable crops including tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers, onions, carrots, lettuce, spinach, cabbage, and broccoli, as well as strong experience with other vegetable crops.

I bring a broad boots-on-the-ground experience from key global produce markets, including the USA, Mexico, Canada, Brazil, Chile, the Netherlands, Germany, Spain, Italy, Russia, Ukraine, Turkey, India, China, Japan, and Australia. My expertise spans both greenhouse and open-field production methods, making me well-versed in all aspects of the industry.

Description:
Welcome to TheGrowingLeaf! 

Join us on a horticultural journey of green thumbs and flourishing gardens. We're a vibrant community of plant enthusiasts, from beginners to seasoned gardeners. Our goal is to help you turn your spaces into green wonderlands.

Meet our founder, Alex Picot, a gardening expert with 25+ years of experience. He has written over 1,000 articles covering a wide range of horticultural topics.

Our guides make gardening a joy without the expense. Whether you're tending to your garden or propagating plants, we have you covered.

Join our community, share your gardening stories, ask questions, and connect with fellow enthusiasts. This is your space to learn, grow and flourish! 

Stay tuned for regular tips, how-to guides, and inspirational ideas to fuel your passion.

#TheGrowingLeaf #GardeningCommunity #GreenThumb #WelcomeToOurGarden

Name: Rock Paper Plants
Description:
Rock Paper Plants isn’t a plant brand.

It's a rhythm.

Where we use real plants to hold space for real women ~especially the ones growing through midlife without the need to prove anything.

Around here, we're not about reinvention.

Or redefinition.

We're about timing, truth, and trusting that growth doesn't need to be loud to be real.

Because when we talk about plants, we’re really talking about growth, presence, and being grounded in who we are.

Plants are the metaphor. The BeLEAF Method is the difference.

#RootedInBeLEAF

Name: Undercover Bas
Description:
Als ondernemer in de tuinbouw ken je ze maar al te goed: seizoenspieken. Complete chaos, van oppotten tot aan afleveren.

En elke keer als je de piek weer achter de rug hebt, denk je: ‘Volgende keer pakken we het anders aan.’ Je trekt alles uit de kast om de volgende keer die piek zonder stress te doorstaan. Extra personeel, nieuwe machines - kosten noch moeite bespaard. Maar bij de nieuwe piek? Chaos als vanouds. 

En dat is eigenlijk ook niet zo gek. Want je kunt wel een blik personeel opentrekken, maar weet dat personeel ook wat ze moeten doen? En maken die nieuwe systemen je processen écht efficiënter? 

Pas als je weet waar het precies knelt, kun je die knelpunten gericht en stevig aanpakken. Maar hoe kom je er op kantoor achter waar het op de werkvloer pijn doet? 

Daar heb je mij voor: Undercover Bas. Als undercover boss draai ik een maand lang op volle toeren mee bij jou op de werkvloer. Niet als consultant in een maatpak, maar gewoon op mijn knieën in de kap. 

Met mijn analytische blik leer ik mensen en processen snel en haarfijn kennen. Ik verzet flink wat werk en binnen een maand zie ik precies wat er moet gebeuren én waar het knelt. Waar de mensen op de verkeerde plekken staan, of waar processen beter kunnen. 

Daardoor komt er rust op de werkvloer, gaat de kwaliteit omhoog en krijgen zowel klanten als je medewerkers een glimlach van oor tot oor. Niet alleen omdat ik mijn mouwen
opstroop, maar omdat we een stevig plan van aanpak maken. Ik zorg ervoor dat processen efficiënter worden en de juiste mensen op de juiste plek staan. 

Zo blijft de kwaliteit constant en kun jij straks in alle rust de pieken afvangen. 

Zonder chaos, zonder stress. Eerder ga ik niet naar huis.

Wil je weten waar jouw blinde vlekken zitten? Welke processen beter kunnen, en hoe jij vol zelfvertrouwen die volgende piek tegemoet gaat? 

Bel of mail mij. 

info@undercover-bas.nl
+31 (0) 6 52 88 23 85

Voor je het weet loop ik bij jou rond als Undercover Bas.

Name: Pflasterlux GmbH
Description:
Pflasterlux ist dein Experte für die nachhaltige Reinigung und Pflege von Außenbereichen wie Pflastersteinen, Fassaden, Dächern und Photovoltaikanlagen. Unser dynamisches Team setzt auf umweltfreundliche Methoden und modernste Technik, um deine Flächen gründlich zu reinigen und langfristig zu schützen – ganz ohne Chemikalien.

Mit Heißwasser und einem Arbeitsdruck von bis zu 500 bar entfernen wir hartnäckigen Schmutz, Algen und Moos, ohne die Oberflächen zu schädigen. Unsere nachhaltigen Materialien sorgen dafür, dass sowohl deine Flächen als auch die Umwelt profitieren.

Anstatt Steinflächen neu zu verlegen, bieten wir eine kostengünstige und umweltschonende Sanierung, die deine Pflasterflächen aufwertet. Mit unserer Kunstharzbeschichtung in fünf verschiedenen Farben kannst du deine Stein- und Dachflächen sogar optisch veredeln und ihnen einen individuellen Look verleihen.

Unser SurfaceCare Programm geht noch weiter: Es hält deinen Außenbereich sauber und umfasst wichtige Gartenarbeiten wie Rasenpflege und Heckenschnitt. Im praktischen Abo kümmern wir uns regelmäßig darum, dass deine Außenanlagen stets in einem gepflegten Zustand sind. Damit decken wir viele klassische Hausmeister-Tätigkeiten ab und entlasten dich in der Wartung deines Grundstücks.

Zusätzlich bieten wir Fugensanierung mit unkrauthemmenden Materialien, sodass deine Pflasterflächen nicht nur sauber, sondern auch langfristig unkrautfrei bleiben.

Mit Pflasterlux sorgst du für saubere, gepflegte und sogar veredelte Außenflächen – effizient, nachhaltig und professionell!

Name: Reelenz
Description:
REELENZ is a unique plant layering and support system, developed and made in New Zealand.   It is a two-part system consisting of a long lasting hanger and replaceable reel pre-wound with twine.  It was designed by a grower for growers.

The main benefits are that it is easy and fast to use for economical stringing in hothouses

1.	Easy 
•	Pre-wound lengths of twine are easy to unwind using the weight of the plant to do the work for you
•	Reels rotate to release just enough twine and then self-locks
•	Reels are easy to remove from the hangers so that twine can be replaced at any point in the season


2.	 Fast 
•	Only one hand is needed for layering
•	The special design allows for quick removal and refitting to the crop wire
•	No need to lift each plant during the layering process


3.	Economical  
•	Reelenz is a two piece unit.  The hanger is made from nylon to ensure a long life so that it can be used over multiple seasons.
•	The reel with pre-wound twine can be replaced at any time throughout the season so that no twine goes to waste.
•	Twine is UV stabilised to last 12 months

The hanger is made from long lasting plastic so that it can be used over multiple seasons without needing to be replaced.  The reel insert with twine can be replaced at any point in the season, ensuring that every bit of twine is used, and nothing goes to waste.

Replacement reels are available separately and come pre-wound with 25m of polypropylene twine. The twine is UV stabilised for a 12 month period.  

We are working on an eco-option, so watch this space!

REELENZ is suitable for growers of hothouse crops such as tomatoes, cucumbers, capsicum and flowers.

Cucumber,

Name: Garden Arts
Description:
Firma Garden Arts specjalizuje się w kompleksowym projektowaniu, wykonaniu i pielęgnacji przydomowych ogrodów. Nasz doświadczony zespół potrafi stworzyć wyjątkowe miejsce, które podkreśli indywidualny charakter przestrzeni i idealnie wpasuje się w potrzeby każdego z domowników. Niezależnie od tego, czy jest to mały ogród czy kompleksowa przestrzeń zieleni, jesteśmy gotowi podjąć się każdego wyzwania.

Jesteśmy dumni z tego, co wyróżnia nas spośród konkurencji - skupienia na jakości i dbałości o szczegóły. Nasze usługi są gwarancją solidności, estetyki i zgodności z najwyższymi standardami sztuki ogrodowej. Zależy nam na tym, aby nasze projekty łączyły harmonię estetyczną z praktycznym wykorzystaniem przestrzeni.

Ważnym aspektem naszej działalności jest także profesjonalna pielęgnacja terenów zieleni. Dzięki naszej trosce i zaangażowaniu, ogrody naszych klientów zachowują swoje piękno na długie lata, stając się źródłem radości i inspiracji.

At Morpheus Garden Care, the focus is on 'soft' landscaping and grounds management, consciously combined with a pinch of permaculture & a dash of drone technology.

'Soft Landscaping' is the living elements of your garden or grounds - the turf, hedges, flowerbeds and features such as wildflower meadows. 

'Grounds management' covers grounds maintenance, gardening, landscape maintenance, even estate management. 

'Permaculture' a method for designing sustainable, human-supporting landscapes that mimic the operation of natural ecosystems.

At Luxe Leaf, we believe in a greener, more compassionate world where every choice we make has a positive impact on our environment and our loved ones, both two-legged and four-legged. Our promise is rooted in our dedication to eco-friendly, vegan and cruelty-free practices, ensuring that every product we offer aligns with our core values of sustainability, responsibility and love for all beings.

We believe that plants have the power to transform spaces and lives. They bring beauty, tranquility and a breath of fresh air into our homes. However, we also recognise that the way we source and produce these plants matters just as much as the end result. Our commitment is to provide products that are not only esthetically pleasing but also ethically sourced and produced.

Our objectives within the plant industry are ambitious yet grounded in our passion for making a meaningful difference.

1. Educating and Empowering Customers: We aim to educate our customers about benefits f eco-friendly and pet-safe plants. Through informative content and guidance, we empower you to ake thoughtful purchasing decisions that align with your values and protect your home environment.

2. Building a Community: We strive to build a community of like-minded individuals who share our vision for a greener, kinder world. Through our products, customer service and outreach efforts, we foster connections and inspire collective action towards a more sustainable future.

At Luxe Leaf, we don't just sell plants: we offer a lifestyle choice that embodies care for the environment, animals and your home. By choosing our products, you are making a statement about what matter to you and joining us in our mission to create a better world.

Thank you for supporting Luxe Leaf Plants. Together, we can cultivate a brighter, more sustainable future - one plant at a time.

Name: Merkelbach Boomkwekerij
Description:
Onze kwekerij is gespecialiseerd in meerstammige bomen en sierheesters met bijzondere sierwaarde, zoals bloemen, een bijzondere bast, een unieke bladvorm en -kleur. Op onze percelen kweken wij in de vollegrond een breed assortiment planten. Deze worden vanaf de maat 100-125 cm tot aan 275-300 cm verkocht. Daarnaast hebben wij een pottenveld waar we een deel van ons assortiment in een groter formaat in Air-Pot kweken. Ons plantgoed is zeer geschikt voor de doorkweek bij andere kwekers en als uitgangsmateriaal bij architecten en hoveniers. Ook leveren wij aan particulieren.
Wij kweken een groot deel van ons assortiment zelf door middel van enten en stekken. Vooral Magnolia’s, Cornussen, Cercis en Amelanchier vindt u terug in ons assortiment. Er zitten altijd verrassende, unieke soorten tussen die je niet overal vindt. 

Naast kwaliteit kijken wij nadrukkelijk naar de toekomst. Wij werken stap voor stap toe naar een volledig biologische teelt met aandacht voor bodemleven, plantgezondheid en een duurzame wereld voor deze en volgende generaties. Niet omdat het een trend is, maar omdat wij geloven dat dit de juiste weg is.

Description:

Weston Miller, Owner and Consultant
I started Cascadia Garden & Landscape Consulting to help YOU care for your soil, plants, and outdoor property areas. I'm here to help you achieve your goals for your garden and landscape.

Garden & Landscape Consulting
Do You Have Questions About Your Garden Or Landscape
I provide practical, science-based solutions to help you care for your soil, plants, and outdoor property areas.

My consulting services will help you to:

Analyze the sun, soil, water, and infrastructure of your site and how these factors impact your plants.

Choose the right plants for your site and provide them with the right care.

Improve the habitat of your site with Pacific Northwest native plants and other herbs and flowers that attract pollinators and wildlife.

Identify weeds and diagnose plant problems and vertebrate damage. Understand the pros and cons of the management options including do-nothing, non-chemical methods, and chemical methods.

Apply permaculture design methods to your site. Get a realistic assessment of its opportunities, challenges, and hazards. Create a plan to adapt your site for climate change.

Get referrals for trustworthy professionals for tree care, garden/landscape design, pest management, and more.



See my Consulting Focus to learn more about how I can help you. Check out my Testimonials to see how I've helped clients and colleagues.

Service Area
Online

For online consultations, my service area is the Cascadia region extending from Northern California to Southern British Columbia.



At Your Site

For in-person consulting and coaching, my service area is the greater Portland, Oregon metro region. Travel time and mileage is included in-person consulting and coaching services for sites 35 miles from SW Portland. I'll travel further if you cover travel time and mileage.

Ogrodniak
Description:
Swój wyśniony ogród już dziś zaplanować możesz dzięki doświadczeniu firmy Ogrodniak!

Mieszkanie w domku to bez cienia wątpliwości znacznie większa dawka obowiązków i należy wziąć to pod uwagę. Musimy być przygotowani na dbanie nie wyłącznie o środek naszego jednorodzinnego domu, lecz także pozostałą część terenu. Duża liczba osób marzy o tym, aby stworzyć cudownie wyglądający ogródek po zamieszkaniu w domku. Projektowanie na własną rękę i utworzenie  ogródka nie jest proste i w tym miejscu należy mieć to na uwadze. Trzeba mieć na uwadze, iż uszykowanie projektu ogrodowej powierzchni będą mogły zająć dużą ilość godzin. Z całą pewnością niezwykle trudno będzie połączyć to z zawodowymi obowiązkami. Może z tej przyczyny rozsądnie zastanowić się nad skorzystaniem z pomocy firmy, która trudni się projektowaniem powierzchni ogrodowych od lat. Warto bez wątpienia przeglądnąć stronę internetową www.ogrodniak.pl, a więc firmy trudniącej się projektowaniem ogródkowych powierzchni od bardzo dawna.

Name: Graham Hull
Description:
Wool Pots are an environmentally friendly alternative to plastic plant pots. 
Wool Pots are manufactured using British wool that might otherwise not find a home. Some of the benefits of using Wool Pots are:-
•	Natural slug and snail barrier
•	Air pruning creates stronger roots and less root disturbance
•	Wool insulates and retains water so they use between 20-30% less water
•	Strong and flexible easy to use
•	Once planted in soil they degrade and all nutrients in the wool feeds the plants
•	A truly zero waste natural plant pot 

We have created a product which helps farmers, helps reduce the “mountain” of unwanted wool, protects plants and helps save the planet – not bad for a plant pot!
The problem we are trying to solve…500 million plastic plant pots are sent to landfill in the UK every year, a similar number are incinerated. It takes 450 years for a plastic pot to degrade into micro plastics.
We use British Wool and are members of the Campaign for Wool.

Name: Urban Gaia Gardening Services
Description:
I'm Missy Greenleaf Flinn. I’m a gardener based in Columbus, OH. I have deep roots in both the soil and the spirit of the land. As a Franklin County Master Gardener Volunteer, I have received intensive horticultural training and work in gardens across Central Ohio, including tending the Heritage Garden at the Ohio Governor’s Residence. I specialize in native plants and love helping others discover native alternatives to conventional nursery choices—solutions that honor biodiversity, sustainability, and the character of place.

My approach to gardening is shaped by my studies in eco-theology at the Methodist Theological School in Ohio, where I earned a Master of Divinity degree. I believe every landscape has its own spirit, and that gardening can be a way to listen, respond, and participate in that sacred dialogue.

At Urban Gaia, I bring a holistic perspective rooted in hands-on experience, ecological awareness, and spiritual reflection. I love getting my hands in the dirt, planting and tending, and even find joy in the slow, meditative work of weeding and pruning. I’ve found healing and connection through gardens—at my home, Oak House, and in both public and private green spaces—and I’m passionate about helping others experience that same sense of peace and possibility.

You can also find my reflections on gardening and spirituality on my Substack, Highways & Hedges.

I want to help you in your garden.

Name: FM 2020 Limited
Description:
About FM 2020 Limited:

Introducing FM 2020 Ltd, a forward-thinking and innovative kiwifruit orchard management company that specialises in the management, contracting, leasing, and partnership service of kiwifruit orchards. FM 2020 Ltd is spearheaded by a team of experienced horticulturalists with a deep passion for kiwifruit and a commitment to sustainable farming practices.

At FM 2020 Ltd, we believe in an integrated approach to orchard management. We pride ourselves on paying close attention to the finer details that can make all the difference in ensuring healthy and productive orchards. From pruning, summer pruning, picking, spraying, irrigation, and management, our comprehensive approach to orchard care ensures our clients' crops are healthy, productive, and profitable. Whether you are an experienced grower or a new player in the market, our team of experts is dedicated to ensuring your orchard is a success.

In addition to our orchard management services, our leasing, partnership, and contracting services are designed to provide flexible solutions for kiwifruit growers. Our leasing agreements provide a turnkey solution for orchard management, allowing us to handle all aspects of the growing process. Additionally, our partnership services enable growers to work closely with us to tailor a customized plan that suits their specific needs. In addition, our contracting services allowed us to access a pool of skilled and experienced labour force that is trained in safe and efficient orchard practices, ensuring that your orchard runs smoothly and efficiently. At FM 2020 Ltd, we understand that every orchard is different, and our contracting services aim to maximize each orchard's unique potential. 

So, whether you're a seasoned kiwifruit grower looking to optimize your orchard's performance, or a new entrant to the industry seeking a reliable partner to help you get started, FM 2020 Ltd is your trustworthy solution. Don't hesitate to get in touch with us today.

Name: Bear Creek Genetics
Description:
Rooted in Legacy. Bred with Purpose.

Bear Creek Genetics was born out of a deep respect for the plant and the culture that raised us. What started in the early 2000s during the medical era has grown into a quiet pursuit: preserving legendary genetics and breeding small-batch seeds with intention.

We’re not chasing trends or pumping out hype drops. We work with proven cuts, time-tested lineages, and a focus on stability, flavor, and history.

This work isn’t for everyone—and that’s okay. Bear Creek is for growers who care about where their seeds come from, and where they’re going.

Interested in running our gear? DM us to join The Inner Canopy, Bear Creek's seed tester program.

Name: Sklep ogrodniczy Maciejka https://e-maciejka.pl/
Description:
Sklep ogrodniczy e-Maciejka to doskonałe miejsce dla miłośników ogrodnictwa. Oferujemy szeroki wybór wysokiej jakości nasion, roślin ozdobnych, nawozów, narzędzi ogrodniczych i dodatków, by stworzyć wymarzony ogród.

Nasze nasiona to gwarancja udanych zbiorów. Oferujemy różnorodność odmian warzyw, kwiatów i ziół, dostosowanych do różnych warunków klimatycznych. Bez względu na poziom doświadczenia, u nas znajdziesz idealne nasiona.

W ofercie posiadamy rośliny ozdobne, od klasycznych róż po nowoczesne odmiany bylin i krzewów. Dbamy o to, aby były zdrowe i dobrze ukorzenione, gwarantując ich pomyślny rozwój po zasadzeniu.

Nasze nawozy to klucz do bujnego wzrostu i pięknych kwiatów. Oferujemy zarówno nawozy ogólne, jak i specjalistyczne, dostosowane do potrzeb konkretnych roślin.

W dziale narzędzi ogrodniczych znajdziesz wszystko, co niezbędne do pielęgnacji ogrodu. Kosiarki, nożyce, grabie, a także profesjonalne narzędzia do przycinania i pielęgnacji drzew – mamy sprzęt dla każdego ogrodnika.

Dodatki ogrodowe dostępne w naszym sklepie pozwolą ci nadać osobisty charakter twojemu ogrodowi. Lampiony, donice, ławki ogrodowe – wszystko, co sprawi, że przestrzeń wokół domu stanie się miejscem, w którym chętnie spędzasz czas.

Sklep ogrodniczy www.e-Maciejka.pl to nie tylko miejsce zakupów, to także centrum wiedzy ogrodniczej. Nasi eksperci chętnie udzielą porad dotyczących pielęgnacji roślin, doboru nawozów czy narzędzi. Razem z nami stworzysz wymarzony ogród, pełen życia i naturalnej harmonii. Zapraszamy do Sklep ogrodniczy Maciejka Twojego partnera w ogrodniczych pasjach! W sprzedaży nasiona traw Barenbrug, nawozy Emeralld, nawozy Fructus oraz Florovit. Dodatkowo środki ochrony roślin. Sklep ogrodniczy Łódź

Name: Rasadnik Prunus d.o.o.
Description:
Dobrodošli u Rasadnik Biljaka "Prunus"!

Od osnivanja 1997. godine, Prunus se posvećuje pružanju vrhunskih biljaka i izuzetne usluge našim kupcima već više od dva desetljeća. Kao vodeći rasadnik biljaka, specijalizirani smo za uzgoj raznovrsnog izbora drveća, žbunja, cvijeća i više, koji odgovaraju kako kućnim tako i komercijalnim potrebama uređenja okoliša.

U Prunusu se ponosimo našom posvećenošću ekološkoj održivosti i odgovornim hortikulturnim praksama. Naš tim iskusnih profesionalaca osigurava da svaka biljka koju uzgajamo bude njegovana s pažnjom, rezultirajući zdravim i živopisnim primjercima koji uspijevaju u različitim okruženjima.

Bilo da ste vlasnik kuće koji želi unaprijediti svoj vrt ili pejzažni arhitekt koji traži premium biljke za projekt, Prunus je tu da zadovolji vaše potrebe. Nudimo širok raspon vrsta, od autohtonih biljaka do egzotičnih sorti, pažljivo odabranih kako bi zadovoljili različite preferencije naših kupaca.

Osim naše široke ponude biljaka, Prunus pruža personalizovanu podršku i stručne savjete kako bi podržali naše kupce tokom njihovog vrtlarskog putovanja. Naša obučena ekipa je uvijek spremna da pomogne pri odabiru biljaka, savjetima o njezi i rješenjima za uređenje okoliša, osiguravajući besprijekorno i zadovoljavajuće iskustvo za svakog kupca.

Pridružite nam se u našoj misiji uljepšavanja prostora i poticanja dubljeg povezivanja s prirodom kroz moć biljaka. Povežite se s Rasadnikom Biljaka "Prunus" na LinkedInu kako biste bili informisani o našoj najnovijoj ponudi, savjetima o vrtlarenju i uvidima u industriju. Rastimo zajedno!

Description:
The Local Flower Collective was established in 2018 to further the development of Ontario flower growers and promote environmentally conscious design practices. The Collective is run by a thriving community of local growers and florists that are passionate about celebrating the entire stage of a flower's life – seed to vase!

Together, many thoughtful hands formed this group as a space where seasonality and Ontario’s unique bounty could be at the forefront of floral design. Our goal is to provide more support to local growers while putting the most unusual flower varieties into the hands of designers. The more beauty bursting out into the streets the better!

Located in Toronto’s Junction neighbourhood, The Collective is a hub of activity from May through October as the fields are in full flush during those months. It’s a space where: growers drop off their weekly harvests for florist pickups; a communal design studio available for rent by The Collective members; and a prop rental atelier for weddings, workshops and events.

Nossa proposta é simplificar a rotina alimentar, proporcionando porções com combinações nutritivas, que são preparadas com cuidado e embaladas de forma conveniente. Com ingredientes selecionados e frescos, garantimos que cada porção seja uma explosão de sabores e nutrientes essenciais para o seu bem-estar.

Atendemos pessoas que se preocupam em cuidar da sua saúde e buscam praticidade sem abrir mão da qualidade. Sabemos que a correria do dia a dia não pode ser uma barreira para uma alimentação equilibrada, por isso, oferecemos opções que se encaixam perfeitamente em sua rotina.

Além disso, nos orgulhamos de apoiar ativamente aqueles que se dedicam ao esporte e ao cuidado com o corpo. Entendemos a importância da nutrição adequada para o desempenho esportivo e estamos comprometidos em ajudar você a alcançar seus objetivos nessa área.

No Picadinhos do João, acreditamos que alimentar-se bem não precisa ser complicado. Nossa missão é facilitar a sua jornada em direção a uma vida mais saudável, proporcionando refeições práticas, deliciosas e repletas de nutrientes. Descubra o prazer de uma alimentação saudável, sem abrir mão da praticidade, com o Picadinhos do João."

Name: Gam Growth Investments Ltd.
Description:
Agriculture is a major sector of The Gambia's economy, employing over 80% of the labor force and accounting for approximately 30% of the country's GDP. The main crops grown in The Gambia include peanuts, millet, sorghum, rice, and vegetables. The country also has a significant fishing industry. However, The Gambia remains heavily dependent on imports to meet its food needs and is vulnerable to fluctuations in global food prices.
The Gambia is heavily dependent on imports to meet its food needs due to a combination of factors. One major factor is the country's limited arable land and water resources. Despite being one of the smallest countries in Africa, much of The Gambia's land is not suitable for farming due to poor soil quality, low rainfall, and lack of irrigation infrastructure. This limits the amount of food that can be produced domestically. Additionally, the country's population is rapidly growing, which places further pressure on the limited food production capabilities.

Die IntergrA Lahr wurde 2010 als gemeinnützige Unternehmensgesellschaft zur Durchführung von Integrationsprojekten gegründet. Wir haben zwischenzeitlich 4 dauerhafte Arbeitsplätze für Menschen geschaffen, die infolge ihres körperlichen, geistigen oder seelischen Zustands auf die Hilfe anderer angewiesen sind. Zusätzlich sind immer wieder Praktikanten von Schulen oder anderen Einrichtungen bei uns tätig. Die IntegrA Lahr beschäftigt somit über 50% schwerbehinderte Mitarbeiter, deren Teilhabe an einer sonstigen Beschäftigung auf dem ersten Arbeitsmarkt auf besondere Schwierigkeiten stößt.

Wichtig ist uns die Zusammenarbeit und gemeinsame Beschäftigung von Menschen mit und ohne Behinderung. Daher arbeiten die Menschen mit Behinderung jeweils im Team mit einem ausgebildeteten Gärtner/Gärtnermeister, dadurch können wir qualitativ hochwertige Arbeit anbieten und abliefern.

Alle unsere Mitarbeiter mit Behinderung sind sozialversichert, erhalten den Mindestlohn und haben volle Arbeitnehmerrechte.

Integrationsprojekte und Integrationsunternehmen verstehen sich nicht als "Sonderbetriebe", sondern arbeiten wie andere Wirtschaftsunternehmen markt- und wettbewerbsorientiert als Betriebe des allgemeinen Arbeitsmarktes.

Daher freuen wir uns auf Ihre Rückmeldungen und Ihre Aufträge. Gerne stehen wir Ihnen für weitere Informationen zur Verfügung.

No additives. No blending. Real floral flavors, ethically harvested and eco-packaged. 

Why we exist (mission)
To protect and grow pollinator populations, improve crop yields through responsible pollination services, and deliver transparent, artisanal honey that connects people back to healthy ecosystems and honest farming.

What we do (services & offerings)
Premium single-origin & forest honeys — small-batch, raw, minimally processed.

Commercial pollination services — rental of healthy hives for orchards, vegetable farms and seed producers.

Beekeeping consultation & training — for farmers and enthusiasts (setup, hive health, integrated pest management).

Bulk supply for F&B brands and sustainable retailers; curated corporate gifting with eco-packaging.

Community & conservation programs — habitat restoration, farmer partnerships, and education drives.

Values & differentiators
Full traceability & lab-tested purity.

No adulteration, no heat-treatment that kills natural enzymes.

Bee-first practices that focus on hive health and biodiversity.

Eco-friendly packaging & minimal waste.

Direct trade with growers; fair pricing to farmers and beekeepers.

Name: The Coco Farms B.V.
Description:
The Coco Farms: Nurturing Sustainable Growth with Nature's Best 
At The Coco Farms, we are driven by a singular mission: to promote healthy, circular living by supplying the purest, most sustainable growing media straight from nature. We specialize in providing premium, 100% natural and chemical-free coconut peat (coir), ethically and sustainably sourced directly from our lush green farms.

We recognized the critical need for superior, eco-friendly alternatives in agriculture and horticulture. Our coconut peat is a testament to this vision—a high-performance, versatile substrate that is naturally aerated, highly absorbent, and free from pathogens and weed seeds. It’s a product that is better for consumers, better for plants, and fundamentally better for the planet.

Our commitment to sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. We manage our supply chain to ensure every batch of coir meets stringent quality standards while supporting regenerative farming practices. By transforming a natural byproduct (coconut husk) into a valuable, reusable resource, we actively contribute to a closed-loop system and minimize environmental impact.

Our Core Applications & Sector Impact
Our pure coconut peat is engineered for performance across multiple essential sectors:

Hydroponic Farming & Greenhouses: Our coir ensures superior water retention and is naturally aerated, allowing roots to "breathe." This creates the perfect, pathogen-free environment for young, sensitive plants and efficient, modern hydroponic systems.

Landscaping & Gardening: As a premium soil conditioner, our product locks in soil moisture to significantly reduce irrigation needs. It also helps control weed growth and soil erosion, slowly degrading to enrich the soil over time.

Animal Bedding: We provide a superior, dust-free and naturally anti-fungal bedding solution. Its highly absorbent nature efficiently soaks up moisture and odors, ensuring maximum comfort and hygiene for livestock and pets.
