Name: Weifang Mingchen Sunshade Technology Co., Ltd.
Description: Weifang Mingchen Sunshade Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise integrating the research and development, production, sales, import and export of new polymer functional sunshade materials. We have established ourselves as the gold standard for quality in the industry with 16 internationally recognized certifications. We are the first to obtain dual certifications for the ISO 9001:2015 quality management system and ISO 14001 environmental management system. In terms of functionality, our fabrics meet the EN 13561 European sunshade safety standard, BS 476 Class 0 fire protection certification, and China's GB 8624 Class A flame retardant certification. They also achieve UPF 50+ long-lasting UV protection as tested by ASTM D7869. We are committed to green manufacturing, hold GRS Global Recycled Standard certification (for recycled polyester series), and continuously promote a carbon-neutral production system. Leveraging our 50,000-square-meter intelligent production facility and KARL MAYER precision equipment, we have established an industry-unique, fully integrated, closed-loop quality control system encompassing R&D, production, and testing. Our Class 100,000 cleanroom ensures a robust weaving environment, while our quality control lab conducts over 300 batches of spot checks daily, each accompanied by authoritative SGS/BV/TÜV test reports. Our R&D center produces over 20 patented functional fabrics annually. We not only provide certified fabrics that meet the standards of multiple countries, but also customize specialized export certification solutions, ensuring that every square meter of fabric carries a visible level of trust.

Name: Treescape Professional Tree Services
Description:
Welcome to Treescape Professional Tree Services!

We’ve been delivering comprehensive tree management solutions for homeowners, business and local government throughout Melbourne and surrounds since 1984. As your trusted partners in tree care, our mission is simple: we’re here to help you create a greener, healthier and more beautiful environment for all to enjoy.

We offer:

Tree Pruning
Our team of qualified, experienced arborists prune trees to Australian Standards (AS 4373 – Pruning of Amenity Trees), taking care to abide by local regulations and requirements. 

We have the skills and knowledge to undertake formative pruning, weight reduction, installation of non injurious cabling, removal of dead wood or full canopy reduction on a range of tree species. 

Tree Removal
If a tree must be removed entirely, our team has the skill, equipment and expertise to remove trees and stumps with minimal disruption and maximum safety.

Advice and Preservation
We offer advice and detailed reports on tree conditions, hazards and preservation techniques so you can make informed decisions about tree health.

Tree Selection
We take the guesswork out of tree selection, ensuring the trees we plant require minimal maintenance and fulfill their intended purpose.

Elm Leaf Beetle control
We specialise in treating Elm trees for the eradication of Elm Leaf Beetle to protect the vitality of your Elm trees. Our treatments focus on preventing defoliation and promoting long-term tree health.

Stump Removal
Stump removal frees up valuable outdoor space which can increase the value of your property. Stumps are not only unsightly, they can also become a liability if they cause damage to underground services or begin to sprout shoots and regrow.

Mulch Sales
Our organic mulch not only helps retain moisture, it’s also a natural weed suppressant. Spread it at the right depth, and your soil will thank you with vibrant, healthy trees.

Need help with something not listed here? Just give us a call.

Name: San Diego County Orchid Society
Description:
The San Diego County Orchid Society (SDCOS) is a 450+ member not for profit whose mission is: 
To promote interest in orchids and their cultivation, to educate by exchanging information and experiences related to successful orchid culture, and to support the conservation of orchids in the wild.

SDCOS is based in Balboa Park, San Diego.  Meetings open to the public on the 1st Tuesday of every month at 6:30 PM, except December.
At the monthly meetings, 2 orchid speakers present talks, refreshments are served, and there is a plant show and tell for orchids that people brought in. 

SDCOS hosts quarterly orchid shows in Balboa Park, Casa del Prado room 101.  These shows are held on the last full weekend in July, October, and January, as well as a rotating weekend every April. Visit SDOrchids.com for more details.

Since the Orchid Conservation Program was started in the 1990s, SDCOS has raised and distributed more than $300,000 in grants for orchid conservation.

Name: Fertile Ground Design
Description:
Planning Your Garden Design: Why Winter is the Perfect Time to Start

As the winter frost settles across UK gardens, many might think this is a dormant period for garden design. However, professional garden designers know that winter is actually the ideal time to begin planning your garden transformation. Here's why the colder months present the perfect opportunity to start your garden design journey.

Winter Planning, Spring Success

The bare bones of your garden are most visible during winter. Without the distraction of summer foliage, it's easier to see the underlying structure of your space. This clarity allows designers to better assess essential elements like sight lines, spatial relationships, and architectural features. The stripped-back winter landscape reveals opportunities and challenges that might be hidden during lusher seasons.

Understanding Your Space

Winter gardens show us crucial factors that affect design decisions:
Sun patterns and shadow areas are more apparent
Drainage issues become evident during winter rains
Structural elements and their condition are clearly visible
Privacy concerns are highlighted when deciduous plants lose their leaves

The Timing Advantage

Starting your garden design project in winter offers several practical benefits. Most importantly, it provides ample time for:
Detailed design development
Planning permission applications if required
Contractor scheduling for spring implementation
Plant sourcing and availability checking
Budget planning and material selection

Looking Ahead

While winter might seem like a dreary time to think about gardens, it's actually when many of the UK's most successful garden projects begin. Professional garden designers use this period to meticulously plan every detail, ensuring that when spring arrives, your garden transformation can proceed smoothly and efficiently.

Name: Maharana Pratap Horticultural University, Karnal
Description:
Maharana Pratap Horticultural University, Karnal (MHU Karnal) is Haryana’s first horticultural university, established in 2016 under Haryana Act No. 32 of 2016 with the approval of the Hon’ble Governor of Haryana. The university is located at Village Anjanthali, Tehsil Nilokheri, District Karnal, along the GT Road corridor.

Dedicated to excellence in horticultural education, research, and extension, MHU Karnal offers Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and Doctoral programmes in horticulture, agriculture, forestry, biotechnology, food technology, and allied sciences.

With state-of-the-art laboratories, experimental farms, and strong farmer–industry linkages, the university focuses on innovation, sustainability, skill development, and entrepreneurship. MHU Karnal aims to emerge as a Centre of Excellence contributing to agricultural growth, food security, and rural prosperity in Haryana and the nation.

We, Sujji Foods, are popularly known for cultivating milky mushrooms for more than 25 years. This variety of mushroom is well known as 𝘊𝘢𝘭𝘰𝘤𝘺𝘣𝘦 𝘪𝘯𝘥𝘪𝘤𝘢 & APK2. Subramaniyan N, proprietor of Sujji Foods, is well-known for establishing the first ever successful commercial trial plant of milky mushroom at Erode, Tamil Nadu. This variety of mushroom contains medicinal value compared to others. Both fresh and dry mushrooms are available here and are supplied in pre-booking.

Currently, we have been serving our customers with fresh, high-quality milky mushrooms through retail companies like Lulu Hypermarket, Swiggy Instamart, Zepto among others across Coimbatore, Bengaluru, Trivandrum, Palakkad, Kochi, and more.

Features of milky mushrooms:
- Excellent shelf life (2-3 days at 25-30°C and 10-15 days at 4°C)
- High fibre content
- High temperature species

In September 2008, the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) awarded us for the cultivation of milky mushroom at the best level.

We welcome you to stay connected with us for business and get the latest updates.

Name: Growing for Change CIC
Description:
We are Growing for Change CIC, an Organic Market Garden based at Moelyci Farm, just outside Bangor.  We offer ‘horticultural/green therapy’ via volunteering opportunities to anyone in recovery from substance misuse and/or mental ill health.

Our name reflects three things we care passionately about & want to change:

We want to change the local food economy so that nutritious, organic produce is grown & available locally, at affordable prices.

We want change in our lives. This project is open to anyone who has experienced substance misuse & wants meaningful change.  We believe change is encouraged through support, mutual aid, teamwork and fun!

We want to change the stigma surrounding people who have experienced long term substance misuse.  We do this by running a successful business and contributing to our local community.

The benefits of being outside, in nature and growing are well documented & present an opportunity for meaningful change in our lives.  Additionally, the opportunity to learn new skills & meet like-minded people builds confidence and fosters a sense of achievement and purpose.

Follow us on social media or contact us:

Instagram: @Growing_for_change
Facebook: @GrowingForChangeMaesG

This recognition signifies that we are conducting our business using strategies aimed at improving employee wellness and productivity, energy savings, water efficiency, resource stewardship and reducing CO2 emissions. Name: Stadt.Land.Grün GmbH
Description:
Machen, lachen, durchatmen – so läuft’s bei uns.

Wir sind ein nachhaltiges GaLaBau-Unternehmen mit Haltung. Bei uns zählt, was du tust – nicht, wie schnell du rennst. Wir packen an, geben Gas, wenn’s nötig ist, und nehmen bewusst Tempo raus, wenn Durchatmen dran ist.

Humor, Teamgeist und Vertrauen gehören bei uns genauso dazu wie fachliches Können. Fehler sind Lernchancen, Eigeninitiative ist ausdrücklich erwünscht.

Als Tochter des Oldenburgisch-Ostfriesischen Wasserverbandes (OOWV) arbeiten wir nach klaren Prinzipien: naturnaher Landschaftsbau, nachhaltige Pflege und gelebte Biodiversität. Wir schaffen Lebensräume und übernehmen Verantwortung für Natur und Zukunft.

Ein besonderer Fokus liegt auf der Ausbildung. Wir geben Wissen weiter, begleiten Nachwuchskräfte eng und schaffen Perspektiven.

Mit über 100 Kolleg:innen in Brake, Wardenburg und Aurich gestalten wir Landschaft – und ein gutes Miteinander.

Name: Fána Nurseries Ltd
Description:
Fána Nurseries: Your Partner for Premium Irish Trees

Fána Nurseries is a specialist tree nursery providing premium Irish-grown trees to landscapers, architects, contractors, councils, and garden centers across the nation.

As a family-run business, Joe and Peter Ahern, along with our dedicated long-standing team, bring extensive knowledge of nursery management and tree cultivation. This expertise guarantees our clients receive expert advice and personalised service.

Our trees are carefully chosen for streetscapes, public spaces, and private gardens throughout Ireland, supplied primarily through professional trade partners.

Fána Nurseries began on family land in County Cork's fertile Blackwater Valley. Founder Joe Ahern identified a clear market need: Irish-grown trees for Irish landscapes. 

This was built on a simple, core principle: "Only supply what you’d be proud to plant yourself."

From the outset, local landscapers valued our honest grading, hands-on approach and the chance to select stock grown in Irish soil. As demand expanded, so did our nursery, yet we've always maintained our personal touch.

With a new generation of the family now involved, we continue our commitment to Irish-grown quality and reliable service.

Our clients consistently choose us because:

* We save them time and hassle through quick quote responses and dependable, on-time delivery.

* We are dependable, delivering precisely what we promise for every project.

* We are easy to deal with: approachable, responsive and dedicated to assisting our clients.

* We share our knowledge and experience to advise on the optimal choices for any project.

* We are flexible, capable of supplying both large volume orders and smaller, bespoke selections.

At Fána Nurseries, we make the quote process straightforward and responsive. Whether you’re planning ahead or working to a tight deadline, our team is here to provide up-to-date availability, tailored advice and fast turnaround on pricing.

Name: Ksanj
Description:
India's first and largest exotic and rare plants' store.

About us (Director's note):

I founded Abhinav’s Exotica (our offline plant nursery) in 2016 after years of struggling to get my hands on rare and exotic collector’s plants in India. Offline nurseries (as fragmented and unregularized as they are) do not grow and stock them. As for the small but emergent online space, it doesn’t have barely enough genus, species and sub-species as any amply driven plants’ collector would have wanted.

That’s how our journey of developing a robust- growing, nurturing and selling infrastructure started. India being primarily an agriculture – driven economy and us being located at the centre of it (Haryana), we firmly believe that it is about time to re-imagine the horticulture and ornamental plants’ landscape in India. 

Along the way and over the years, we have added propagation and growing facility of more than 500 much sought after plants species’ over multiple genuses. KsanJ is our effort to map our physical nursery’s offerings into the online space.

We aspire to add more and more plants’ species from around the world to our collection and offer them to passionate plants’ lovers nationwide. This journey of realizing our deep love for all things plant and nature will be driven by passion of our community that comes alive through technology based innovations.

Happy Gardening!!

Name: Eden Living Walls
Description:
Eden Living Walls, a local green wall company based in Slough Trading Estate, is deeply committed to Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles. Our core mission is to tackle climate change and promote sustainability through the installation of green walls.

From an environmental standpoint, our living walls play a crucial role in improving air quality by acting as natural air purifiers. By filtering out pollutants and absorbing carbon dioxide, we actively contribute to reducing greenhouse gas emissions and creating healthier, cleaner environments.

We also recognize the social aspect of our work. Our green walls enhance the aesthetic appeal of urban areas, creating vibrant, livable spaces that positively impact the well-being of residents and workers. By bringing nature back into cities, we aim to foster a stronger connection between people and the environment.

Eden Living Walls is dedicated to good governance practices. We operate with transparency and integrity, ensuring that our projects are executed responsibly and sustainably. We prioritize collaboration with local communities, stakeholders, and businesses to create a positive and lasting impact on the areas we serve.

By promoting biodiversity and pollination, we actively contribute to preserving and restoring ecosystems. Our living walls provide habitats for a wide range of plant species, insects, and birds, supporting local biodiversity and contributing to the overall health of the ecosystem.

At Eden Living Walls, our ESG-driven approach guides us in creating a greener, more sustainable future for our communities. Join us on this journey as we transform urban spaces, tackle climate change, and promote a harmonious coexistence between nature and people.

Name: Plants Market Access Council (PMAC)
Description:
The Plants Market Access Council (PMAC) is an incorporated society which helps support exports and enduring market access for New Zealand plant products. PMAC members include horticulture industry organisations, exporter groups, independent verification agencies, the Ministry for Primary Industries (MPI) and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs & Trade (MFAT).   

PMAC members agree strategies, discuss and prioritise market access activities undertaken by MPI and MFAT. PMAC members also provide input into the use of funds and cost recovered from industry, to fund activities and projects that support plant exports and international access. PMAC also acts as a forum for sharing new developments and issues that impact the sector.

Name: El Nativo Growers Inc
Description:
El Nativo Growers specializes in high quality plants from California, Australia and other Mediterranean climates that thrive in the Southern California environment. Our species list consists of unusual, hard to find, and standard stock material. Although California native plants make up a significant portion of our physical inventory, they represent about 30-40% of our overall species list. 
Although the majority of our plant material would be considered water-wise or drought tolerant, we grow a large number of species that do not fit this description. These include a sizable group of water loving plants used in landscape water features including many California native plants that require significant amounts of water to survive (riparian plants, wetland plants, etc). Drought tolerance is a relative term. Among the species that we grow, there is a very large range of drought tolerance from naturalized material (no supplemental water required once established) to fairly regular summer water (1-2 x per week depending on exact site conditions).

We produce material from plugs to 24" box specimens and most sizes in between. We grow groundcovers, shrubs, trees, succulents, perennials, and various grass and grass-like species. We provide contract-growing arrangements for many types of projects.

El Nativo Growers services all facets of the wholesale industry. Our customer base consists of landscape contractors, wholesale nurseries, brokers, consultants, designers, municipalities, retail nurseries, and revegetation firms. Our main offices are located in Azusa, California, approximately 10 miles east of Pasadena. Our regular service area includes all Southern California counties from San Diego to Santa Barbara. We will ship to Northern California and other locations on a per project/order basis. At present, we are unable to ship any material via mail order.

Name: MnM Blumen GmbH
Description:
Welcome to MnM Blumen!

We are your premier destination for wholesale flowers and plants, based in the heart of Cologne, Germany, with an additional office in the Netherlands. Founded on a commitment to quality, speed, and sustainability, MnM Blumen has grown to become a trusted partner for a diverse clientele across Europe.

 Our Product Range

At MnM Blumen, we offer an extensive selection of products that cater to varied tastes and requirements. Our portfolio includes:

Fresh Flowers: Sourced directly from growers, our fresh flowers come in an array of varieties and colors.
Dried Flowers: Ideal for long-lasting arrangements.
Plants: From indoor plants to garden essentials, we have a plant for every setting.
We prioritize quality, ensuring all products are sourced directly from trusted growers. This allows us to offer items that are as fresh as they are beautiful.

 Services You Can Count On

Beyond supplying top-notch products, we offer an array of floral decoration services for life's significant events—be it a wedding, a baby shower, or a corporate event. Our talented team works closely with clients to turn their visions into stunning floral realities.

 Quality and Speed

Two fundamental pillars of our business are quality and speed. We employ stringent stock management strategies to ensure a quick product turnover. Our logistics network is finely tuned to offer reliable, fast deliveries throughout Europe, making us a preferred partner for many businesses.

 Sustainability and Relationships

MnM Blumen is committed to conducting business in an ethically and environmentally responsible manner. We're continuously working to minimize plastic use and make our operations as sustainable as possible. In addition, we place great importance on establishing long-lasting relationships with both our suppliers and customers.

Name: D.A.D
Description:
Dope Ass Dirt, organic living soil amendments, soils, and consulting. We believe that real growth comes from real soil, that's why we've harnessed the heart of nature's pantry to create a premium living soil amendment. Our unique blend of organic matter, and vital minerals, creates a bustling hub of microbial life that offers a one-stop, natural solution for plant nutrition and soil health. Dope Ass Dirt customers aren't just feeding their plants; they're taking them on an extraordinary journey of growth and flavor rooted in the essence of life itself!

Our story begins in the heart of the earth itself, where an intricate tapestry of organic matter, living microorganisms, and vital minerals forms the foundation of all terrestrial life - the living soil. We took inspiration from this naturally occurring wonder and created Dope Ass Dirt, a premium living soil amendment that enriches your garden and takes your plants on a journey of unprecedented growth.

Our secret lies in the bustling hub of microbial life we cultivate in your soil. This not only provides your plants with a comprehensive, balanced diet but also creates a vibrant, sustainable ecosystem within your garden.

When you use Dope Ass Dirt, you're not just feeding your plants; you're embarking on a voyage into the very roots of nature, immersing yourself in the complex cycle of life that governs our planet.

But our journey doesn't stop at your garden's edge. With every handful of Dope Ass Dirt, you're contributing to a broader movement. A movement towards sustainable gardening, healthier plants, and a planet teeming with life.

Join us as we say farewell to artificial nutrients and welcome the power of real growth with Dope Ass Dirt. Become a part of our story today, and let's write the future of gardening together.

Name: Leafy Tiger
Description:
Established in June 2023, Leafy Tiger is your go-to destination for all gardening needs. Our commitment lies in offering exceptional value, top-quality products, and unparalleled customer service, including comprehensive after-sales support. 
We are proud to be a part of the Bells Brothers Nurseries group, a company with over 60 years of history in the horticulture industry.

Bells Gardening, our esteemed parent company, is a fifth-generation farm based in Benington, Lincolnshire. Founded by Bernard Bell in the early '60s, 
Bells Gardening started with just half an acre of glass and has since grown to encompass 34 acres of glass and poly tunnels. Our family-run farm specializes in supplying premium bedding and flowering pot plants, and proudly promotes British-grown plants. With a longstanding reputation for quality, we have become a market leader, providing plants to many supermarkets, DIY stores, and independent retailers across the UK. There’s a high chance you’ve bought something from us without even realizing it!

You can also visit our garden Centre in Benington, near Boston (PE22 0EE), where we offer a wide range of plants at competitive prices.

Leafy Tiger was launched to help us stand out in the busy online world, extending our reach and bringing our exceptional products and services to a broader audience. Whether you are a seasoned gardener or just starting out, Leafy Tiger is here to support you every step of the way.

Name: Paulownia Koretin
Description:
The Paulownia tree can adapt to almost any soil, having a growth rate and a size in just 3-5 years that other tree species would reach in 25 years. It can grow in the first years about 2-3 meters/year.
If it is cut or damaged, it regenerates very quickly.
It adapts very well to the dusty and noxious city environment, and its roots save the soil from landslides.
The commercial value of the wood is comparable to that of walnut, the culture of this tree can be a gold mine for the investor - quality A timber (60%) and residues (30%) can be used as biomass to obtain electrical or thermal energy by gasification.
A hectare with 500 trees collects an approximate volume of 100 tons of CO2/year and produces 75 tons of oxygen, the equivalent of a daily amount of oxygen needed for 205 people.

Name: MbFlores Oficial
Description:
A MbFlores, conhecida também como Morumbi Flores, foi fundada em 1° de maio de 1974 por Jacob Napoleão Brancher e iniciou atendendo os concessionários do Cemitério Gethsêmani. Em 1994, Marcos Brancher, filho do fundador, assume a direção e com os demais sócios dá continuidade à ampliação das atividades oferecendo os serviços de decoração floral e lançando sua primeira loja virtual. Passou a atuar também no segmento de paisagismo e manutenção de áreas verdes. A MbFlores mantém sua sede própria no bairro do Morumbi em São Paulo, no mesmo local desde sua inauguração.

Atualmente, atua nos seguintes segmentos:

MbFlores Empresas - Focada em entregar soluções para garantir que os ambientes corporativos estejam sempre lindos e floridos.

MbFlores Paisagismo - Projetos residenciais e corporativos além de implantação e manutenção de áreas verdes.

MbFlores Arte Floral - E-commerce com diversos arranjos refinados preparados com flores frescas e de qualidade para presentear ou para decorar sua casa ou empresa.

MbFlores Homenagens - E-commerce exclusivo que atende toda a Grande São Paulo através de equipe própria e demais cidades do Brasil através de parceiros comerciais com arranjos e coroas de flores cuidadosamente criados e produzidos para expressar os sentimentos de amor e saudades aos entes queridos que já partiram.

Name: Sakhi Agrotech Pvt Ltd
Description:
At Sakhi Agrotech, we believe that the future of farming lies at the intersection of tradition and technology. Rooted in India’s rich agricultural heritage, we are committed to empowering farmers and agri-entrepreneurs through innovative, sustainable, and technology-driven solutions.

Our work revolves around creating a smarter, greener, and more efficient agricultural ecosystem — from soil to harvest. By blending modern agri-tech tools with on-ground expertise, we aim to enhance productivity, reduce environmental impact, and ensure long-term food security.

With a vision to cultivate growth and nurture the future, Sakhi Agrotech stands as a trusted partner to farmers, distributors, and agri-businesses, driving positive change in the rural economy and beyond.

Together, we’re not just growing crops — we’re growing possibilities.

Name: Van Grasman
Description:
Ontdek Van Grasman - de ultieme kennisbank voor gras en gazon. Wij gaan verder dan alleen basiskennis; we graven dieper om u alles te bieden wat u moet weten over de wereld van gras en gazon. Vergeet het eindeloos zoeken op internet en navigeer direct naar onze uitgebreide, gestructureerde en volledige informatiebron.

In deze tijd van informatie-overvloed begrijpen we hoe overweldigend het kan zijn om de juiste kennis te vinden. Van Grasman is er om u te helpen, door alles wat u moet weten op één plek te verzamelen. We behandelen een breed scala aan onderwerpen, van het gebruik van de juiste grasmaaier tot het bestrijden van gazonziektes. Of u nu wilt weten hoe u gras moet zaaien, bemesten, beluchten of verticuteren, wij hebben alle antwoorden!

Wat ons onderscheidt, is onze toewijding aan de juistheid en relevantie van de informatie. We baseren onze bevindingen op praktijktests en de beste huidige kennis, zodat u er zeker van kunt zijn dat u op onze informatie kunt vertrouwen. Dit stelt u in staat om snel de juiste actie te ondernemen, gebaseerd op betrouwbare informatie.

Met Van Grasman aan uw zijde, bent u nooit meer in het duister over het onderhouden van uw gazon. We zijn hier om u te helpen, van de aanschaf van uw eerste grasmaaier tot jaarlijks terugkerend onderhoud. Stap in de wereld van Van Grasman en geef uw gazon de zorg en aandacht die het verdient. Laat uw gras altijd groener zijn!

Name: AKOFRUITS
Description:
At AKOFRUITS Azerbaijan our core commitment lies in the sustainable cultivation of premium fresh fruits using cutting-edge agricultural methods. We have embraced super-intensive horticulture as the cornerstone of our mission, aiming to redefine how we produce and deliver fruit while respecting the environment.
Our orchards are a testament to our dedication to eco-conscious practices and consistent quality. We prioritize the coexistence of nature and technology in every facet of our operations.
Throughout the cultivation process, we employ advanced techniques such as precision irrigation, data-driven crop management, and smart fertilization to optimize growth, conserve resources, and ensure a steady supply of premium, flavorful fruits.
At AKOFRUITS, we believe that premium quality and sustainability should go hand in hand. Our fruits are harvested at the peak of ripeness, representing a harmonious blend of nature's bounty and modern technology.
Experience the pure essence of freshness, flavor, and environmental responsibility through our range of premium fruits. Join us in embracing the future of horticulture, where innovation works in harmony with nature, and each bite tells a story of quality, responsibility, and delectable taste. 
Welcome to AKOFRUITS, where excellence is bounty of nature.

Name: Nordic Food Forestry
Description:
Our vision at Nordic Food Forestry is to redefine the perception of what green spaces and gardens can be, shifting the focus toward a more meaningful and sustainable use of these areas, which are too often dominated by large, sterile lawns and concrete surfaces. 

Instead, we aim to promote more sustainable and productive gardens that embrace biodiversity and provide us with high-quality food. By using strategies inspired by natural systems, one can create what is known as a food forest. When established with the right principles, a food forest becomes an investment with diverse benefits and requires minimal maintenance.

Name: The Garden Specialist
Description:
The Garden Specialist started in 2006 with the goal of delivering exceptional gardening services, at an affordable price, after witnessing the need for true experts on the Fylde Coast.

By 2008 the business was well established and had the nice surprise of winning the first 'In Bloom' gold medal due to a client secretly entering their garden into the competition.

Every year after, until 2019, gardens were winning gold medals in Lytham in Bloom, Beautiful Blackpool and St Annes in Bloom. 

Some gardens were awarded the 'In Your Neighbourhood' award (highest, level 5) by the RHS judges of North West in Bloom and Britain in Bloom.

It only stopped due to a pause in the competitions due to Covid.

Since Covid the business was scaled back slightly whilst David took time out for reflection and professional development, something that was long overdue after so many years in the industry. 

The enthusiasm he had when he started his career is back. He has increased his knowledge in horticulture along with current industry practices and is excited to be pushing the business forward again.

The business has continued to grow with a wide variety of different clients in both the private and commercial sectors undertaking all aspects of garden/grounds maintenance, soft landscaping projects, specialist lawn treatments, herbicide application projects and pond work.

MADHUVARSHA ENTERPRISES PVT.LTD is a pioneer in distributing quality inputs for Agriculture and horticulture across India. Located in Bangalore - the hub of horticultural and gardening activities - we supply a wide range of innovative products and solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of growers and professionals.
Our product includes premium growing media, advanced inputs such as greenhouse covering plastics, insect-proof nets, seedling trays, grafting clips, right pots, Biplantol, BCC paper rolls, grow bags, and more. We also represent leading global manufacturers of equipment, offering complete seeder lines covering media mixing, tray filling, seeding, covering, watering, and related processes.
In addition, Madhuvarsha Enterprises operates its own production facility for growing media and thermoformed trays, ensuring consistent quality and reliability. We proudly collaborate with companies from the USA, Italy, Holland, Thailand, Germany, and other countries, bringing world-class technologies and materials to India.
Our mission is to bridge the gap between global producers and end-users, delivering cutting-edge products and technologies to farmers, entrepreneurs, research institutes, gardeners, and hobbyists alike.
At VARSHA ENTERPRISES, we are committed to nurturing growth and innovation.

Name: ALTVM
Description:

Located in Edmond, Oklahoma, ALTVM (pronounced AL-TUM) was founded in early 2019 as an R&D cultivation company that focuses on world-class genetics designed for production. Through this R&D process, they have created a very unique genetic library with strains for both flower and hash that you won't find anywhere else!

Since the company's inception, they have planted over 10,000 seeds from some of the best breeders across the country. Using these genetics, they have launched their own breeding program that enables them to create 100+ new crosses each year. These crosses are then hunted through and ran in production rooms to collect performance data of new cultivars.

Altvm currently has 360 operable flower lights with plans to increase that number to 640 flower lights by 2026. We specialize in genetic and operations consulting. As we expand our company's footprint, we are always looking for new team members or company partnerships to work with. Come grow with us!

Name: Bleume
Description:
At Bleume, we’re passionate about nurturing the natural beauty within every home. Our mission is to empower plant lovers, from novice gardeners to seasoned green thumbs, by providing premium horticultural supplies that help plants thrive. At this time, a Plantman Logo was developed and copyrighted. Plantman Products entered production in July of 1986 and since then many more products have been researched and added to our product line.

Name: DP Seeds
Description:
DP Seeds is an innovative provider of leading seed varieties for the global vegetable and floral markets.  Started in 1985, founder Duane Palmer created a company that emphasized quality, reliability, and consistent performance in the field and greenhouse.  The company has advanced through both organic growth and selected acquisitions.  Originally founded and based in the Yuma, AZ market the company is now headquartered at new corporate offices and warehouses in Central Connecticut, offering convenient access to air freight logistics and centrally situated between key import hubs of Boston and New York. 

Recently the company was acquired by Griffin Family Farms, offering a unique opportunity to combine the field trialing expertise in both conventional and organic farming with the global procurement presence of DP Seeds.  The new company is focused on continuing the strong historical legacy of seed innovation and branding, while investing in the future for unique success and innovation.

Name: Wickmans Plantskola - Taimisto - Nursery
Description:
Från vår plantskola kan du köpa fleråriga härdiga växter. Finska och nordiska kloner är vår absoluta specialitet bland dessa. Häckplantor odlade i kruka är en annan stor produkt.

På senare år har frukt- och bärväxter kommit starkt och också här är största satsningen på härdigt material som har bästa förutsättningar hos kunden.

Alla som behöver växter inom grönsektorn kan bli våra kunder, både på partisidan och minutsidan. På minutsidan handlar du i vår egna lilla Garden-Center butik i Närpes under säsongtiden 2 maj till 30 september och på partisidan handlar du direkt från våra odlingar, oftast då med transport och allt ordnad fram till dörren.

Beställa växter kan man göra året runt hos oss. Leveranserna sker efter de  kallaste vintermånaderna, genom vår-sommar och ända fram till riktig sen höst.

På plantskolan prövar vi ständigt intressanta växter både beträffande odling och marknadsanpassning. Vi gillar helt enkelt att veta vad vi sysslar med.

Ett annat sätt att betjäna är genom att blogga om våra fina växter och hur de kan användas. Bloggen som vi startade redan 2015  hittas snabbast via hemsidan. Kika gärna in här!

Name: Schindler Gärten GmbH
Description:
Die Schindler Gärten GmbH wurde von Daniel Schindler gegründet und wird seither inhabergeführt. Rund ein Jahr später rückte sein Bruder Andreas Schindler in die Geschäftsleitung nach. Die operative und strategische Leitung obliegt den beiden persönlich. Das Unternehmen verfügt über starke Partnerschaften und vielfältige Branchenkontakte, um für sämtliche Auftragsvolumen und Umsetzungspläne gewappnet zu sein. Ausgänglich gestartet in Ebikon befinden sich Geschäftssitz, Büroräumlichkeiten sowie Magazin mittlerweile in Luzern mit Lagerfläche in Meggen. Seit 2002 war Daniel Schindler im Auftrag verschiedener Gartenbauunternehmen in der gesamten Region Luzern unterwegs und lernte die Materie von der Pike auf. In dieser Zeit durchlief er sämtliche Stagen vom Praktikant zum Landschaftsgärtner-Lehrling, Vorabeiter und Gartenbaupolier bis zum Gesellschafter. Nach 15 Jahren Praxis im Angestelltendasein entschied er sich für die Selbständigkeit, um noch näher am Puls des Kunden zu sein und seine Ideen zusammen mit den Ihren in Symbiose verfliessen zu lassen, damit auch Sie der Zukunft gewachsen sind!
Gründer Daniel Schindler, sein Bruder und Mitinhaber sowie die ganze Belegschaft vereinen über ein halbes Jahrhundert Fronterfahrung. Ihr Vorteil liegt darin, dass sie aus ihren vorausgegangenen Tätigkeitsfeldern und Engagements sowohl im Einzugsgebiet der Zentralschweiz profitieren als auch viele Objekte bereits persönlich kennen.
Gemeinsam der Zukunft gewachsen!

Name: National Canopy Ltd
Description:
National Canopy Ltd is a leading horticultural organisation with the purpose of UK tree planting and plant propagation for carbon off-setting initiatives, as well as landscape enthusiasts. With national reach, we plant, hold and distribute trees for a range of projects to help reduce carbon emissions for SMEs, Corporate and Charity Organisations.

National Canopy operates in a unique way, initiating tree planting projects to help off-set your carbon emissions. As a clean company ourselves, we can provide a selection of routes for you to become carbon neutral or at least start the journey. 

National Canopy works with a variety of organisations, tailoring a bespoke service to accommodate your tree planting projects – whatever your purpose. You can avail of the following options:

Sponsor a tree/trees – We hold and maintain them on our land
You purchase a tree/trees – again we hold and maintain them on our land, or can deliver them to your location for planting 
Should you want us to hold them, we will ensure that your trees are protected and well maintained by our team of operatives. You may even prefer to do staggered planting to work with your budgets. Whatever the route of operation, National Canopy put you on the right path to Net Zero.

We only grow the hardiest of trees – giving confidence to our buyers that their planting projects will flourish. We plant our trees in natural conditions from day one, offering assurance in the investment you make. Growing trees in fabricated conditions can lead to a transplanted tree being susceptible to ‘transplant shock’. Therefore we strive to ensure that this will not be the case with your trees.

National Canopy only work with trees that have been grown outdoors in premium environments that provide the most natural surroundings a wild tree would experience. Trees from National Canopy are hardy, robust and are available all-year round, every season.

Be sure to invest in the best, for a life-long successful project.
